E: Planeshred Claws

C: 忆域迷因「狂怒褪去之壳」
E: Memory Zone Meme "Shell of Faded Rage"

C: 魔王爪牙
E: Demon King's Minions

C: 基层员工•外勤
E: Grunt: Field Personnel

C: 借力球
E: Borrowed Force

C: 扑大哥
E: Trot Prime

C: 毁灭扑满
E: Trotter of Destruction

C: 对冻结状态下的我方目标及相邻目标造成冰属性伤害，同时解除主目标的冻结状态。若相邻目标处于冻结状态，则再次对主目标施放本技能。
E: Deals Ice DMG to Frozen targets and units adjacent to the target. This also removes the primary target's Frozen state. If the adjacent units are frozen, then this ability is used again on the primary target.

C: 每有1个我方目标陷入冻结状态，自身及召唤物造成的伤害小幅提高，伤害提高效果可叠加。
E: The unit and all summoned objects gain slightly increased DMG for each Frozen target on the enemy team. This DMG boosting effect is stackable.

C: 施放【全体护盾】吸收敌方全体受到的伤害，并使敌方全体的韧性无法被削减。
E: Unleashes the Collective Shield and absorbs DMG taken by all friendly units, as well as preventing all friendly units from receiving damage to their Toughness.

C: 进入反击状态，持续1回合。在该状态下受到我方目标攻击后，立即对该目标施放【霜之惩击】。该效果最多触发1次。
E: Goes into the Counter state for 1 turn. If attacked by a target while in this state, immediately use "Smite of Frost" on the attacker. This effect can only be triggered 1 time.

C: 使指定我方单体陷入【拘束】状态，并造成1次物理属性伤害。当自身被弱点击破或生命值低于一定量时我方目标的【拘束】状态立即解除。
E: Restrains a single target, and deals Physical DMG 1 time. When this unit has their Weakness Broken or drops below a certain amount of HP, dispels the Restrain status from the target.

C: 锁定2个我方单体，下次行动对其施放【砍伐指令】。同时使【自动机兵·灰熊】进入蓄力状态，下次行动对我方全体施放【剿灭指令】。
E: Locks Onto 2 targets and casts Felling Order on them in the next action. At the same time, makes Automaton Grizzly enter the Charging state, which will cast "Purge Order" on all targets in the next action.

C: 使指定我方单体陷入【拘束】状态，【拘束】状态下无法行动也无法被指定为目标。当辅助机械臂单元被弱点击破时我方目标的【拘束】状态立即解除。
E: Restrains a single target, preventing them from taking action or being targeted. The Restraint is dispelled if the Auxiliary Robot Arm Unit suffers Weakness Break.

C: 对指定我方单体造成雷属性伤害，并有概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入触电状态。同时对所有处于触电状态的我方目标造成雷属性伤害。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target, with a chance to Shock the target. And at the same time, deals Lightning DMG to any other Shocked targets.

C: 对指定我方单体连续造成冰属性伤害。施放该技能时，额外造成伤害，伤害次数等同于场上【飞剑】的数量。施放技能后，清除场上所有的【飞剑】。
E: Continuously deals Ice DMG to one target. After using this ability, additionally deals DMG for a number of times equal to the number of "Flying Swords" on the field. After using this ability, remove all "Flying Swords" on the field.

C: 【「飞霄」之影】的额外行动会与蚀月心兽的部位共鸣，共鸣会使蚀月心兽的部位恢复一定韧性，受到攻击时被削减的韧性值提高；下次行动变为强化行动，【喰云之首】共鸣大概率使我方全体目标陷入<u>怒噪</u>状态，【裂维之爪】共鸣额外大幅增加伤害，【辟尘之尾】共鸣大概率使我方全体目标陷入<u>虚弱</u>状态。
E: The additional action from Shadow of "Feixiao" will resonate with the Ecliptic Inner Beast's body parts. Resonance will restore a certain amount of Toughness for the Ecliptic Inner Beast's parts and increase the Toughness value reduced when attacked. The next action becomes Enhanced. Resonance with "Nebula Devourer" has a high chance of inflicting <u>Outrage</u> on all targets. Resonance with "Planeshred Claws" additionally greatly increases DMG. Resonance with "Worldpurge Tail" has a high chance of inflicting <u>Weaken</u> on all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成风属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入风化状态。
E: Deals Wind DMG to a single target, with a high chance to cause Wind Shear.

C: 当场上存在4个建木枝梢时，丰饶玄鹿的韧性无法被削减，消灭任意建木枝梢可解除该效果。
E: When there are 4 Ambrosial Arbor branches on the field, the Toughness of the Abundant Ebon Deer cannot be reduced. The effect expires when any Ambrosial Arbor branch is defeated.

C: 对我方全体造成风属性伤害。
E: Deals Wind DMG to all targets.

C: 【业火焚心的影将军】的额外行动会与【蛊言妄念的蚀心兽】的部位共鸣，共鸣会使【蛊言妄念的蚀心兽】的部位解除弱点击破状态；下次行动变为强化行动，【喰云之首】共鸣大概率使我方全体目标陷入<u>怒噪</u>状态，【裂维之爪】共鸣额外大幅增加伤害，【辟尘之尾】共鸣大概率使我方全体目标陷入<u>虚弱</u>状态。
E: "Hellcharred Shadow General's" extra turn will Resonate with "Sanerot Hearteater's" parts. The Resonance will dispel the Weakness Broken state on "Sanerot Hearteater's" parts, and their next action becomes an enhanced action. "Nebula Devourer's" Resonance has a high chance of causing all targets to enter <u>Outrage</u> state. "Planeshred Claws's" Resonance greatly increases DMG. "Worldpurge Tail's" Resonance has a high chance of causing all targets to enter <u>Weaken</u> state.

C: 减少我方战技点。只能在【课堂频道】状态下使用。
E: Reduces Skill Points for targets. This ability can only be used while under the "Classroom Channel" state.

C: 将【课间频道】状态转变为【课堂频道】状态。
E: Switches the "Off-Class Channel" state to the "Classroom Channel" state.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动时释放【烈焰爆炒】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses Flaming Stir-Fry for the next action.

C: 进入蓄力状态后，当【炉灶加温】叠加至一定层数时，立即对敌方全体目标造成大量火属性伤害，并使自身防御力降低，同时清除所有【炉灶加温】层数。
E: After entering the Charging state, deals massive Fire DMG to all friendly units and decreases this unit's DEF once Stove Heating has a certain number of stacks. Then, clears all Stove Heating stacks.

C: 本次战斗中，「昔在、今在、永在的剧目」与所有「秩序的傀儡」共享血量。
E: In this battle, "The Past, Present, and Eternal Show" shares HP with all "Puppets of the Order"

C: 战斗中会出现黑泥对首领进行强化。强化后【暴怒斯科特（污染）】会立刻施放【狼的加班】。
E: Black Mud will appear in battle to enhance the Boss. After enhancement, "Wrathful Skott (Corrupted)" will immediately use "Wolf's Overtime."

C: 进入【守备】状态，弱点未被击破时受到的伤害降低，被击破时行动额外延后，被击破后受到的伤害提高。
E: Enters the Safeguard state. When not Weakness Broken, reduces DMG received. Once Weakness is Broken, action will be additionally delayed. After Weakness is Broken, increases DMG received.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 对我方全体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 对我方全体目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets.

C: 对我方全体目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets.

C: 使【哀悯长臂】得到强化，并使其行动提前，持续3回合。
E: Causes "The Long Arms of Sorrow" to be enhanced and advances its action, lasting for 3 turns.

C: 进入<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态，对我方全体角色造成大量量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>，该伤害<u>【不致命】</u>，同时使我方全体角色陷入<u>【沉沦于长眠】</u>状态。在三阶段，会立刻进入<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态，并使所有【哀悯长臂】得到强化，同时我方目标生命值百分比较低时会重新陷入<u>【沉沦于长眠】</u>状态。
E: Enters the <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> state and deals massive Quantum <u>"Atrophy DMG"</u> to all targets. The DMG dealt is <u>"Non-fatal"</u> and inflicts <u>"Indulging Slumber"</u> to all targets. In Phase 3, immediately enters the <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> state and enhances all of "The Long Arms of Sorrow." Additionally, targets with a lower HP percentage will enter <u>"Indulging Slumber"</u> state again.

C: 对我方单体造成量子属性伤害，对高于一定生命值百分比的目标，该伤害会转化为量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to one target. This DMG converts to Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>" against targets with HP above a certain percentage.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量火属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Fire DMG to one designated target.

C: 免疫除【反造物主】外的行动条变化效果影响。【秘所思】无法被消灭，受到致命攻击后陷入【重创】状态，使我方全体行动提前并解除【<u>行动锁定</u>】状态。
E: Immune to the effects of action bar changes, except "Anti-Creator." "Mythos" cannot be eliminated. When receiving a killing blow, it enters the "Grave Wound" state, causing all targets' actions to advance and dispelling the "<u>Action Lock</u>" state.

C: 施放【沉默的悲叹】时，消耗生命值召唤【残破容器】，并使消耗的生命值转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>。当拥有的<u>【灾难之力】</u>层数不为0时，若【残破容器】受到致命攻击，则立即消耗1层<u>【灾难之力】</u>和一定比例的生命值，重新召唤【残破容器】。施放【莫因舍弃而哭泣】时，吸收【残破容器】并回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值。
E: When using "Silent Sorrow," consumes HP to summon a "Long-Shattered Vessel" and converts the consumed HP into <u>"Entangled By Agony."</u> When stacks of <u>"Calamity Power"</u> are not at 0 and if a "Long-Shattered Vessel" receives a killing blow, immediately consumes 1 stack of <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and a percentage of HP to resummon a "Long-Shattered Vessel." When using "Cry Not for the Discarded," absorbs any "Long-Shattered Vessel" and restores the HP that was converted to <u>"Entangled By Agony."</u>

C: 消耗所有<u>【灾难之力】</u>对我方全体造成数次少量物理属性伤害，消耗的【灾难之力】层数越多，伤害的段数越多，随后对我方全体造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and deals several instances of minor Physical DMG hits to all targets, where the more consumed "Calamity Power" stacks, the higher the instances of DMG. Then, deals minor Physical DMG to all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

C: 当【翁法罗斯的「恨」】达到上限时，战斗失败。
E: When "Amphorean Hatred" reaches its max, combat ends in failure.

C: 对指定我方目标造成少量量子属性伤害，将目标行动提前并解除其控制状态。同时对其施加<u>【二律背反】</u>效果。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one designated target, advances their action and dispels control states on them. Additionally, applies the "<u>Antinomy</u>" effect on them.

C: 使除自身外的敌方全体目标在自身处于【论证形态】时，永久获得<u>【风行】</u>和<u>【「律法」的惩戒】</u>效果。
E: While this unit is in "Disputation Mode," permanently grants all enemy units (except this unit) the <u>"Stormride"</u> and <u>"Retribution of 'Law'"</u> effects.

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害，处于【<u>在毁灭中狂欢</u>】状态时，对受到攻击的我方目标施加【<u>黑潮热</u>】，使造成的部分伤害以持续伤害形式在一定回合内扣除。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets. When in the "<u>Revel in Destruction</u>" state, inflicts "<u>Black Tide Fever</u>" on the targets attacked, causing some DMG dealt to be taken in the form of DoT over a certain number of turns.

C: 对我方全体目标造成大量虚数属性伤害，使目标降低生命值的一部分转化为【<u>侵蚀</u>】。
E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to all targets and converts a portion of the targets' reduced HP to "<u>Corrosion</u>."

C: 消耗所有充能。对指定我方单体造成伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入冻结状态。
E: Consumes all Charge. Deals DMG to a single target, with a high chance of Freezing the target.

C: 扑满被惊动了，即将在2个回合后逃离。
E: The Treasure Trotter got spooked and will flee in 2 turns.

E: The Trotter flees in an instant.

C: 扑满拔腿就跑，瞬间失去了踪影。
E: The Trotter flees in an instant.

E: Deals Lightning DMG to whoever violates the ban.

C: 召唤【巽风造物】。
E: Summons Windspawn.

C: 对指定我方单体造成基于其生命上限百分比的雷属性伤害，该伤害无视目标的防御力。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target based on a percentage of their Max HP. This DMG ignores the target's DEF.

C: 自身施放技能令我方单体同时处于【量子附魔】与【虚数附魔】状态时，解除该目标的【量子附魔】与【虚数附魔】状态，并对其造成少量量子属性伤害与虚数属性伤害，同时大概率使其陷入【<u>缠禁</u>】状态。
E: When this unit uses their ability and causes a target to be in Quantum Infusion and Imaginary Infusion at the same time, dispels both Quantum Infusion and Imaginary Infusion on the target, and deals minor Quantum DMG and Imaginary DMG with a high chance of inflicting <u>Snarelock</u> to the target.

C: 锁定我方单体并使【破灭玄莲】进入【绽放】状态，同时解除【破灭玄莲】的【弱点无效】效果。【破灭玄莲】下次行动施放【破灭】。
E: Locks on a target and causes Destruction Lotus to Bloom. At the same time, dispels Destruction Lotus' Weakness Protected effect. Destruction Lotus's will use Havoc during its next action.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to a single target and any adjacent targets.

E: Spawns True Stings.

E: Deals minor Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 罗浮仙舟上为数众多的聚居洞天之一，名唤「长乐」，人们百年一日安居于此。可世上真有长乐无忧之地？
E: One of the many residential delves on the Xianzhou Luofu. People live here peacefully for centuries at a time. Does it really provide personal exaltation as its name suggests?

C: 围绕匹诺康尼著名的卡通形象打造的影视娱乐公园，吸引了无数热爱钟表小子IP的动画爱好者前来观光游玩。
E: A film and television theme park built around Penacony's famous cartoon character has attracted countless animation enthusiasts who love Clockie to come and visit.

C: 排除障碍，找到前进的方法
E: Remove the obstacles and find a way forward

C: 「无数流星划过今夜的天空…如果选中了正确的那一颗，它将把你的愿望带向千百个世界。」 ——阿德里安•斯宾塞-史密斯，《有关星空的寓言集》 命运的罗盘上标着三个方向：未知、已知和不可知。可以忍受「未知」，却绝不能屈服于「不可知」。 阿基维利离开孤绝世界裴伽纳，不断开拓着宇宙未知的边界，试图找寻存在之树的端点。但祂的命运因意外而终结。
E: "Countless shooting stars streak across the night sky... If you can pick the right one, it will carry your wish to thousands of distant worlds." — Fables About the Stars by Adrian Spencer Smith There are three directions on the compass of destiny — the Unknown, the Known, and the Unknowable. THEY can tolerate the Unknown, but will never bow to the Unknowable. Akivili left the isolated world of Pegana and continued to expand the unknown edges of the universe, trying to find an endpoint of the Tree of Existence. Unfortunately, Akivili's destiny was abruptly ended due to an accident.

C: 「镜中之人揽镜自照：却不认得镜中的样貌。」 ——阿德里安•斯宾塞-史密斯，《有关星空的寓言集》 在揽镜人的传说中，司美之神的陨落是某种古老的隐喻，它象征着众生对美的观点分崩离析，变化纷乱，犹如耸立的高塔溃塌为残破的砖瓦。因此，揽镜人追求的目标也有了另一重意义：当人们对美的观念再度融合一致，纷争与歧见也将消失。他们信仰的神明也将再度完整，宇宙遂成为一个整体。 这也许不是单纯的妄想，因为揽镜人持有一系列名为「超验之镜」的实体。超验之镜不会反照出物质世界的景象，而是映现持有者所认定的美好，并将之投射进现实中。 根据揽镜人的自述，这些镜子乃是伊德莉拉的神体碎片；司美之神入灭时，祂的碎片洒落在星海的各个角落。流浪的揽镜人竭力追寻线索，夺回碎片，指望有朝一日能将它拼拢复原，令「纯美」重返世间。
E: "The mirror-holder gazes into the mirror, but recognizes not the face staring back." — Fables About the Stars by Adrian Spencer Smith The legend of the Mirror Holders had it that the downfall of the God of Beauty was an ancient metaphor symbolizing the shattering of peoples' views on beauty, crumbling like a collapsed tower into rubble and bricks. Therefore, the goal of the Mirror Holders takes on another significance: When conceptions of beauty are reunified, all disputes and strife will disappear. They believe the Aeon they worship will be perfect and complete again, and the universe will become whole. This may not be a mere delusion, as the Mirror Holders possess a series of items named Mirrors of Transcendence. These mirrors do not reflect the material world, but instead reflect what is considered by the beholder as "beauty" and project that into reality. As the Mirror Holders recounted themselves, these mirrors were fragments of Idrila's divine form. When the God of Beauty died, THEIR fragments were scattered to the cosmos. The wandering Mirror Holders tried their best to find clues and recapture these fragments, hoping to one day piece everything back together and let Beauty return to the world.

C:
位于阿斯德纳星系的盛会之星，梦想之地。匹诺康尼是高悬在深黯星空中之上的奢丽酒店，也是星际名流觥筹交错，万邦豪客们一掷千金的度假胜地。人们来此寻找深埋心中、长久渴求的梦，通过酒店的入梦池踏入实现一切梦想的美梦国度。

极少会有客人关注匹诺康尼沉重的历史：千年以前，这里曾是公司建造的边陲监狱。被流放的罪人们历经迢迢苦旅，抵达此处，被强加一项危险的使命：修补忆质在现实星系中的泄口。在频繁暴露于忆质的劳作中，这些犯人意识到自己渐渐踏入一处奇妙的共有梦境，在其中他们寻得一个共同的梦想——「自由」。

万界之癌爆发后，边陲监狱的归属发生易主。与这场抗争相关的史料极为稀缺，且内容令人生疑。但有的记载明确指出，在悲悼伶人、假面愚者、无名客、厄兆先锋等一众派系的帮助下，囚犯们成了这片新生国度的主人。在此后的流放之地时期，不谐的杂音间或传出。直到「家族」降临并接管梦境，匹诺康尼终于经历了爆发式的繁荣，成为蜚声银河的度假胜地。

琥珀<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪，时值谐乐大典召开之际，传奇大亨「钟表匠」向全银河发出信函，邀请一众派系前来争夺其宝贵遗产。星穹列车在这场规模空前的盛会中成为最后赢家，成功阻止了宇宙化作已死星神空想的可怖未来。沉沦美梦的盛会之星也在「开拓」的指引下重归清醒——人们不再受梦境摆布，而将直面现实的权利掌握在自己手中。
E:
The Planet of Festivities in the Asdana star system, also known as Land of the Dreams. A luxurious hotel positioned above the fathomless sky, Penacony is also a popular vacation spot where interstellar celebrities party the days away and the affluent from diverse worlds revel in lavish ventures. People flock here in search of dreams they've longed for or have already buried, and through Dreampools in the hotel are transported to a realm of dreams where everything can come true.

Rarely do guests pay attention to Penacony's heavy past. A millennium ago, it was a frontier prison established by the IPC. Exiled prisoners must survive an arduous journey across vast distances to reach this location, and are then forced to take up a dangerous duty: To mend the physical leak through which memoria seeps into the galaxy. As they frequently labor while being exposed to memoria, the prisoners gradually discovered themselves entering a captivating shared dream world, where they collectively obtained a single shared desire — freedom.

After the eruption of the Cancer of All Worlds, the ownership of the Frontier Prison changed hands. Historical records related to this struggle are scarce and often questionable. However, some accounts clearly state that with the assistance of various factions — including the Mourning Actors, the Masked Fools, the Nameless, and the Omen Vanguards — the prisoners emerged as the new rulers of this nascent realm. Sounds of discord could then periodically be heard during the subsequent times when it became a land of exiles. It was only when The Family descended and took control of the Dreamscape that Penacony experienced unparalleled and explosive prosperity, transforming into a renowned cosmic resort.

During the Charmony Festival in <unbreak>2158</unbreak> AE, the legendary tycoon, known as the Watchmaker, sent a galaxy-wide invitation, summoning various factions to Penacony to compete for his invaluable legacy. Eventually, the Astral Express and its crew emerged victorious in this unprecedented festival, averting a grim future where the Cosmos would have become a hollow dream of a dead Aeon. Under the guidance of Trailblaze, the Planet of Festivities, once lost in revelry, returned to wakefulness. Its people no longer surrendered themselves to the Dreamscape but instead embraced the power to confront reality.

E: Max level reached

E: Eidolon Level:

C: 还是我来开吧…
E: I'll do it instead...

C: 通过阿然了解什么是梦境鼓励师
E: Learn about the Dreamscape Motivators from Ran

C: 找到梦境酒店内巨大的茶杯
E: Find the giant teacup in the hotel in the Dreamscape

C: 星期日示意砂金打开装有基石的匣子。砂金努力抑制自己的慌乱，将匣子打开，却发现其中空无一物。星期日展示两枚基石，示意砂金瞒天过海的诡计已经被拆穿。真理医生避开砂金的目光，砂金意识到是真理医生出卖了自己。
E: Sunday gestured for Aventurine to open the box, which was supposed to contain the Cornerstones. Aventurine attempted to hide his distress while opening it, finding it empty. Sunday displayed two Cornerstones, showing that Aventurine's scheme had been uncovered. Dr. Ratio looked away from Aventurine, who understood that Dr. Ratio had turned against him.

C: 遮天蔽日的虫群保卫圣杯，并将你们团团围困。你命令Saber解放宝具，摧毁圣杯。
E: The Swarm blotted out the sky, shielding the Holy Grail and trapping your team. You ordered Saber to release her Noble Phantasm and shatter the Holy Grail.

C: 真理医生将逃窜的灵火收容。螺丝咕姆现身，称已在此恭候多时。
E: Dr. Ratio secured the escaping Phase Flame. Screwllum then emerged, saying they had been waiting for quite a while.

C: 镜流与刃在龙尊雕像前决斗，期间关于云上五骁的诸多记忆在镜流眼前闪回。数个回合的较量之后，刃受击倒地。
E: Jingliu and Blade engaged in a fierce duel before the High Elder Statue, while fragments of Remembrances from the High-Cloud Quintet flashed through Jingliu's mind. After several intense exchanges, Blade was knocked to the ground.

C: 攻击过后，你与桑博却只发现花火的尸体。桑博惊呼：「你把花火给打死啦！」
E: After the attack, you and Sampo only found Sparkle's corpse. Sampo gasped in shock and shouted, "You killed Sparkle!"

C: 末日兽一战后，你再次醒来。三月七已在身旁守候多时，并向苏醒的你问好。
E: After the Doomsday Beast fight, you woke up again. March 7th had been waiting by your side and greeted you.

C: 你看到米沙与黄泉被一群帮派分子团团围住，无法脱身。钟表小子请求你为他们解围。
E: You found Misha and Acheron surrounded by a group of gang members, unable to escape. Clockie implored you to help them out.

C: 离开前，星期日望向公园回忆童年，感叹即便成长，自己仍未走出昔日困局。
E: Before leaving, Sunday gazed at the park and reminisced about his childhood, lamenting that even though he was now an adult, he still did not leave the trappings of the past.

C: 在迷迷能力的作用下，你与遐蝶看到过去鼎盛时期的悬锋城。为确定当下时代，你们决定在外围调查一番。
E: Thanks to Mem's powers, you and Castorice witnessed a vision of Castrum Kremnos in its golden age. To confirm the timeline, you decided to explore the outskirts and investigate further.

C: 来古士揭露黄金裔实为「毁灭」的柴薪，翁法罗斯将化作<color=#f29e38ff>绝灭大君「铁墓」</color>摧毁宇宙。昔涟质疑其有所隐瞒，决定自我牺牲换来「记忆」瞥视，不断重置时间。白厄接过她的仪式剑，<color=#f29e38ff>承诺将背负所有火种，踏上永不终结的逐火之旅直到真正的救世主到来。</color>
E: Lygus showed that the Chrysos Heirs were in fact fuel and kindling for the Destruction, and Amphoreus would become the <color=#f29e38ff>Lord Ravager, Irontomb</color>, to destroy the universe. Cyrene rebuked him and suspected him of hiding certain facts. She decided to sacrifice herself to make the Remembrance gaze in this direction, thus allowing time to be continuously reset. Phainon took up her ceremonial blade and <color=#f29e38ff>vowed to carry all Coreflames, embarking on the Flame-Chase Journey without end, until the true Deliverer arrives.</color>

C: 刻律德菈现身，当众宣布海瑟音的逆举，称其伙同天外之人窃听机密，意图强夺火种，谋害凯撒。海瑟音出言申辩，被刻律德菈喝止。
E: Cerydra appeared and denounced Hysilens' betrayal in public, accusing her of conspiring with those from beyond the sky to spy on confidential matters, attempting to rob the Coreflame by force, and harming the Imperator. Hysilens tried to defend herself, but Cerydra cut her off.

C: 云璃前往检查可疑的星槎，发现来者竟是彦卿。一阵巨大的震动过后，竞锋舰的速度逐渐变慢。云璃与彦卿前往引擎室察看情况。
E: Yunli went to inspect a suspicious starskiff and discovered the arrival was Yanqing. Following a strong tremor, the Skysplitter began slowing down. Yunli and Yanqing headed to the engine room to investigate.

C: 在龙尊雕像下，丹恒随灵砂来到鳞渊境，会见在此等候的龙师涛然。
E: Beneath the High Elder Statue, Dan Heng followed Lingsha to Scalegorge Waterscape to meet with Preceptor Taoran who was waiting there.

C: 你们抵达受到裂界严重侵蚀的残响回廊，必须想办法找到这座裂界迷宫的出口。裂界的污染越重，就证明你们离其源头越近了。
E: You stepped into the Corridor of Fading Echoes, a maze heavily corrupted by the Fragmentum, and had to find a way to locate its exit. The greater the contamination became, the closer you were to its source.

C: 你们被几只机械怪物包围。机械怪物的控制者称「机要重地贼人免进」，别怪他不客气！
E: Mechanized enemies surrounded you. Their controller declared: "This is a restricted area for authorized personnel only—don't blame me for being ruthless!"

C: 砂金对你的合作决定表示欣喜。砂金邀请你反过来利用他，以此展示与你合作的价值。在砂金的带领下，你前往事实所在之处。
E: Aventurine was pleased with your decision to cooperate with him. He invited you to turn the tables and exploit him instead, to prove the value of your collaboration. Led by Aventurine, you headed to where the truth was.

C: 米凯带众人来到「拉扎莉娜」与「铁尔南」墓前，讲述两位无名客为匹诺康尼的「开拓」而牺牲的事迹。流萤带领加拉赫、星期日抵达。
E: Micah led the group to the graves of Razalina and Tiernan, recounting how the two Nameless had sacrificed themselves during the "trailblazing" of Penacony. Firefly then arrived with Gallagher and Sunday.

C: 黄泉告诉你流萤为传递真相以真实死亡脱离梦境，你决意继承她的意志，迈向最终决战。
E: Acheron told you that Firefly left the Dreamscape via a real death to pass on the knowledge of the truth. You decided to inherit Firefly's will and step towards the final battle.

C: 梦主与星期日的计划被挫败，「秩序」星神再度沉睡。匹诺康尼的星核危机暂时解除，但「梦想之地」的平和之下仍有暗流涌动。
E: The Dreammaster and Sunday's plans were destroyed, and the Aeon of Order slumbered once again. Penacony's Stellaron Crisis was temporarily removed, but there are still hidden currents flowing under the Land of the Dreams' peaceful veneer.

C: 你重新开始调酒，准备再次完成纪念之饮。
E: You restarted the mixing process and were prepared to complete the commemorative drink again.

C: 恰丽卡念叨着「睡蕉小猴」，紧闭双眼，看起来正在认真作画。出于礼貌，还是不要打扰她吧。
E: Chaletka mutters "Slumbernana Monkey" with her eyes tightly shut, looking deeply focused on her drawing. Out of politeness, it was better not to disturb her.

C: 三月七向蒙塔娜解释，波提欧只是看上去凶巴巴的。听丹恒说，波提欧动不动就喵喵叫呢。
E: March 7th explained to Montana that Boothill only looked a little scary, and Dan Heng said he was more bark than bite.

C: 你们看到恰丽卡的甜品摊位前围满了前来购买点心的同学。看来恰丽卡找到了属于她的「忍符」。
E: You saw students crowding around Chaletka's dessert stand to buy snacks. It seemed that Chaletka had found her own "ninja talisman."

C: 在「忍之都」，为了对抗罪恶的御猿•邪忍，一位初入忍道的女孩向「苦茶大师」学习缭乱•忍法。而属于女孩的忍号，须她自己决定。
E: In the Ninja Capital, a girl new to the way of the ninja learned Dazzling Ninjutsu from Master Kucha to fight the Evil Ninja Osaru. The ninja name she would take had to be decided by herself.

C: 丹恒说遇到了自称巡海游侠的人，需要波提欧确认身份。波提欧随即动身离开翠丝快餐，前去调查。
E: Dan Heng said he had met someone claiming to be a Galaxy Ranger and needed Boothill to confirm their identity. Boothill immediately left Jessie's Snack to investigate.

C: 你透过车窗看到翁法罗斯，经介绍得知其被「智识」「记忆」以及未知的第三重命途包裹。三月七一反常态，一直没有走出房间。
E: Through the window, you saw Amphoreus and learned that it was wrapped in "Erudition," "Remembrance," and an unknown third Path. Oddly, March 7th was behaving unusually and remained in her room.

C: 你与记忆中的流萤道别，流萤相信她与你未来的道路还会交汇。当再次邂逅的那天到来时，她会假装与你素未谋面，让一切都从头开始。
E: You said goodbye to Firefly in your memory. She was sure your paths would cross again someday. When that happened, she would pretend you've never met, and get to know you anew, as if starting all over.

C: 在回忆中，缇宝向母亲诉说童梦，她梦到海岛、山脉与黑色的浪潮。母亲鼓励她好好学习，成为合格的雅努斯圣女，为众人指点迷津。
E: In the memory, Tribbie told her mother about a dream of islands, mountains, and black tides. Her mother encouraged her to keep studying hard, to one day become a worthy Holy Maiden of Janus, and guide the people through the unknown.

C: 巴特鲁斯挖掘第三处宝藏，却找出一个金山羊面具。赛飞儿认出这是「黄金替罪羊」装置，让巴特鲁斯解开谜题。
E: Bartholos dug up the third treasure, and found only a golden goat mask. Cipher identified it as a Golden Scapegoat and let Bartholos solve the puzzle.

C: 你在创世涡心看到白厄与来古士。来古士揭示负世泰坦之试炼正是肩负世界本身，「再创世」意味着白厄将依其记忆再造新的世界。
E: You found Phainon with Lygus at the Vortex of Genesis. Lygus revealed that the Worldbearing Titan's trial was about shouldering the entire world, and Era Nova meant that the new world would be reshaped by Phainon based on his memories.

C: 多哆啦迷和昔涟解读「救世主」牌面，表示白厄将成为如刻法勒般背负世界之人。而其他神谕牌所揭示的，是白厄未来的同伴。
E: Dolimem and Cyrene interpreted "The Deliverer" card, believing Phainon was destined to carry the world, just like Kephale. The rest of the cards unveiled the future allies who would stand by his side.

C: 断锋爵要求你和昔涟在进入会场前交出所有随身物品，包括<color=#f29e38ff>识刻锚</color>。昔涟猜测你与黑塔的对话已被刻律德菈得知，提议将计就计。
E: Dux Fragoris demanded that you and Cyrene surrender all personal belongings before entering the banquet hall, including the <color=#f29e38ff>Chronocognitive Anchor</color>. Cyrene suspected that Cerydra had already learned about your conversation with Herta and suggested turning the situation to your favor.

C: 吟风爵想撰写关于她自己的诗篇，曳石爵请你们为她带去一些灵感。昔涟提议以「未来」开篇，吟风爵据此补写《落木逐火英雄纪》。
E: Dux Carminum wanted to compose a poem about herself. Dux Helkolithist asked you to bring her some inspiration. Cyrene proposed starting with the word "future," and with it, Dux Carminum added a new stanza to the Heroic Saga of Flame-Chase.

C: 你深入海底神殿，看到遍地的战士与海妖尸骸。吟风爵与曳石爵正被海妖包围，无处可逃。
E: You dived into the underwater temple, where the bodies of soldiers and sea sirens littered the floor. Dux Carminum and Dux Helkolithist were surrounded by sirens, with no way out.

C: 迷迷请你抓住她的手，一起躲入你最深的记忆中。迷迷吟唱祷言：「揭开记忆的帷幕，激起往昔的涟漪。」
E: Mem asked you to take her hand and retreat together into your deepest memories. Mem chanted a prayer: "Lift the curtain of memory, and stir up ripples of past reverie."

C: 你与昔涟眺望海面，而白厄正在世界的尽头等待你们。在写下结局前，昔涟必须和你一起出发，去面对被她长久遗忘的「记忆」。
E: You and Cyrene gazed out at the sea, while Phainon waited at the world's end. Before writing the ending, Cyrene must set out with you to confront the "memories" she had long forgotten.

C: 黑塔自加冕中返回，并无大碍。「神礼观众」已经走到命运的终点，来古士请求螺丝咕姆将他的遗体带往<color=#f29e38ff>亚德丽芬</color>，那里有一行「赞达尔」留下的公式。若有朝一日，螺丝咕姆必须亲手摧毁「智识」，那公式会成为螺丝咕姆的助力。
E: Herta returned from the coronation, unharmed. Theoros had reached the end of his road, and Lygus requested Screwllum to take his remains to <color=#f29e38ff>Adlivun</color>, where an equation left by Zandar remained. Should the day come when Screwllum must destroy Erudition with his own hands, that equation will prove useful.

C: 你向真理医生转述帕梅拉的发现，称失踪的科员是声讨管理层的意见领袖。真理医生将小册子翻阅完毕，你们动身向艾丝妲回报发现。
E: You reported Pamela's findings to Dr. Ratio and mentioned that the missing researchers had been opinion leaders who criticized the management. After Dr. Ratio finished reviewing the booklet, you headed out to report your findings to Asta.

C: 你与三月七来到机械屋附近。希露瓦正在此向周围观众表演，众人齐声高唱。
E: You and March 7th arrived near the workshop. Serval was putting on a show for the crowd, and everyone was singing along with her in harmony.

C: 佩拉钻入废墟，却只找到冰冻的生鱼片。玲可判断出其没有变质，多亏了寒潮，不然人们根本吃不到七百年前的生鱼片。
E: Pela dug through the ruins, only to find frozen sashimi. Lynx determined it hadn't gone bad. Thanks to the Eternal Freeze, otherwise no one would have the chance to eat a <unbreak>700</unbreak>-year-old raw fish.

C: 玲可为自己的任性之举道歉，希露瓦表示可以理解。杰帕德正要重申雪原的危险性，被希露瓦打断。
E: Lynx apologized for her willful behavior, and Serval showed understanding. Just as Gepard was about to reiterate the dangers of the Snow Plains, Serval interrupted him.

C: 据捕头和捕快所述，在花火的小剧场中，受害者名为<color=#f29e38ff>金槌花火</color>，她在金槌府邸被手下的<color=#f29e38ff>三位勇士</color>发现死于<color=#f29e38ff>锤击</color>。捕快为了圆上小剧场的情节，先是称这三位勇士因为押送货物被劫，故存在为了逃避责任而杀害花火的动机，随后又临时补充三位勇士关系不好的设定。
E: Based on the Constable and Bailiff's account, the victim was named <color=#f29e38ff>Sparkle Goldhammer</color> in Sparkle's staged scenario. She was discovered dead from a <color=#f29e38ff>hammer strike</color> by <color=#f29e38ff>three warriors</color> who served under her at the Goldhammer Residence. The Bailiff, trying to wrap up the storyline, first claimed the warriors had killed Sparkle to avoid punishment for losing their escorted goods, then quickly added that the three warriors had poor relationships with each other.

C: 三月七等人的行踪被发现，被迫与神秘狐人们对峙。
E: March 7th and the others were discovered, forcing a confrontation with the mysterious foxians.

C: 椒丘回见呼雷，却在庭院中同时见到了自己先前求助过的人。他们被末度诱骗至此，并最终死于呼雷之手。
E: Jiaoqiu returned to see Hoolay and found the people he had previously asked for help in the courtyard. They had been lured there by Mok Tok and killed by Hoolay.

C: 三月七与云璃来到观众席上，可以望见远处的擂台。云璃要暂时离开去竞锋舰上好好检查，嘱咐三月七专心备赛。
E: March 7th and Yunli arrived at the spectator seats, where they could see the distant ring. Yunli said she had to leave for a moment and do some inspections around the Skysplitter, instructing March 7th to focus on preparing for her match.

C: 在濒死的虚弱中，椒丘露出得胜的微笑。椒丘早早喝下「颠踬散」，使药毒流遍己身。连同鲜血一起，多疑的呼雷服下毒药。
E: In his weakened, dying state, Jiaoqiu revealed a victorious smile. He had consumed Tumbledust, allowing the toxin to spread throughout his system. Together with his blood, the wary Hoolay had unwittingly consumed poison.

C: 浮烟答应为你们提供情报，但提出了一个条件：它想要重续当年大岁阳「燎原」与将军的胜负。为此，你们需要去往神策府请景元出面。
E: Cirrus promised to provide information, under one condition: They wanted to resolve the unfinished business between the great heliobus Ignamar and the general of the Luofu. This meant you had to visit the Seat of Divine Foresight to seek Jing Yuan's cooperation.

C: 岁阳抓捕成功，白露也将要回归丹鼎司。接下来，将这次「灵异事件」的调查报告发到「罗浮杂俎」上吧。
E: Having captured the heliobus and with Bailu ready to return to the Alchemy Commission, it was time to post the investigation report on this "paranormal incident" to the Ghostly Grove.

C: 事件彻底解决，你们的粉丝数也上涨不少。趁现在好好休息吧。
E: The incident had been fully resolved, and your follower count had climbed significantly. You took the chance to enjoy a well-earned rest.

E: Not everyone gets the chance to hear a director talk about their area of expertise.

E: Has the surgery started? Wait, no, it ended.

E: Silver Wolf, you don't really need to doubt yourself.

C: 「我帮你算过了，是对的。」黑塔收到了你的认可。
E: "I checked your work, and it's correct." Herta seems pleased to be validated.

C: 在「黄金的时刻」，你遇见了被星探纠缠的乱破——星际和平影视一直想签约一位巡海游侠。\n「球棒•忍者，这位忍徒请求收录在下于《银河忍法帖》中吟唱的忍•真言。但在下担心贸然把忍•真言交予公司，可能会有未曾设想的连锁•陷阱…请帮助我破除疑虑吧！」
E: At the Golden Hour, you run into a talent scout pestering Rappa about a contract — The IPM always wanted to get a Galaxy Ranger on board.\n"Baseball Bat Ninja, this initiate requests the ninja mantra I performed from the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions to be recorded and given to the IPC, but I'm worried about the potential traps within... Please help me make up my mind!"

C: 蛀洞飞梭留下了破坏性的尾迹云，反物质军团从洞口鱼贯而入。各星球陷入了恐慌。而你，星际和平公司的舰队指挥官，正率领整片星区的防御力量严阵以待。\n「侦测到<unbreak>351</unbreak>个高能反应，比我们略多…」副官咽了口唾沫，等待你的指令——
E: The Borehole Blitz leaves behind a trail of ruin as the Antimatter Legion swarms through the gaps. Worlds are panicking while you, fleet commander of the IPC, hold the line with the combined defense force of the entire sector.\n"We are detecting <unbreak>351</unbreak> high-energy signatures, slightly overtaking our numbers..." The adjutant swallows nervously and waits for your orders —

C: 这个男人最值得纪念的东西是什么？他从不展开细说，只是默默守护着他人的东西。
E: What's this man's most precious treasure? He never speaks about those, instead silently protecting others' possessions.

C: 没想到螺丝咕姆此行前来是为了终止「模拟宇宙」项目。好在这位机械绅士是个开明的人，在关停系统前，他愿意为你们的调查提供最大限度的帮助。
E: Screwllum's visit was to terminate the Simulated Universe project, how surprising! Thankfully, the robot gentleman is an open-minded individual, and he is more than happy to provide you with whatever help you need in your investigation before shutting down the system for good.

C: 尼卡多利，颁赐者，千军首，天谴之矛！我们应让他们自行争战，「纷争」当会决定荣誉的得主。
E: Nikador, The Giver, Master of Legions, Lance of Fury! We should let them fight for themselves. The Strife will grant glory to the rightful one.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「欧洛尼斯奇迹」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Oronyx's Miracle. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 占领了整个监狱后，你必须处理各区划中残留的古怪钟表……
E: After taking over the entire prison, you'll need to deal with the strange clocks left in each subdivision...

C: 监狱解放后，仍有许多被破坏的球笼通路有待修复。
E: After the prison break, there are still many Spheroid pathways that require repairs.

C: ……浮黎，祂着实难以揣摩。我很怀疑「记忆」的诞育是否与那场声势浩瀚的众星陨落有关，那无可计数的生命消亡前最后的哀嚎啼哭，令我震撼万分。唉，都怪「贪饕」奥博洛斯！说真的，所有人都以为祂是头笨重的古兽，就像克里珀是个超大的石头人一样，没想到祂的躯体竟有多变的形态。我怀疑诞育祂的黑暗海潮下还覆着一层人类未知的领域，噢，祂的腹内也是——据说没有物种能抵御奥博洛斯身躯上灯笼般的「诱饵」，无数星系都已在祂的肚子里，只有那些消亡的「记忆」被保留下来，真是多亏了浮黎……
E: ...Fuli, THEY are really hard to fathom. I doubt that the birth of the Remembrance is related to that widespread and vast fall of the stars. That final wailing and screams of countless lives before their demise shook me to the core. Alas, it was all the doing of Oroboros the Voracity! To be honest, everyone thought THEY were just a clumsy Leviathan, like how Qlipoth was thought to be an oversized statue. Who would have guessed that THEIR body has multiple forms? I suspect that there is a dimension unknown to humanity under the dark tides that gave birth to THEM. Oh, and THEIR abdomen, too — it is said that no species can resist the lantern-like "bait" on Oroboros's body, and that countless galaxies are already in THEIR stomach, with only the "memories" of those that perished being left behind thanks to Fuli...

C: <color=#87e0ffff>【弹射】</color>对随机敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>基础伤害的火属性伤害，重复<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>次。每次造成伤害时使其陷入<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>层特殊灼烧【星冕】：每回合开始时受到等同于基础伤害<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>的火属性持续伤害，最多叠加<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>层，持续<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>回合，每层【星冕】使目标防御降低<unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak>。
E: <color=#87e0ffff>"Bounce"</color> deals Fire DMG equals to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> base DMG to random enemy targets, repeating <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s). Every time it deals DMG, inflict <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of special Burn state, "Starcrown": At the start of each turn, takes Fire DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> base DMG, stacking up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s) and lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Each stack of "Starcrown" lowers the target's DEF by <unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak>.

C: <color=#87e0ffff>【群攻】</color>对敌方全体造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>基础伤害的物理属性伤害，重复<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次。攻击时使其陷入特殊裂伤【剥离】：每回合开始时受到物理属性持续伤害，并仅在回合开始时使其当前承受的所有持续伤害以原伤害<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>的倍率产生伤害，持续<unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak>回合。
E: <color=#87e0ffff>"AoE ATK"</color> deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> base DMG to all enemies, repeating <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s). When attacking, inflict the special Bleed effect "Peeled": At the start of every turn, takes Physical DoT, and makes all currently possessed DoTs deal DMG at a multiplier of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG only at the start of a turn, lasting for <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

E: When dealing DMG to a Weakness Broken enemy target, each stack of "<u>Critical Boost</u>" additionally increases CRIT Rate and CRIT DMG.

C: 天才俱乐部#56以利亚萨拉斯曾经有个美好的愿望：俱乐部里的天才们能够欢聚一堂，其乐融融地交流生活、爱情与梦想。为此，他发明了「俱乐部券」，并设计了一整套系统，保证即使在他死后，每位入会的新人都能得到这张能够即时传送到某个宴会位面的入场券。事实是，#56以后的每位会员都确实使用过「俱乐部券」，可时间从来没有重合过哪怕一次。
E: Genius Society #56, Elias Salas, once had a beautiful dream. He wished the geniuses of the Society could come together and happily converse about their lives, loves, and dreams. For that purpose, he invented "Society Tickets" and designed an entire system that ensured every new Society member would receive this ticket even after his death. This ticket would instantly teleport the user to a specific dimension decked with festivities. The truth is that every new member after #56 had indeed used their Society Ticket, but not a single one of them had used it at the same time as someone else.

C: 受虚构史学家的影响，鲁珀特二世的结局向来模糊不清。有资料写道，血肉之躯让二世终究无法达成帝国的伟业，最终病死在铸铁的王座。有诗文戏言，糖果色纱裙的女士慢条斯理地走进王都，而后帝国轰然倒塌。有声音唏嘘，金属的戒指刺破了他的手指，于是暴起的机械杀死了眼前的有机体。也有剧目演绎，他忽地发出感慨，像是获得解脱那般，流下人类的泪水，缓慢而永恒地，在臣民面前阖上了眼睛。
E: Due to the influence of History Fictionologists, the end of #Rubert II has always remained enigmatic. Some references wrote that the second emperor's organic body ultimately hindered him from completing the empire's great work, as he died from illness on the cast-iron throne. Some poets warbled that a lady in a pastel-colored silk dress sauntered into the capital, and the empire collapsed in a cacophony. Other voices lamented that the metallic ring pricked his finger, and so the riotous machine killed the organic before him. Some plays also dramatized that he suddenly expressed his profound feelings and shed human tears as if he suddenly became free, then slowly closed his eyes before his subjects, never to open them again.

C: 约一千个琥珀纪前，科尔奇人在雨林中建立了高度繁荣的日暮王朝，但在冰期来临后的十个琥珀纪内，他们又迅速消失。因为从未有遗体出土，科尔奇人的形象成了困扰史学界多年的难题，直到一群「开拓」的愣头青炸塌了地下的王陵。这些被困在地道里的无名客意外发现了一种即食藻类，并靠着它成功撑到了救援来临。而美味的球藻也借此走向群星——当人们意识到它们就是科尔奇人时，这些球藻已在五十多个星球被标记为入侵物种。
E: The Kolchis established an extremely prosperous sunset dynasty in the rainforest approximately one thousand Amber Eras ago. However, they disappeared within ten Amber Eras after the beginning of the Ice Age. The fate of the Kolchis became a myth that plagued historians for many years due to how bodies of this race have never been unearthed — until a group of hothead daredevils following Trailblaze collapsed the species' subterranean royal mausoleum with dynamite. These Nameless, trapped in the underground passage, discovered an edible algae species and held on until help arrived thanks to consuming this algae. That was how these delectable algae were introduced to the stars — when people realized that these algae were nothing less than the Kolchis, this moss ball became labeled as an invasive species on more than fifty planets.

C: 在家族的众多领地里，斯兰卡人的故乡一定是最安静的区域。这些以粒子连接成的思维集群，因在固液气中频繁转换的身体和情绪，一度成为人人喊打的危险分子。但家族的到来改变了现状，温柔的轻抚让每颗粒子都携手歌唱，哪怕是化身高能气体团的斯兰卡人，也能长期稳定在固态。它们连接成一片水晶草原，粒子间的共鸣无声演奏着谐乐颂的曲调，就像…冰冷的石头。
E: Among The Family's many territories, the home of the Sulank is certainly the quietest. These thought clusters formed by connections between particles were always considered a huge threat by people due to their bodies and emotions that frequently change between the states of solid, liquid, and gas. However, the arrival of The Family changed everything. Their gentle caress brought every particle together in harmonious song. Even those Sulanks taking the shape of high energy gas clouds are able to maintain solid form for long periods. They connect to form a crystal plain, as the resonance between their particles sings silent Odes of Harmony, like... ice-cold stones.

C: 你十分确定运行这段代码会导致栈溢出，填满存储空间。 但这么做能让你收获大量宇宙碎片，所以何乐而不为呢？ 「伟大的机械公爵呵，我不明白你为什么允许这种代码存在于我们完美的项目中！」 「前提：完美与错谬相悖。提问：现实宇宙是完美的吗？答案：否定。结论：模拟宇宙不应完美，模拟宇宙需要错谬。」
E: You are almost certain that running this will cause stack overflow, eating up all available memory. But doing so will give you loads of Cosmic Fragments, so why not? "My almighty Mechanical Duke, I do not understand why you tolerate such heinous codes in our impeccable project!" "Premise: Perfection is the opposite of mistakes. Question: Is the real universe perfect? Answer: Negative. Conclusion: Simulated Universe should not be perfect. It must allow mistakes."

C: 运气是一种能力吗？也许；运气能够被改变吗？黑塔认为能。这位天才发明了「福灵胶」，将它涂抹在眼皮上，将获得整整<unbreak>24</unbreak>个系统时的好运。黑塔太空站的许多人欣喜若狂地试用这项发明，他们全都度过了波澜不惊的一天，这说明在动荡的世界上，能平凡地生活就已经很好运了。
E: Is luck an ability? Maybe. Can luck be changed? Herta believes it can. That genius invented the "Fortune Glue." Just apply it on your eyelids and you would get a full <unbreak>24</unbreak> system hours' worth of good luck. Many at Herta space station were ecstatic to try out this invention. They all had an uneventful day, which shows that it is already lucky to be able to live an ordinary life in a turbulent world.

C: 对有机生命的刻板印象也存在于机械群体间，例如这颗与苹果合二为一的心脏——或与心脏合二为一的苹果。可惜这个问题的答案已经无从考证，因为其创作者，奥尔森博士，因被指控「太过了解有机世界」而在战争期间遭到机械帝国处理。毋庸置疑：能证明其清白的也只有有机生命。
E: Mechanical lifeforms also have stereotypes for organics. For example, take this heart merged with an apple - or an apple merged with a heart. Unfortunately, the nature of this question will remain forever inconclusive. Its creator, Dr. Olsen, was accused of being "too cognizant of the organic world" and was "resolved" by the Machine Empire during the war. Undoubtably, only an organic lifeform could have proven its innocence.

C:
要怎样从泥沙中找到过去？头生三角的博尔古兽，消逝在融化成海的山峦，独眼的食人水螅，在殖民舰船的辉光中销声匿迹。扫描仪事无巨细地将每块骨骼和印痕收进眼里，它们支离破碎地堆砌着，等待你去整理。

石头里记录着过去，你在颗粒状的果实中看到一片花海，多尼人将它们吞进肚子，在迁徙的飞行中播撒到大陆的彼端。蛛网状的高塔在大陆边缘林立，演化为金色的植物生长在泥土的缝隙里。而后热潮来袭，藻类涌出，终结了古早的周期。

你收集起碳化的过去，在今日述说往世的秘密。
E:
How to unearth the past from the sand? The three-horned Bor Leviathians have faded into the sea formed from melted mountain ranges. The one-eyed cannibal polyps have vanished in the glow of colony ships. The scanner meticulously takes in every bone and imprint, leaving nothing behind. They build in tattered fragments, waiting for you to sort them out.

The stones contain the records of the past, and you see a sea of flowers within the granular fruits. The Dauniets eat the fruits and scatter them to the other end of the continent during their migratory flight. Web-like towers erected on the edges of the continent evolve into golden plants that grow in the crevices of the soil. Then, the heatwave comes, followed by the algal bloom that brings the ancient cycle to an end.

You gather the carbonized past and narrate the secrets of bygone days in the present.

C: 卡密特行军蚁，噬硅花，还有无处不在的科尔奇人，超距传输技术带来的不仅是大规模的商品流通，也是不计其数的物种迁徙。它们藏在货箱里，客人的衣袖里，甚至是肚子里，从检疫装置的眼皮子底下溜走。于是集群的真菌吞没了星体，蔓延的赤潮窒息了海洋。\n\n你奔走于各个网点，沿着它们的痕迹，绞尽脑汁将不应属于这里的生物消杀。野蜂寄生蚂蚁的身体，毒雨灼烧花朵的表皮，兵来将挡，水来土掩，趁着尚未病入膏肓，务要以毒辣的手段遏止灭绝的星火，归还群星和平的宁静。
E: The Karmite army ants, the silicon-eating flowers, and the ever-present Kolchis — the Hyper-distant Delivery technique not only facilitates large-scale trading of goods but also the migration of countless species. They hide in cargo crates and the sleeves or even the stomachs of the guests, slipping past quarantine checks unnoticed. As a result, clusters of fungi engulf the stars, and the spreading red tide leaves the ocean suffocating.\n\nYou move between different nodes, following their traces, and racking your brain for ways to eliminate the creatures that do not belong here. The parasitic wild bees infest the ants, and the poisonous rain burns the surface of the flowers — different situations call for different actions. While it is not too late to salvage the situation, you need to act decisively to nip the problem in the bud and restore peace to the stars.

C:
我仍在寻找他们的踪迹，受晨昏之眼的应允，
高居于天空的神之子民。
用凌驾世人的智慧所打造的，
雷霆浇筑的利剑，背生双翼的奇兽。
沐浴艾格勒的恩赐而生，
为泰坦献出所有，投身神战的勇士，
能与他们的英勇相提并论的，唯有受尼卡多利庇佑的悬锋。
可他们为何消失在世间？如黑潮悄无声息。
那阳雷的化身不是曾刺穿天空吗？
若非她的壮举，世间有几人胆敢举起弑神的旗帜？
还是说，他们皆受了泰坦的诅咒，一如我们，
作为对众神拔剑相向的惩戒？
E:
I am still searching for their traces. The traces of the subjects of gods, who, blessed by the Eye of Twilight,
Once dwelt high in the sky.
Mythical winged beasts wielding swords forged with wisdom surpassing that of mortals
And from thunder.
Warriors born of Aquila's blessings,
Who dedicated their all to the Titans in the divine war.
Their valor matched only by the Kremnoans blessed by Nikador.
But why have they vanished like the silent black tide?
Did the incarnation of the day thunder not once pierce the sky?
Without her heroic feats, who would dare raise the banner to slay gods?
Or were they, too, cursed by the Titans, just as we are,
Punished for daring to draw swords against the gods?

C:
你参加过麦加纳肯人的追悼会么？
那是西边的小城邦，你如今已经不能在地图上找到它。
我还记得，人们会给死者穿上最好看的衣服，
遗体画上精致的妆容，棺材围满鲜花与香薰。
马戏团在台上卖力演出，亲朋则在台下哈哈大笑，
笑声越大，代表思念越深。
如此狂欢三天三夜，在演出高潮时分，遗体完成火化。
人们围绕火堆载歌载舞，当作最后告别。
这习俗源自独特的信仰，
他们认为，塞纳托斯是由扎格列斯假扮的。
E:
Been to a Megnakken send-off?
You can't find that western little city on maps anymore.
I still remember, the people would dress the deceased in the finest clothing,
paint the most intricate makeup on corpses, and adorn caskets with fresh flowers and fragrances.
The circus performs in full swing on stage and close friends laugh heartily in the audience,
their grief measured in decibels.
This rave continues for three days and nights. As the performance reaches its climax, the corpse is cremated in flames.
Everyone would sing and dance around the pyre as a final farewell.
This tradition stems is rooted in their unique religion,
for they believe that Thanatos is but Zagreus in disguise.

E: Selection Difficulties (II)

C: 贤人之路（其三）
E: Path of the Sage (III)

C: 曾有一个保姆机器人突发奇想，将丰饶香涎做成干酪，好满足小主人看似永无止境的食欲。不料香涎干酪竟自己生长起来，保姆机器人和主人开足马力，消化速度却也跟不上干酪的生长速度。于是他们只好求助路过的悲悼伶人，搭乘贡多拉逃去了别的星系。直到现在，银河中仍然有一个星系被美味的干酪塞得严严实实，一丁点空隙也没留下。这个故事很有教育意义：不要浪费粮食。
E: Once upon a time, a helper robot turned Ambergris of Abundance into cheese on a whim to satisfy its little master's seemingly never-ending appetite. Unexpectedly, the Ambergris Cheese started to multiply on its own. The helper robot and the master worked at full speed, but their digestion still could not keep up with how fast the cheese was multiplying. Therefore, they had to ask for help from a group of passing Mourning Actors and escaped to another world on a gondola. That one world in the cosmos is still stuffed full of delicious cheese to the day, packed so tight that not a single centimeter of space is left. The story teaches an important lesson about not wasting food.

C: 当星啸麾下的反物质军团浩浩荡荡地抵达布科莱特星云时，留在他们面前的，只有一片空白的物质残渣。忆者们把整个世界的记忆都装进《布科莱特》，大摇大摆地溜出了绝灭大君设置的包围圈。通过放弃累赘的形骸，布科莱特的居民们成功完成了模因化的重生。但在星啸眼里，他们不过是换了种方式，在军团到来前选择了自我毁灭。
E: When the Antimatter Legion serving under Celenova made their grand arrival at the Boquelet Nebula, all that remained to welcome them was a blank canvas of residual matter. The Memokeepers had stored the entirety of this world's memories inside the Boquelet and strutted casually through the encirclement the Lord Ravager had set up around them. By abandoning their cumbersome physical forms, the citizens of Boquelet had successfully achieved memetic rebirth. However, in Celenova's eyes, all they had achieved was to choose their own method of self-destruction before the Legion arrived and did it for them.
