C: 「素裳： 得书之喜，旷若复面。我二人安好如常，勿念可也。 关于来信所述平日之近况，我二人已了然，深感欣慰。另又新添些许嘱咐，且以此手书为示，愿自勉之。 其一，与朋友交，应明辨损益。素裳如今年至及笄，却不知人心多叵测，世途有机阱之险，以至竟与邪徒恶党同道，实令我二人深感忧愤。直者、信者、博闻者，此乃君子，应广结交之；便辟者、善柔者、便佞者，此乃小人，应自当远离。 其二，不可好大喜功。我二人深知素裳向来急公好义，然信中陈述虚实参半，数处似有夸大之嫌。仙舟古语有云：『名不可简成，誉不可巧立』，出力而自矜功伐，虽多劳苦，终不可取。谨记：我仙舟民寿限无穷，几多功名终须归过眼云烟。是故为人应先固本，足履实地，如临薄冰。一时急功，扼腕歧路，令堕魔阴，贻害终生！ 另：平日砥砺剑技，更莫忘复诵『剑心决』，凝练心气。心蕴乃武艺之本，待炼心气于无形，方可知剑不过身外凭依之物。草、木、石、竹皆可为剑，顺心顺力，逍遥自在，驯驭『轩辕』则计日可待矣。 又：错别字好多啊素裳，执勤结束多读些书吧。还有，是「独当一面」，不是「独霸」。 素衣 于十月廿二」
E: Sushang: Reading your letter is almost as good as seeing you again in person. The two of us are safe and sound, so don't worry about us. As for your recent situation you described in your letter, we understand and are deeply gratified. In addition, we've added some new instructions here and hope you're able to make an effort with these. Firstly, when making friends, you should consider if they're good or bad. Sushang, you're now old enough for courtship, but you still don't understand how unpredictable and dangerous the world can be. Your collusion with hoodlums has worried and aggrieved us. Straight-forward, trustworthy, and knowledgeable people are good and should make good friends. But expedient, soft, and flattering people are no good, and should be avoided. Secondly, don't strive to achieve grandiose things. We know you've always been anxious about justice, but your letter seems to have fact mixed in with fiction, or at the very least be greatly exaggerated. An old saying in Xianzhou goes, "As reputation is never easily gained, so glory cannot be coincidence." It's not good to make achievements and then boast about them. Keep in mind: We Xianzhou people live forever, so fleeting fame and fortune pass through our fingers into the sands of time. It's why you need to build up a strong foundation and focus on the practical, being meticulous and careful as if skating on thin ice. One slip and you'll get into trouble, fall into the grasps of mara, and bear the consequences for life! PS: Keep your sword sharp every day, and don't forget to recite your Blade Swara to focus your spirit. The mind is the basis of martial arts, and when your mind gets refined into the formless, you can know that the sword is nothing but another crutch to rely on. Grass, wood, stone, bamboo and the alike can all make swords. Follow your heart and energies freely. It will take many a day yet for you to eventually tame your Xuanyuan sword. PPS: You made a lot of writing errors, Sushang. Please read more books while you're off duty. And it's "look after myself," not "looking after myself." Suyi October 22

C: 今天是难得的休息日。 天蒙蒙亮的时候，她已从住处出发，只是行动轨迹略有偏移。 今天是她定期体检的日子。 「会头晕？」 「不会。」 「间歇性疲惫？」 「不会。」 「心脏不舒服？」 「不会。」 狐人医士皱起了眉。 「将军，恕我直言，如果什么都正常的话，这份检查报告就是无稽之谈。你我都心知肚明，『月狂』的后遗症愈来愈频繁与显著，我只能尽力减缓。」 「那又如何？」 「但一切都只是时间问题，长期以往，最终你恐怕会彻底迷失，再也……」 她笑了笑。 「你负责『医治』我，我负责『医治』战争。我们说好的，彼此都全力以赴。」 取完药，她特地绕了远路，那是一条僻静的小径。一墙之隔，便是人声鼎沸、热闹非凡的繁华街道。摊贩的叫卖声、孩童的笑声此起彼伏。 「现在多好啊。」她喃喃道。 耳旁响起了黄钟共鸣系统的传信—— 「征忒斯特-Ⅷ孽物，大捷。 「征萨金夏都孽物，初出而不利。后得公司助力，大捷。 「鏖战果儿都，大捷。 「……」 在生命结束之前，她会将仇敌一一猎尽。 直到有一天，她会因「月狂」彻底成为野兽，不分敌我。 直到有一天，「巡猎」的锋镝，将贯穿自己的心脏。
E: Today is a rare day of rest. By the time that dawn started to break, she had already set off from her home, but her destination is a little different today. Today is the day of her periodical health inspection. "Do you get dizzy?" "No." "Spells of fatigue?" "No." "Any irregularities with your heart?" "No." The foxian doctor furrows his brows. "General, with all due respect, if everything were as normal, these reports of yours would be sheer nonsense. You and I both know that the consequences of Moon Rage are becoming more frequent and pronounced. All I can do is try my best to slow it down." "So?" "But it is all just a matter of time. I fear that, in the future, you will completely lose yourself, never to..." She smiles. "You are responsible for 'curing' me, and I am responsible for 'curing' war. We promised that we would both give our all to these roles." After receiving her medication, she deliberately takes a long route home across a quiet and secluded path. On the other side of the wall, she can hear the bustling and excited sounds of people in a packed market street. The calls of vendors and the laughter of children rise and fall. "What a wonderful time this is." She murmurs to herself. Suddenly, a Yellowbell Resonance System notification begins to ring in her ears: "We have secured a resounding victory against Toste-VIII abominations." "We have secured a resounding victory against the Sakin Chadu abominations thanks to the IPC's assistance after initial setbacks." "We have secured a resounding victory in the battle of Gordo." "..." Before her life ends, she will hunt down every one of her nemeses. Until the day that Moon Rage turns her into a truly feral beast that cannot tell friends from foe. Until the day... when the arrow of The Hunt will pierce her own heart.

C: 仙舟「曜青」的影卫，沉默寡言、独来独往。\n专司情报与不见光的事务，鲜少在人前露面。貊泽显露锋芒时，便是敌人的死期。\n刺杀手段丰富，对整洁和条理有超乎寻常的执着。
E: A Shadow Guard of the Yaoqing, Moze is taciturn and solitary, always acting on his own.\nAs an expert in intelligence services and other operations that must remain covert, Moze rarely shows himself before others. The moment he reveals his blade usually spells doom for his enemies.\nHe commands a vast wealth of assassination techniques, coupled with an extraordinary obsession for orderliness and cleanliness.

C: 风波后的匹诺康尼，活力依然。 那座金碧辉煌的都市，是奢华迷离的商业天堂，也是她一直渴望拜访的胜地。 「你也是逐梦客吧？这身装扮可不多见啊。」 猎人穿着的异乡人不知何时走到她身边。 「当然，我也是。别看我现在这样，总有一天，我会把克劳克影业买下来！你呢？」 「如此说来，小女子也勉强算半个吧…… 「一直想着当有一日漫游星海，去往不同的世界，联结各地的贸易。可惜……」 她没有再说下去，异乡人若有所思地点点头，举起苏乐达向她致意，一饮而尽后，转身离开。 归乡之路本就漫长，但她还是选择于此停留。 未来不止一路，她的渴望也不止于归乡。 「这位女士，来点苏乐达？」 她转过头，是一个推着车的商贩。 「…看您的穿着，应该来自罗浮仙舟？多年前我就跟着老板去过一趟，那巨大的舰船，繁华的样子，我到现在也忘不了。 「那一次我们前往鸣火商会拜会，接待我们的使者停云小姐，倒是和您有几分相似，不知道您是否认识她…… 「女士，女士，你在听吗？」 她望向匹诺康尼的星空，在尚不可见的远方，人们正在涌来，人们正在远去。 「抱歉，我刚刚在想一笔能以小小杠杆撬动大鳄的『大生意』，一本万利，却也九死一生……」 「你在犹豫？」 她莞尔一笑。 「是犹豫过…不过终于是拿定了主意。 若是小女子此番登场，能迷了那些大手的眼，那么也算是行往更远的天际了。」
E: Penacony remains vibrant after the storm. That gilded metropolis, a paradise of luxurious and indulgent commerce, is a destination she had always longed to explore. "You're a Dreamchaser too, aren't you? I don't see many people dressed like you." An outlander in hunter's garb approaches her before she realizes it. "Of course, I too am one. Don't let my appearance fool you. One day, I'm going to buy Clock Studios! What about you?" "In that case, you can also consider me as some sort of a Dreamchaser..." "I've always imagined roaming the starry seas, traveling to different worlds, and establishing trade everywhere. Unfortunately..." She falls silent and the outlander nods thoughtfully, raising the SoulGlad in her honor. After gulping down the can of SoulGlad, he turns to leave. The road home is already long, yet she chooses to pause here. The future holds many paths, and her longing is about more than simply returning home. "Care for some SoulGlad, my lady?" She turns her head toward a vendor pushing a cart. "... Judging by your attire, you must be from the Xianzhou Luofu. I traveled there with my boss many years ago, and I still remember the massive ship and vibrant atmosphere." "When we visited the Whistling Flames merchant guild, the messenger who received us, Miss Tingyun, looked rather like you. I wonder if you know her..." "Ma'am, ma'am, are you listening?" She gazes at Penacony's starry sky. People are coming and going in the distance yet unseen by her. "Apologies, I was just contemplating a "major deal" that could leverage a small advantage to move giants — a venture with immense returns, but fraught with perils...." "Are you hesitating?" She smiles. "Yes, I have hesitated... but I've finally made up my mind." "If I can dazzle those powerful figures upon my entrance, then that would count as having journeyed to the farthest reaches of the sky."

C: 他多次重返「阿尔冈-阿帕歇」，调查当时下令灭族的男人，却发现他的身影在历史记载中，早已被抹去。 他闯入忆庭分部，试图读取与「阿尔冈-阿帕歇」有关的忆泡。陈列于展柜的忆泡纷纷滚落，那些忆者顾不得对他进行阻拦，蜂拥而上率先将那些难得一见的记忆抢救下来。 在被驱逐出忆庭时，他终于趁乱在关于「阿尔冈-阿帕歇」的忆泡中看到了那个男人。 「奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德，星际和平公司『市场开拓部』主管……」 …… 「你听说了吗，最近有个神秘的改造人在庇尔波因特的星际港口袭击公司的船队……」 「市场开拓部的生意被搅黄了不少，我们就等着看好戏吧，谁让他们平时那么张扬……」 「好戏？明天就要回庇尔波因特了，我可不想被人用枪指着脑袋……」 身着制服的公司员工捧着咖啡，三三两两穿过喷泉广场。 树荫下，牛仔压低帽檐，一边读着报纸上的通缉令，一边悠闲地啜饮单一麦芽果汁。 「波提欧。出生地未知。巡海游侠。对以下罪案负责：针对庇尔波因特的袭击，五起；针对星际和平公司市场开拓部武器仓库的袭击，三起；针对P40级以上公司员工的袭击，若干起；此外，此人还应对玛丽-卢安星系珍宝失踪案、孔厄行星环暴动案、伽利略星大爆炸等多起公司下辖星球的案件负责。」 「他宝贝的，枪林弹雨、死里逃生的事情被你们写得跟小可爱一样……」 他扔下报纸，紧盯着从公司分部进出的舰队。虽然通缉令上他的赏金一涨再涨，奥斯瓦尔多却像一条湿滑的泥鳅，从未让他抓住过半点踪迹。不仅在公开报道中不见其踪影，甚至连那些中级员工也不知道他的所在。 港口，低级智械有条不紊地运送货物，朴素的货运舰来来回回。当他数完第三百五十九艘货运舰，港口的工作人员开始脱帽致意，一艘华丽的太空舰在护卫舰的拱卫下从港口滑出，驶向盛会之星。望着那装饰浮夸的舰船，他摇摇头，继续等待着什么。 在数十分钟后，一艘灰色的小型生态舰无声无息地跟着商业舰队飞出了港口 ——那才是他真正的目标。 「没有哪个地方永远是铜墙铁壁一块。找不到你奥斯瓦尔多，找到看不惯你的公司狗还不容易？」 「想想过去那些和敌人联手、被我干掉的家伙，不知道他们现在会不会在地狱里笑话我…」 他丢掉手中的空瓶子，露出了尖牙。 「没事，我们很快就会见面了。」
E: He returned to Aeragan-Epharshel multiple times to investigate the man who ordered the annihilation of his whole tribe, only to discover the man's identity had already been erased from historical records. He forced his way into a Garden of Recollection branch and tried to read Memory Bubbles related to Aeragan-Epharshel. The Memory Bubbles on the display cabinets all fall towards the ground. Those Memokeepers had no time to stop him as they rushed forward and prioritized saving rare and precious memories. As he was kicked out of the Garden of Recollection, he finally saw that man amid the chaos in a Memory Bubble related to Aeragan-Epharshel. "Oswaldo Schneider, director of the Marketing Development Department in the Interastral Peace Corporation..." ... "Did you hear that a mysterious cyborg has been attacking the IPC's fleets in Pier Point's interstellar port?" "Loads of business for the Marketing Development Department got ruined cause of that. Let's all get some popcorn ready. It's about time they pay their due for being so in-your-face all the time..." "Popcorn? I'm going back to Pier Point tomorrow and I don't want to have a gun pointed to my head..." Uniformed IPC workers cross the Fountain Plaza in twos and threes as they hold cups of coffee in hand. The cowboy lowered the brim of his hat under the shade of a tree. He read the wanted notice in the newspaper as he leisurely sipped a bottle of malt fruit juice. "Boothill. Birthplace unknown. Galaxy Ranger. Responsible for the following crimes: 5 counts of assault against Pier Point; 3 counts of attacks against weapon warehouses belonging to the IPC's Marketing Development Department; multiple counts of attacks against IPC workers at rank P40 or above. Moreover, this person should also be responsible for the treasure theft on the Marie-Louin system, riots in the Kongea ring system, the great explosion on the planet of Galileo, and many other incidents on planets under the IPC's jurisdiction." "Son of a bench, y'all blowin' smokes over here 'bout me dodgin' them bullets and cheatin' death like a lil' shirt-for-brain at his first rodeo..." He tossed the paper aside and stared at the fleets entering and leaving this IPC branch office. Though the bounty on his head kept rising with every wanted notice, Oswaldo remained slippery as an eel, leaving no trail. Not only is the director untraceable through official announcements, but even the middle managers are unaware of the man's whereabouts. The low-tier Intellitron are shipping goods in an orderly manner at the dock as plain-looking shipping vessels shuttle to and fro. When he had counted 359 shipping vessels, the workers at the dock started to take off their hats in salute as a magnificent spaceship slid out from the quay, surrounded by protective corvettes, to sail toward the Planet of Festivities. He shook his head as he looked at the pretentious luxury spaceship and kept waiting for something else. After a few minutes, a small gray bioship silently left port together with a commercial fleet — That was his real target. "Ain't no place forever ironclad, pardner. Sure, I can't track ya down, Oswaldo. But sniffin' out them yellow-bellied IPC dogs who can't stand you ain't no tall order." "Mullin' over them varmints I sent to boot hill for backin' the wrong side... Reckon they might be yukkin' it up at me from hell 'bout now..." He tossed the empty bottle and showed his sharp teeth. "Don'cha worry. We'll be meetin' up real soon."

C: 「树庭诸贤人： 关于某些学者指控我『学术诽谤』、『败坏青年』、『不信神明』三大罪名，我无意奉陪这些拙劣的把戏，也不屑为自己辩护。不过，考虑到这能让诸位深入了解我的研究，我不妨简单说说。 学术诽谤之罪，据他们所言，是我在课堂上公开诋毁经典的泰坦学与灵魂学研究，称其为『学术界的黑潮』。请问：评价是否有错？一门研究泰坦能不能站在一根针尖上的学科，以及一门主张灵魂本质为水的学科，因某些权威的坚持存活至今，和精神黑潮何异？ 我自小在树庭求学，深知只有批判和怀疑才能掀起思想的变革。我鼓励学生挑战我的权威，这就是他们称之为『毒害青年』的方式。以白厄和遐蝶为例，两人初入学时，对如何思考，何谓逻辑一无所知，看看他们现在，有时都能将我驳得哑口无言！如果说这是『毒害』青年，我难以想象他们所谓的『正确教育』指的是什么。 正因此，某些人指控我和参与逐火的黄金裔过从甚密，宣称我的理论为他们提供夺取火种的支持。是啊，我曾经向缇里西庇俄丝请教过失落的历史，我那两位最优秀的学生正巧也是黄金裔，这又如何？ 我也是他们所谓的黄金裔，但我从不迷信神谕。如果神是超脱人世的至纯粹、至永恒之物，那么听好了，世上有且只有一个神，那就是无法毁灭的真理！ 只有真理的信徒才会在这条道路上前仆后继，而以智者自诩的权威们如此恐惧神明的坍塌。 你们建议双方在瑟希斯见证下各退一步以缓和事态…抱歉，我毫无此意。相反，我想给指控我的诸位一句忠告—— 未来的世界会了解我，而你们对我宣读指控，将比聆听判词的我还要恐惧！」 ——那刻夏于一次贤人会上的即兴申辩
E: "Sages of the Grove: Regarding how some scholars accuse me of the three great sins, 'academic defamation,' 'corrupting youths,' and 'religious heresy,' I don't intend to entertain their cheap tricks, nor will I bother defending myself. However, considering how this might allow everyone to better understand my research, I'll briefly explain it. According to them, I committed the sin of academic defamation when I publicly disparaged the classic research of Titan studies and parapsychology, claiming them to be 'a black tide of the academic world.' Answer me this: Was my evaluation incorrect? A study about whether Titans can stand on the head of a pin, and a study that posits the nature of souls as water. They persist until this day because of certain authorities. How is that any different from a mental black tide? I studied in the Grove since I was a child, and thoroughly understand that the revolution of ideas can only be achieved through criticism and suspicion. I encourage students to challenge my authority, and this is what they claim to be 'corrupting youths.' Take Phainon and Castorice, for example. When they first began their studies, they were clueless about how to think and what logic is. Look at them now. They can render me speechless sometimes! If this is what it means to 'corrupt' youths, I cannot imagine what they regard as 'correct education.' As such, some individuals accuse me of having excessively close ties with the Flame-Chasing Chrysos Heirs, claiming that my theories help them seize the Coreflames. Indeed, I once consulted Tribios about lost history, and both of my most brilliant students happen to be Chrysos Heirs as well. And what of it? I am also what they call a Chrysos Heir, but I've never had blind faith in prophecies. If gods are truly the purest and most eternal beings that have ascended above the mortal world, then listen well: The world only has one god, and that is indestructible "truth"! Only disciples of truth can continue on this path. The authorities who proclaim themselves to be sages fear the fall of god. You suggested that both parties take a step back to deescalate the situation... My apologies, but I don't intend to do that. On the contrary, I would like to give a word of advice to those who wish to accuse me— The future world will understand me, and all of you who raise accusations against me should be more afraid than me when I await my verdict!" — An improvised speech by Anaxa, during a meeting of the sages

C: 「亲爱的三月七： 夜是如此漫长…是因为听不到你的声音么？ 我庆幸你的沉睡，如此便不必亲眼目睹翁法罗斯的午夜，这处你最初抵达的遗迹，埋藏着最无情的，遗忘的气息。 无边的噩梦从这里涌出，吞没银河…你不会喜欢的。 就像我曾经的困惑一样——被记忆裹挟的「过去」，无法诞生任何新的「未来」。 三千万世，那女孩徒劳地将记忆收集，向天外主宰记忆的神明祈祷。 可那些伤痕累累的回忆，那粉饰为『英雄故事』的记忆的涟漪，都是毁灭的薪柴…他们，真的会有任何结果么？ 可奇怪的是，那女孩的一举一动，她所描绘的故事，有时让我想起了你。你也总在每次旅程之后，绘声绘色地讲述自己的冒险故事，想象奇妙的未来。 你爱说，有一天，你会用相机的闪光灯，为大家照亮探索的前路。 你曾说，你一定会用上『斩星破宙•大琉璃剑』保护列车组的所有人。 你也说，你会变得成熟、优雅、强大，带领着大家前进。 你的那些遐想…一笔一划都勾勒在我的沉眠中。 那么…如果是你，在听到一个无缘未来的故事时，会想做怎样的润色呢？ 我也曾思考，怎样让那女孩讲的『故事』，不徘徊在周而复始的岁月里…你应该理所当然就会这么做吧？ 但当我透过岁月的罅隙窥视这个世界『记忆』的始末时…我知道那伪善的天父，祂早已背向翁法罗斯，将目光朝向『毁灭』。而祂狂热的信徒，也将追着记忆的残照，再次寻上你…… 纵然是你的伙伴，开拓的行者们，他们的到来不过延缓了孕育『毁灭』的进度—— 我们唯一的出路，一场彻底的『感官之雨』，它会涤净这里一切徒劳而惨烈的痕迹，你的伙伴，只需要一场沉睡，便能迎来再度启程的机会。 这场『雨』不会持续太久，它会将一切痛苦的记忆冲刷殆尽——也许「忘却」才是唯一出口。 然后，我就可以在这本名为「翁法罗斯」的手账中，真正贴上你想要的未来。 不要睁眼，三月。 残酷的事，就由我代劳吧♭ 你的， 『长夜月』♭」 ——深藏心底的声音
E: "Dear March 7th, The night feels so long... Is it because I can't hear your voice? I'm grateful for your slumber, for it spares you from witnessing the midnight of Amphoreus. These ruins where you first arrived, buried deep with the most ruthless essence of Oblivion. Endless nightmares surge forth from here, devouring the cosmos... You won't like it. Just like my past confusion... when trapped by the Remembrance, no new "future" can ever be born. For thirty million lives, that girl futilely gathered the memories, praying to the deity with authority over the Remembrance beyond the sky. But those scarred memories, those ripples of memories disguised as "heroic tales," are all just fuel for Destruction... Will they ever amount to anything at all? But strangely enough, that girl's every move and the stories she tells sometimes remind me of you. You, too, after every journey, would vividly recount your adventure stories and imagine wonderful futures. You used to say that one day, you'd light the path ahead for everyone with your camera flash. You once said you'd definitely protect the Express Crew with your "Starshatter: Shard Supreme." You also said you'd become mature, elegant, and strong, leading everyone forward. Your wild imagination... every stroke and line is etched into my dormancy. So... if it were you, how would you embellish a story of an unreachable future? I have pondered how to keep that girl's "story" from wandering in the endless cycle of years, too... You would naturally do the same, wouldn't you? But when I peered through the cracks of time to see the beginning and end of this world's memories... I knew that hypocritical sky father had already turned THEIR back on the Amphoreus, setting THEIR gaze toward the Destruction. And THEIR maniacal followers will chase after the afterglow of memories to find you once again... Even your companions, striders of the Trailblaze — their arrival merely delays the gestation of Destruction— Our only way out, a thorough "Rain of Sensation," will cleanse all traces of futile agony here. Your companions need only fall into slumber to gain the chance for a new departure. This "rain" won't last forever. It will wash away all painful memories. Perhaps "Oblivion" is the only exit. Then, in this journal called Amphoreus, I can finally paste the future you've been yearning for. Keep your eyes closed, March. I'll take care of the cruel part ♭ Yours truly, 'Evernight' ♭" — A voice deep within

C: 为了消除星核带来的危机，{F#少女}{M#少年}{NICKNAME}选择与星穹列车同行。
E: A {F#girl}{M#boy}, {NICKNAME}, decides to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the threat of the Stellaron.

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，今后，这里就是你的家了。\n新的冒险就要开始了，准备跃迁前往新世界吧！
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express. From now on, this will be your home.\nA new adventure is about to start. Prepare to warp jump to a new world!

C: 矿区风波暂告一段落。「地火」首领奥列格为报答各位无名客的支援，他同意与你们合作，并为你们安排了合适的住处。\n这所「大饭店」装潢实在是过于简朴，压根没有刀斧手藏身的地方，这让你不禁感受到家的温暖。\n无论如何，这已经是「地火」能提供的最舒适的住处了…不要有怨言，安心休息吧。
E: Peace has returned to the mines at least for now. Oleg, chief of Wildfire, has agreed to work with you to show his gratitude towards you, the Nameless, for your support. He has arranged your accommodation.\nThe fact that this "grand" hotel is hardly furnished, leaving no places for any hit man to hide, makes this place almost feel like home.\nAll things considered, this is the coziest spot Wildfire can afford to spare... Save your complaints for tomorrow and have a good night's sleep.

C: 你们发现克拉拉坐在损坏的供能装置面前，正为如何修理它犯难。\n作为克拉拉的家人，此时就应该义无反顾地伸出援手，然后以此相要挟…不对，是创造机会顺势说服克拉拉。\n好巧不巧，你发现这供能装置的构造竟与此前维修过的各种器械类似——是时候展现真正的技术了！
E: You find Clara sitting in front of a damaged energy supply device troubled with its repairs.\nAs a member of Clara's family, this is the time to give her a helping hand and use it as leverage... No, to use it as a chance for an opportunity to convince Clara.\nCoincidentally, you find the energy supply device to have a similar structure to the various machines you've fixed before — it's time to display your true abilities!

C:
在和同伴充分交换意见之后，你们很快得出结论：当下最要紧之事务应是回到旅店房间好好睡一觉，回头再去请教「地火」的想法。
这听起来确实是有点扯，但你如何能拒绝长途跋涉和艰苦战斗之后的柔软床垫呢？
之前的你还对眼前的铺位有所嫌弃，可它现在简直是全世界最舒适的地方，没有之一。
晚安，也愿你不再从噩梦中惊醒。
E:
Having had a thorough discussion, you quickly conclude that the priority is to return to the hotel and get a good night's sleep. You will ask what Wildfire makes of this later.
It may sound outlandish, but how can one say no to a soft mattress after a long journey and harsh battle?
You toss all the complaints about your bed behind, thinking it must be the nicest thing this world has to offer.
Nighty-night. May you no longer be troubled by nightmares.

C: 得知你们为星核而来，停云邀众人前往司辰宫通传来意。\n仙舟之上，六司各掌其职。在这敏感时刻，你们若想在罗浮上自由行动，便须取得司掌航行与外交的天舶司长官，驭空的首肯。
E: Knowing that you came for the Stellaron, Tingyun invites everyone to the Palace of Astrum for a meeting.\nSix individual commissions oversee the Xianzhou. If you wish to move freely on the Luofu during these sensitive times, you must obtain the approval of the Head of the Sky-Faring Commission, Yukong, who is in charge of transport and diplomacy.

C: 司辰宫中，满心以为会获得支持的你们却遭到了驭空的回绝。\n所幸云骑军将军景元现身定策。但他并未将搜索星核的重任交给你们，而是让你们找到行踪无定的卡芙卡。\n出得司辰宫，你们暂得片刻休憩，而后，你们将开始猎手与猎物间的追逐。
E: In the Palace of Astrum, the hopeful Trailblazers are rejected by Yukong.\nFortunately, General Jing Yuan of Luofu's Cloud Knights appears and intervenes. However, he does not entrust you with the task of searching for the Stellaron, instead instructing you to locate Kafka's unpredictable whereabouts.\nAfter leaving the Palace of Astrum, you have a short rest before commencing with your game of cat and mouse.

C: 抵达「迴星港」，你们展开搜索行动。猎物总会不自觉留下痕迹，而分辨痕迹是否属于猎物，则是考验猎人技巧的时候了。
E: Having arrived at the "Stargazer Navalia," you begin searching for Kafka and the hunt is on. Prey always leaves behind traces of its presence unwittingly, and now is the time to hone your hunting skills and determine whether the traces you find belong to the prey or not.

C: 身为持明龙尊的转世之身，你的前世曾身负守望建木的职责，是众人仰止的英雄。但一桩冲动引致的罪行却改变了所有人的命运。\n你曾决心不再重蹈覆辙，不再履踏故土，也绝不以那位龙尊的面目现身人前…可惜，一切终究只是你自己的愿望罢了。
E: As the reincarnation of Vidyadhara high elder, you were responsible for guarding the Ambrosial Arbor in your previous life, and you were a hero that everyone looked up to. But an impulsive crime changed everyone's destiny.\nYou were determined not to repeat the same mistakes, to never again return to your homeland, and to never again take on the shape of that high elder... Unfortunately, that was all just wishful thinking.

C: 你前往调查骚动的来源，发现一位银发少女正遭到围追堵截。\n是可忍，孰不可忍？你决定提棍上阵，让这帮坏东西好好改造，重新做人。
E: As you head to investigate the source of the disturbance, you discover a silver-haired young girl being chased and surrounded.\nCan you turn a blind eye, or not? You decide to take up your bat and head into battle. You will teach these thugs a thing or two about how to behave.

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n据他所说，你们此行的目的地是一座名为「皮皮•皮皮西的沙龙」的沙龙——这名字应该是故意的。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nAccording to him, your destination for this journey is a salon named "Peppy Pepeshi's Salon" — The name must have been intentional.

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n触碰这台神秘的机器后，你发现自己变成了一个不怎么爱说话的卡通人物。根据游戏设定，你现在打倒石头老板，没收他的非法所得物。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nAs you touch the mysterious machine, you realize that you've been transformed into a taciturn cartoon character. According to the game story, you will now defeat Boss Stone and confiscate his illegal items.

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友（好吧，或许不是朋友）桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界（以一种合法的方式）。\n来都来了，稍微体验一下也未尝不可…吧？
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo (okay, maybe friend is a strong word) happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things (in a legal way).\nWell, you're here now so, it couldn't hurt to try... Right?

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n你们的旅途刚一开始就结束了，因为一名极有原则的猎犬家系成员把守着大门。如果你们想继续深入，恐怕必须得用钟表把戏干点坏事了…愿钟表小子宽恕你。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nJust as your journey begins, it comes to an end as a Bloodhound Family member with a strong sense of principles guards the door before you. If you wish to continue ahead, you may have to use Clockwork for no good... Let's hope Clockie forgives you.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 流萤向你袒露了心声。无论你作何感想，现在都已经到了告别的时候…但你们还可以同行最后一段路。\n前往「黄金的时刻」，从那里返回现实与众人会合吧。
E: Firefly has confessed her innermost thoughts to you. No matter how you feel about it, it is time for you to say farewell... However, you can still walk the last part of this journey together.\nHead to Golden Hour and return to reality to reunite with everyone.

C: 你安然无恙地返回「黄金的时刻」——带着无比巨大的信息量一起。如果不出意外，列车组的同伴们听过你的见闻后一定会露出无比惊讶的表情…前提是你的舌头别打结。\n拭目以待吧。
E: Safe and sound, you return to the Golden Hour with a repertoire of information. If everything goes as planned, the Crew will surely be blown away after hearing your experiences... provided that you don't get tongue-tied.\nLet's look forward to it.

C: 当你们找到姬子时，她正在与一位名为米凯的当地人交谈。好巧不巧，这位自称「守墓人」的温和男性竟还是这片流梦之地的负责人之一。\n你们的出现似乎并不令他感到意外。他表示可以带领各位深入了解流梦礁，但在此之前需要与某位「重要的客人」同行——如无意外，这位「客人」多半就是知更鸟小姐了。
E: When you find Himeko, she is speaking with a local named Micah. Coincidentally, this mild-mannered man who calls themselves the "Gravekeeper" is actually one of the people responsible for this land of Dreamflux.\nYour appearance in this land doesn't seem to surprise him in the slightest. He says that he would be able to take you to get a deeper understanding of Dreamflux Reef, but you must travel alongside a certain "special guest"... If you are not mistaken, this "guest" is quite likely Miss Robin.

C:
……

商人：「会计！你我都是主人的忠仆，理应秉着忠诚相勉！你为何对我下此毒手！」
会计：「因为主人用泥土造化了你，用烈火造化了我。我比你高贵！」

会计：「你们不曾为旧主效命，而不清楚他的威能。他能夺走我们自由，便也能赐予我们自由！你们怎敢与我刀兵相向？」
艺人：「因为主人用烈火造化了你，用辉光造化了我，我比你高贵！」
侍卫：「因为主人用烈火造化了你，用鲜血造化了我，我比你高贵！」
参谋：「主人终将归来！祂至忠诚、至卑微，却至尊贵的仆人，便是那不曾争抢、虔诚信仰者。」
新至的主人：「而我——我将成为诸位新的家人，并将你们从死去的幻影中解放！」

……
E:
...

Merchant: "Accountant! We are both loyal servants to our master. We should use our loyalty to encourage each other! How could you scheme against me!"
Accountant: "Because the master crafted you from clay, and me from fire. I am more noble than you!"

Accountant: "You have never served the old master and will never understand his true power. Our freedom is his to give and take as he pleases! How dare you cross arms with me?"
Artist: "Because the master crafted you with fire, and me from radiance. I am more noble than you!"
Retainer: "Because the master crafted you from fire and me with blood, I am more noble than you!"
Advisor: "The master will return! The servant who serves THEM with the most loyalty, the most humility, and yet the most noble — he would be that devoted believer who never robbed or fought what was not his."
New Master: "As for me... I shall forge new bonds of Kinship and liberate you from the clutches of death."

...

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所说，欧洛尼斯让{F#她}{M#他}看到了星核猎手…那是一段理应不存在，却无比鲜明的记忆。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, Oronyx showed {F#her}{M#him} the Stellaron Hunters... It was a memory that should not exist, yet it seems so vivid and realistic.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 阿格莱雅因事务繁多，暂时无法与树庭归来的众人面议。舟车疲顿的{NICKNAME}一行人决定先休息一番。
E: With many matters demanding her attention, Aglaea cannot yet receive those back from the Grove. {NICKNAME}'s travel-weary group decides to rest first.

C: 一场梦境，将*我们*带回那段早已为岁月所模糊的遥远回忆之中，而这场幻梦，印刻着*我们*内心最深处的不安。
E: A dream carries us back to memories long faded by time, and this dream mirrors the profound fears within our hearts.

C: 一场梦境，将*我们*带回那段早已为岁月所模糊的遥远回忆之中，而这场幻梦，印刻着*我们*内心最深处的不安。
E: A dream carries us back to memories long faded by time, and this dream mirrors the profound fears within our hearts.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的神职。\n开拓总是会面对如此的时刻，将自己的命运与他人的命运深深地结合在一起…只有{NICKNAME}自己能决定{F#她}{M#他}的命运走向何方。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the divine role of Time.\nTrailblazers always face moments like this, where their fate becomes deeply entwined with that of others... Yet only {NICKNAME} can decide where {F#her}{M#his} destiny leads.

C: 赛飞儿发短信邀请{NICKNAME}前往斯缇科西亚寻宝，或许能够成为一道不错的调剂。
E: Cipher sent a message inviting {NICKNAME} to go treasure hunting in Styxia — could be a welcome change of pace.

C: 怎么会有这么欠揍的人？
E: How can someone be such a pain in the neck?

C: 为什么会在那天放弃登上星穹列车呢？你感到有些悲伤。
E: Why didn't you board the Astral Express that day? You feel a little sad.

C: 睡吧，当你醒来，一切都会变得美好。
E: Get some rest. When you wake up, everything will be better.

C: 你已知悉翁法罗斯的往日，如今，你要改写它的明天。该如何与命运的伟力抗衡？你身旁的伙伴与同行的智者，一定能驱散疑虑的阴云。
E: You have seen the past of Amphoreus. Now, you shall shape its future. How will you stand against the weight of destiny? The companion beside you and the sages who walk with you will definitely clear the clouds of doubt.

C: 你看，「时辰」的精灵来了，她是来解放你的。但解放需要支付代价——\n关于你所离席的岁月，永远消失在时间的裂隙里，再也回不来了。\n但你要前进，用你创造的未来，偿还你欠下的债。
E: Look, the "Clockkeeper" is here with your temporal pardon. But this bail comes with interest.\nThe seconds, minutes, and years of your absence will be foreclosed upon, forever beyond withdrawal.\nThe only way out is forward, where each new moment you create becomes the currency to settle what you've borrowed from time's unforgiving bank.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n这里的混乱的记忆越来越多，除了我的记忆，还有谁的记忆？
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe chaotic memories here keep growing. Besides mine, whose else could they be?

C: 多亏了星期日与长夜月的短暂碰撞，得以让潜伏起来的黑天鹅锁定了长夜月的藏身处，并沿着命途的河流逆流而上。\n忆庭决不允许黑天鹅擅自行动，而黑天鹅也不知道自己将面对什么……
E: Thanks to the brief collision between Sunday and Evernight, Black Swan, who had been lurking, managed to lock onto Evernight's hideout and travel upstream along the currents of the Path.\nThe Garden of Recollection would never allow Black Swan to act on her own, while she had no idea what she was about to face...

C: 突破屏障之后，螺丝咕姆发现一处有趣的信号——「神话之外」。去会会现实中的智械哥，从他脑袋里找出德谬歌的线索吧。
E: After breaking through the barrier, Screwllum detects an intriguing signal: Exomyth. It's time to meet the old Intellitron in reality and find clues about the Demiurge from his head.

C: 愿望，只是救世主执念的一部分。深入归墟的旅途中，我们又与刻律德菈、海瑟音、缇安、缇宁等伙伴重逢。每位黄金裔都目睹了白厄一路走来的孤独抗争，也都毫不犹豫地化身同行的记忆，只为与救世主并肩作战。
E: Wishes are but a part of the Deliverer's obsession. During our journey deep into the ruin, we reunited with other companions such as Cerydra, Hysilens, Trianne, and Trinnon. Each Chrysos Heir witnessed Phainon's solitary defiance along the way, and they transformed without hesitation into memories that walk with us, only to be able to fight alongside the Deliverer.

C: 铁墓之战，以「毁灭」的落败告终。我在熟悉的车厢中醒来，只是列车似乎不同往日，似有稀客到访……
E: The Battle of Irontomb ended in Destruction's defeat. I woke up in the familiar car, but the Express felt different today, as if some rare visitors had arrived...

C: 「军团」战役暂告息止，行进于茫茫星海中，来自「黑塔」的星声余音再度传来——在艾丝妲与全体科员的群策群力下，作为寰宇明珠的空间站，似乎正开展着名为「复兴计划」的行动，亟需有志之士加入。\n而阿兰认为，你是一等一的好选择。
E: The Legion's campaign has come to a temporary end. Traveling amongst the vast sea of stars, the star echo remnants from Herta Space Station are heard once again — with the combined strength of Asta and all the researchers, the peerless space station seems to be expanding and recruiting for an operation known as Project Revival.\nArlan believes that you are the most suitable candidate for this.

C: 成功集齐三卷失落的录像带之后，你发觉三者内容似有交叉，均记录着一位名叫「希拉」的科员的人生备份。\n正当你疑惑之时，录像带通过视讯号植入的秘密防卫机制使你头痛欲裂，失去了知觉。
E: After gathering the three lost videotapes, you notice that they all seem to be records of the life of a researcher named Sheila.\nJust as you start to figure this out, a secret defense mechanism implanted in the video signal gives you a splitting headache and knocks you unconscious.

C: 黑塔委托你寻找某个丢失的奇物，你可能需要艾丝妲的帮助
E: Herta had commissioned you to find a lost Curio, and you might need Asta's help.

C: 在贝洛伯格行政区的寻访告一段落，接下来的路线，就交给开了导航模式的小机器人吧。
E: Your search in the Belobog Administrative District has come to an end. Now, let's leave the route planning to your little robot's navigation mode.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n扑满！扑满！小~扑满！
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nTrotter! Trotter! Little~ Trotter!

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n扑满好像在给我们带路。先跟着吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nThe Trotter seems to be leading the way for us. Follow it for now.

C: 身为「地火」的首领以及磐岩镇唯一的医生，娜塔莎每日劳务缠身，想要踏出诊所一步都是难上加难。\n不巧，她又碰上几位颇为顽固的病患，无论如何都不愿配合复诊。\n帮她一个忙，去劝说那些加入了所谓「互助会」的患者吧。
E: As the chief of Wildfire and the only doctor in Boulder Town, Natasha is busy every day, and it's almost impossible for her to leave the clinic.\nWhat's worse, some stubborn patients refuse to come for a follow-up visit.\nDo her a favor and persuade the patients who joined the so-called "mutual aid society."

C: 有传闻说：铁卫禁区的某位队长正满世界寻找这样一群「外来者」——他们衣着光鲜、气宇非凡，还一度使驻扎在禁区内超半数士兵陷入昏迷…当然，这位队长也包括在内。\n他是来找你寻仇的吗？还是见过你的武艺后竟想拜你为师？直觉告诉你，后者发生的概率微乎其微…但也不是没有这种可能。\n总之，不妨亲自去拜访一下这位队长吧——只是应当记得：这次下手千万要轻点。
E: Word has it that a certain Captain of the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone is looking up and down for a group of outsiders, who are said to be well-dressed with a lordly bearing. They knocked out half of the soldiers in the Restricted Zone... including the Captain himself.\nDoes he want payback? Or is he so impressed by how good of a fighter you are and decided to become a student of yours? The latter, however unlikely it seems, may as well be plausible.\nIn any event, perhaps you should pay a visit to this Captain. Just try not to beat the snot out of everyone this time around.

C: 佩拉和玲可已经将露营地构建完毕。接下来，她们决定为露营餐收集食材——顺便寻找不大可能出现在城郊雪原的地髓激活元件。
E: Pela and Lynx have finished setting up the camp. Then they decide to gather food as well as trying to find a Geomarrow Activation Element, even though it would be incredibly rare to find one out in the Outlying Snow Plains.

C: 你以自己认为恰当的方式彻底结束了推销员的无尽骚扰，还碰巧得知了「查宝」的归宿在何处。\n是时候前往空间站向站长艾丝妲求证了——当然，如果今天发生的一切实在令你感到委屈，你也可以试着向这位温柔的站长求取安慰。
E: You put an end to the salesperson's endless harassment in your own way, while also accidentally discovering where Findie belongs to.\nIt's time to go to the space station and ask Lead Researcher Asta for confirmation — if you feel today was a little too much for you, perhaps she can lend a sympathetic ear.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的展品遭遇了一连串的莫名失窃。\n为了找回失窃的展品，你和佩拉决定前往大矿区调查。\n斯薇塔小姐的线索句句属实，你找到了几条能够侧证展品盗窃案于此地发生过的证据。把这些信息回报给佩拉吧。
E: There has been a series of thefts in the Belobog History and Culture Museum.\nTo find the lost exhibits, Pela and you decide to head to the Great Mine to investigate the matter.\nAll of Miss Swetta's information was true. You found some circumstantial evidence indicating the thefts had happened here. Report this back to Pela.

C: 你结束了博物馆一个阶段的经营。\n你似乎又在展厅里看到了佩拉的影子，或许是对诺尔伯特公子的审讯有了进展？去和她聊聊看吧。
E: You finished one phase of the museum's operations.\nYou seem to see Pela again in the exhibit hall. Perhaps there are some results from Norbert's interrogation? Go speak with her.

C: 你还是决定让「黛青小姐」保持着她的秘密。至此，「美丽狐仙聊天」的真相已经昭然，将它汇报给艾丝妲，希望这些情报对温符瑞的外驻有一些参考作用吧。
E: You decide to let "Ms. Daiqing" keep her secret. At this point, the truth about the Foxian Beauty Chat has come to the surface, and it will be reported to Asta. Hopefully, this information will be of consideration for Wen Furui's transfer request.

C: 虽然主意不算是好主意，但不失为一种尝试，去找找云骑军的甲胄吧。\n这些甲胄严丝合缝，根本看不出士兵的种族和性别，真是太巧了。
E: It's not the greatest idea, but it's an idea. Go look for Cloud Knights' equipment.\nThe armor is tightly sealed, no one would be able to tell the species and gender expression of an individual wearing them, what a find.

C: 十王司判官请求你们将她护送至星槎渡口。横生的建木枝蔓，失控的魔阴身与孽物…想必这一路定然不可能一帆风顺。
E: The Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission requested you to escort her to the Starskiff Jetty, with overgrown Ambrosial Arbor Vines and uncontrolled mara-struck individuals and abominations along the way... It is nearly impossible for the journey there to be smooth sailing.

C: 十王司判官请求你们将她护送至星槎渡口。横生的建木枝蔓，失控的魔阴身与孽物…想必这一路定然不可能一帆风顺。
E: The Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission requested you to escort her to the Starskiff Jetty, with overgrown Ambrosial Arbor Vines and uncontrolled mara-struck individuals and abominations along the way... It is nearly impossible for the journey there to be smooth sailing.

C: 虽然你们找到了莱恩老师的手稿，但是因为突如其来的袭击，这份手稿变成了「损坏的手稿」。\n但是这能怎么呢，至少还剩了几页好的，都交给铖杰师傅好了，多少也算是交差。
E: You managed to find Master Ryan's manuscript, but a sudden ambush damaged it.\nHowever, what else could you have done? At least there were several complete pages left. Hand them all to Chengjie, at least you would've completed the task.

C: 丹恒返乡兹事体大，甚至需要向罗浮六御以及持明族长老通告…既然丹恒安排好了渡船，就随他一起同行吧，自己一个人用界域定锚到丹鼎司不算数啊。\n丹恒没打算隐藏持明族的身份，这也许说明了他如今坦荡的态度。但，持明族会怎么看呢？
E: Dan Heng's homecoming seems to be a big ordeal, requiring notice to be delivered to the Luofu's Six Charioteers and the Vidyadhara elders... Seeing as Dan Heng already made travel arrangements, you should go with him. It won't do for you to just use a Space Anchor to teleport to the Alchemy Commission alone.\nDan Heng never intended to conceal his Vidyadhara heritage, and this might explain why he possesses such a magnanimous demeanor nowadays. Yet, the Vidyadhara's attitude towards his return remains to be seen...

C: 就如同你所担心的，小聪从未认真了解过静斋其人，甚至做不到投其所好。只好拜托你去打听一下。\n当然了，你发现了静斋的拒绝多少有些不太自然，也许仔细问问会有什么新线索。\n难道那位叫作孤屿的诗人，不令人在意吗？
E: As you feared, Cong never got to know Jingzhai serious and didn't even know what she really liked. You have no choice but to go ask around.\nOf course, you found Jingzhai's refusal to be a little suspicious. Maybe you'll find some new clues if you ask carefully.\nDoesn't that poet, Guyu, stir concern in anyone?

C: 这里似乎刚发生了一起「谋杀案」（幸好在匹诺康尼，人很难真的被「谋杀」），而「凶手」毫无疑问就是那位让人捉摸不透的花火。黑天鹅似乎并不打算将「凶手」的身份告知猎犬家系，而准备陪花火玩玩。你摸不透花火到底在想什么，也摸不透黑天鹅到底在想什么。
E: It seems that there was a "murder case" (fortunately, in Penacony, it is almost impossible for people to actually be "murdered"), and the murderer is without question the enigmatic Sparkle. It seems that Black Swan has no intention of telling the Bloodhound Family about the murderer's identity. She is instead planning on playing with Sparkle. You cannot grasp what either Sparkle or Black Swan is thinking.

C: 神策府中，景元邀请你们与怀炎将军一番恳谈，并剖陈曜青与朱明将军的来意。\n此刻你们意识到，在解决建木危机的同时，星穹列车已然进入了仙舟联盟的视野之中。令你们颇为意外的，则是怀炎将军那若有似无，推波助澜的态度。
E: In the Seat of Divine Foresight, Jing Yuan invited all of you to commune with General Huaiyan and scrutinize the reason of the Yaoqing and Zhuming generals' presences.\nAt this moment, you realized that, in the midst of quelling the Ambrosial Arbor crisis, the Astral Express had already caught the attention of the Xianzhou Alliance. What surprised you even more was General Huaiyan's attitude in pressing the issue subtly.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。\n深入幽囚狱中，你们渐渐察觉到个中之事的诡谲。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.\nDeep in The Shackling Prison, the abyssal treachery of the conspiracy gradually dawned upon you.

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定在擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。\n巨大的震动仿佛一个警告，危机悄然降临。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the tense atmosphere and anxiety from waiting are starting to make Yunli uneasy. She decides to conduct a thorough patrol of the Skysplitter before the tournament begins to ensure that nothing untoward is happening.\nA tremendous quake seems to herald the silent arrival of danger.

C: 怎么回事？钟表小子怎么又出现了？难道这段故事还另有隐情？\n皇帝陛下究竟遇到了什么麻烦？
E: What's going on? Why is Clockie here again? Is there more to this story than meets the eye?\nWhat troubles did Her Majesty exactly encounter?

C: 求生、财富、信仰、荣耀、所要守护的事物…一切战士都有拼死而战的理由，为战而生的眷属也不例外。这位敌人为何要对自己不可能战胜的城邦挑起争端呢？\n从这个本应疯狂的战士口中，你听到了两个未曾听闻的名字。这些事情的真相与你寻找金丝的目的并无干系，但探索未知也确实是无名客的工作——至少比一拳打死她有趣，你接这活儿总不会真的是为了战斗吧？
E: Survival, fortune, faith, honor, things they want to protect... Every warrior has a reason to fight to the death, and the Titankin that live for battle are no exception. Why would this enemy initiate a conflict against a city that they have no hope of defeating?\nYou hear two unfamiliar names from the mouth of this supposedly crazed warrior. Though finding the truth behind these names has nothing to do with your objective of finding the golden thread, it is also the duty of a Nameless to explore the unknown... At least it would be more interesting than finishing her off with a single blow. You didn't just take this job to get into fights after all, right?

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

C: 在纷争面前，浪漫似乎总是无力的，纤细的丝保护不了任何东西。那丝依然能在黑暗中隐隐发光，即便最终破碎消亡，也能让人赞赏它残余的美好——或许，那欣赏者并不存在，只是破碎的丝破碎前的想象，以此来掩盖那毫无浪漫可言的沦亡。\n「 美和丑起于做这些行动的方式，一切行动，专就其本身看，并没有美丑之分。做的方式美，所做的行动就美，做的方式丑，所做的行动就丑。」
E: Romance is seemingly powerless in the face of strife. Its brittle thread is unable to protect anything. This thread can still glow faintly in the darkness. Even if it is broken and withered, people can still appreciate its lingering beauty... Perhaps there isn't even anyone present to appreciate the beauty of an ending. This is all just the imagination of the thread itself as it breaks. Perhaps this is all just their attempt to cover up a loss that never had any romance to speak of in the first place.\n"Whether something is beautiful or ugly is decided in how an action is carried out. No action is beautiful or ugly in itself. If the methods of this action are beautiful, then the action itself is beautiful. If the methods of this action are ugly, then the action itself is ugly."

C: 你的灵魂是沉重的吗？还是轻盈的？
E: Is your soul heavy? Or is it light?

C: 这只呜呜伯好像已经吓得动弹不得了…过去确认一下它的状况吧？
E: This Wubbaboo seems petrified with fear... Go and check up on it.

C: 科员以斯帖正在为自己的形象而苦恼，你发现她想改变发色，但苦于找不到参考。带着你独特的审美，过去指导一下以斯帖吧！
E: Researcher Esther is having a rough day with her appearance. She wants to change her hair color, but she doesn't know what colors to change to. With your unique perspective on beauty, go and advise Esther!

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n在那之前，他希望你能去花店为他的女儿选一束花——至于要选什么种类的花，决定权在你。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nBefore that, he wants you to buy a bouquet for his daughter at the florist's — It's up to you to decide what kind of flower to buy.

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知艾格尼斯发布了委托，想要行使她的正当权益。帮帮艾格尼斯！
E: You see that Agnes has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise her rightful rights. Go help Agnes!

C: 不甘落败的棋鬼又准备了新的「寻径指津」谜题，是时候让它输得心服口服了。
E: Unwilling to accept defeat, the Chess Ghost has prepared a new Pathfinder puzzle. It's time to make it acknowledge defeat gracefully.

C: 不甘落败的棋鬼又准备了新的「寻径指津」谜题，是时候让它输得心服口服了。
E: Unwilling to accept defeat, the Chess Ghost has prepared a new Pathfinder puzzle. It's time to make it acknowledge defeat gracefully.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 火种匣里存放着掌账祭司的私藏古画。公器私用实在可恶。\n伊来内请求你打开下一个火种匣。「余火」会在其中吗？
E: The Coreflame Casket holds a collection of ancient paintings privately hoarded by the accounting priest. Such misuse of public resources is truly despicable.\nAlain asks you to open the next Coreflame Casket. Could the Embers be within?

C: 地衡司收到居民在丹鼎司洞天里发现近似「云吟术」的异象，并且在异象中遭遇了隐身怪物。\n广进根据异象的规律，在海滩上备好了饵食，希望借此找到引起异象的元凶……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission received reports that anomalies resembling cloudhymn magic have been spotted in the Alchemy Commission delve, and that invisible monsters were encountered within this phenomenon.\nBased on the patterns of anomalies, Guangjin has prepared bait on the beach in hopes of uncovering the true source behind the phenomenon.

C: 浮烟喜欢以「棋子」喻人、以「棋局」喻势…而你需要做的便是在棋坪之上击败它。
E: Cirrus likes to use analogies such as "pawns" and "chess" to describe people and situations... And what you need to do is to defeat it on the chessboard.

C: 清理区域内的所有污染。
E: Cleanse all contamination within the area.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 两个小贩仍不见踪影，为了不让再度来袭的黑潮造物占据此处，伤害躲在内室中的难民，你们不得不独力迎敌……
E: The two merchants are missing, and to stop the oncoming Black Tide Creatures from taking this place and hurting the refugees hiding inside the inner chambers, you have to face the threat yourselves...

C: 与「影像」有关的「设备」…雷金的灵感真的靠谱吗？
E: An "equipment" that's related to "images"... Is Regin's intuition trustworthy?

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 按道理来说，罗浮夜市不应该如此冷清。眼下似乎只有小吃摊旁边还算有些烟火气。\n你得到了白露想要的小吃，现在就拿去给她吧。
E: Theoretically, Luofu's night market shouldn't be so deserted. Only the food stalls have some semblance of life around them.\nYou got the snacks that Bailu wanted. Go bring it over to her.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 符玄似乎陷入一种思维死角中，她想向你证明「既有命中注定，那么一切便是徒劳」，你与捉鬼小队反将这样的邀请当作解开禁锢的钥匙。\n继续与符玄交谈吧，看看能不能唤醒她。
E: Fu Xuan seems trapped in a deadlock of thoughts, attempting to prove to you that "if everything is predestined, then everything is futile." You and your squad members decide to instead use this invitation as the key to unlocking her confinement.\nKeep talking with Fu Xuan and see if you can wake her up.

C: 藿藿在幻障中再次体验「被人抛下的孤独体验」，尽管她知道这是假的，却难以独自克服困境。\n想必是尾巴大爷的离开又进一步加深了藿藿的孤独感受。\n尾巴大爷必须做点什么，比如「将每个人都带回来」。
E: Within the illusion, Huohuo once more experienced "the loneliness of being abandoned." Despite knowing that it is merely an illusion, she struggles to overcome it on her own.\nSurely, Mr. Tail's departure has only intensified Huohuo's feelings of being alone.\nMr. Tail must do something, such as "bring everyone back."

C: 青雀散播着自己的发财梦，令太卜司的卜者们各个心猿意马，摩拳擦掌。但你，不，但藿藿和尾巴却从中嗅到了岁阳作怪的味道。你们摇动「同心火铃」，深入困住她的幻障。
E: Qingque is freely informing everyone of her dream to make it big, getting all the diviners in the Commission distracted and eager to have a go themselves. However, you — or rather, Huohuo and Tail — have detected a trace of a heliobus' tricks. Your team ring the "Harmonic Chime" and dive deep into the illusion trapping Qingque.

C: 造物们在你的帮助下迅速适应了禁闭舱段的环境，但也有个别造物格外嘈杂，不知它们发生了什么，过去看看吧。\n从某种意义上来说，它们是你培育出来的，你算不算是它们的家长？
E: With your support, the creations quickly adapt to the environment of the Seclusion Zone — but some creations are still super noisy. What's happened? Go find out.\nIn a sense, they were nurtured into existence by you. Does that make you... their parent?

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n学习过调饮的基本方法，现在该去接待顾客了。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nHaving learned the basics of mixing drinks, it's now time to serve the customers.

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n舒翁打算继续寻找被遗弃的「美梦剧团」，去梦境酒店深处看看吧。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nSiobhan decides to continue her search for the abandoned Sweet Dreams Troupe. Explore deeper into the hotel in the Dreamscape.

C: 为了找到《美梦大机密》的胶卷，你来到了匹诺康尼大剧院。\n《美梦往事》的结局就藏在这里，找找看吧。
E: You have arrived at the Penacony Grand Theater to find the Dreamjoy Secrecy film.\nThe ending of Dreamjoy Memoir is around here somewhere. Start searching!

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 你现在是卢卡选手的教练了！\n身为教练，必须好好熟悉比赛的规则。\n正好卡美丽似乎精于此道，向她请教一下吧。
E: You are now Contestant Luka's coach!\nAs the coach, you need to thoroughly familiarize yourself with the rules of the competition.\nLuckily, Carmella seems to be well-versed in this. Go ask her about it.

C: 完成「枘凿六合•Remake」简单模式I
E: Complete Hexanexus: Remake Easy Mode I

C: 完成「枘凿六合•Remake」困难模式II
E: Complete Hexanexus: Remake Hard Mode II

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n万事俱备，该前往此行的「战场」了！
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nAll is ready. It's time to head to the battlefield!

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到垃圾桶组合的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the trashcan group's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 三月七似乎有了新的灵感，和她聊聊今日的摄影课题吧。
E: March 7th seems to have a new inspiration. Discuss the Photography Task of the day with her.

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就这幅作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about this work

C: 达米亚诺斯总是擅长想歪点子，比方说飞上天外或者用透镜观察黎明机器的变化…这次他会盘算什么？
E: Damionis is always coming up with the wildest ideas, like flying beyond the sky or using a lens to observe changes in the Dawn Device... What will he come up with this time?

C: 「黑潮」事件顺利解决，却留下了更多谜团。\n继续比赛，赢得前往淘汰赛的入场券「银盏徽章」，或许就能让真相水落石出。
E: The black tide incident has been resolved, but more mysteries still remain.\nContinue the competition and win the Silver Chalice Badge, the ticket for the knockout stage. That might uncover the truth.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯即将代替山之民达利安与你对垒，让它瞧瞧老牌小海豹战队的底蕴。
E: Spirithief Bartholos will replace the Mountain Dweller Dorian against you. Show it the true strength of a veteran baby seal squad!

C: 重新回到了熟悉的场所，在迷路迷境的经历是一场梦，是睡前故事，还是真实的时光呢？你心里肯定有好多疑惑，去找昔涟问问看吧。
E: Back in familiar surroundings, was the experience in the Membrance Maze just a dream, a bedtime story, or a slice of reality? You must have so many questions swirling in your mind. Why not go ask Cyrene about it?

C: 舒翁口中的「特调配方」究竟有什么秘密？既为了解开疑问，也为了证明自己的实力，你决定按照配方调制这份「能让饮用者对任何事表示赞同」的调饮。
E: What secrets lie within Siobhan's "special recipe"? To unravel this mystery and prove your own abilities, you decide to mix this drink that "makes anyone who drinks it agree to anything" according to the recipe.

C: 你调制了名为「人格」的配方，黑塔人偶喝下后，展现出了令人意外的一面。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为黑塔再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You mixed a recipe called "Persona," and after the Herta puppet drank it, she showed an unexpected side.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Herta.

C: 开启了「货币战争」初级测试，是时候展现真正的技术了。
E: The beginner's test of Currency Wars has been initiated. Time to show what you're really made of.

E: Talk to the unfamiliar woman and find out about what's happening

E: (Optional) Ask people nearby for any clues to finding Tingyun

E: Check on the survivors

E: Speak with Robin

E: Find Boss Stone's treasure

E: Defeat the unknown creature

E: Follow the Firefly in the memory

E: Head to the Dreamjolt Hostelry

E: Sit down and begin talks

E: Investigate the first "Non-Existent Memory"

E: Offer the Golden Bough of Vows to the heart

E: Try to reach where Mem is and rescue Mem

E: Take a bath

E: Send condolences to the victims' families

E: Discuss your next steps with Aglaea and the others

E: Continue forward and join up with Hyacine

E: Use the Shrine of Prayers to Rewind the shattered platform

E: Investigate the strange "body"

E: Go forth, into the deeper abyss

E: Cast ripples and initiate the third gaze backward

E: A new sprout of Remembrance awakens in the Abyss

E: Repair the gap and take out the Legion abomination at the end of the path

E: Get into the Medical Cabin to save Sheila

E: Help the Wubbaboo to deal with the monsters

E: Take the elevator to the lower zone

C: 完成「封锁扇区•难度一」
E: Complete Sealed Sector: Difficulty 1

C: 与帕姆交谈
E: Talk to Pom-Pom

C: 前往磐岩镇支援希儿
E: Head to the Boulder Town and aid Seele

E: Follow Numby deeper into the Great Mines

E: Follow along the town's roads to find Topaz

E: Pass the senior mine cart operator's test

E: Find Sampo's lost mining tool

C: 寻找尤利安需要的宝贝
E: Find the treasure Julian needs

C: 将拍卖会的消息转告给虎克
E: Tell Hook about the auction

E: Find the treasure according to the puzzle in the book

E: Unlock the Gear Bridge

E: Continue searching for clues in the Snow Plains

E: Head to Qlipoth Fort and speak with Bronya

E: Go to Cloudford and catch up with Qingque

E: Find the "abnormality" in this memory

E: Read the anonymous letter on the Express

E: Seek to learn swordplay

E: Interact with the picture frame

E: Continue fulfilling your duties as the lobby manager

E: (Optional) Talk with Dan Heng

E: Talk to Wallace in the Overworld

E: Collect strange traces

E: Steel yourself and look for Manya once again

E: Speak with the player from the Zhuming

E: Pass the Trial of Equilibrium: Part Six.

E: Defeat the boss enemy

E: Look for the Trotters at the Trove of Verdure

E: Report to Emmrich

E: Talk with Garcia

E: Head to the Boulder Town clinic to find Natasha

E: Speak with Gepard again

E: Leave the fantasia

E: Leave Artistry Hardware and plan your next step

E: Provide your tea tasting feedback to Boss Du

E: Complete the Pathfinder challenge

E: Speak with the poster

E: Investigate the cause of the noise nearby

E: Adjust the path and drive the Spheroid to escape

E: Enter the hotel in the Dreamscape and investigate the mysterious painting.

E: Go to the hotel in the Dreamscape and speak with Starlet

C: 夜半探灵
E: Midnight Paranormal Hunt

C: <color=#f29e38ff>坚韧训练</color>的效率提高#1%
E: Increases <color=#f29e38ff>Tenacity Training</color> efficiency by #1%

C: 训练额外提高#1点力量与坚韧，进行<color=#f29e38ff>游历后失效</color>
E: Training additionally increases Strength and Tenacity by #1. This effect is <color=#f29e38ff>lost after performing an Excursion</color>

C: 前2次行动：<color=#f29e38ff>灵敏与感知训练</color>的心情消耗降低#1%，且效率提高#2%
E: For the first 2 actions: Reduces <color=#f29e38ff>Dexterity and Acuity Training's</color> Mood consumption by #1% and increases efficiency by #2%

C: 安排至少2次感知训练：本日所有行动额外提高#1点感知
E: Plan at least 2 sessions of Acuity Training: All actions today additionally increases Acuity by #1

C: 快乐工作法
E: Joyful Working

C: 全Boss速通
E: All-Bosses Speedrun

C: 中段
E: Progression

C: 独辟蹊径•高段
E: Singular Ingenuity: Culmination

C: 距离第二次试剑
E: Time to Second Sword Trial

C: 手眼身法
E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 通过「阿休」成功机械降灵，银狼得到稀有以太灵。
E: Obtained the Spiritus Ex Machina through A-Xiu, granting Silver Wolf a rare Aether Spirit.

C: 走…吧…
E: Let's... go...

C: 哈哈，你已经很有开拓者的样子了。没错，总不能对身处危机的人置之不理吧。
E: Haha, I see you're already a full-fledged Trailblazer. You're right, we can't remain indifferent to those in crisis.

C: 我就知道，在八卦这方面，没人比得上你！
E: I knew you'd be excited! Check out the master of gossip over here.

C: 这就是「星核」——某位星神把它散播到银河各处，制造混乱和灾祸。
E: This is Stellaron — spread throughout the cosmos by a wandering Aeon, sowing chaos and disaster.

C: 天才俱乐部#76螺丝咕姆。我认识他很久了，他是个真正的好人，一位绅士，拥有卓绝的机械头脑，和他的交流让我受益颇多……
E: Member <unbreak>76</unbreak> of the Genius Society, Screwllum. I have known him for a long time. He is a really good man, a gentleman with an exceptional mechanical mind. I have learned a lot from him.

C: 最好传说不实，我可不想当赞达尔猎手。
E: Well they better be false. I don't want to be a Zandar hunter.

C: 如果您正在遭遇：失眠多梦、夜半盗汗、脱发头痛、食欲全无或食欲激增——请尽快联系医疗舱室-心理健康科。
E: If you are experiencing: Insomnia, night sweats, hair loss and headaches, total loss of appetite or a surge in appetite, please contact the medical cabin's Mental Health Department as soon as possible.

C: 其他大部分科员只是受了轻伤，但我担心的是他们的精神状态。
E: The rest are fine, mostly minor injuries. But I'm worried about their mental states.

C: 军团拥有星神{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}纳努克{RUBY_E#}的赐福。它们有备而来，这里的人是守不住的。
E: Either way, the Legion has the blessing of the Aeon, {RUBY_B#The Destruction}Nanook{RUBY_E#}. They came prepared and everyone here is not.

C: …如果真是这样就好了。
E: ...I really hope that's true.

C: 有人却返璞归真，用这小鬼一具身体就搞定了——怎么做到的？
E: Yet someone was able to achieve that with this little twerp's body. How did they do it?

C: 你是空间站的主人？
E: You're the master of the space station?

C: 为什么邀请我上车？
E: Why invite me to join?

C: 那一件好像还被做了点改装。
E: That also got modified a bit.

C: 你对我的误解还挺深。算了，我知道是谁干的。
E: Seems like you have some deep misunderstandings about me. *sigh* Ah, well, I think I know who caused that.

C: 嗯，我做好了。
E: Okay, I'm ready for step three.

C: 帕姆生气的模样可是非常可怕的…对，非常可怕……
E: Pom-Pom is terrifying when they get angry... Yes, terrifying...

C: 把她封进六相冰里的人…不论是谁…要么是为了保护小三月，要么就是为了放逐她。我觉得，那块冰在宇宙中漂流的时间应该很久了。
E: Whoever sealed her inside the Six-Phased Ice... No matter who it is... did so either to protect or banish her. I believe she had been floating through space for some time.

C: 它模拟的是什么？
E: What exactly does it simulate?

C: 你说的酬劳应该是真金白银吧？
E: I thought you were talking about a financial reward?

C: 要是拿不到财产证明，我跟死了有什么区别喔！你们让开，让我进去……
E: If I can't get my proof of property, it doesn't matter how safe I am! Out of my way — let me pass...

C: 在家靠父母出门靠朋友，朗道！
E: A friend in need is a friend indeed. Let's find Landau!

C: 糟糕，被发现了！
E: Darn, he's spotted us!

C: 那你琢磨出什么了吗？
E: So what details have you been pondering?

C: 你知道「星核」在哪里吗？
E: Do you know where the Stellaron is?

C: 那边…哦，对了！你之前不是养死了好几盆花么？我清理屋子的时候把它们都堆到那边了，味道特别大！你不要过去！
E: It's, um... right! You remember how you neglected all those flowers to death? I piled them all over there during a bit of spring cleaning, and now they smell terrible! So... don't go over there!

C: 不过，我们除了发现了一道刻在盒子上的谜题外，就没有任何进展了。我是想直接拆开它，但茉莉一直不同意……
E: But we haven't made any progress other than finding a puzzle engraved on the box. I wanted to just take it apart, but Molly wouldn't let me...

C: 她居然也有没带够钱的时候…
E: Can't believe that she didn't bring enough money...

C: 不过这些内容都是粉丝们幻想出来的，有的甚至和原著基本上没关系了。他们好像定期会举办交流会，用来交流心得感悟。
E: But they are all created by fans, and some of them are completely unrelated to the original works. I think they have meetings on a regular basis to share their ideas.

C: 我们走吧，回铁卫禁区一趟，好好会会这群腐败到骨子里的家伙。
E: Now, let's go back to the Restricted Zone and give those filthy thugs a proper "greeting."

C: …此前在禁区发生的事，请允许我再次向各位致以歉意。你们并非用心险恶之人…我理应更加相信希露瓦的判断才对。
E: ...Please allow me to apologize again for what happened in the restricted zone. You were only trying to help... I should've trusted Serval's judgment.

C: 走吧，我们再去行政区溜达一圈！
E: Come on, let's go back to the Administrative District and hang out for a bit longer!

C: 不！当然不是这个意思——只是我们当下可调用的资源有限，必须重新规划。
E: Of course not! I'm just saying we have limited assets, and we need new parameters.

C: 天下没有不散的宴席。等回到列车上，你的伤感就该消失得差不多了。
E: Nothing lasts forever. You'll stop feeling sad the moment you set foot on the Express.

C: 唔…克拉拉觉得，事情应该不是这样的……
E: Um... I don't think that's how it works...

C: 问问列车长帕姆。
E: The conductor — Pom-Pom.

C: 不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}——我先失陪一会儿。等我回来以后，再把你那边的情况给我讲讲吧。
E: Sorry, {NICKNAME} — I need to get this over with. Let me know what they said when I get back.

C: 现在能聊聊这把吉他了吗？
E: Serval, can we hear more about this guitar now?

C: 你其实很舍不得她吧。
E: You're sad to see her go, aren't you?

C: 即使在白天，这条走廊依然灯火通明。
E: Even during the daytime, this corridor is still brightly lit.

C: 这只邮筒仿佛饱经沧桑，你隐约看见两片夹着红肠的面包被人当作信件塞进邮筒——要么，就是这只邮筒被当作垃圾箱塞入了垃圾。
E: This mailbox looks like it's seen better days. You think you saw someone post a sausage between two bits of bread here... Come to think of it, maybe they were using it as a trashcan.

C: 黑色的车窗向你投以回视，犹如IX从宇宙黑洞的深处投来的一瞥。
E: The dark car window gazes back at you, like IX from the depths of a black hole.

C: 总有人会来处理它——其实，你很确定，当你下次来到这个邮筒时，就不会再看见它了。
E: Someone will come and deal with it. In fact, you're certain you won't see that letter again the next time you come to this mailbox.

C: 这只垃圾桶呈现出某种从容不迫的优雅魅力，散发着不容置喙的超凡自信，这或许与它收藏的一封信件碎片有关。
E: There is a leisurely elegance to the trashcans, which exudes commanding confidence. It may have something to do with the letter fragment in its possession.

C: 湿垃圾！
E: Wet garbage!

C: 毫无疑问，这就是全世界最完美的垃圾桶。
E: There's no doubt about it, this is the world's most beautiful trashcan.

C: 在所有低情商的宣发文案里，这也可以算是翘楚了。
E: Considering all the other cliched advertising, this is pretty good.

C: 打开它。
E: Open it.

C: 桑博跟我说了。别担心，银鬃铁卫不会追到地下来的。地上和地下已经隔绝很多年了，地下最混乱的时候铁卫也没来过。
E: Sampo told me. Don't worry, the Silvermane Guards won't follow you below ground. We've been cut off from the surface for many years. Even when things were at their worst down here, they never showed.

C: 搏击讲究的是拳法、掌法、指法！缺一不可！必须三者都练到指随心动，随心所欲才行！
E: You have to use your fists, palms, and even your fingers in combat! If you don't know how, you're done for! You need to train until your body is an extension of the mind... and the mind is an extension of your will.

C: 由于没有其他选手愿意与机器小分队对抗，这场比赛只好由「冷面小青龙」独自出战，他本人也放出豪言壮语：「随便」！
E: Given that no other fighter was willing to take on the strength of Team Robomatic, Cold Dragon Young will face off against these opponents alone! On learning his fate, the brave young fighter had one thing to say: "Whatever!"

C: …这几个人是谁？
E: ...Who are they?

C: 就是全部说出来，不能隐瞒，也不能骗姐姐。
E: It just means you'll tell me all the details. No hiding anything, and no telling fibs.

C: 啊，漆黑的虎克大人，搏击俱乐部在哪，能帮忙带个路吗？
E: Uh, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, where is the Fight Club? Can you show us the way?

C: 这还不算出生入死吗？
E: How's that for thick and thin?

C: …如果不能保住地上的防线，地下就会因为失去物资支援而崩溃——大守护者是这么向我解释的。
E: ...If we couldn't hold our defensive line, then we wouldn't be able to maintain our supply of aid to the underground, which would have collapsed without us. That was the supreme guardian's explanation.

C: 走，再去镇上逛逛。
E: Let's go explore the town a bit more.

C: 你也睡不着吗？
E: No sleep for you either, huh?

C: 我原本在那管理一家孤儿院兼诊所，但侵蚀发生了，就不得不搬来这磐岩镇。毕竟得先保证自己能活下去，才有机会救治更多的人。
E: I used to manage an orphanage and clinic there, but after the Fragmentum corroded the area, I had no choice but to move here to Boulder Town. After all, I have to survive myself if I want to save more people.

C: 我们也来帮忙吧。
E: We'll help, too.

C: 感谢你，{NICKNAME}。要不是遇到你们两个，希儿就要一个人去裂界冒险了。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. If we hadn't run into you two, Seele would've had to venture into the Fragmentum on her own.

C: 真没想到，我竟然会在这里跟未来的「守护者」谈心。我从小就没见过几个上层区的人。只听大人们讲的故事，我还以为你们都是群傲慢又冷漠的家伙。
E: I never thought that I'd be here having a heart-to-heart with the future guardian. As a kid, I didn't meet many people who lived in the Overworld. I only heard stories from the grown-ups and figured you were all just a bunch of cold snobs.

C: 嗯。我准备好了…母亲。
E: Yes. I am ready... Mother.

C: 「地火」接下来会怎么样？
E: What's next for Wildfire?

C: 我赢了，说好的奖金…
E: I won, so the money...

C: 什么狗屁五冠王，「怪物盔甲」来了，其他人都得跪着求饶。
E: Yeah five-time champ my butt. He'll be kneeling to Monster Armor and begging for mercy.

C: （告诉娜塔莎关于科鲁泽的事）
E: (Tell Natasha about Kluzer)

C: 这分数具体怎么算，我们会负责搞定的，您只要专注于比赛本身就行。一旦您的排名发生变化，我们会立刻通知您。
E: As for the calculation of the points, we'll take care of that. All you need to do is focus on the fight itself. As soon as your ranking changes, we'll notify you.

C: 我要参加下一场比赛。
E: I want to be in the next match.

C: 我先去其他地方转转。
E: I'll go mill around elsewhere first.

C: 在隔绝年代里，下层区的居民对银鬃铁卫想必是颇有微词。假使我们突然打着大守护者的名义接管下层…过程中一定会遇到不少阻力。
E: People here must have felt abandoned by the Guards after the passage was sealed off. If we were to simply "take over" the Underworld in the name of the supreme guardian... I can only imagine how people would react.

C: …不错的回答。奥列格，你怎么看？
E: ...That's an answer I can accept. Oleg, what do you think?

C: 听上去情况很糟啊…你没受伤吧，希露瓦小姐？要不要帮你诊断一下？
E: Sounds like you went through a lot of danger... Are you hurt, Miss Serval? I can have a look if you like.

C: 对了，诊所里有一对姐弟，听说是被你们亲手搭救下来的。你们有空的话，不如去确认下他们的情况吧？
E: Oh, there was a girl and her brother who said you saved their lives. You might want to check on them and see how they're doing.

C: 你要努力成为姐姐的依靠。感觉无助的时候，你们至少还能对彼此敞开心扉。
E: Be there when she needs you, and listen to her when she feels vulnerable. She'll do the same for you.

C: 三月七、丹恒和我。
E: March 7th, Dan Heng and me.

C: 对了，既然{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}已经收集齐《冒险鼹鼠队》的书页，不如将他们交给出版社吧，这样贝洛伯格所有的小朋友都能看到了。
E: Oh, {M#mister}{F#miss}, since you've already collected all the pages for The Adventurous Moles, why don't we bundle them up and give them to a publisher? That way, all children in Belobog can read it.

C: 毕竟外面只有风雪嘛。
E: In the real world, there's only snow outside.

C: 哎，这也是儿童文学的魅力嘛。
E: But, hey, that's the charm of children's stories.

C: 你向垃圾箱长者行了个礼，而它回报给你的是深沉的尊严——足足有两个垃圾桶那么大。
E: You bow at Elder Dumpster, to which it responds with a deep dignity, it almost feels like it is the size of two dumpsters.

C: 涂改纸条。
E: Scribble the paper.

C: 「星核猎手」曾犯下多起大案，任何一名成员均有独自覆灭一颗星球的能力，其效忠的星神尚不明确，划定为极度危险份子。
E: The Stellaron Hunters have committed many significant crimes. Any one of their members has the power to destroy a planet, and it remains uncertain which Aeon the group is loyal to. They are classified as extremely dangerous terrorists.

C: 该协定将进一步推动开放双方各自市场，在农业、工业、医药、文化等多个领域深入合作，为缔造自由、开放、繁荣和共赢的商业市场奠定坚实基础。
E: The agreement will help to open up markets and promote cooperation between the two sides in agriculture, industry, medicine, and culture, laying a solid foundation for a free, open, and prosperous business environment.

C: 这一事件引发了各世界的广泛关注。日前，在家族、星际和平公司和无名客的共同努力下，星核隐患已得到妥善处理。
E: The incident has garnered widespread attention across various worlds. But thanks to the collaborative efforts of The Family, the IPC, and the Nameless, the Stellaron threat has been successfully handled.

C: 咦？恩公们到得挺早啊。久等啦，驭空大人在司辰宫内恭候各位。
E: Oh, you're here already? Sorry to keep you waiting. Madam Yukong is expecting you.

C: 区区星核而已，联盟早已知悉此物，自有办法应对。仙舟翾翔八千载，见惯了危急存亡。眼下的灾难虽来势汹汹，仙舟亦有余力自处，不需假借外人之力来平息祸端。
E: The Xianzhou Alliance knows what a Stellaron is and is more than capable of handling it ourselves. We have been around for over <unbreak>8000</unbreak> years and weathered countless dangers and crises. While the situation is serious, we have more than enough resources to spare. Outsider help is not needed on this occasion.

C: 对此，你们又作何解释？
E: What say you in your defense?

C: 长得不错。
E: He's pretty handsome.

C: 正是。
E: Precisely.

C: 别放在心上，三月。我觉得那位符玄姑娘挺通人情的，不会生你的气。
E: Don't take it to heart, March. Miss Fu Xuan seems like a reasonable lady — I'm sure she's not angry with you.

C: 恩公有所不知，仙舟的卜算之法可不是抛铜钱，抽木签之类的哄人玩意，而是名为「玉兆」的技术。
E: Oh no, Xianzhou divination is nothing like the superstitious scams you see elsewhere. It's based on a technology called the jade abacus.

C: 丹鼎司是指望不上了，得尽快找些能医会药的人手来……
E: There must be alternate medical practitioners somewhere — the Alchemy Commission can't help us right now...

C: 打牌也是一种定力修炼嘛，卜者可是很需要定力的。
E: *yawn* Celestial jade helps train my concentration. Diviners need to be able to focus.

C: 抱歉。在下自出生起就目不能视，是个「天缺者」。
E: Precisely. I've been without sight since the day I was born.

C: 我也没妈妈。
E: I don't have a mom either.

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: （沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 我听说好像哪里发现反物质军团的炸弹…安全起见，整座罗浮都要封锁，把炸弹清除了才能开放。不知道是不是真的。
E: I heard that they found an Antimatter Legion bomb, and the entire Luofu needs to be locked down for safety's sake. They'll only re-open after they've removed the bomb... I don't know if that's true.

C: 反正上面啥也没说，就让我过来疏散流云渡里的百姓啦。
E: Anyways, the higher-ups didn't say anything. They just got me to come evacuate the civilians in Cloudford.

C: 事关生命耶！你这人长得也算一表人才，怎么性格这么懒啊！
E: This is life and death, okay!? You look like you can handle yourself, how come you're so lazy?

C: 好吧，你快点哦。
E: Okay, but think fast.

C: 对，这妖雾是专为对付云骑军的杀手锏。
E: Indeed. This demonic vapor is a weapon targeted against the Cloud Knights.

C: 嗯，「药王秘传」必藏身丹鼎司，将军和本座心知肚明。只是捉不住把柄，没法问六司的罪，只好等你自己跳出来了。
E: Indeed. The general and I knew that the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus must be hiding in the Alchemy Commission. However, without evidence, we couldn't bring charges before the commissions. We had to wait for you to show yourselves...

C: 仙舟先民与帝弓同战，毁弃建木，设立「十王司」划定生死，正是为了重新以人类的姿态活下去。
E: Our Xianzhou ancestors fought side by side with the Arbiter, laid waste to the Arbor, and established the Ten-Lords Commission to lay down the lines between life and death... In doing so, we enshrined our future as human beings.

C: 我是「绝灭大君」幻胧。
E: I am Lord Ravager Phantylia.

C: …呃，什么意思。
E: ...Meaning?

C: 啊，那可不行。
E: Hmph, not on my watch.

C: 你的模样，有点眼熟啊……
E: You... you look so familiar...

C: 「药王秘传」在丹鼎司发动叛乱，目前正处于云骑军的节制下。各处都不太安全，请暂时留在这儿。
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus started a rebellion in the Alchemy Commission — the Cloud Knights have the area locked down. It's not safe, please remain here for now.

C: 怎么啦？
E: What's up?

C: 应星、饮月…你们逃得够久了，也该回幽囚狱啦。
E: Yingxing, Imbibitor Lunae... You've been running for too long. It's time to go back to The Shackling Prison!

C: 哈哈，我来迟了，这一路多亏符卿的撑持。神策府送来的战报我已收到，至于幻胧的计划么……
E: Haha, forgive my late arrival, Lady Fu — we are indebted to you and your forces. The Seat of Divine Foresight relayed the battle reports to me. As for Phantylia's plan...

C: 持明？哎？这些「珍珠」是持明？
E: Huh? The Vidyadhara? You mean these pearls will turn into people?

C: 幻胧…真是个可怕的敌人。若不是她想将「毁灭」的力量注入我身体，把我转变成虚卒。胜负恐怕还在未定之数。
E: *sigh* Phantylia... a truly fearsome enemy. If she hadn't attempted to turn me into a pawn of Destruction, I'm afraid victory would have been far from certain.

C: 停云小姐物品里的那柄菜刀，还有尚滋味…我总记得，在长乐天听过这个店招的名字呀？
E: The kitchen knife and Spices Supreme... I think I heard about that store before — over in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 岩明先生说了，接渡使返乡时会带礼物送给信赖的同僚…
E: Mister Yanming said an Amicassador will return with a gift for a trusted colleague...

C: 停云生平的物件，我已吩咐岩明在整理。我希望各位能从中选些物品，放上星槎。
E: I've instructed Yanming to sort through Tingyun's belongings. I hope you can pick some out to place around the starskiff.

C: 说起来，停云小姐最初被敝店吸引，也是因为这道「红油乱斩牛杂」。嘿嘿，鲜香辛辣，光是闻闻味道就能教人食指大动。就连她那样精致的妹子也抵不住这诱惑。
E: Speaking of which, it was our Chili Beef Offal Stew that first attracted Miss Tingyun to our restaurant, hehe. It's spicy, sumptuous, and guaranteed to get the mouth watering. Not even a girl as refined as Tingyun could resist the temptation.

C: 这把弓，是停云为我挑选的礼物？她明白我的痛苦，我却已不能再为她做什么了……
E: This bow... Did Tingyun pick it out for me? She understood my pain — it's a shame I can no longer do anything for her...

C: 我听说在狐人的礼俗里，纸鸢是用来宽慰那些无法再起飞的飞行士的灵魂。停云和我虽然不是真正的飞行士，但我们这辈子都在和星空打交道。
E: I heard that foxians have a tradition where paper kites are used to comfort the souls of pilots who can no longer take to the skies. Tingyun and I were never pilots in the strictest sense of the word... but we spent much of our lives out among the stars.

C: 这是燕翠小姐代表金人巷商户们所送的礼物，你一定会喜欢。
E: This is a gift from Miss Yancui on behalf of all the restaurants on Aurum Alley. You are going to love this.

C: 嗯，一言为定。
E: Mm-hmm, it's a deal.

C: 能看见你，多半意味着你们在仙舟上的事情已经忙得差不多了？
E: I'm guessing seeing you here probably means your affairs on the Xianzhou are mostly complete?

C: 听你的脚步声，我就知道你来啦。
E: I knew it was you by the sound of your footsteps.

C: 原来是你啊！想来就是你把我们哥儿几个出卖给了黉学的先生吧？
E: Ah, it's you! You're the one who betrayed us, right?

C: 丹枢托我给你们带个话。
E: Dan Shu asked me to bring you a message.

C: 看你们表现吧。
E: That depends on your end of the bargain.

C: 彼时，星穹列车也曾到访匹诺康尼——正如旅行有聚有散，根据列车记录，似乎有几位乘客选择了留在这里，将匹诺康尼选做自己的终点站。
E: During that time, the Astral Express once visited Penacony. As with all meetings, they inevitably lead to goodbyes. As the Express's logs indicate, it seems some passengers decided to call Penacony their permanent home.

C: 过去这么久，还能找到吗？
E: It's been so long. Will we still be able to find them?

C: 我尊重你的决定，好好休息。
E: I respect your decision. Rest well.

C: …所以，跟我来吧。我会带你回家。
E: ...So, come with me. I'll take you home.

C: 有何不可？
E: (Why not?)

C: （她能听见我在想什么？）
E: (She can hear the thoughts in my head?)

C: 你还没告诉我怎么离开…
E: You haven't told me how to leave this place...

C: 让您久等了，砂金先生。这边请，我们借一步说话。
E: I've kept you waiting, Mr. Aventurine. This way please, let us speak in private.

C: 不不，我只是把自己的房间让给了你。
E: No no, I only let you have my room.

C: 不管有什么理由，出去。
E: Well, it doesn't matter. You need to leave.

C: 嗯，很好。
E: Mm, very well.

C: 这还差不多。
E: That's better.

C: 有句话怎么说的来着？「祸不单行」……
E: How does the saying go? "Trouble comes in pairs"...

C: （总算结束了。按照梦境护照的指引操作入梦池吧……）
E: (Seems like it's over. Time to work the Dreampool according to the Dreamscape Pass' instructions...)

C: 请往这边来！
E: Please come this way!

C: 这就是精神分析，{M#先生}{F#女士}！
E: It's the magic of psychoanalysis, {F#madam}{M#sir}!

C: 触碰梦泡。
E: Touch the dream bubble.

C: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
E: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
