E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
E: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

C: 内容倒是挺神奇的…
E: It's quite fascinating...

C: …谢谢。如果没有您出手相助，我真的不知道该怎么办了。
E: ...Thanks. Without your kind help, I wouldn't know what to do.

C: 我还知道，你们经常在银河各地到处旅行——你是受家族邀请来的吧？我…我可以担任你的向导！
E: I also know that you guys often travel around different places in the cosmos. Did The Family invite you here? I—I'd be happy to show you around!

C: 接下来…我们走这边吧……
E: Now... let's go this way...

C: 哟，保镖大哥！我们又见面了。
E: Here we are again, pal!

C: 「小丑」？
E: Clown?

C: 你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: You can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

C: 亲爱的，你表现得真棒！看看这是什么——「片刻自由」——你拿到它了。
E: Look at that, you did great! This is the proverbial moment of freedom! You've earned it.

C: 梦境可不是自家的浴缸，而是变幻莫测的深海，如果要我说得更清楚点——别被诱人的荧光给骗了，如果你折在了那种家伙手里…我可是会非常非常失望的。
E: You're not at home anymore kid — you've wandered into the depths of the unknown. Let me put it to you straight — don't let yourself get enticed by that glowing light. I'm going to be very disappointed if you get bamboozled by the likes of them.

C: 我会始终保持警惕。
E: I'm going to be vigilant to the end.

C: 可惜，忘了请教她的名字…只知道她来自「流光忆庭」。
E: It's a shame that I forgot to ask her for her name. I only know that she's from the Garden of Recollection.

C: ——全宇宙有哪个不知道你们茨冈尼亚人？天生的骗子、小偷、交际花…口蜜腹剑，名副其实。
E: You Sigonians are notorious throughout the entire universe! Liars, thieves, social manipulators, wolves in sheep's clothing... You're really living up to the reputation.

C: 收起你那俏皮的舌头，小孔雀。请回吧，我们是愚者，不是傻瓜，不打算和公司的哈巴狗玩朋友游戏。
E: Cut it out and go home, you slick talker. We are Fools, but we aren't stupid. We aren't interested in playing the friend game with the lapdogs of the IPC.

C: 也许因为我们都在梦里吧。
E: Perhaps, it's because we're all in a dream.

C: 噢，天哪——他们看起来可真诚恳。既然这样，你是不是也能叫他们离开了？
E: Wow, they look really sincere. In that case, can you ask them to leave now?

C: 我看到个表盘，然后拨动了它。
E: I saw a dial and got it moving.

C: 这位小姐…也是你的熟人吗？
E: Is this lady... your friend too?

C: ——是这里。
E: ...This is.

C: 态度也太强硬了吧……
E: He won't budge...

C: 唔，看来我们是说服不了他了——我再想想办法吧……
E: Hmm, seems like he won't give in... Let me think of another way...

C: 不过，就算您不愿意与我共舞——也没关系！
E: It's totally fine if you want to turn me down!

C: 来啊，比划比划！
E: Come on! Let's fight!

C: 咖啡…当下好像也没有这个条件……
E: Coffee... We can't really make that here...

C: 三月会拉着我们一起自拍…
E: March would force us to take a selfie with her...

C: 你是…？
E: And you are...?

C: 我名为莎塔娜——想和您谈一个条件。
E: My name is Shatana, and I have a deal to offer you.

C: （看来她确实是这个意思……）
E: (I think that's what she means...)

C: 如此一来，您便能成为新王，率领我等向伪王发起抗争。去吧，深潜于梦中之人啊…使命在召唤着你。
E: Once you've accomplished that, you'll become our new king and lead our fight against the evil king. Off you go, dream diver... Your mission is calling for you.

C: 数万年的囚禁早就磨平了我的桶边，我已风光不再，只想以一个普通垃圾桶的身份度过余生。再见了，陌生的人。
E: Countless years of captivity have whittled flat my edges. My prime is long past, never to return. I only wish to pass the rest of my life as a normal trashcan. Farewell, stranger.

C: 众目睽睽之下，你将金垃圾据为己有。确实，这些小小的垃圾桶人…有哪个能像你一样高大、挺拔？
E: Under the watchful eyes of the three, you claim the golden trash as your own. Indeed, among these small trashcans, is there anyone who stands as tall and upright as you do?

C: 咳咳，能听到吗？星穹列车，好久不见——匹诺康尼好玩吗？
E: Ahem, can you hear me? Astral Express, it's been a while. How's Penacony?

C: 把这段代码输进你们的入梦池，就是那个用来做梦的装置，到隐藏地图去看看吧！位置坐标都给你们打包好了，喏，一键复制就行。
E: Enter this string of code into your Dreampool — the device you use to dream with — and dive into the hidden map for a look! The coordinates have been sent to you. You just have to copy them over.

C: …我来吧，放轻松——你会没事的。
E: ...Allow me. Relax, you'll be fine.

C: 也许是星核猎手的陷阱…
E: It could be a Stellaron Hunter's trap...

C: ——那只忆域迷因，它也在那里。
E: ...That Memory Zone meme, it is here as well.

C: 毫无疑问，残骸内部现在正有一团剧烈焚烧的火焰亟待破壳而出。为了你的生命安全，你最好离它远点。
E: Without a doubt, a fierce inferno rages within the remains, desperately longing to break free from its confines. For the sake of your safety, it is best to keep your distance.

C: 我们出发吧……
E: Let's get going...

C: …从那位「巡海游侠」的手中。
E: ...from that "Galaxy Ranger."

C: 毕竟我说过，你可以和同伴商量，也可以反过来利用我，我很欢迎！因为这也是在向我展示你们的价值。
E: I've said before, you can liaise with your companions, or even twist the narrative against me. I'll wholeheartedly embrace it! It signifies your potential.

C: （…不对，我没她的联系方式啊。问问黑天鹅吧……）
E: (...Hmm, I don't have her contact info, I'll ask Black Swan...)

C: 是「命运的奴隶」让你这么做？
E: Did Destiny's Slave make you do it?

C: 所以你建议先接受砂金的合作提议。
E: So you suggest accepting Aventurine's proposal to team up?

C: 那当爸爸被流沙卷走的时候，母神为什么没有保佑他…明明爸爸是为了准备给她的供品，才会去卡提卡人在的地方……
E: Then why did she not protect Dad when he was swept away by the quicksand...? After all, Dad went to the Katicans' land only to prepare for Gaiathra Triclops' offerings...

C: 哪有这么大的隐夜鸫？依我看，这应该是湮厄鹰。
E: How can Nightingales be so huge? They look more like Torment Eagles to me.

C: 很奇妙的装置。如果里面那个聒噪的小人消失，我对它的评价会更高。
E: Quite a fascinating contraption. I would rate it more favorably if that clamorous little person inside were gone.

C: 暂且不必。我现在更希望知道，属于他的那枚基石在哪。
E: Not at the moment. I'm more interested to know the location of his Cornerstone.

C: 好，好，我怎么感觉咱们这是在攻读入室盗窃学的学位呢？
E: Fine, fine. Why do I feel that we're pursuing a degree in burglary now?

C: 还有一枚碎片飞到楼上去了，得通过<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机</color>蹦到那里。但多半没这么容易。
E: One of the fragments flew upstairs. I'll need to use the <color=#dbc291ff>pinball machine</color> to flick myself up there, but it's tough.

C: 感觉一举一动都在被监视…
E: Feels like our every move is being watched...

C: 这个……
E: Well...

C: 时尚、奢侈与消费主义的梦境，薄暮的时刻，我的同伴也拜访了那里。
E: The Dreamscape of chic, luxury and consumerism — the Moment of Dusk — my companions have been there too.

C: 那群穿黑西装的没讲太多，所以我不知道你到底用了什么手段，才在当年那场大屠杀里保住了小命。
E: The guys in black didn't say much, so I've no idea what you did to save your skin in that massacre back in the day.

C: …我要和你赌。
E: ...I'll take my chances.

C: 偷渡犯？匹诺康尼怎么会有偷渡犯呢。从来没有这种事。
E: Stowaways? How could there be stowaways in Penacony? We've never had anything like that before.

C: 少喝点苏乐达吧，朋友，对身体有好处。
E: You really shouldn't drink so much SoulGlad, my friend. It's not good for your health.

C: 也许吧。匹诺康尼的经典饮品，酒吧里少了它确实有点怪怪的。
E: Yeah, perhaps. SoulGlad is a classic in Penacony, and it'd be strange for a bar not to have it.

C: 能想象场面有多激烈。
E: I can only imagine how intense that scene must have been.

C: 我看到了…我和舒翁共同登上舞台的时刻。
E: I've seen it... the moment when Siobhan and I share the stage.

C: 一座城市的文化就是历史最真实的注脚。在你眼中这是玩乐的地方，但在我眼中，它是一座监牢，用来监禁这颗星球的过往。
E: The culture of a city reflects its history in the most authentic way. To you, it's a fun place, but to me, it's a prison for the planet's past.

C: 监狱长期暴露在高浓度的忆质中，产生了一种特殊的现象。无数个体的梦境交错重叠，人们开始在梦中相会，过上恍如现实的生活。
E: The prolonged exposure to high concentrations of memoria caused a unique phenomenon. The dreams of countless prisoners intersected and overlapped, and people started meeting each other in their dreams, living lives that were almost identical to reality.

C: 这里的脚印与别处不同…共有两道。不久前可能有外来者从这里走过。
E: The footprints here are different from the rest... there are two sets of them. Looks like outsiders might have passed through here not long ago.

C: 「…据庇尔波因特热线消息，骇人听闻的『艾吉哈佐砂金案』获得重大突破，犯罪嫌疑人现已落网——」
E: "...According to a Pier Point hotline tip, there was a major breakthrough in the shocking Egyhazo Aventurine case. The suspect has been arrested..."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「托帕石」</color>？为什么会在这里……
E: A <color=#dbc291ff>topaz</color>? What is this doing here...

C: 怎么，她的基石就这么让你撕心裂肺？
E: What, does her cornerstone wrench at your heart so?

C: 而我们，将在下一次{RUBY_B#母神轮回之始}「卡卡瓦」{RUBY_E#}的极光下重逢……
E: As for us, we will reunite in {RUBY_B#Start of Gaiathra Reincarnation}Kakava{RUBY_E#}'s next aurora.

C: {NICKNAME}说得没错，无论如何，我们都不能对匹诺康尼的安危置之不理。
E: {NICKNAME} is right. No matter what, we cannot ignore the safety of Penacony.

C: 我会抵达{RUBY_B#第IX机关}「虚无」的尽头{RUBY_E#}。
E: I will reach {RUBY_B#Device IX}the Nihility's end{RUBY_E#}.

C: 如果你到最后都没有拔出那把刀…就是我满盘皆输了。
E: If at the end of the day you did not unsheathe your blade... I would have lost the bet.

C: 「黄泉」…名副其实。
E: Acheron... a befitting name.

C: 收下这份礼物吧，小宾客。这可是家族特意为你准备的礼物。
E: Here, take this, little guest. This gift has been specially prepared for you by The Family.

C: 是呀。美梦的工作结束后我就会回家。以前交通还算方便，但自从没办法自由通行后，就一直是眠眠带着人们在两座梦境之间往返。
E: Yep. After my work in the beautiful dream ends, I'll go back home. Commuting used to be more convenient, but ever since travel became cumbersome, Sleepie started ferrying people back and forth between the two Dreamscapes.

C: 怎么又是加拉赫…
E: Gallagher again...?

C: 哦，你也认识她？还是你也喜欢忆质动力学？
E: Oh, do you know her, too? Or are you also a fan of memoria dynamics?

C: 当然！她可是忆质动力学的杰出学者，是第一个将忆质速率测量法应用于星际旅行的人。
E: Why, Of course! She's an excellent scholar of memoria dynamics, and the first person to apply memoria rate measurement methodology on interstellar travelers.

C: 啊！杨叔，还有{NICKNAME}，等你们好久啦！
E: Ah! There you are! I've been waiting for you two!

C: 毕竟从黄泉小姐的例子来看，除非有令使以上的力量介入…否则很难想象在「同谐」的属地，会存在另一种能够影响所有人的意志。
E: Considering what happened with Acheron, it's difficult to conceive of another entity within the realm of the Harmony capable of influencing everyone, unless a power surpassing that of an Emanator is involved...

C: 如果这只小谐乐鸽到最后都学不会飞，该怎么办？
E: What if this little Charmony Dove never learns to fly in the end?

C: 我们追寻前辈无名客的脚步来到此地，没有理由不继续跟随他的足迹。
E: We have always been following in the footsteps of our Nameless predecessors, and there's no reason to stop now.

C: 非常感谢各位。
E: Thank you all very much.

C: 那你知道本球棒侠的其他称号么？
E: Ha, of course, my reputation precedes me. Believe in the Galactic Baseballer supremacy!

C: 不是的，加拉赫先生。我想，米哈伊尔一定会把最珍贵的事物留给我们。
E: Don't think that's the case, Gallagher. I'm sure Mikhail has left us the most precious thing of all.

C: 联系不上是什么意思？
E: What do you mean by "unable to reach" them?

C: 请您稍安勿躁。我们需要联系上二位的同伴才能确认你们的身份……
E: Please be patient. We need to contact your companions in order to confirm your identities...

C: 此地不宜久留，先返回列车吧。
E: We shouldn't linger here too long. Let's go back to the Express for now.

C: 一件物品确实能帮助忆者与你建立联系…但波提欧先生，希望你以后能提前告知我备用计划的存在。
E: A concrete object can indeed help the Memokeeper establish a connection with you... but Boothill, if you have more back-up plans in the future, I hope you'll let me know in advance.

C: 把一切归结于星神和命途，事情就没那么复杂了。就像岚永远走在「巡猎」的道路上，就像阿基维利虽然不知所踪，但列车依然行驶在开拓的路上，永不脱轨。
E: It's much simpler when you boil it down to the Aeons and Paths, like how Lan always follows the Path of The Hunt or how the Express stays true to the Trailblaze despite Akivili's disappearance.

C: 而其中有些人，他们存在的痕迹过于强烈，以致在这一簇簇浪花里留下了自己的倒影。
E: And for some, their presence leaves such a strong mark that it's reflected in the waves.

C: 你是在守望它们吗？
E: Are you watching over them?

C: 那个…你平时都是这样表达「失望」的吗……
E: Uh... Do you usually express disappointment this way...?

C: 你拍案而起，想让你知难而退？不可能！逐梦客可以被击倒，但不会被击败！
E: You slam the table and rise up. They think you'll back down? Impossible! Dreamchasers can be knocked down, but never knocked out.

C: 我成为大亨，她穷困潦倒。
E: I became a big shot, but she ended up destitute.

C: 奇人擂台战，等你来夺冠！欢迎来到动作明星的秀场！
E: The champion's crown awaits you on the stage! Welcome to the arena of Action Stars!

C: 哼…哼。
E: Hmph... Hmph.

C: 我们有急事…能请你让一下吗？
E: We've got an urgent matter to attend to... Can you please let us pass already?

C: 滴答！是不是有什么人在求救？
E: Tick-tock! Do I hear someone calling out for help?

C: <size=36>卡！！！</size>
E: <size=36>CUT!</size>

C: 一个白手起家的富豪，竟然用如此轻蔑的态度对待自己曾经的同伴，使我心中不由得感到愤怒！
E: A mogul who went from rags-to-riches treating a former companion with such disdain — it just makes my blood boil!

C: 烤全鸟！这可真是太糟糕了——我们赶紧救它出来吧！
E: A roasted bird! This is horrible — let's save it, quickly!

C: 接下来，我想请各位观看大屏幕，我们来时的路，就从这里开始。
E: Now, everyone, please look at the huge screen. The road we once took begins here.

C: 看来偷渡客在匹诺康尼真的很常见啊…但故事里的这家伙，我觉得一点都不值得同情。
E: It seems illegal stowaways are really quite common on Penacony... But that guy in the story, I don't think he deserves any sympathy at all.

C: 先说结果：他取得了巨大的成功。摆脱追捕后，他做了几年生意，很快跻身名流，平步青云。尽管不及老奥帝那样的大富翁，但也算是出类拔萃的风流人物。
E: First, the outcome: He attained major success. After avoiding capture, he ran a business for a few years, very quickly making a name for himself, elevating his status. He might not have become a tycoon like Old Oti, but he was considered a character of excellent repute.

C: 那么他实现最初的愿望了吗？没有。我最后一次见他是在现实中，猎犬们正要将他永久驱逐，而我则是随行的铎音。使命很简单——聆听罪犯的忏悔。
E: Now then, did he realize the wish he set out to achieve? No. The last time I saw him was in the real world, where the Hounds were going to permanently exile him, and I was the accompanying Bronze Melodia. The mission was simple: Listen to the criminal's repentance.

C: 听起来…好像无懈可击啊……
E: It sounds... like a flawless theory...

C: 各位的信念令人惊叹……
E: Your convictions, my friends, are indeed awe-inspiring...

C: 是啊，米哈伊尔在家的时候，我们就会站在喷泉边，在池子里放下「罗盘号」——我自己做的玩具船！
E: Yeah, while Grandpa was at home, we would stand by the fountain and place the "Compass" — a toy boat that I made — into the pool!

C: 呃…是、是的。
E: Um... yeah.

C: 因为他生来就想要「开拓」，不是吗？
E: Because he was born with a desire to "trailblaze," wasn't he?

C: 「我们应当再造一个囚笼，不在这世上，而在人心中。只要我们不使他们自由，便永远不会流离失所。」
E: "Let's build another prison, not within the physical world, but within their minds. As long as we keep them imprisoned, they will always have a sanctuary."

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕8系统时 流梦礁
E: 8 system hours until Charmony Festival - Dreamflux Reef

C: 星核在哪里？我怎么没看到？
E: Where is the Stellaron? Why am I not seeing it?

C: 确实，{M#兄弟}{F#姐妹}你误会了，我是从忆者那儿听来的。
E: Pardner, you got it all wrong. I heard it straight from the Memokeeper.

C: 先说结论吧：<color=#dbc291ff>在与星期日的对抗中，列车组的各位、乃至匹诺康尼的所有人都失败了，无人生还</color>。
E: Well, let's start with the conclusion — <color=#dbc291ff>The Crew was defeated in the battle against Sunday. Everyone in Penacony failed, and no one survived</color>.

C: 流萤与知更鸟的两起假死…
E: The fake deaths of Firefly and Robin...

C: 每一次，想象之中都有一团火从黑暗中升起。它温暖，明媚。我时常思考，那火焰或许就是智能的本质——一簇因高温激发的灵感。宇宙未来的方向或许就在其中。
E: Every time, within the realm of imagination, there emerges a fire from the shadows. It is warm, bright. I frequently ponder, this flame might represent the essence of intelligence — a cluster of inspiration ignited by high temperatures. The future direction of the universe may well lie within it.

C: 星期日
E: Sunday

C: 依照无名客的传统，他的乘员专票被归还星海。
E: In line with the Nameless' tradition, his Crew ticket was returned to the starry seas.

C: （这声音…是黑天鹅？）
E: (That voice... Is that Black Swan?)

C: 所以，究竟是为什么呢……
E: So, why is all this...?

C: 我依然记得，那是我旅途的起点，是我生命中红色的本源，是每一场风雨中最为激烈、热忱的事物……
E: I remember that marks the start of my journey, the origin of the vibrant red hue in my life, and the most fervent element amidst every tempest...

C: 即便那颗星星所在的地方…是一片永远孤独的黑夜？
E: Even if that star... must hang in a perpetual night of solitude?

C: 算了，卡芙卡托我带句话：「要是在匹诺康尼见到什么好东西，帮我也带一件，直接刷我的卡就好，密码你知道的。」
E: Anyway, Kafka asked me to pass on this message: "If you see anything fabulous in Penacony, get one for me too. Just swipe my card, you know the PIN."

C: 吃下「橡木蛋糕卷」后，账账似乎表现得不太舒服。
E: After eating the Oak Cake Rolls, Numby seems a bit uncomfortable.

C: 长梦总有醒来的时候，我们在匹诺康尼的冒险也临近尾声了。
E: Even long dreams eventually come to an end. Our adventure in Penacony is reaching its conclusion.

C: 有，对方答应了。不过人要再过一阵才能到场。
E: Ah, they agreed, but it'll take some time before they arrive.

C: 但你却很信任他，对我们而言如生命般宝贵的「基石」，你竟然愿意托付给他，去完成一场赌局。
E: But despite that, you trust him. You even entrusted him with a Cornerstone, something as precious as life itself, to finish this gamble.

C: 就像晖长石号一度停航，却又再度启航。我相信美梦会迎来它的新生。
E: I believe the sweet dream will see its rebirth, just like the Radiant Feldspar resumed its voyage.

C: 而后，公司会将其中5%的股权转赠给星穹列车，并推举姬子女士为独立董事，此举是为表彰历史上的无名客为梦想之地做出的牺牲和贡献。
E: Then, the IPC will transfer 5% of that stake to the Astral Express and recommend Miss Himeko as an independent director to honor the sacrifices and contributions made by the former Nameless to the Land of the Dreams.

C: 你愿意…愿意和我交往吗？
E: Will... will you go out with me?

C: 以前我没答应你，是因为我觉得你根本不知道我喜欢什么。但是这份礼物让我明白了…你其实一直在默默观察，尝试着去了解和我有关的一切…所以，我愿意。
E: I never said "yes" before because I thought you had no idea what I liked. But this gift made me realize you were actually paying attention all along, trying to learn everything about me... So, yes, I will.

C: 二十二年啊…我追了他整整二十二年，跑遍了银河的每个角落。没想到最后会在这里，用这种方式……
E: Twenty-two years... Twenty-two years of chasing this guy all over the Cosmos. Y'know, never thought it'd end up like this, right here...

C: 先前来这么一下子，我们巡海游侠也算是再度出山了。你今后在路上估计能遇到不少「巡猎」的同志，拜托你替我问声好。
E: Makin' an entrance like that, us Galaxy Rangers are makin' a comeback. Reckon you'll meet quite a few followers of The Hunt on your journey, do me a favor and pass on my regards will you?

C: 真的吗？看来…卡芙卡教给我的没错。
E: Really? Then it seems... what Kafka taught me was correct.

C: 心急可吃不了热的苹果派，{M#先生}{F#女士}！
E: Keep your shirt on! A watched pot never boils, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}!

C: 「警长」娃娃长叹一声，以其精湛的演技咽了气。很可惜，虚数中子弹根本不在这里，还是去别处再找找吧。
E: The "Sheriff" doll lets out a long sigh and, with its exquisite acting, feigns death. Unfortunately, the imaginary neutron bomb isn't here, it's best to look elsewhere.

C: 我是来拆除你的。
E: I'm here to defuse you.

C: 什么…你看不出来吗？我是「折纸」娃娃啾！
E: What... You can't tell? I'm the Origami Doll, tweet!

C: 你是指「钟表匠」的贵宾们吗？可惜…以我的经验，在场的人里应该没人能改变现状。
E: You mean the Watchmaker's guests? That's a pity... Based on my experience, I don't think any of them can turn the tide on this situation.

C: 抱歉，米凯先生，事到如今才来和你们道别。
E: Apologies, Mr. Micah, that we are only now bidding you farewell.

C: 那美丽的事物从前如此，现在亦然，而我同样相信……
E: All those things, beautiful before, are still so now. And I believe...

C: 和一般的载具不同，星穹列车会将一次次的「开拓」转化成维持运行的能源。理想状态下，只要开拓之旅不曾间断，列车便能获得源源不断的动力，如永动机一般持续前行。
E: Different from typical vehicles, the Astral Express converts every "Trailblaze" into the energy it needs to run. Ideally, as long as trailblazing expeditions continue without interruption, the Express will receive a constant flow of energy, much like a perpetual motion machine.

C: 「不朽」的后人吗…还真是一条有魅力的小龙呢，尤其是你那段浑浊不清的记忆。
E: Ah, the Permanence's descendant... What a charming little dragon, especially with those mired memories of yours.

C: 既然这位「帕姆」三天前就已入住，我们多半能在梦里找到他。到时再详细询问吧。
E: Since "Pom-Pom" checked in three days ago, we can probably find him in the dream. We'll ask him more about it then.

C: 好、好痛！
E: O—Ouch!

C: 诸般邪祟，速速退下。不然在下就要让汝等领教缭乱•忍法的厉害了。
E: Be gone, fiendlings! Or I shall give you a taste of my Dazzling Ninjutsu!

C: 很久很久以前，在某个遥远的世界，有一座繁华的城邦。此城世代由一位忍侠把持大权，世人称其为「忍之都」。
E: A long, long time ago in a world far away, there was a city that flourished under the rule of a Ninja Hero for many generations. It was known as the Ninja Capital.

C: 你向大家讲述了方才的怪梦……
E: You tell everyone about the strange dream you just had...

C: 别急，这不是真正的考试。
E: Calm down. It's not a real exam.

C: 得了吧，老同学。
E: Alright, you old fogy.

C: （主角？戏剧性？这芮克先生说话还真是奇怪……）
E: (Leading character? Drama? This Mr. Reca says some strange things...)

C: 是啊，缭乱忍侠。这是此地的奉行武士…不，是我等罪孽召来的厉鬼。
E: You're right, Dazzling Ninja. They are the warriors of this land... No, they're the evil spirits drawn to our sins.

C: 社员证带来了
E: I brought my membership card.

C: 哦？倒是货真价实的社员证。能人<unbreak>124</unbreak>……
E: Oh? And a genuine article, no less. Let's see, Denisovan <unbreak>124</unbreak>...

C: 现在知道好好说话了？睡蕉社的？证件拿出来看看。
E: Hah, I see you finally learned some manners. Now show me your Slumbernana Association ID.

C: 好吧，至少没有「一个更坏的消息」……
E: Oh well, at least you didn't say "worse news"...

C: 嚯，怎么搞定的？你把她的助蕉解决了？
E: Jeepers! How'd you get through to her? Mashed her Assistanana to pulp?

C: 啥？派对？
E: What? A party?

C: 带我一个。
E: Let me join in too.

C: 在助蕉面前，猎犬们拥有如此压倒性的力量吗——眼前的景象令人忍不住产生怀疑。
E: Do Bloodhounds possess such overwhelming power in the presence of the Assistanana? This scene raises doubts.

C: 筑梦蕉师抬起喷罐，彩色的墨点喷溅而出。彩墨如同拥有了生命，在墙壁上流淌、翻涌、交融，组合出变幻莫测的图像……
E: The Dreamweaver BananAdvisor raises the spray can, and colorful ink droplets splatter out. The colored ink seems to come to life, flowing, surging, and blending on the wall, creating ever-changing images...

C: 保持平和的心态，想好要创造的事物，让情绪与材料共鸣，便能让想象化作梦中的现实，这就是「筑梦」蕉！
E: Calm your mind, visualize what you want to create, channel your emotions to resonate with the materials, and there you have it! Your imagination will come to life in the dream. That's dreamweaving, bana!

C: 这是、是你曾经帮助的那位神秘的桶——是莎塔娜！她压制住了小猴！
E: This is... the Mysterious Trashcan you once helped— it's Shatana! She has subdued the little monkey!

C: 万事俱备！展现你的才华，在墙壁化作的画卷上释放自我吧——
E: Everything is ready! Show your talent and unleash yourself on the canvas of the wall—

C: 你、你们这些有钱人真是无理取闹！要真是什么高级玩意，我能卖这个白菜价吗！
E: You rich folks are just being unreasonable! If it were really some high-end stuff, would I be selling it at such a low price?

C: 当然了，富贵，你难道不能理解当小猴的幸福吗？
E: Why, of course, Richie. Can't you see how happy it is being a monkey?

C: 重点不是这个吧。
E: That's not the point.

C: 但口说无凭，让在下确认一番——百货•忍徒，这可是阁下的意思？
E: Your words alone will not suffice. Ninja Initiate Merchant, is this truly your intention?

C: 看来他回答不了啊。那么——百货•村长，这可是阁下的意思？
E: He does not seem capable of a response. Merchant Chief, is this a willing decision of yours?

C: 智械变回机器、扎兹卡变回飞鸟，而最常见的人类文明，无一例外落入了同一种惨状：数以亿计的猿猴，在曾经名为「家园」的废墟上游荡。
E: Intellitrons deteriorated into mere machines, Zatzkas regressed into birds, and even the most ubiquitous human civilizations were subjected to the same fate: Millions of apes and monkeys now wander amidst the ruins that they once called home.

C: …蕉蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉蕉。「蕉蕉蕉蕉」，蕉蕉。
E: ..."Bana bana," bana.

C: 说出挑衅的话
E: Taunt Brave Monkey.

C: 蕉…你们这群差生，既然执意要破坏课堂，那就必须进行*蕉正*了——助蕉们，跟我上！
E: Bana grr... If you unruly students insist on disrupting my class, you're in for some corrective bananishment! Teach them a lesson, Assistananas!

C: 不能怪我了吧？
E: No pinning the blame on me this time!

C: （怎么感觉今天一直在追猴子……）
E: (Why does it feel like I've been on a wild monkey chase all day...)

C: 蕉蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bananana! Bananana!

C: 这个人似乎不准备给出任何回应。
E: It seems this person isn't planning to respond.

C: 蕉…蕉蕉……
E: Bana... Bana bana...

C: 而最后的忍者，缭乱•忍者AKA乱破，在苦茶大师门下历经十年苦修，百般忍法无所不通，万字真言倒背如流。
E: The only remaining ninja, Dazzling Ninja AKA Rappa, has trained an entire decade under the tutelage of Master Kucha to be adept in a wide variety of ninjutsu, gaining also the ability to recite lengthy mantras fluently.

C: 晦暗的密药，蕴含过量忍•力，咽下则将承受碎骨断肠之苦。
E: Secret concoctions of concealed evil. It contains an excessive amount of ninja strength. Swallowing it means enduring bone-shattering pain.

C: 在下懂了，这一定是苦茶大师的试炼，想考验我的忍•断舍离之心……
E: I understand. This must be Master Kucha's trial for me. He's testing my ninja skills of letting go...

C: 告诉我，她到底失败在哪里？
E: Tell me. In what sense of the word is she considered a failure?

C: 贯彻「忍道」者，即为忍侠。在下……
E: Whoever follows the way of the ninja is a ninja. I...

C: 另一边，为高潮准备的前奏曲也已就绪了——
E: The prelude prepared for the climax is all ready elsewhere...

C: {NICKNAME}，丹恒！还有…乱破小姐？
E: {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng! And... Miss Rappa?

C: （芭蕉花酱…不，嘉宝娜也得到了大家的认可……）
E: (Nanabloom-chan... or I should say, Gabbana has gained some recognition...)

C: 跟紧了…否则我们的朋友会有意见的。
E: Don't fall behind now... unless you want to upset our friends here.

C: 我们…在这里稍微多转转吧。
E: Let's explore the room a bit.

C: 这本来是亲圣女派以防不测，为我和母亲准备的暗道……
E: It was a secret passage prepared by the Holy Maiden's supporters for Mother and me as a precaution...

C: 推不动…也翻不过去……
E: I can't move it... Can't climb over it either...

C: 你们要放弃白厄了？
E: Are you going to leave Phainon to die?

C: 再等一下。
E: Give me a minute.

C: {RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}…王啊……
E: {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}... My king...

C: 这一切，你心知肚明。滚出去，我们的土地，可恨的{RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子！
E: All of this, you know very well. Leave our city, cursed son of {RUBY_B#Kremnos Founder}Gorgo{RUBY_E#}!

C: 蝶宝？
E: Cassie?

C: 病患就在眼前…我必须忠于医者的本职。
E: As a healer, I cannot ignore those in need of medical attention.

C: 树庭？难道说……
E: The Grove? You mean...

C: 相信我，阁下。她对两位的态度远远好过那刻夏。
E: Believe me, she is far nicer to the two of you than she is to Anaxa.

C: 只有小部分学者与我一起留守，捍卫树庭。如果不出意外，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种应在不久后同时抵达奥赫玛……
E: Only a small fraction of the scholars stayed behind with me to defend the Grove. If all goes well, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame will reach Okhema before long...

C: 什么意思，你是要缠上我们，把我们永远关在这里嘛？
E: What's that supposed to mean!? Are you planning to keep us here forever?

C: 因为我不相信{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}竟会以人形行走在大地上，也担忧泰坦已遭黑潮挟制，恐将置我们于死地……
E: Because I did not believe that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} would walk this world in a human form. I was also afraid that the Titans were under the control of the black tide and would do us harm...

C: 呵…甚好。吾等竟能于死境中取得如此生机，命运还真是深奥难解哪。
E: Heh... Excellent. To think we were able to gain a new chance at life in the midst of death — fate truly is a mysterious thing.

C: 呵呵…虽然不得「纷争」权柄，可吾毕竟也贵为神灵哪？
E: Heh... Even if I do not have the authority of Strife, I'm still a god.

C: 它已经发现我们了…我们尽量为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}争取时间。
E: He has already discovered us... Let's do our best to buy time for {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你们几个，可曾去过悬锋城？
E: Have you ever been to Castrum Kremnos?

C: 元老院的眼线，不用管么？
E: What about the Council's informants?

C: 住手！
E: Stop!

C: {M#他们}{F#她们}会保护好缇安的。
E: ...They will keep Trianne safe.

C: 二位！你们也在，那我就放心了。
E: Oh, you two are here as well! That's a relief.

C: 凶手…是…迈德漠斯……
E: The culprit... is... Mydeimos...

C: 这二人，表面上是圣城最强大的战士，但终究掩盖不了少年心性……
E: On the surface, these two are the mightiest warriors in the holy city, but they're still impulsive youths at heart...

C: 仪式还未重启。免得你忘记——距离我将你揪出试炼才没过多久。
E: The ritual hasn't reopened yet. In case you forgot — It hasn't been THAT long since I pulled you out of the trial.

C: 让我先试试…水温刚好呢！
E: Let me check... The water temperature feels just perfect!

C: 走吧，带我去见阿格莱雅。
E: Let's go. Take me to see Aglaea.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，这趟树庭之行…实在发生了太多意料外的事情，我们本无意将你卷入危险，遑论直面黑潮……
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, so many unexpected things happened on our journey to the Grove... We truly had no intention of putting you in danger, let alone face the black tide head on...

C: 活着回来了，黑潮也不过如此。
E: We made it back alive. So much for the black tide.

C: 洗耳恭听吧！我是悬锋孤军之首，{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}——
E: Listen closely! I am the leader of the Kremnoan Detachment — {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}!

C: （缇安，连*我们*自己的交流也感应不到了吗……）
E: (Trianne can't even hear our own telecommunication?)

C: 「离别和死亡，本就并蒂双生……」
E: "Separation and death are two sides of the same coin..."

C: 真的？我能做到吗…
E: Really? Are you sure I can do it?

C: 原来如此。白厄，你方才提到的「战场」……
E: I see. Phainon, that "battlefield" you mentioned...

C: 看来你和哈托努斯聊过了啊。这个名字，是那位传说中的山之民吧？
E: Sounds like you've spoken with Chartonus. That's the name of the legendary Mountain Dweller, right?

C: 她没有那么容易妥协。你开出了什么条件？
E: She's not one to easily make a concession. What did you offer her?

C: 尽管说吧，万敌阁下。我一定逐字逐句帮你传达。
E: I'm all ears, Lord Mydei. I'll make sure to convey every single word.

C: 多花些时间，最后一次看清他们的脸孔…未尝不可。
E: Perhaps it wouldn't be a bad idea... to take a moment and etch their faces in my memory one last time.

C: 问吧，别留遗憾。
E: Go ahead. You better not leave any regrets behind.

C: 是，母亲。
E: Yes, Mother.

C: 荣耀伴您左右。
E: May glory be with you.

C: 上吧，搭档——今日，命运会站在我们这边！
E: Let's go, partner! Today, destiny shall stand with us!

C: 我们回来了，阿雅。
E: We're back, Agy.

C: 就等你这句话呢，伙伴。
E: I've been waiting for someone to say that, friend.

C: 我是认真的哦！你对翁法罗斯具有特别的意义，这点大家都心知肚明。而{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
E: I'm serious! You're special to Amphoreus, and we all know that. Now, about {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

C: 她刚才提到了「至亲」……
E: The "family" she just mentioned...

C: 哪里的话，我这不是在夸他嘛。
E: That's not talking smack. It's clearly a compliment.

C: 可即便如此…我还是难以想象。
E: Even so, I still find it hard to imagine.

C: 圣女大人，你怎么穿得这么薄就出来了？今天天冷，我去取条毯子来……
E: Lady Maiden, you need to dress warmer! It's pretty cold out. Let me get you a blanket...

C: 乖，时候不早啦，快回家去吧。
E: It's getting late! Be good and go home now, okay?

C: 那也是缇里西庇俄丝出生的地方。
E: It's also the place where Tribios was born.

C: 你在打什么主意……
E: What are you scheming?

C: 唔…两位，介意吾稍微打个岔么？
E: Eh... Do you two mind if I cut in?

C: 不必担心！请永远记住：在匹诺康尼的美梦中不存在死亡！您所见证的一切暴力，都是安全无害的梦境秀！唯独「愿望成真」是真实不虚的奖赏！
E: Fear not! Mark my words: in the sweet dream of Penacony, there is no such thing as death! Any violence you witness is nothing more than harmless spectacle. The only thing real... is the prize of having your wish come true!

C: 作为御主，善用召来的历史英灵…「从者」，发挥他们名为「宝具」的特殊能力才是幸存的关键。我说的没错吧…芮克先生？
E: As a Master, survival hinges on using your summoned Heroic Spirits, your Servants, wisely, and utilizing their Noble Phantasms. Isn't that correct, Mr. Reca?

C: 「不协和音」…可是，那是你自己的名字。
E: Dissonance... But that's your name.

C: 放松一点，我们真的是朋友。
E: Relax, we're friends.

C: 男人满脸无奈地看着你，努力把嘴边的吐槽憋了回去。
E: The man looks at you with exasperation written all over his face, visibly biting back a snarky remark.

C: 如果你想说「我们是不是在哪儿见过」，那我可以回答你，「没有」。
E: If you're going to ask me "Have we met before," my answer is gonna be "no."

C: 杨叔现在怎么样？
E: How's Mr. Yang?

C: 我想留下来。
E: I want to stay.

C: 从不。
E: I'll never regret.

C: 到研究室去！到餐厅去！去钓鱼，去看电影吧！
E: Let's go to the lab! Hit the cafeteria! Let's go fishing together! Let's go watch a movie!

C: 这也太庸俗了吧！
E: What a crude wish!

C: 有些遗憾啊，哥们儿…如果还有机会见面，我一定请你去银河里最好的酒吧来两杯。
E: Such a shame, brother... If we ever cross paths again, I'll take you to the finest honky-tonk in the cosmos for a drink.

C: 哎，你们这些乘客，简直都一个样——米哈伊尔乘客，你又在发呆了，你在想什么？
E: You passengers are all the same — Mikhail, you're spacing out again. What's going through that head of yours?

C: 艾普瑟隆的影视巨星、橡木家系的话事人，知更鸟女士领衔主演！
E: Starring the superstar of Epsilon and the head of the Oak Family, the Lead Actor is... Miss Robin!

C: 我就知道是你小子。
E: I knew it was you.

C: 你是贴我身上的狗皮膏药吗？
E: What are you? A piece of gum stuck to my shoe?

C: {NICKNAME}，虽然过去我曾和列车诸位交过手，但这都是各为其志——这一回，我对圣杯并没有什么兴趣。我的上司对老奥帝先生打算做什么更好奇。
E: {NICKNAME}, I know I've butted heads with the Express Crew before, but that was just a difference in perspective. As for this time, I've got no interest in the Holy Grail. My boss is more concerned about what Old Oti has up his sleeve.

C: 斯科特们你一言我一语，相互推卸着责任，好不热闹。
E: The Skotts start bickering and tossing blame around. What a scene.

C: 葛瑞迪！你还想造反不成？别忘了，我可是你的御主，只要我动用令咒，你就得——呱？呱呱呱呱呱？
E: Grady! Are you trying to betray me? Don't forget, I am your Master. With my Command Spell, you'll have to — ribbit? Ribbit, ribbit? Ribbit? Ribbit!

C: 是被它操控做一辈子的丑角，还是为了尊严做一瞬的骑士？现在回头还来得及。
E: So what'll it be? Spend your life as a dancing puppet for him, or live one moment as a knight? It's not too late to turn back now.

C: 滴答，你什么时候产生了我在装死的错觉？我的<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>早就已经启动了。
E: Tick-tock, what gave you the impression I was faking? My <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color> has been ticking away this whole time.

C: 你见过被战车碾压的尸骸吗？Trace on！
E: Ever seen bodies mangled under war chariots? Trace on!

C: 我说过，除你以外我别无选择。
E: We've been through this. You're the only one I can turn to now.

C: 你打算怎么做？
E: What's the plan?

C: …我们不必为此调整行程，但务必要多加留心。
E: ...We needn't change our plans because of him, but be sure to keep your guard up.

C: 小女子不明白，这位恩人似乎是想救我，可为何又要告知这些？
E: I don't understand. You appear to be trying to save me, benefactor, but why are you telling me all this?

C: 交给你们，我放心。而且姬子也在，任何拿不准的她来定夺就好。
E: I trust that you can handle it. Besides, Himeko will be there. She'll be able to handle any decisions should you run into any difficulties.

C: 那便依您的主意。
E: Let's go with your suggestion.

C: 哎呀，小女子就当这是夸赞吧，下回您不妨说是「八面玲珑」。
E: I'll just assume that's a compliment! Maybe next time, you could just say "silver-tongued."

C: 那么，事情总算办妥了。算算时间，也该回去了？
E: Well, it looks like everything's finally in order. I suppose it's time to head back?

C: 「瓦尔特」这个名字，在我的故乡代表「世界」。它喻示每个人都自成天地，其可能性和远方的群星无异。与人们产生的联结，才是我在旅途中最宝贵的收获。
E: In my homeland, the name "Welt" means "world." It suggests that each person is a world unto themselves, and that we harbor as many possibilities as the distant stars. The connections I gain on my journey are what is most precious to me.

C: 按照您的意愿就好。也许，他正在我心间冷嘲热讽吧。
E: Whichever you prefer. He's probably mocking me from inside right now.

C: 星期日先生希望能与列车同行。显然，我不该自行决定此事。
E: Mr. Sunday wants to join us on the Express. Of course, I can't make that decision alone.

C: 同一时间，晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号
E: Meanwhile, The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand

C: 你尝试投入了一些东西，但它完全没有任何反应——小垃圾桶真有个性，成功引起了你的注意力。
E: You attempt to insert some things, but no reaction is observed — This little trashcan has quite the personality, successfully grabbing your attention.

C: 我需要一枚能钉破玻璃的尖钉，也就是各位。只有「开拓」能深入翁法罗斯，穿过层层迷雾，令世界的「记忆」重现天日。
E: I need a sharp nail to break through that glass, and that's where you come in. Only through trailblazing can we reach the heart of Amphoreus, cut through the thick mist, and bring the world's "memories" back to light.

C: （该收拾些什么好呢？）
E: (What should I pack?)

C: 别——头发都没梳呢。省着点电吧……
E: No—! Not when my hair's messy. And don't drain the camera's battery now...

C: 但这项工作可不简单，且不说前置准备有多麻烦，机器头的一瞥…稍有不慎就可能毁掉整个空间站。
E: Alas, our work is never this simple. Putting aside all that onerous legwork, a single glance from Droidhead... could vaporize the entire space station if we're ill-prepared.

C: 您的观察真是细致入微，黑塔女士。需要我们帮忙吗？
E: You've got quite the sharp eye, Madam Herta. Would you like us to help?

C: 我得继续前进…几步，只差几步我就能见到机器头了！
E: I must continue forward... Just a few more steps and I'll be able to see Droidhead!

C: 出去？您、您的意思是…要在这个时候中断谒见实验？
E: Leave? S—Surely you're not suggesting... we stop the Audience Experiment right now?

C: 丹恒，该起床了。
E: Dan Heng, time to get up.
Me...

C: ——从挥出第一棒才算正式开始！
E: ...you land a hit with your bat!

C: 那么，能否请你们表明来意，从天而降的客人？
E: So, care to share the reason for dropping in on us? Hmm? Visitors from above?

C: 还真有点？缘分啊——如此一来，我们也算是不打不相识。给，这是你的武器。
E: Well how about that? Perhaps it's fate! Friction really does spark friendships, huh? Here, you can have your weapon back.

C: 我们决定了。既然要与各位同行，理应在力所能及的范围内帮忙。
E: Alright, we'll go. If we're to be companions on this journey, it's only right that we offer assistance where possible.

C: 可惜，我们的疑问仍没得到解答，反而变得更多了。既然风波已经平息，可否请两位拨冗解惑？
E: Regrettably, our questions are still unanswered, and now we have even more. Now that things have calmed down, perhaps you two can find the time to answer a few of them?

C: 诺杜斯先生他们已经去避难了。后面交给*我们*，你们也快和市民一同撤离吧！
E: Mr. Noldus and the others have gone to seek shelter. Leave the rest to us. You should evacuate along with the citizens.

C: 奥赫玛的两位新盟友，欢迎来到翁法罗斯。
E: New allies of Okhema, welcome to Amphoreus.

C: 困境…多么柔婉的说法。
E: Rough patch... That's a mild way to put it.

C: 二位已经对翁法罗斯的历史有了基本的了解，接下来，我们就进入正题吧。请随我来。
E: We can move on to the problem at hand, now that both of you have some understanding of Amphoreus' history. Come with me.

C: 这么理解也无妨。
E: You're not wrong to think of it that way.

C: 大功告成！以后*我们*就能通过石版联络对方啦。不过仅限于奥赫玛城中哦，离开了阿雅编织的金线，传信就不起效果了。
E: All set! Now we can contact one another with our teleslates. Only in Okhema though. Messages won't send once you're outside Agy's web of golden threads.

C: 请两位拿出石版，我来教你们连入奥赫玛的<color=#dbc291ff>万帷网</color>。
E: Please take out your teleslate. I'll help you connect to Okhema's <color=#dbc291ff>World Wound Web</color>.

C: 他到底想干嘛？我们走近些看看。
E: What is he trying to do? Let's get closer and take a look.

C: 但谢谢你们，为我展示了天外的画卷。此刻，我就要去完成这项震古烁今的伟大事业——达米亚诺斯决不食言！
E: But thank you for showing me the image from beyond the sky. Now, I shall embark on this earthshaking undertaking — Damionis always follows through on his words!

C: 所以…我是对的？你们真的…来自天外？
E: So... I was right? You really are from... beyond the sky?

C: 第二问。
E: Question Two.

C: 但我也累了。所以，复盘的环节尽量简短点吧。
E: But it's been a long day for me too, so let's get through the review quickly.

C: 当然不会。
E: Certainly not.

C: 这不重要。
E: That's not important.

C: 此外，我还想推举两位来自异邦的勇士——他们同我一起面对过{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的半身，我对他们的勇武没有丝毫怀疑。
E: Furthermore, I recommend the two warriors from foreign lands. They have fought alongside me against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s double, and I have full faith in their bravery.

C: 与其担心「门」的问题，不如先想想我们三人要如何对抗千军万马。
E: Instead of worrying about gates, why don't you take the time to think about how the three of us are supposed to fend off an entire army.

C: 哦？缇宝老师教会你了？
E: Oh? Tribbie taught you how?

C: …但这些也都是过去的事了。
E: ...But that's all in the past.

C: 别担心，不会有事的。
E: Don't worry. You'll be just fine.

C: 抱歉，阿蝶，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}从来都不是一位喜爱与人交流的泰坦。在这件事上，*我们*恐怕也爱莫能助。
E: Sorry... We wish we could help, Cas, but {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has never been a Titan to chat or interact with humans.

C: 这就是我们坠落的地点。我们乘坐的车厢遭到了攻击，我和{NICKNAME}险些丢了性命。
E: This is where we crash-landed. {NICKNAME} and I nearly died when our car was assaulted.

C: 走吧。有了缇宝老师的符节，我们应该能顺利进入命运三相殿。
E: Let's go. With Tribbie's token, we should be able to go straight into the Temple of the Three Fates.

C: 我不理解。如果它拥有神力，难道不该用更粗暴的方式阻拦来犯之人吗？
E: This doesn't make sense to me. Oronyx thinks of us as intruders, so isn't it far easier for them to forcefully stop us with their divine powers?

C: 直觉告诉我，事情不会如此简单…但现在也想不出更好的办法了。
E: My intuition says this won't be that easy... But I suppose we don't have any better solutions at the moment.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 我怎么会和你们在一起？
E: Why am I with you guys?

C: 我们所行的这条路绝不平坦…它伴随着烈火，伤痕，恶意和杀生。但我向你保证，只要与星核猎手并肩，你就永远不必品尝背叛的滋味。
E: This path is anything but smooth... it's marked by flames, scars, malice, and bloodshed. But I guarantee, as long as you stand with the Stellaron Hunters, you will never know the pain of betrayal.

C: 这样吗…这一次同行，也会迎来戛然而止的时刻吗？
E: Is that so... Will this journey also be cut short suddenly?

C: 我们的确重逢了。
E: We did reunite.

C: 这里…曾经不是这样。
E: This place... isn't as I knew it.

C: （第一次感觉，列车如此陌生……）
E: (It's the first time that the Express has felt so unfamiliar...)

C: 迷迷，相信。跟上，伙伴！
E: Mem, believe. Follow, friends!

C: 「我们的神，我们的王，为了支撑你永恒的战斗，我们准备了盛大的祭礼啊——」
E: "Our god, our king, to aid your timeless struggle, we have prepared a grand ritual—"

C: 「请允许我们用卑微的十指触碰你的灵魂，为你编织盛装神性的剑皿…它将赐予你永恒的生命，贮存你永恒的荣耀啊。」
E: "Please grant us the honor to touch your soul with our humble hands, and present to you this sacred Sword Vessel... It shall consecrate your eternal life and enshrine your everlasting glory."

C: 想帮助他们，我们必须完成被托付的任务。
E: We'll only be able to help them once we've seen our own mission through.

C: 你…你这给一颗黑心镀了金的女人！我不想再看见你了，再见！
E: Y—You heartless woman! I never want to see you again, not for all the gold in the world!

C: 不…我不认为万敌阁下的出走是出于怯懦…相反，那是勇敢的决定。
E: No... I don't believe that Lord Mydei left out of cowardice. It was, in fact, a courageous choice.

C: （望向遐蝶）
E: (Look at Castorice.)

C: 那是生命比面包更廉价的年代，人们见惯了蛮荒和死亡。
E: This was a time when life was valued far less than bread. People hardly bat their eyelids at the savagery and death that had become commonplace.

C: …你们。
E: ...You two.

C: 灵魂…它还可以为我们展示更多。
E: The soul... can reveal even more to us.

C: 也许你应该尝试用扎格列斯之手将<color=#dbc291ff>雕像的底座复位。</color>
E: Perhaps you should try using the Hand of Zagreus to <color=#dbc291ff>restore the statue's base.</color>

C: 我是天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}——乱世的使者，纷争的化身！
E: I am {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the Lance of Fury, the messenger of turmoil, and the embodiment of Strife!

C: 岁月飞逝，距离上一位泰坦殒落已经过去了很久……
E: Time passes quickly. It's been a long time since the last Titan fell...

C: 明日同一时分，黄金裔将在创世涡心集合，归还天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的火种。
E: This time tomorrow, the Chrysos Heirs will gather at the Vortex of Genesis to surrender the Coreflame that once belonged to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the Lance of Fury.

C: 有人在替他们负重前行…
E: There are others carrying the burden for them.

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

C: 白厄阁下…但愿你真的做好了准备。
E: I pray you truly are prepared, Lord Phainon.

C: 白厄还说你不会来了。
E: Phainon said you weren't coming.

C: 火种的归还已经完成，但对白厄阁下的考验还没结束。
E: The Coreflame has been surrendered, but Lord Phainon's test isn't over yet.

C: （<color=#dbc291ff>「众人将与一人离别，{RUBY_B#只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」}惟其人将觐见奇迹{RUBY_E#}，此乃命运使然……」</color>）
E: (<color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, {RUBY_B#Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova}and that person alone will witness the miracle.{RUBY_E#} Such is the will of fate."</color>)

C: 这也意味着，你愿意接受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的试炼？
E: Does this mean you're ready to take on {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s trial?

C: 放心，有我在，就算有意外…嗯…也是上天堂！
E: Don't worry! With me by your side, even if things go south, you'll be heading straight to heaven!

C: 是一部寓言诗：在遥远之地，有座名为「斯缇科西亚」的城邦。某天，一头被黑潮侵蚀的巨龙从天而降，如同「死亡」本身。
E: It just contains an allegory: In a faraway land, in a city known as Styxia, a dragon corrupted by the black tide descended one day, swooping upon the city like Death itself.

C: 阿格莱雅一定会回收{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，但老师如今的状态…极其特殊，谁也不知道剥离火种可能产生的影响。
E: Aglaea will surely take back {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame. But with Anaxa's current condition... It's so unique that nobody knows how taking the Coreflame away from him will affect him.

C: 初接触时的冰冷转瞬即逝，取而代之的…是指尖的触感，以及顺着纤细的手臂传来的、因畏惧而产生的颤抖。她微颤的手指轻抚着你的脸颊，稍稍作痒。
E: The coldness of the initial touch dispersed as quickly as it came, and replacing it... was the touch of fingertips, and a tremble born of trepidation that originated from a certain lanky arm. Her quivering finger gently brushed against your cheek, causing a faint tickle.

C: 厄兆总是成双，一股股微小的气流，终究要酝织成撕裂天幕的风暴了。
E: Omens always come in pairs. A tiny air current will eventually brew into a storm that tears the sky apart.

C: 什么？
E: What?

C: 不无道理。可如果负世的尊神仍不应答呢？
E: That very well could be true, but what if the Worldbearing Titan still chooses to remain silent?

C: 既然一切生命皆出于同一根源——为何我不能以自己为代价，让至亲复活呢？
E: Since all living things stemmed from the same origin, why could I not sacrifice myself in order to resurrect my nearest and dearest?

C: 人子啊，记住了：知晓自身的无知便是最大的睿智。
E: Child of humanity, remember this: Being cognizant of one's ignorance is the greatest wisdom of all.

C: 在下奉来古士大人之命前来通报：凯妮斯大人已莅临元老院，敬候阁下光临，还请即刻移驾。
E: I have a message from Lord Lygus: Lady Caenis has met up with the Council of Elders and is awaiting your arrival, so please depart forthwith.

C: 我会击溃阿格莱雅的自以为是。
E: I will be the one to shatter Aglaea's self-righteousness.

C: 你可以把我交出去，告诉她元老院只想找我聊聊天，并无任何冒犯之意。
E: You can do as she says. Tell her that the Council of Elders merely wished to chat with me and had no intention of offending her.

C: 正义之子面对有悖常理的世界，会让世界天翻地覆……
E: Putting a child of justice into a farcical world is bound to turn it upside down...

C: 呵…但愿我们在他心里的分量，能与整个世界相当。
E: Hmph... Let's just hope we mean as much as the world to him.

C: 还是…来不及吗……
E: Did I... still fail to make it in time...?

C: 这一次，那声音前所未有的清晰——
E: This time, the voice is a lot clearer than before.

C: 去吧，我不会阻止你。还有{NICKNAME}，身为亲身欺瞒死亡之人，我想你有充分的理由和遐蝶同行，与「死亡」的尊神见上一面。
E: Go. I will not stand in your way. As for {NICKNAME}... you are someone who has cheated death. I believe you have more than enough reason to make the trip with Castorice and meet the god of "Death" themself.

C: 我想在出发前，和缇安大人再说说话。
E: ...I just wanted to speak to Lady Trianne for a bit before I set off.

C: 但如果有所犹豫，它们便会发出刺耳的噪声。随后，行刑官也必定会听见受刑者的哀嚎。
E: But should the executioner have any hesitation, the holes will produce a piercing whistle. On that cue, the screams of the executed are sure to follow.

C: 这是你的义务。记住，思考死者为何而痛苦，然后向他们献上敬意。
E: This is your duty. Remember, consider the source of the dead's suffering, then give them the respect they deserve.

C: 这根短矛飞了一圈回到了原地，又若无其事地假装自己是一道新的题目。
E: The short spear flew in a circle and returned to its original spot, nonchalantly pretending to be a new puzzle.

C: 别忘了，把遐蝶的东西还给她。
E: Don't forget to give Castorice's jewelry back.

C: 没事，没多少……
E: Don't worry... it's not a lot...

C: 泰坦…拒绝…你…我……
E: Titan... Rejects... You... Me...

C: 放心，这时就该人家登场了——
E: Don't worry. It's time for me to shine...

C: 我们也会落得一样的下场吗？
E: Will we suffer the same fate as well?

C: 他刚才好像问过一遍了。
E: I think he asked that already.

C: 斯缇科西亚…覆灭了？
E: Styxia... is no more?

C: 这、这可不行！新来的勇士，速速去列队吧！
E: Th—This cannot stand! Newcomers, hurry up and go take your positions!

C: …这是为何？
E: ...Why?

C: 所以，小蝶…从巨龙怀中诞生的少女，那些幽灵口中「死亡」的化身…就是你？！
E: That means... The girl born in the dragon's embrace... The personification of "Death" these souls talked about... That's you? Cas???

C: 我的记忆…应该是从阿蒙内特将我带到哀地里亚时开始才对。
E: My memories only begin... After Amunet brought me to Aidonia.

C: 缇安，可以！缇安喜欢小小蝶，喜欢和小小蝶一起拍照。
E: Trianne says yes! Trianne likes Little Cas and would love to take a picture with Little Cas!

C: 对于「我」的死亡，她追悔莫及。而后，她以泰坦的神权将我的灵魂重塑，却也让自己从未在人前示现，无法被人寻获……
E: She was consumed with regret over my death, so she used the Titan's authority to reforge my soul. Yet, it also means she has never revealed herself to anyone, hidden away from the entire world...

C: 啊！所以这一路上，我们不是捡拾到了某物……
E: Ah! So, instead of picking up objects on the way here...

C: 是啊。正如「死亡」本为一体的双掌，在我们抵达人间时一分为二，再也无法触及对方……
E: Yes. "Death" was originally a pair of hands, but they were split in twain when we reached the mortal realm, never to touch each other ever again...

C: 这听起来，反而是在否定{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的意义……
E: Are you saying there's no point in {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' existence...?

C: 这种时候，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的助力总会恰到好处地出现呢……
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s aid always appears in times like this. How convenient...

C: 与此同时 奥赫玛
E: At the same time, in Okhema

C: 去说给那群向诸神乞求拯救的人听。
E: Tell it to those begging for salvation from the gods.

C: *观众议论纷纷*
E: *crowd chatter*

C: 元老们，公民们，请肃静！
E: Elders and citizens, silence, if you please!

C: 死刑！死刑！
E: Let him die! Let him die!

C: 只是，指引一位迷途者重返人间绝非易举。死亡的呢喃甘美而宁静，倘若意志不足，必将被冥府的长臂死死牵制。
E: That being said, it is not easy to guide a lost soul back to the mortal realm. The whispers of Death are sweet and alluring. If your determination wavers, you will succumb and be forever ensnared by the netherworld's grasp.

C: 方才那盛大又荒唐的表演，就是你的毕生所求？
E: That grand and absurd performance was what you've been seeking your whole life?

C: 看来，这是最后的机会了…不妨让我们打破对彼此的芥蒂吧？
E: So, this is our last chance. How about we let go of the bad blood between us?

C: 愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
E: May Cerces safeguard your thoughts.

C: 还是来说说你的猜想吧？
E: Can you share with us your hypothesis?

C: 我先行告退了。
E: I'll take my leave for now.

C: …别对上眼了，我可不认识渎神者。
E: ...Avoid his gaze. I don't acquaint myself with blasphemers.

C: （黄金裔是具备英雄资质的人，大多身手不凡，拥有超人的力量。而通过火种试炼的黄金裔，更会荣升「半神」，接管泰坦的权能……）
E: (Chrysos Heirs are humans who possess heroic qualities, with most of them demonstrating extraordinary combat prowess and strength. Upon clearing a Coreflame trial, a Chrysos Heir can even ascend to a demigod and inherit a Titan's divinity...)

C: 孩子啊，自你为我播下怀疑的种子，又已过去了许久。我在无数个日夜记录下自己的推论和狂想，却又在醒来时把它们尽数焚毁。
E: So much time has passed since you sowed the seeds of doubt in my heart, child. Many a night, I find myself penning down all my theories and wild ideas, only to burn them to ashes when I open my eyes in the day.

C: 阿格莱雅！这是怎么了？
E: Aglaea! What happened here?

C: 呵呵……
E: Pfft. Hahaha...

C: 姐姐已经做好了牺牲的准备…可是，我做不到……
E: My sister is prepared to sacrifice herself... and yet, I can't do the same...

C: 言至于此……
E: Regarding this matter...

C: 我不明白…为什么，你敢于为自己无法见证的未来牺牲？
E: I do not understand... Why would you dare to sacrifice yourself for a future that you won't get to witness?

C: 诚如预言所述，我们也已许诺，待到一切结束，就要面对自己命中注定的时刻。
E: As foretold in the prophecy, and according to our vows, once it all ends, we must face our fated moment head on.

C: 正如今日的逐火之旅——翁法罗斯的历史是一种「轮回」。
E: ...Just like the Flame-Chase Journey of today. Amphoreus' history is cyclical in nature.

C: 而且，过去那对双子…即便她们真是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}本尊，如今也依旧不知去向……
E: Besides, those twins in the past... Even if they really are {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, their whereabouts are still unknown even today...

C: 按序揭露它的真相吧，英雄们。
E: Reveal its truth in order, heroes.

C: 了解到她所经历的一切以后……
E: After learning about everything she went through...

C: 如果这就是历史的真面目，那塞涅俄丝和艾格勒的融合…难道也并非是为了让世人免受天灾？
E: If this is the true history — was Seliose's fusion with Aquila truly meant to save humanity from ruin?

C: 相反，逐火之旅就要成功了。
E: On the contrary, the Flame-Chase Journey is on the verge of success.

C: 不可思议，好身手！
E: Unbelievable — you've got some impressive moves!

C: …否决你的审判！
E: ...we reject your judgment!

C: 「侵晨」将要斩落的神明——
E: The first and only god that Dawnmaker will slay —

C: 能成为第一位幸运听众，你应该感到万分荣幸才对。
E: You should feel incredibly honored to be the first to hear this.

C: 这是…宿命……
E: This... is fate...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将与贪婪同行，亦将亡于分文……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall walk with greed, and die over petty change..."</color>

C: 「但是…至少有一件事…我做到了……」
E: "But... at least there's one thing... I did accomplish..."

C: 缇里西庇俄丝女士的预言…果真不会落空啊。
E: Lady Tribios's prophecy... It seems it didn't fail after all.

C: 你们应该会很合得来。
E: I'm sure the two of you would get along wonderfully.

C: 恰好，现在生病的是我深爱的这个世界，那我又怎能在它面前露出愁容呢？
E: The world I love is the one suffering now. How could I face it with a frown?

C: 想想看吧！以阿雅的性格，假如她认定你没有那份资质……
E: Imagine this: Knowing Agy's personality, if she believed you weren't worthy...

C: 谁扯我衣服？
E: Did someone rip off a piece of my clothes?

C: 今天也没力气再练了。不如…我们去友爱之馆找点好看的，换换心情？
E: I'm out of energy for training today. How about we go to the Library of Philia to lighten the mood?

C: 你之前在看什么？
E: What were you reading before?

C: 读完此文，你感到全身力量充盈，仿佛作者笔下的一拳神王就是你的化身。
E: This article leaves you feeling empowered, as if you are the author's One Punch God incarnate.

C: 你的爪子拿得住吗？
E: Those mitts up to the task?

C: 桀桀桀，遵命！看我的吧——
E: Roger that! Watch me —

C: 哎呀，瞧瞧这紫色水晶的透亮程度…正好跟我的肤色绝配！赛飞儿大姐头，你果真是全翁法罗斯审美最顶级的侠盗！
E: Look at the clarity of this purple crystal... It matches my skin tone perfectly! Cipher, Cipher, you truly have the most refined taste of all the thieves in Amphoreus!

C: 哈，挺能干的嘛！虽然我还是没看出这玩意和「诡计」有什么关系就是了。
E: Ha, not bad! However, I still don't see how this ties into "Trickery."

C: 请你为克拉特鲁斯阁下带话，让他集结圣城卫士和悬锋族人，挨家挨户地带去消息：明天的明晰时，白厄会在云石天宫宣讲。
E: Please deliver a message to Lord Krateros. Have him gather the Holy City Guards and the Kremnoans to spread the word from door to door: At the Lucid Hour tomorrow, Phainon will speak at the Marmoreal Palace.

C: 哈托努斯来了。
E: Chartonus has arrived.

C: 对应刻法勒的黄金裔么…呵，当初在教室里按着你的脑袋背公式的时候，可真没想到你还是这块料。
E: The Chrysos Heir of Kephale... I had no idea you had it in you while I was drilling those formulas in your head in class.

C: 呵…你还是那么懂得如何令人不快啊。
E: Heh... you know just how to make a person uncomfortable.

C: 如今她不在了，而你们又打算在城防漏洞百出时出征「晨昏之眼」…啧啧。
E: Now that she's gone... and you're heading out to battle the Eye of Twilight... with the city's defenses in shambles... tsk tsk tsk.

C: 我现在掌握了治愈的力量。我想要缝合天空的裂隙，疗愈人们的伤痛。
E: I now wield the power of healing. I aim to mend the fissures in the sky and heal the wounds of the people.

C: 你回来了。这趟还顺利吗？
E: You're back. How did it go?

C: 走吧，丹宝，别愁眉苦脸的啦。求告先祖最后的一站，我们可是要出个远门咯。
E: Come on, Dannie. Don't look so gloomy. We're gonna have to take a long trip for the final visit to the ancestors.

C: 最后一站的目的地，是万敌阁下的故乡——悬锋城。
E: Our final stop is Lord Mydei's home — Castrum Kremnos.

C: 嘿…你越来越会聊天啦，丹宝。
E: Heh... You're getting better at this, Dannie.

C: 千年前，当世界急需一位敢于挑战神明的英雄时，英雄塞涅俄丝站了出来，开启了逐火的时代……
E: When the world cried out for a hero to challenge the gods a thousand years ago, Seliose stepped forward and began the Flame-Chasing era...

C: 或许我们的气息，让它回忆起了千年前的鏖战。
E: Perhaps our presence stirred memories of the fierce battle from a thousand years ago.

C: 嘟…嘟嘟，嘟……
E: Doot... doot-doot, doot...

C: 我也对那位「阳雷骑士」的故事有些好奇…阅读这段记忆再走吧？
E: I'm also curious about the story of the Daythunder Knight... Why don't we read this part of the memory before leaving?

C: 你为何要这么做，塞涅俄丝？你曾是多么热情善良的女孩…在这阴云之子的殿堂里，你曾多么虔诚地向艾格勒祷告！
E: Why would you do this, Seliose? You were once such a warm-hearted girl... In this hall of the Cloudborn, you prayed so devoutly to Aquila!

C: 也正因我怜悯你们，我将替你们所有人踏上这次征程——
E: Out of care for you all, I'll walk this path — on behalf of everyone.

C: 她或许以为，破釜沉舟之下，所有人都能像她一样觉醒。
E: She probably thought that, once there's no turning back, everyone would come to their sense like she did.

C: 不管那位泰坦要阻挠我们几次…我都会重新建起桥梁！
E: I'll restore the bridge every time... No matter how many times the Titan obstructs us!

C: 晨昏与阴晴，本是一体两面。
E: Brilliant dawn and shadowed dusk are but two sides of the same coin.

C: 这样就可以了吧。
E: This should probably do it.

C: 神的部分？怨愤，惶悚。
E: The god's part? I sense resentment. Terror.

C: 灰宝，原来打算靠这种方式打败艾格勒吗？
E: Wait! Is this how you plan to beat Aquila?

C: 你不加入我，与我一起向仁慈的刻法勒祈祷吗…？
E: Why don't you join me in praying to the benevolent Kephale...?

C: 列车组的大家都在等我们回去！
E: Everyone in the Crew is still waiting for our return!

C: 遵命，白厄阁下。
E: Understood, Lord Phainon.

C: 果然…赛飞儿小姐没有辜负使命！
E: As expected... Miss Cipher did not fail her mission!

C: 或许在遥远的西风尽头，亦有公正的律法能为这位元老的灵魂断罪。
E: Perhaps, at the distant end of the west wind, there will be a just law that can convict the sins infesting this elder's soul.

C: 我还是觉得应该有人留下…
E: I still feel like someone should stay behind...

C: 放心，卫士。眼前这位先生是来接应的「开拓」盟友。介意让我们单独聊聊吗？
E: Don't worry, guard. This gentleman is an ally of the Trailblaze. Would you mind giving us a moment to speak in private?

C: 当然。我们会在一旁等候，请注意安全。
E: Of course. We'll wait nearby. Please stay safe.

C: 哈，果然在这里。
E: Found you!

C: 喂，伙伴，小点声啊…！
E: Hey, partner, keep it down...!

C: 也许，对于真正的救世主…这些心愿只是沧海一粟。
E: Perhaps... for a true Deliverer, such wishes are but droplets in an ocean.
Y—You...

C: 算了，先跟上白厄吧。
E: Forget it, I need to catch up with Phainon first.

C: 别想太多，白厄。遵从自己的内心吧。
E: Don't overthink it, Phainon. Trust your heart.

C: 那其中也包括你和你的民族，悬锋人。
E: Yes, even you and your people, Kremnoan.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>男人一手缔造，也是这个世界即将迎来的最后一次「永劫回归」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The final Eternal Recurrence created by this man's hand, and the last one this world shall undergo.</color>

C: 不会在最上层罐子里吧……
E: It's not in the jar on the topmost shelf, is it...?

C: 你失去…还远远不足……
E: And you haven't lost... nearly enough...

C: 二位想以「半神」这卑微的身份，改写被群星写定的结局？
E: Do you two really think, as petty little "demigods," you can change the outcome written by the stars?

C: 我明白。就让我踏入轮回，延续翁法罗斯的计算…欺骗众神，欺骗这个世界。
E: I understand. Then let me step into the cycles and continue Amphoreus's grand design: to deceive the gods, deceive the world itself.

C: 我们何时有过回头的选择？
E: When have we ever had the luxury of turning back?

C: 没错。所以，剑旗爵，请引领我觐见刻律德菈陛下吧，我有义务将真相如实相告。
E: Exactly. So, Dux Gladiorum, please take me to meet Her Majesty Cerydra. I must share the truth with her.

C: 相同的话…我也听过不下百遍了。
E: I've already heard the same thing countless times...

C: 哎…你还真爱出风头啊。
E: Heh... you sure do love stealing the spotlight.

C: 这事和你无关，树庭男孩。退下吧，我可不想有人受伤哪。
E: This is none of your business, Grove boy. Step aside, I don't want anyone getting hurt.

C: 每一个人的愿望…我都铭记在心。
E: I have kept everyone's wishes close to my heart.

C: 必须…将那「毁灭」的神像焚烧殆尽。
E: Must... burn that idol of the Destruction to the ground.

C: 完成太阳的工作吧。
E: Finish the sun's work.

C: 还是说……
E: Or maybe...

C: 啊，难道是——阿哈？！原来，踏上「欢愉」是这么轻松的事吗？
E: Hold up— Aha? No way! Stepping onto the Path of Elation can't be this simple... right?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「生命的价值并不在于过去发生的一切，而在于当下，在于未来。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The value of your life does not lie in what happened in the past, but in the present, and the future."</color>

C: …终于。
E: ...finally.

C: 毕竟，我可是亲身体会过呢。
E: I know because I've been exactly where you are.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你们都是…「记忆」的孩子……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Both of you... children of Remembrance...</color>

C: >>>PoleMos<unbreak>600</unbreak>，原动力：██，泰坦权能：纷争，命途：██<<<
E: >>>PoleMos<unbreak>600</unbreak>, Primum Mobile: █████████, Titan Authority: Strife, Path: ████<<<

C: 我还有一位同伴在这里。
E: I still have a friend stranded here.

C: 圣城也有许多逐火的同伴。
E: And old Flame-Chase companions await in the holy city.

C: 海瑟音小姐…真不愧是骑士统领。
E: Hysilens... No wonder she's the Knights' Commander.

C: 话虽如此，应该不用多做自我介绍啦。*我们*知道，你见证过逐火之旅的「未来」——远比我们眼中的预言更加清晰。
E: Although introductions are probably unnecessary. We know you've witnessed the future of the Flame-Chase Journey, even more clearly than we have.

C: 这城中是否还有像{M#他}{F#她}一样，来自天外的客人？那是我们的挚友，此行前来……
E: Does this city host any other visitors from beyond the sky? We're looking for our dear companions...
Y—You...
Hah...

C: 如今，又一个选择摆在您的面前：该与何人协作，让「律法」的天秤偏向哪方——<color=#dbc291ff>我，抑或那位「救世主」？</color>
E: Now, another choice lies before you: With whom shall you ally to tip the scales of "Law": <color=#dbc291ff>me, or that "Deliverer"?</color>

C: 那位凯撒，真是咄咄逼人…完全不给我们提问的机会。
E: The Imperator is quite... forceful... She didn't give us any chance to ask questions.

C: 好了，各位，还请随意落座，稍候片刻。待我洗去捕食的血腥，就来招待二位。
E: Alright, please make yourselves comfortable and wait a moment. Let me first wash off the blood of the hunt, and then I'll attend to you two.

C: 你将会织出世上最浪漫的事物…
E: You will weave the most romantic thing in the world...

C: 但这反而会成为我们的「捷径」，对吧？
E: But that's actually gonna be our "shortcut," right?

C: 感谢配合。凯撒有些急务要处理，稍后便会赴宴。
E: Thank you for your cooperation. The Imperator has some urgent business she needs to attend to and will arrive shortly.

C: 在犹豫吗？
E: Are you hesitating?

C: 那位君主向来我行我素。她虽赐我们爵名，却不会与任何人分享行踪。
E: Our sovereign has always acted however she pleases. Though she gave us ranks, she'd never tell anyone her whereabouts.

C: 是能将人们从海妖的迷魂歌谣中唤醒的「解药」。
E: Is an "antidote" that can awaken humans from a sea siren's enchanting song.

C: 但二位——我希望你们拥有清醒的视野。
E: But you two... I wish for you to see the truth.

C: {NICKNAME}，小心……
E: {NICKNAME}, careful...

C: 我一定会想到办法出去的。
E: I'll definitely find a way out of here.

C: 嘻…「智识」的监牢可拦不住我们，我们不在0和1的逻辑之中……
E: Teehee... Erudition's prison cannot stop us, for we lie outside the logic of zeros and ones...

C: 带我回现实吧！有个奇怪的声音告诉我，沿着这条路一直走下去，就能进入翁法罗斯——
E: Why don't you take me back to reality! A strange voice told me that I can enter Amphoreus if I keep following this road...

C: 滥用骗术的人不值得轻信。
E: Habitual liars are not trustworthy.

C: （也许只是错觉…先跟上她吧。）
E: (Maybe my instincts are wrong... Let's follow her first.)

C: 这种渴望在每个英雄体内摇曳，耀眼…却又灼目。
E: A hunger that flickers in every hero's heart, so bright, yet so blinding...

C: 人们曾为我登峰欢呼…如今为陨落欢呼……
E: People once cheered for my ascension... and now they cheer for my fall...

C: 她会被光芒刺眼，因为那身后的火光从来没有直接射入眼眸；她的双腿将无比沉重，因为她从未学过迈步向前。
E: The light will blind her, for the fire behind her had never once actually touched her eyes. Her legs will buckle beneath her, for she had never learned to walk forward.

C: 你与我，所有被神谕感召的黄金裔，皆是受到诅咒之人。正如那狂妄的神礼官所说，金血是「毁灭」的因子，是与世界的命运互斥之物。
E: You, I, and every Chrysos Heir summoned by the prophecy are the accursed ones. Just like that arrogant Theoros said, our golden blood is the agent of Destruction, the antithesis of the world's fate.

C: 「律法之半神」，「凯撒」刻律德菈…逝于光历3960年。
E: Cerydra the Imperator, the Demigod of Law... Deceased Light Calendar 3960.

C: 你的歌声很美。
E: Your song is beautiful.

C: 半神们打败了你，丑角。
E: The demigods defeated you, clown.

C: 作为旁白，你的话太多了。
E: For a narrator, you're awfully talkative.

C: 而现在，就让我们携手，以「记忆」的力量完成最后一步吧。
E: But for now, let's join hands and complete the final step with the power of "the Remembrance."

C: 很真实的触感。
E: You feel very tangible. Very real.

C: 这是…那救世主的经历？真是身临其境。
E: Is this... that Deliverer's experience? It's truly immersive.

C: 喔，原来是那女巫的地盘。宴会上，是她和另一位安提基色拉人助我解了围。
E: Oh. So it's the territory of that witch. She and another Antikytheran lent me a helping hand back at the banquet.

C: 我知道你在想什么，小跟班。你想借那救世主的回忆打动我，令律法的天平倾向{F#她}{M#他}和那两位天才，对么？
E: I know what you want to do, sidekick. You want to use that Deliverer's memories to influence me and tilt the scales of law toward {M#him}{F#her} and the two geniuses.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>为征服献身，或用剑刺入暴君的胸膛。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Either sacrifice yourself for conquest, or pierce this tyrant's chest with your sword.</color>

C: 「于是，凯撒完成临终前的致辞。」
E: "Thus, the Imperator concluded her final speech."
Hah...

C: 我不如他们——况且，神谕也是他们的战争机器，我没有这种好运。贸然开战只会令我们陷于不利，一举一动都将受翁法罗斯所有人审判……
E: I am inferior to them in that regard. They also have the prophecy to wield as a weapon, something I am not blessed with. Launching an unplanned attack will only disadvantage us, as all of Amphoreus will judge our actions...

C: 「凯撒用自己的生命改写了何种律令，如今我们尚不得而知。」
E: "To this day, we do not know which rule the Imperator overwrote at the cost of her life."

C: 容我拒绝。已死之人绝不会惧怕死亡。
E: I must refuse. A dead man never fears death.

C: 看来对我这位不速之客，你已经不那么惊讶了。
E: Looks like you're no longer that surprised to see me, even though I am an uninvited guest.

C: 在谈论方法前，你可曾掂量过「代价」二字的分量？
E: Have you ever wondered what the word "cost" means before jumping into action?

C: （至少，她还愿意交流，是因为我违抗了忆庭的律令？也许，我还有机会……）
E: (At least she's still willing to talk. Is it because I disobeyed the Garden's rules? Maybe I still have a chance...)

C: 那，在处置这位「美丽的忆者」前，至少为我解开几个疑惑吧。
E: Well, before you get rid of this "beautiful Memokeeper," the least you could do is answer some of my questions.

C: 它提到了…你的名字？
E: It mentioned... your name?

C: 一位星神出现在她的梦里，缠绕翁法罗斯的三重命途，再加上忆庭不顾一切的入侵行动……
E: An Aeon appearing in her dreams, Three Paths intertwining in Amphoreus, and the Garden trying to infiltrate this world at all costs...

C: 难道是她的想象？「心中」的英雄？可是，这样就难以解释「进程错误」……
E: Maybe she's talking to her imagination? A hero "within"? But that wouldn't explain the "process error"...

C: 我很幸运哦，在等待「救世主」的漫长时光中，能有你这样一位从不缺席的听众。
E: I'm actually really lucky, you know? During the long years I've spent waiting for the "Deliverer," I've always had you here as an audience.

C: 但，世上怎会有如此真实的梦呢？所以，我不同意他的看法。
E: But how could a dream feel so real? That's why I didn't agree with him.

C: 总有一天，会有人翻开这近乎「永恒」的一页……
E: There will come a day when someone turns over this nearly "eternal" page...

C: 所以在谈论翁法罗斯的命运前，何不让我们先放下嫌隙……
E: Before we talk about Amphoreus's destiny, why don't we lay aside our differences...

C: 你的做法，我绝不认同！
E: I'll never agree to your means!

C: 还觉得自己能做什么吗，粉色的小忆灵？
E: Still think you can do something, little pink memosprite?

C: 没错，这就是「记忆」。
E: Yep. That's what "memories" are.

C: 它有什么特别的？
E: What's so special about it?

C: {RUBY_B#「建立」}继承大家的决心，将其带向他们为之牺牲了一切，却又无缘看见的未来——{RUBY_E#}
E: I {RUBY_B#Establish}inherited everyone's determination{RUBY_E#}, carrying it forward into the future they fought for, one they can never see.

C: 第 <unbreak>33550336</unbreak> 次永劫回归 光历<unbreak>4932</unbreak>年
E: <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th eternal recurrence, Light Calendar <unbreak>4932</unbreak>...

C: 谢谢你的…溺爱。但现在，请安心把它交给我吧。无论是我的过去，还是那道「忘却」的执念……
E: Thank you for your... coddling, but please trust me and leave it to me. Both my past and that obsessive "Oblivion"....

C: 来日若有需要，就随时唤醒「我」的力量吧。必要的时候也可以决绝一些，去吞噬、烧毁那些烦心的障碍……
E: If you ever need me again, feel free to awaken "my" power. And when the time comes, don't hesitate to devour or burn away anything that stands in your way.

C: 那道烈焰，烧毁了树庭，惊扰了众生的沉眠……
E: That fiery blaze engulfed the Grove and woke all creatures from their slumber...

C: 丹恒？初次见面。{NICKNAME}的伙伴，原来不止小昔涟吗？
E: Dan Heng? Nice to meet you. I didn't realize {NICKNAME} had more companions in addition to little Cyrene.

C: 我已垂暮，半神的名讳毫无意义。屹立于此的，只是「开山者」曾经的战友……
E: I am near my end, and the demigod title means nothing to me now. The being who stands here now is just the former comrade of the "Mountainbreaker"...

C: 一头将死的野兽，何谈抵抗？
E: For a beast on the brink of death, what is the point of resistance?

C: 看来，无论这回忆属于谁，荒笛都是其中的主角。
E: Regardless of whose memory this is, it seems that Terravox has a leading role in it.

C: 补充一些现成的凝胶子弹好了……
E: Let's replenish some ready-made gel bullets...

C: 前进吧，金色的龙鱼，还有「救世主」，去寻找你们的同伴……
E: Go forth, golden dragonfish, and you, "Deliverer," seek out your companion...

C: 「说到这个，那列车上有一个信使，一个忆者，立场不明。动手时，可别被她们察觉了。」
E: "By the way, there's a Messenger and a Memokeeper on that Express. We don't know where they stand on this matter, so make sure they don't notice you when you make your move."

C: 「失控了，完全失控了……」
E: "It's spinning out of control... Everything's out of control..."

C: 「她只想。找到。失散的姐妹。」
E: "She just. Wants to find. Her lost sisters."

C: 可点燃一团火，也可以是为了照亮前路。
E: But lighting a fire can also illuminate the path ahead.

C: 以「天才」之名，我定会见证它的失败。
E: Then, in the name of "genius", I shall most certainly witness its failure.

C: 「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹，此乃命运使然。」
E: "All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle. Such is the will of fate."

C: 至此，让我们所有人踏上最后的伟大征程。
E: And now, let us all embark on this final grand journey.

C: 「怎么可能，那只是一个美好…呃，对{NICKNAME}来说美好的梦境吧！」
E: "No way. That was just a nice dreamscape! ...Uh, at least nice for {NICKNAME}..."

C: 话说回来，既然翁法罗斯存在另一颗星核……
E: By the way, if there's another Stellaron in Amphoreus...

C: 来了啊，比我预想中要早。
E: You're here. Sooner than I expected.

C: 为了所有人，都能以「救世主」的姿态走到终点。
E: So that everyone can reach the end as a Deliverer.

C: 我不明白。这里，难道不是家吗？
E: I don't understand. Isn't this my home?

C: 听你这么说，我很高兴。
E: I'm glad to hear that.

C: 白厄在做的事，并无不同。
E: What Phainon is doing now is no different.

C: 那是「智识」的冰冷。
E: That would be the Erudition's coldness.

C: 它在检索博识尊？啧，天外战场的事你们别操心，尽全力干扰它！
E: Is it querying for Nous? Tsk. Don't worry about what happens out here! Interfere with it as much as you can!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>一个人的性格，就是{F#她}{M#他}的命运。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A person's personality is their destiny.</color>

C: {NICKNAME}的肩膀，真的很可靠呀。
E: {NICKNAME}'s shoulders are really dependable.

C: {RUBY_B#浮黎}「记忆」{RUBY_E#}…在「昔涟」梦中出现的神明。祂的身影和话语都模糊不清……
E: {RUBY_B#Fuli}The Remembrance{RUBY_E#}... That was the god who appeared in "Cyrene's" dream. THEIR figure and speech were both so blurred...

C: 嗯，继续前进吧。
E: Yes. Let's move forward.

C: ▀▄▀纰缪▀▄▀参错▀▄▀舛讹
E: ▀▄▀Fallacy▀▄▀Contradictions▀▄▀Errors

C: 结论是？
E: And?

C: 我喜欢边泡澡边泡面。
E: I love eating instant noodles while taking a bath.

C: 一起去旅行吧，搭档。
E: Let's go on a journey together, partner.

C: 不过，这还不足以让大家成为真正的「生命」哦。
E: But that alone isn't enough to make everyone a true "life form" yet.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>《如我所书》的尾声。</color>
E: The epilogue of As I've Written.

C: 你留下，让我先出去瞅瞅。
E: You stay here while I go check things out.

C: …想得美！
E: ...Dream on!

C: 理解它热烈和浪漫的人们，自然会为最后被点上的那枚「。」热泪盈眶♪
E: Those who understand its passion and romance will naturally be moved to tears by that final "." placed at the end ♪

C: 不敢苟同。在如此庞大的丛林里，早期奥赫玛的独裁官制度才是能提供生存保障的范本。
E: I beg to differ. In such a vast jungle, the dictatorship system exhibited by early Okhema is the only example of guaranteed survival.

C: 听起来，和「智识」正相反呢…一位计算未来，一位铭记过去。
E: So it is the opposite of the Erudition... One calculates what is to come, and the other holds on to what came before.

C: 「纷争」的长矛险些夺走了{NICKNAME}的生命——
E: The spear of Strife nearly claimed {NICKNAME}'s life...

C: 它孤独地生长…哪里也去不了。它独自凝望着海面，想象着…永远到达不了的彼岸……
E: It grew all alone... unable to go anywhere. It watched the sea in silence, dreaming of a faraway shore it could never reach...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌…昔涟…迷迷……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Demiurge... Cyrene... Mem...</color>

C: 是吗？我不这么觉得——「一无所获」就是最大的成果。
E: Really? I don't think so. "Not finding anything" is our biggest find.

C: 这样一来，它就不再是「昔涟」一个人的回忆。
E: That way, it won't just be "Cyrene's" memories alone.

C: 只是笑着，只是爱着。
E: You'll only reply to them with love and a smile.

C: 而我们的故事，会静静地躺在花丛中，一如「记忆」的每一道涟漪……
E: And our stories will be lying silently among the flowers like every ripple of "Remembrance"...

C: 但我最{RUBY_B#波尔卡•卡卡目}希望到场的人{RUBY_E#}已经在了。
E: Either way, {RUBY_B#Polka Kakamond}the person I was hoping for most{RUBY_E#} is here.

C: 美妙的啼哭。很快它就会响彻银河。
E: What a beautiful wail. It will soon resound throughout the entire cosmos.

C: 波提欧先生，真高兴在这场血战后能看见你平安无事。
E: Mr. Boothill, it's a relief to see you alive and well after all that bloodshed.

C: 为了联结银河，与更多势力同行。
E: To connect the cosmos and journey alongside more allies.

C: {NICKNAME}█银河的未来█在你手中▄▄▄▄▄▄█▀██
E: {NICKNAME} █ the future of the cosmos █ is in your hands ▄▄▄▄▄▄█▀██

C: 咦，这个终端的存储设备不见了……
E: Huh? I can't see the memory storage for this terminal...

C: 穿过去看看呗。不要紧，咱俩不会折在这儿的。
E: Let's take a look. Don't worry, this place won't be our grave.

C: 诸位！现在情况很明显，<color=#dbc291ff>「异星水魈」</color>流窜已久是不争的事实。这水魈面貌变化多端，频频以假乱真……
E: Now, everyone, the situation is clear as day. It's already well-known that <color=#dbc291ff>Xenohydro</color> has been on the loose for a long time. Xenohydro can change its form and mimic others' appearances so perfectly that it's virtually impossible to tell the difference...

C: 为什么不自己打开…嚯嚯，兴许是我这把老骨头没注意到吧。
E: Why didn't I turn it on myself... Hoho, I suppose I didn't notice.

C: 我手上这瓶，可是四个琥珀纪前的汽水<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>，历久弥香，嗬…爽快！
E: This bottle of soda is from four Amber Eras ago, <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color>, so fragrant. Ho... so refreshing!

C: 后来我还是从别人口中得知，他那进行星际旅行的飞行器机油，还是从我这机修间一点一点偷去的！
E: Afterward, I learned from the others that the fuel in the spacecraft that he used for his adventure was stolen bit by bit from my maintenance room!

C: 但辗转到老爹我手上，用那老斑鸠发明的特殊显影法一试，嚯！发现上面揭示了某个房间的坐标。
E: But it ended up here with me, I tried using that old scoundrel's special technique to reveal the text, and lo and behold! It revealed the coordinates of a room.

C: 怎么，这「宝藏」上面也标注着「宝藏」的位置？在这儿跟老爹我玩套娃哪？
E: What? This treasure is also marked with the location of another treasure? What game is he playing?

C: 对不住啊，{F#丫头}{M#小子}。我没想到他会唱上这么一出。
E: Sorry, {F#lass}{M#lad}. I didn't expect that from him.

C: 让我想想，不如给你些别处寻不到的珍贵货。看手稿上所写这些香料，在仓库里耐心找找不成问题……
E: Let me see. I guess I can give you a few treasures you won't find anywhere else. And I may have some of these ingredients in the warehouse.

C: 你喝过一种名叫「卡利白」的汽水吗？
E: Have you ever had a soda called Kapo-Kali?

C: 它一度是空间站的招牌，风靡南垣星系的反重力饮品。
E: It was once the signature of the space station, an anti-gravity drink extremely popular in the Southern Orion system.

C: 那么，代价是什么呢？
E: Well then, what's the price?

C: 你看见一段模糊不清的监控录像，最后的画面停留在一个<color=#dbc291ff>爆炸头发型</color>的科员蹲下，将手伸向尽头的画面。
E: You see a blurry surveillance video recording. The final image is of a researcher <color=#dbc291ff>with a luscious hairstyle</color> kneeling down and reaching toward something.

C: …你缠着我这么久，也算陪我解了闷，这些东西就送给你吧——我真的不是懒得靠近垃圾桶喔。
E: ...You've been pestering me for so long, I guess it was kind of entertaining. Here, take these — It's not because I'm too lazy to toss them out.

C: 要是成功修复我们的通讯，我一定报答你——早晚请你当{F#伴娘}{M#伴郎}！
E: If you can resume our communication, I promise I'll reward you by inviting you to be our {F#bridesmaid}{M#best man}!

C: 我在这里也早就呆腻了…身为「黑塔•寰宇地概科」的科员，连真正的银河也没见过，说出去早晚笑掉别人的大牙。
E: I'm already tired of this place... As a member of the Herta Department of Cosmic Geography, I haven't even seen the real cosmos. Isn't it embarrassing?

C: 总有一天，总会有人，能看见我洛奇的闪光点。
E: One day, one day someone will see my advantages.

C: 那么，就拜托你了！我向艾丝妲站长申请了「{NICKNAME}」专属的权限卡。
E: Well, we shall count on you, then. I will also ask the lead researcher, Asta, to issue an access card exclusively for you.

C: 其实，激活本身不是难事，只需要走近界域定锚，你我的生物电场就会让它重新运转……
E: Well, actually, the activation itself isn't the difficult part. You just need to get close to the Space Anchor, and the biological polarity of your body will be enough to activate it.

C: 每个人都得参与吗？
E: Does everyone have to participate?

C: 左耳声级大于右耳，确定在九点钟方向。说明三点钟方向的怪物已被清除。做得好。
E: The sound is much louder in the left ear, which confirms the 9 o'clock position. That means the monsters in the 3 o'clock position have been eliminated. Good job.

C: 每个科室都珍藏着数以百计的藏品。由于此次怪物入侵，约莫有大半都在冲击中流散。
E: This monster invasion caused the loss of roughly half of the hundreds of collections held by each department.

C: 录像带的末段模糊不清。
E: The end of the video seems to be blurry.

C: 这里是……
E: This is...

C: 不，{M#先生}{F#小姐}。我志愿将自己的一切都贡献给法政科，贡献给正义，包括我的健康、我的梦想和我最炙烈的感情。
E: No, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}. I hope to contribute my everything to the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, including my health, my dreams, and my passion.

C: 快把门打开吧。
E: Open the door.

C: 正好让防卫科介入审讯。
E: Let's just call the Security Dept. on him now.

C: （可他说话的内容与发帖的文风，都与艾丝妲说的「毒鸡汤」有着显著不同，恐怕感染者并不是他。）
E: (But his speech and the style of his posts are significantly different from the "cliché quotes" Asta had mentioned. I'm afraid he's not the infected one.)

C: 你就不怀疑另外两个？
E: Have you ever suspected the other two?

C: 没错，人找不到，消息不回，通讯也不接。
E: Yes, I can't find him. He's not answering his messages or calls.

C: 你被波少粉丝后援会团团包围，被迫接受了漫长的思想教育，逐渐忘记了过来问询的原本目的……
E: You've been surrounded by the Master Capote Fan Club and listened to a frustratingly long lecture, thus gradually forgetting what you're going to ask...

C: 抱歉教授。我实在没有办法把你想象成一个…强势的上司。
E: I'm sorry, professor. I just can't think of you as an... an overbearing boss.

C: 你看，这个天花板都被打碎成什么样了。阿兰他心里肯定是憋了很多苦楚和委屈，但是又无处发泄，最后只能对着怪物奋力一击！
E: Look how smashed up this ceiling tile is... Arlan must have bottled up his frustration and had no way of releasing it — so he took it out on the monsters!

C: 小姐，我……
E: My lady, I...

C: 那、那个，法政科的卢卡奇也许会知道些什么，那家伙比界种科的人还熟悉空间站的生物……
E: Th—That Lukacs from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics may know something. He is more familiar with creatures around the space station than the staff from the Department of Ecology...

C: 既然如此，盯好阿德勒，也许会获得线索——他已经开始行动了。
E: In that case, let's keep our eyes on Adler. We might be able to gain some clues— He's already gone.

C: 和之前的比起来…好像也没什么区别？
E: It doesn't look very different from the one from before...?

C: 你们在密谋什么？
E: What are you plotting?

C: 是啊，阿德勒一直都像大人一样稳重，本还让我有些担心。
E: Um hum, Adler has always acted like an adult. And I was a bit concerned at some point.

C: 它好像说了什么？
E: Did it say something?

C: 嗯，你说得对，是我以偏概全了……
E: Hmm, you're right, I shouldn't overgeneralize like this...

C: 我还是想不起来…
E: I don't remember...

C: 一滴汗。
E: A drop of sweat.

C: 看这幅悠然自得的样子，她应该在这个房间待了好一会儿，估计是在等什么人吧。不知道之后发生了什么，咱们再看看别的地方。
E: Judging by how calm she is, she must have been in this room for a while — maybe she was waiting for someone. I'm not sure what happened after that — let's search somewhere else.

C: 你是内鬼！
E: Aha! You're the imposter! Among Us!

C: 这一点差的有点多。
E: Oh, so close yet so far.

C: 但我们在研究长远方向上产生了一些分歧，分歧往往带来偏执，而偏执会阻遏知识的形成。
E: However, we have our differences when it comes down to our long-term vision for the future. These differences will often manifest into bias, and bias will get in the way of the formulation of knowledge.

C: 那里有一群不知疲惫的生命，试图触摸真理的脐带。
E: There is a group of lifeforms there that know nothing of fatigue. They are attempting to touch upon the umbilical cord of the truth.

C: 似乎不太顺利啊。
E: It doesn't seem to be going well.

C: 嘿，朋友，这边这边！你可算来了，等你好久啦。
E: Hey friend, over here! You're finally here, I've been waiting for a long time.

C: 根据艾丝妲站长的指示，空间站成立了专项小组来解决这一问题。
E: Following Lead Researcher Asta's orders, the space station formed a special task force to tackle this problem.

C: 突如其来的现实发言！
E: This sudden honesty!

C: 等一下，你是在真心夸我吗？
E: Are you saying we're also beautiful?

C: 我不承认…
E: No...

C: 啊？然后呢？
E: Huh? And then?

C: 哼，你以为我想啊？我这叫被现实打败了，懂不懂？
E: Tsk, do you think I like being negative? My friend, this is what's known as falling prey to the grim reality of life, understand?

C: …这完全是不同的方向好嘛！要不…我们各自回自己的房间检查一下？
E: ...But those are in opposite directions! How about... we go check our own rooms?

C: 如此短暂…偶然的相逢。有幸认识列车组众人，你们的情感…如此瑰丽。
E: Such a brief, fortuitous encounter... It has been an honor knowing each and every one of you on the Express.

C: 去和大家聊聊吧…
E: Let's go talk with the others.

C: 假设银枝找到了「失踪」的伊德莉拉，以人类的双眼，他能辨认出来吗？还是面对自己所执着的「祂」，却像盲人一样视而不见，甚至浑然不觉……
E: Let's assume that Argenti finds the "missing" Idrila. Will he be able to recognize THEM with his human eyes? Or, obsessed with his version of "THEM," will he turn a blind eye and not even see THEM for who THEY are?

C: 需要帮忙么？
E: Do you need my help?

C: （不对，不是这条路。我没去过那里。）
E: (No, not this road. I didn't go there.)

C: 阿德勒？
E: Adler?

C: 身为其后裔，冥火大公有着和相位灵火相似的能力。恐怕他无法做到「相位变换」，但能实现劣化的「空间转移」。
E: As a scion of the Phase Flame, Duke Inferno would naturally share similar capabilities. Full-on phase shifting may be a bit too ambitious for him, but teleportation? That's likely more his speed.

C: 这就是人体自燃的真相：科员们并非消失，而是被「转移」了。
E: That is the truth of the spontaneous human combustion — the researchers didn't disappear — they were "moved."

C: 不用了。
E: No, I'm good.

C: （呼噜呼噜…）
E: (Purring)

C: 「芝士流心」是谁？
E: Who is Molten Cheese Tart?

C: 起初，我试图培育一位天才。但我失败了，此题尚不可解，还有漫长的路要探索。
E: At first, I tried to create a genius. I failed. That question has no solution yet, and a long journey of discovery still lies ahead.

C: 「反吐真剂」的药效也将过去。日后若有人提起我，你随意便是，或者说不曾相识也好。
E: The effects of the Anti-Truth Serum will also wear off. If others mention me to you in the future, you can answer however you like, or even pretend you never knew me.

C: 如果不希望秘密泄露，最彻底的方法就是将其销毁。「反吐真剂」的尾调会让你忘记我们共同经历的这一小段时光。
E: If I do not want a secret revealed, the most foolproof way is to destroy it. The Anti-Truth Serum will make you forget the brief period we spent together.
(Meow...)

C: 「阮•梅」造物蹦到了桌子上！
E: Ruan Mei's creation jumps onto the table!

C: 待办事项1已完成，接下来将导航至——「歌德宾馆」，该地区的联系人是「老歌德」，已规划最优路线。
E: To-do list item 1 is complete. Next, navigate to Goethe Hotel. The contact for this area is Old Goethe. The optimal route has already been plotted.

C: 就来一束「七彩虹」吧。
E: Then I'll take a bouquet of "Rainbow."

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 我能帮到他什么吗？
E: Can I help him somehow?

C: 对，我亲自赶走了公司狗。
E: That's right. I chased out the IPC dogs myself.

C: 你这生意也太好了吧？
E: Woah, your business is seriously booming!

C: 除此以外，他们还寄了一大包特产过来。喏，这些全是给你的，小三月听说了你这一路奔波的事，坚持要把特产全都留给你。
E: They also sent over a huge pack of souvenirs. Here, they're all yours. When March heard about all your adventures, she was determined to save them all for you when you got back.

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ——我们到了。
E: Jarilo-VI, we're here.

C: 桑博•科斯基，幸会。
E: Pleasure to meet you, the name's Sampo Koski.

C: 照片？
E: Photos?

C: 帮个忙，哥们！我不想被抓啊！
E: Help me, old friends! I don't wanna be caught!

C: 帕姆不能随便离开列车，它早就跟每个乘客都说过了吧？
E: Pom-Pom can't just leave the Express whenever they feel like it. You didn't know?

C: 那笔债务的数额…是天文级别，我甚至不知道该怎么准确地念出那串数字。
E: The debt owed is an astronomical amount. I don't even know how to read such a long string of numbers.

C: 根据她的说法，筑城者和公司投资人商定的还款年限是…<unbreak>280</unbreak>年。但借款之后不到百年，雅利洛-Ⅵ和整个银河的联系就彻底切断了。
E: According to her account, the repayment period agreed upon by the Architects and the IPC investors was... <unbreak>280</unbreak> years. However, less than a century after the loan was taken out, the connection between Jarilo-VI and the rest of the galaxy was completely severed.

C: 要是咱们之间的缘分够深，说不定在节庆现场还能遇见。喏，这是我的联系方式——工作的时候我一般不回消息，等下班了咱们可以多多交流~
E: Who knows, maybe we'll cross paths again during the celebrations. Oh, here's my contact information. I don't usually respond during work hours, but I'd be happy to chat off the clock⁓

C: 没办法…向导丢了，接下来就只能靠咱们自己继续深入了。走吧！
E: Well, I guess that's that. We're on our own now. Let's keep going.

C: 不知道为什么，字里行间都能感受到布洛妮娅的焦虑…{NICKNAME}，我们尽快回去吧？
E: Hmm... I get the feeling Bronya's worried about something. We'd better go back and see her, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你们到了，外来者。系统功能一切正常，我并未与公司的使者起冲突。
E: Greetings, outsiders. System functions are normal — I have had no conflict with the IPC's representatives.

C: 城里的大家都在帮忙施工，庆典恐怕是办不起来了。不过往好处想，能和托帕小姐这样的公司高管搭上线，也算是不虚此行了吧？
E: Looks like everyone in the city's helping with construction — doubt there'll be much time for celebrating. Still, look on the bright side — we got to meet a top IPC executive! The trip wasn't a complete waste, right?

C: 小朋友，快来看看呀！
E: Look here, little one!

C: 北方——大陆的最北方。
E: North... as far north as we can go.

C: …然后又重启了一切。
E: ...And then began again.

C: 这次没能让你们体会到节日的氛围，实在是遗憾…我保证，下次一定会尽力补偿各位。
E: I'm sorry you didn't get to experience the festival atmosphere this time around... I promise I'll make it up to you all next time.

C: 拥护大守护者的决定！
E: I support the Supreme Guardian's decision!

C: 他已经丧失人性了…
E: He'd lost his last shred of humanity...

C: 你们做了正确的事。
