E: You two did the right thing.

C: 今天就聊到这里吧，谢谢你帮我处理哥哥留下的烂摊子。这是一点谢意，请你收下。
E: Let's call it a day. Thank you for cleaning up the mess my brother left behind. Here — for your trouble.

C: 欢迎回来！「沉量级」赛事现已开放！
E: Welcome back, the welterweight league is now open!

C: 天啊…没想到您已经制霸五大赛事了！外来者实力竟恐怖如斯！
E: Dear Lord, you've conquered all five of the leagues! Outsiders are such frightening forces of nature!

C: <size=36>「灰背鲸」，以及它的全新遥控支援系统「轻骑兵」！</size>
E: <size=36>Grayback Whale, and its brand-new remote support system, the Light Cavalry!</size>

C: 听说你找我？
E: I heard you are looking for me?

C: 想否认事实？！拉明娜啊拉明娜，你的花样可是越来越多了！我来帮你回忆回忆——
E: You want to deny the truth!? Lamina, Lamina, you're getting more and more dishonest! Let me help you remember—

C: 但是什么也没有发生。
E: But nothing happened.

C: 考虑到现在没有第四个人在场，拉明娜认为谁是水魈，谁就是水魈。
E: Since there is no fourth person present, whoever Lamina thinks is the Xenohydro, is the Xenohydro.

C: 看来，我和你，注定要共沉沦了……
E: It seems you and I are destined to go down together...

C: 没有天赋。没有作品。只有靠多做杂活，才能在夹缝中证明自己的价值。
E: No talent. No achievements. I can barely prove my value by doing the most trivial jobs.

C: 拜托拜托，我只是想站在这儿看个热闹就走，千万别被其他人发现……
E: Sorry, sorry, I am just here to see the excitement. Don't let the others see me...

C: 结果就是一切～敢冒风险的人才能获得成功～
E: Oh please, it's the result that counts~ Gotta take risks sometimes if you wanna succeed~

C: 的确，在希露瓦的机械屋那见过。
E: Yes, we saw one in Serval's workshop.

C: 如果{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}你愿意的话…可以帮帮我吗？
E: If it won't be a bother to you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}... Could you help me out?

C: 我想让它们消失，我想离开这里…我想去见他，他答应希莉儿，会带我过上完美的生活……
E: I want them to disappear, and I wanna get out of here... I want to go and see him. He has promised to give me a perfect life...

C: 某种力量在阻止你带走希莉儿…通过这一连串的反馈，它还完整地向你传达了另一则信息：停止尝试，否则等着你的会是更大的苦头。
E: A force is preventing you from taking Cyrille away... Based on this feedback, you understand it is trying to tell you to stop trying, or face more pain.

C: 顺时针旋转箭头
E: Clockwise rotation arrow

C: 要是我当时带着查宝，大概就不会发生这种事了…不过这样的话，你也找不到最后的线索了吧？真麻烦啊。
E: If I had brought Findie, it probably wouldn't have happened... But then you probably wouldn't be able to find the last clue. What a hassle.

C: …抱歉，一不小心就说了些不中听的话。也许这店名只是代表了某种单纯美好的愿望，并没有其他意思。
E: ...Sorry, don't mean to sound cynical. Maybe it simply represents the people's hopes up here.

C: 一束「初雪八落」。
E: A bouquet of First Snow, please.

C: 有了妈妈的帮助，下层区药物短缺的情况肯定能得到缓解。这样一来，很多走投无路的病人应该也能看到希望了。
E: With her help, we'll be able to ease the Underworld's medical supply shortage. That's good news for patients who'd lost hope.

C: 那是…和瓦赫医生一样的……
E: It's... the same as Dr. Vache's.

C: 谢谢你，队长。那我们就收下了。
E: Thank you, captain. We'll take it with us.

C: 不服用药物，直接与敌人战斗。
E: Let's not drink it, it's time to fight some enemies.

C: 你感觉到了吗，{NICKNAME}？瓦赫的药物似乎起效果了。
E: Can you feel it, {NICKNAME}? It seems like Vache's medicine is working.

C: 哦，没听清楚？那我再给你讲一遍。
E: Oh, you must have missed something. Here's what I've learned so far...

C: 我拜托了驻在镇上的铁卫去各个重要场所盘查，希望他们能查出……
E: I asked the Silvermane Guards stationed there to go investigate some places of interest. I hope they find something...

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}！很高兴见到您。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm glad to see you here!

C: 为了确保能验出文物的真伪，我可是阅读了大量的文献资料…请相信我的判断。
E: I've done a lot of research into artifact authentication techniques... you can trust my judgment.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}。我们回博物馆去，把这件展品物归原处。
E: Let's go, {NICKNAME}. We need to take this item back to the museum where it belongs.

C: 你会这么问，就说明你已经心动了，对吧？太好了！
E: The fact you're asking means you've got your heart set on it already, right? Great!

C: …啊，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！还有，这位是…佩拉格娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜姐姐！
E: Ah, it's {F#big sister}{M#big brother}! And... Miss Pelageya Sergeyevna!

C: 嗯…听起来确实没什么关联。
E: Mm... You're right, it probably doesn't...

C: …咦？这么说来，你手上掌握了确凿的犯罪证据？
E: Huh? Wait, so you have incriminating evidence against the culprit?

C: 哦，正是——我看二位已经在这行政广场附近徘徊了许久，逢人便要停下来询问，想必是在调查什么要紧之事。
E: Oh, as a matter of fact, I do. I noticed you two had been wandering around Administrative District Plaza for some time now, stopping to ask questions at every turn, so I surmised you were investigating something important.

C: 投影仪复位以后，<color=#dbc291ff>历史区也可以对市民开放了</color>。这样一来，博物馆最主要的三个展区都可以正常接待游客了！
E: Once the projector is restored, <color=#dbc291ff>the History-Culture Hall can reopen to the public</color>. Then visitors can enjoy all three of the museum's most important exhibits!

C: （他开始怀疑我了…这可不妙。）
E: (He's starting to suspect me... that's not good.)

C: 「话说回来，博物馆经营游戏玩的还开心吗？友情提醒你，叔叔在这方面可是一把好手！」
E: "So, how's museum manager life treating you? Just a little reminder — when it comes to working in museums, I'm quite the dab hand..."

C: 哎呀，就是那个志愿者！你不要拿漆黑的虎克大人打趣了！
E: Agh, I mean volunteer! You shouldn't sully Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's... um... great name!

C: 哈哈，是觉得和我平时风格差别很大嘛？
E: Haha, it's not like something I would write, isn't it?

C: 实不相瞒：早之前在技术部做研究的日子里，我有六成时间都在对付克里珀堡乱七八糟的表单……
E: To be honest, back when I was doing research in the Technology Division, I spent <unbreak>60%</unbreak> of my time dealing with all the messy forms coming from Qlipoth Fort...

C: 请再稍等我一会儿。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 噗，这都哪儿跟哪儿啊……
E: Pfft, no way, what are you even talking about!

C: 啊，不是，我是想说「少见」！对不起，希儿，希望我没有冒犯到你……
E: Ah, I meant to say "uncommon surname"! Sorry, Seele. I hope you aren't offended...

C: 噗…原来是这样。不过既然提到你的名字了，有一件事我一直很好奇——
E: Pfft... I see. Speaking of your name, there's something I've always been curious about...

C: 嘿，你干嘛去！回来先跟娜塔莎确认下情况，别随便乱跑。
E: Hey, where are you going!? Don't think you can just run off — come back here and finish talking things through with Natasha.

C: …啊，你在我这里登记下名字吧。
E: Oh... You can put the name down here.

C: 哔嘟…对对对，太对了。需要找东西的时候，呼唤查宝就对了。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Yes, yes, yes. When you need to find something you can't see, just call upon Findie. That's me.

C: 拜托你了，快点吧！
E: Thank you! Please hurry!

C: …我还没说要干什么呢！不过，精神头很足，不愧是鼹鼠党的荣誉队员！
E: ...I haven't said what we're gonna do! But that's the spirit. You truly are an honorary member of The Moles!

C: 不是这样的，费斯曼大叔对流浪者们都很信任，大家也都信任着大叔。
E: Not at all, Mr. Fersman trusts every vagrant, and every one of us trusts Mr. Fersman.

C: 我们这里谁都没有这样的权利随随便便将谁抓起来，大家都是流浪者。
E: We're all vagrants. None of us have the authority to arrest anyone just because we feel like it.

C: 那厨子心术不正，费斯曼大叔的玩意绝对是他偷走的！
E: That cook is a crook. He's definitely the one who stole Fersman's device.

C: 冤枉啊，我没偷东西啊！呜呜呜…早知道会被你们怀疑，我就不该在那个时候回到避难所；我要是不回到避难所……
E: Wha— What? You have the wrong person, I didn't steal anything! Waaaah... I knew you'd suspect me. I shouldn't have returned to the shelter at that time. If only I hadn't returned to the shelter...

C: 好啊，我们这就抢回去！
E: Okay, we'll take it then!

C: 我无意干涉你的选择。我只希望这是你彻底想清楚后做出的决定…而不是把它当作逃避的手段。
E: I'm not trying to change your mind. I just want to know that your choice to leave this planet is a result of having thought things through, not because you're trying to run away from something.

C: 姐姐！
E: Serval!

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。我本来提议直接在群里聊，但姐姐坚决不肯…辛苦你特地跑一趟了。
E: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. I wanted to talk about this in our chat group, but sis won't have it... I'm sorry you had to run all the way out here.

C: 哎？好啊，让我看看。
E: Huh? Sure, let me take a look.

C: 而且，玲宝想从她那里学点什么的话应该不难吧？她肯定很乐意教你——毕竟你是她亲妹妹嘛。
E: Anyway, it wouldn't be hard for you to get her to teach you something. You're her sister, she'd be happy to teach you.

C: …啊，对不起，不该说这个的。我有点太激动了。
E: ...Ah, sorry. I shouldn't talk about this. I was getting carried away.

C: 嗯，只是回去放了行李，顺便冲了个澡。花不了多久。
E: Mm-hmm. I went back, stored my supplies, and had a shower. It didn't take long.

C: 我知道了，那这些止痛剂，咱们就平分了吧。
E: *sigh* I see. Let's split these painkillers then.

C: 哼，谁说不是呢？
E: Hmph, aren't we all, though?

C: 那他还真是个小英雄。
E: Wow, what a little hero.
Ohh...

C: 其实我也有一件宝贝…
E: I have a treasure of my own...

C: 科鲁泽倒在了地上，就像裂界怪物一样消失掉，没能留下痕迹。
E: Kluzer fell to the ground and vanished without a trace, just like a Fragmentum Monster.

C: 拿棒棒糖钓小孩子出来吧。
E: If we had lollipops, they'd give themselves up in no time.

C: 咦？那不是「灰熊」型的机器人吗？我们快去看看！
E: Huh? Isn't that a Grizzly robot? Let's go take a look!

C: 帕斯卡，保护，大家！
E: Pascal, protect, everybody!

C: 掘掘博士
E: Dr. Dig

C: 那女人冷着眼，旁观发生的一切
E: Her gaze cold as ice, while the world passes by, yeah

C: 掘掘博士
E: Dr. Dig

C: 提问——微晶单元应当接入哪个零件？
E: Riddle me this: A microcrystalline unit should be connected to which component?

C: 哎哟！这下怎么比之前还疼啊！还好这是最后一步了……
E: Aaaah!!! How come it hurt even more than the other two!? Hmph, at least that's the final step...

C: 那个，如果大家不介意的话…克拉拉还有重要的事，就先回去了。
E: Um, if you don't mind... I still have important things to do. I'll go back now.

C: 放心吧，绝对能搞定——对吧丹恒？
E: Relax, we got this. Right, Dan Heng?

C: 克拉拉明白。你们帮助了很多矿区的伤员，而且还冒着风险去镇上找物资，大家都是热心的好人。
E: I understand. You helped a lot of injured people in the mine, and you risked going into the town for supplies. You're good people.

C: 哎哟，试试也没损失嘛。
E: Come onnnn, what have we got to lose?

C: 别急着走嘛！让我给你讲讲，讲完了你就感兴趣了。
E: Don't just dash off! Let me tell you about it. I'm sure I can stoke your interest...

C: 我们要去找尤利安躲猫猫。
E: We're going to look for Julian and play hide-and seek-with him.

C: …这个大叔，好像觉得全世界的人都在故意骗他…怎么办，荣誉队员？
E: ...This guy thinks that the whole world is against him... What should we do, honorary member?

C: 但是我也有拍卖商品，还有一份商品委托合同。只要我的商品能卖出个好价钱，说不定就够把熊玩偶买下了。
E: But I also have my own items to auction and a commodity contract. If I can sell my stuff at a good price, I might be able to afford the bear.

C: 所以呢，所以呢？
E: So? What's the catch?

C: 我听人说这个拍卖会上有件叫「地髓矿脉探针」的宝贝，但是没想到价格会定这么高啊?
E: ...I heard there was something called a Geomarrow Probe at this auction, but I didn't think it would be so pricey.

C: …呀，除了你们，还真有个人注册了买家的身份，但是却完全没出过价！
E: ...Hmm, aside from you, there was someone else who registered as a buyer but never put in a bid!

C: 别想骗这孩子，她精得很。
E: Don't try to fool this kid. She's smart.

C: 可、可是我们只有七百冬城盾呀……
E: B—But we only have <unbreak>700</unbreak> shield...

C: …虎克还是觉得，探针才是最好的礼物。
E: ...Hook still thinks the probe is the best gift.

C: 别担心，老爹！虎克已经不需要玩偶陪伴啦！有娜塔莎姐姐、鼹鼠党还有荣誉队员陪着虎克，虎克早就不会觉得孤单了。
E: Don't worry, daddy! I don't need a doll to keep me company anymore! Natasha, The Moles and the honorary member will keep me company from now on, so I won't be lonely.

C: 这是很重要的线索…！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我们等下一起去查看一下现场吧？
E: This is a crucial clue! {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, Let's go investigate the crime scene together!

C: 唔…虽然听起来很离奇，但也不能排除这个可能性。
E: Hmm... That would be quite strange, yet such a scenario can't be ruled out.

C: 史瓦罗先生，我想给这个小家伙起个名字…你觉得什么样的名字好听呢？
E: Mr. Svarog, I'd like to give this little fella a name. Any ideas for a good name?

C: 克拉拉也不知道…但如果能把目标锁定到三台机器身上的话，那……
E: I'm not sure, but if we can narrow it down to the three automatons, then...

C: 但于我而言，保护人类社群人身及财产安全的优先级绝对高于上述研究。
E: However, in my opinion, protecting humanity's safety and property is more important than research.

C: 无需进行更多讨论。如果你决心采用克拉拉的方案，史瓦罗基地网络将无条件配合后续行动。
E: There is no need to discuss this any further. If you insist on using Clara's solution, the Svarog base network will completely support you.

C: 让我再考虑一下。
E: I'd like to give it some more thought.
██Thank██you█ ██ █Clara██ █{NICKNAME}█ ██ ████—

C: 不不不，我负担不起……
E: N—No, that's uh, not something I could handle...

C: 马利克下周也要调走了，你听说了吗？最近前线和城里好像都很缺人手。
E: Hmm-hmm... Did you hear Mallick is being reassigned? It seems like both the front line and the city are shorthanded right now.

C: 到了情势危急的时候——现在放松散漫的家伙就会被两面夹击，丢掉小命！
E: The situation is critical... The lazy and undisciplined among you will lose your lives to the forces surrounding us!

C: 这就是筑城者的信念…而对于我们而言，地狱就是望不到边际的裂界，一群疲惫的银鬃铁卫，还有…弥漫着死亡味道的空气。
E: That's the belief of the Architects... but for us, hell is an endless Fragmentum, a few exhausted Silvermane Guards... and the stench of death in the air.

C: 我仔细想了一下，确实有这个可能。
E: I was just thinking that, we can't rule it out.

C: 各位，认识下我的老朋友——邓恩队长。他以前可是我乐队的王牌键盘手。
E: Everyone, this is Captain Dunn, an old friend of mine. He used to be an ace on the keys in the band.

C: 只是暂时晕过去了，不用太担心。
E: He's just unconscious. Don't worry.

C: 现在引起注意了……
E: I think we attracted attention...

C: 把握，不到三成吧。
E: I've probably got a <unbreak>30%</unbreak> chance, or less.

C: 是啊，我们的目的和你、希露瓦、布洛妮娅明明是一致的呀，都是要「存护」这个世界！根本没有敌对的理由好嘛！
E: Yeah, our goal is the same as yours, Serval's, and Bronya's — we just want to preserve this world! There's no reason to turn against each other!

C: 「换位思考」…说着轻巧。人人都有自己的苦衷，但是如果互相之间连面都见不上，还提什么相互理解？
E: Put ourselves in their shoes... Easier said than done. Everyone has their struggles, but how can we understand them if we can't even see each other?

C: 麻利点！干嘛扭扭捏捏的？
E: Come on! What are you squirming around for?

C: 够了！都给我住手！你们，把手里的武器放在地上，双手抱头！动作快！
E: That's enough! Put your weapons down and put your hands up! Quick!

C: 你怎么还有心情开玩笑啊……
E: I wish you wouldn't make light of the matter.

C: 离开？离开哪里？我不记得自己从哪来，也不记得自己离开过任何地方……
E: Leave? Leave where? I can't remember where I'm from, and I can't remember leaving any place...

C: 难道她也在这里？
E: Could she be here too?

C: 重获新生需要付出代价。抹除一切属于旧世界的陈腐印迹，放弃毫无意义的苟延残喘…这就是「星核」开出的价码。
E: There is a price to pay for new life. Wiping away every decaying vestige of the Old World, renouncing the meaningless and lingering struggle... This is the price the Stellaron demands.

C: 欸？她…她说话了吗？
E: Huh!? Did... Did she just speak!?

C: …星核！
E: ...the Stellaron!

C: …我很清楚后果，杰帕德。退下吧。
E: ...I know well the consequences, Gepard. You may leave.

C: 当然——我知道该怎么做。
E: Say no more — I know what to do.

C: 不会！
E: live...

C: 我…不想…伤害别人……
E: I don't... want to hurt... anyone...

C: 我…有一事相求。
E: I... have a favor to ask.

C: 也罢…或许像我这样的人不配获得救赎。再见了，陌生人。
E: Well... maybe someone like me doesn't deserve to be saved. Farewell, stranger.

C: 你明白我一直以来在干的都是什么样的工作了吧？
E: Now do you know the kind of work I've been doing all this time?

C: 根据你的观察，以船身完整通过桥洞为标准，刚才<color=#dbc291ff>「白色的客运型星槎有多少艘？」</color>
E: According to your observation and counting only those that passed under the bridge entirely, <color=#dbc291ff>how many white passenger starskiffs went past?</color>

C: 星槎海街区目前只允许同行两个类型的星槎：<color=#dbc291ff>客运型和货运型</color>。
E: At the moment, there are only two types of starskiffs allowed on the streets of the Starskiff Haven: <color=#dbc291ff>passenger-type and cargo-type</color>.

C: 是吗？俺身体可好了，已经出院了，她不用担心俺。
E: Is that so? I'm good. I even got discharged. She doesn't need to worry about me.

C: 每次都能在事故发生的时候出现，这究竟又是一种怎样的才能呢？
E: Isn't it a talent of some kind to be able to show up every time an accident happens? Wouldn't you say so?

C: 啧，本来只想唬一下的，没想到还真的被拍下来了。
E: Ugh, I was just bluffing. Didn't think you'd have this hard evidence.

C: 鄙人陶德•雷奥登绝不拖欠薪资，还会给{NICKNAME}缴纳安全险和双倍加班补贴。
E: I, Todd Riordan, hereby humbly promise that I will never withhold pay, and will provide {NICKNAME} with personal insurance and double pay for any overtime.

C: 我连药方都没开完就被「请」了出来。
E: I got "asked" to leave before I even finished writing the prescription.

C: 当然不会，这只是我研究的开始罢了。而我首先要解决一个心头疑问：那位丹士长赠给我的药方究竟是真是假。
E: Of course not. This is only the start of my research, but the question I want to answer the most is whether the prescription the last chief alchemist gave me is genuine.

C: 那个女人的礼物一定包藏祸心…
E: That woman's gifts always contain evil intent...

C: 陶德疑惑地看向你。
E: Todd looks at you, puzzled.

C: 将书藏在这里属实是糟蹋了，但还好没有，你不禁松了口气。
E: It is a positive disaster to keep books here. Thankfully, the books were not damaged.

C: 我找到莉拉了。
E: I found Lila.

C: 就是这家花店，对吧？
E: This is the florist, right?

C: 你觉得蘑菇会怎么回答？
E: How do you think the mushroom will respond?

C: 它太忧郁了，完全没法沟通。
E: It's so depressed that it can't communicate at all.

C: 还真是个诗人，属现代派的…
E: What a poet — and a modernist, at that...

C: 你船票落家里了…
E: You left your ticket at home...

C: 你刚才是不是在拍照？把照片给我看看！现在，立刻，快！
E: Were you taking a photo just now? Show me the photo now! Hurry up!

C: 异地同惚恍
E: always will unite in thoughts.

C: 没错，就是这样的。
E: Yes. That's it.

C: 你现在还爱着孤屿吗？
E: Do you still love Guyu?

C: 你将你打听到的消息都告诉了小聪，包括静斋想要你转告的内容。
E: You tell Cong all the information you gathered, including what Jingzhai wanted you to convey.

C: 前提是把所有钱都还回去。
E: Provided that all the money is returned.

C: 嗯，结果他既不是狐仙，也不美丽…温符瑞你还好吗？
E: So, he's not foxian, and he's not a beauty... Are you okay, Wen Furui?

C: 我本来就没有会员资格。
E: I don't even have a membership.

C: 你带我们去见她。
E: You take us to her.

C: 嗯，结果他既不是狐仙，也不美丽…温符瑞你还好吗？
E: So, he's not foxian, and he's not a beauty... Are you okay, Wen Furui?

C: 我竟然有一些心动。
E: That would be nice.

C: 你怎么还在这里啊？
E: Why are you still here?

C: 说回正题，老师的信里提到过，他在鳞渊境见过一些持明族的古迹。比如<color=#dbc291ff>供奉「龙尊」的雕像</color>，还有不少精美的<color=#dbc291ff>历史壁画</color>，这些都是持明历史的见证。
E: Anyway, my teacher mentioned that he had sighted some Vidyadhara monuments in Scalegorge Waterscape in his letters. For example, <color=#dbc291ff>the statue dedicated to the high elder</color> and many beautiful <color=#dbc291ff>historical murals</color>. These bore witness to the Vidyadhara history.

C: 哈哈哈，你还真是促狭啊。没错，是拜托你去瞧瞧。
E: Hahaha, what a nitpicker you are. That's right. I'll need you to check it out for me.

C: 要不要去别的地方瞧瞧？
E: Should we check out some other places?

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。答应你的酬劳…我说话算话。
E: Thanks, {NICKNAME}. I'll pay you as promised.

C: 你们怎么老是让我跑腿啊？
E: Why do people here keep making me run errands?

C: 衰老可以被延缓，但终有一天会到来。对仙舟人来说，魔阴身也是如此，只是它比死亡可怕得多。魔阴身是仙舟人血脉中无法回避的诅咒。
E: Aging can be slowed, but it's still unavoidable — just like being stricken with mara for the people of the Xianzhou... Unfortunately, becoming mara-struck is more terrifying than death. It's an inevitable curse in the blood of Xianzhou natives.

C: 你不会是帮她遮掩吧，看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
E: Are you covering for her? You know something alright — I have a few more questions for you.

C: 你是怎么出来的，我也是。
E: I came here the same way you did.

C: 这封信……！
E: This letter...!

C: 这封信已经证明了半夏与药王秘传存在关系，但不是决定性证据。
E: The letter has proven a link between Banxia and the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, but it's not decisive proof

C: 「魔阴身」的征兆就是从此开始显现。不过，比这更可怕的还是之后肉身上的变化……
E: That's when the symptoms of being stricken with mara begin to show. But the physical changes are the most terrifying...

C: 那个男人，他得到满足了么？
E: That guy, was he happy?

C: 大人…为何一直想逃离丹鼎司呢？您不喜欢治病救人吗？
E: My lady... why do you always run away from the Alchemy Commission? Don't you like treating people?

C: 我们是半夏派来的。
E: Banxia sent us.

C: 听说过星穹列车吗？
E: Have you heard of the Astral Express?

C: 哈哈哈哈，我可没有要抢走丹恒的意思。
E: Hahahaha, I do not seek to take Dan Heng away from you.

C: 白露小姐，您没有事吧？您没事就好。
E: Miss Bailu, are you okay? I was so worried.

C: 以「蝗灾」为例，实现「相变」之后，蝗群会进一步加剧群集行为和游牧行为，并且使个体体内某种激素水平增高，变得更加异化疯狂……
E: Taking the Swarm as an example - they will intensify their collective hivemind behaviors and migrate more after the phase transition occurs. The level of certain hormones in their bodies will also increase, making them more mutated and frenzied...

C: 嗯，您帮了地衡司很多，随时欢迎您调阅行动档案。
E: Alright. Since you've helped the Realm-Keeping Commission on many occasions, you are welcome to access our operation archives any time.

C: 那当然了。自己人永远都是对的。
E: Of course, crew members are always right.

C: 搞不好就是某一位《渔公案》的狂热书友做出了模仿犯罪啊。罗刹被缩小以后就跟着这两个人走了…案情越来越可怕了，没准还是宗绑架案！
E: *gasp* What if a crazy Angler Mystery fan decided to commit a copycat crime? Luocha gets turned into a child, then follows a mysterious duo in black... The plot thickens — this could be a kidnapping!

C: 不过，根据机巧鸟的影像，当天罗刹去那片空地前的最后一站，就是你们店里。
E: Still, according to the cycrane recordings, Luocha's final stop before heading towards the open area was your store.

C: 杨叔，你果然神机妙算啊。罗刹这家伙是真的坏，怎么会有这么坏的人…《渔公案》这么好的书，他说撕就撕。太气人了。
E: Mr. Yang's instinct was right all along — Luocha is a villain! How could he do this? Tearing up a book as well-written as The Angler Mystery... Unacceptable!

C: 应该不是不安，只是担忧。
E: I wouldn't call it restless. A little concerned, maybe.

C: 好！辛苦你啦，净砚小姐。
E: Thanks for the help, Miss Jingyan!

C: （小三月在细节上会突然变得很有逻辑。）
E: (March's logic does seem to improve when it comes to minor details.)

C: 我也不知道…反正不露脸，就当是{NICKNAME}吧。
E: I'm not sure either — the pilot didn't show themself, so... Let's just assume it was {NICKNAME}.

C: 什么「剧透仙人」啊，单纯就是没素质！
E: "The Immortal Spoiler"? Ugh, some people just wanna watch the world burn.

C: 当时的情况很紧急！只有我有那个技术……
E: It was a dire situation! I was the only one who could—

C: 瓦尔特先生，还有{NICKNAME}？二位这次来神策府，是有什么事情要办吗？
E: Mr. Yang, and {NICKNAME}? What brings you to the Seat of Divine Foresight this time?

C: 真怀念啊，当年那个被云骑军控诉超速飞行，抓到我面前的狐人小姑娘，现在已经是和我平起平坐的司舵大人了。
E: Hehe, it all serves to remind me... A long time ago, a young foxian girl, charged by the Knights with a high-speed flight violation, was brought before me as punishment... now she's the Madam Helm Master — my equal.

C: 你们来啦。我妈好像…心情不太好，去外面散心了。
E: You're here. My mom... isn't in a great mood. She went for a walk.

C: 作为外客翻找天舶司的档案…实在有失礼貌。晴霓小姐，我们只能负责陪同，查找的事情还请你自己动手。
E: Hmm... A couple of outworlders going through Sky-Faring Commission files isn't a good look... I'm afraid we can only accompany you, Miss Qingni — you'll need to do the searching yourself.

C: 我爱工作。我爱加班。我爱工作。我爱加班。我爱工作。我爱加班。我爱工作。我爱加班。
E: I love work. I love overtime. I love work. I love overtime. I love work. I love overtime. I love work. I love overtime.

C: 驭空大人的私人日记你也敢翻？还带着人家的闺女一起翻？帝弓在上，你们这可真是……
E: How dare you read Madam Yukong's personal diary! And with her daughter, too!? By the Arbiter, you two are in for a—

C: 真能说服她吗？
E: Can we really convince her?

C: 晴霓！你要去干什么！
E: Qingni! Where are you going?

C: 我想…和您一起飞行一次……
E: I want to... fly with you at least once...

C: 你有没有见过这个人？
E: Have you seen this person?

C: 你在坚持的是什么呢？「选择的权利」吗？抑或仅仅是抗争呢？你还不明白，即使这份抗争的权利，也是在注定的可能性中被死死限制的吗？
E: What is it you're holding on to? The right to choose? Or are you actually trying to defy destiny? Don't you understand that even this act of defiance is limited by predetermined possibilities?

C: 刃与现实的感官已经被我强制阻断了，现在，他只能听见我的声音，感受我的触碰，除此以外的一切他都浑然不觉。
E: I've weakened Blade's senses to the outside world so that he's only able to hear my voice and feel my touch — he's oblivious to everything else.

C: 我看见你的表情了——别问。我不能告诉你答案真实与否。尽情猜测，并且带着答案选择下一个问题：这就是「真心话游戏」的妙处。希望你的下一个问题足够有趣～
E: I see the look on your face... Don't bother asking — I can't tell you if an answer is true or not. Make your best guess and choose your next question based on my answer — that's the beauty of the game. I hope your next question proves interesting~

C: 这个游戏对我而言，真假并不重要……
E: For me, the truth or lack thereof is not what matters in this game...

C: 跟着她那么久还活着的，你是第一个。
E: I've yet to see anyone follow her for as long as you did... and live to tell the tale.

C: 就等杨叔一声令下啦。
E: Awaiting orders, Mr. Yang!

C: 这位是罗浮仙舟的前代剑首「镜流」大人，与你的前世之身「饮月君」可是生死之交。不仅如此，她还是景元将军的…恩师。
E: That is Jingliu, the previous Sword Champion of the Xianzhou Luofu. She was the closest friend of Imbibitor Lunae, your previous incarnation. She was also the general's... master.

C: 但那是很久之前的过去了。可惜，可惜，虽英雄如此，却也无法解脱魔阴。据说镜流大人最终神智狂乱、大开杀戒，成了逃亡域外的重犯。
E: However, those are ancient stories. It's a shame that even a hero like her wasn't able to break free of mara. It is said that in the end, Jingliu lost her sanity and slaughtered anyone in sight. She was deemed a criminal and fled to outer worlds.

C: 这次由你先行，我们在造化洪炉处碰头。
E: You go on ahead this time. We'll meet up at the Creation Furnace.

C: 我不打算动手。
E: I don't plan on fighting.

C: 景元向来善解人意，又听闻你会赴约，便答应了我的请求。
E: Jing Yuan has always been an understanding person. He heard that you would be coming and agreed to my request.

C: 他成为了长生种？
E: He became a long-life species?

C: 像咱们这样，也不是小小年纪就登上了列车，踏上开拓之旅……
E: We're not that old ourselves, right? And yet here we are — Express passengers on trailblazing expeditions!

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 没有问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 我就是来为将军除妖的。
E: That's why I'm here — to help the general eliminate those demons.

C: 咱们来比一场，就用如今遍布罗浮仙舟的孽物试剑。瞧瞧谁的剑更快，斩的更多，如何？
E: Let's have ourselves a little contest. We can use the abominations that have infested the Luofu as target practice... and see whose sword can slay more, and slay faster.

C: 等等看…
E: Wait a second...

C: 「这身金丹玄甲，与我的血肉适性匹配无缺，简直就像是自个身上长出来的器官一般。但它究竟能发挥出几成功力，始终是个谜。」
E: "This armor fits well my blood and flesh. It is like it were an organ attached to my body. However, its prowess is yet to be tested."

C: 比试尚未结束，因为我的最后一剑还没来得及刺出，场上已没了对手……
E: Our contest has not yet come to a conclusion... for I have yet to make my final move, and the field has no opponent...

C: 云骑军排查星核所在的同时，我也奉将军命令追索魔阴身相关之事。托你的福，线索已浮出水面了。
E: While the Cloud Knights were searching for the Stellaron's whereabouts, I was carrying out the general's orders — tracking down clues on the mara-struck. Thanks to your efforts, we now have a lead.

C: 咱们出发吧，这里人太多，不宜久留。
E: Let's make haste — there are too many people here to linger.

C: 绿芙蓉轻松地吹了个唿哨，用笃定的眼神看向你，他似乎认定了你一定会屈从内心的渴望跟他走。
E: Green Hibiscus gently whistles. He looks at you with a calm expression, seemingly certain that you will give into your heart's desire and go with him.

C: 别别别…我知道，你肯定是来卧底的。我其实也是！
E: W—Wait a second! You're here undercover, right? So am I!

C: 你怎么穿着军装就来了…
E: Why did you come here in your uniform...?

C: 嗐，我寻摸着像这样的邪恶组织发展下线时，多半希望成员能在执法者队伍里渗透影响力，所以我穿着盔甲就来了。这叫充分洞察用户需求。
E: Hmph, I have my reasoning. Cults like this want to recruit people with influence in law and order — I wanted them to know I was a Cloud Knight! Always know your enemy...

C: 所以，你在这边是要办什么事吗？
E: So, what can I help you with?

C: 各位，当心。
E: Be careful, everyone.

C: 咦，怎么还有个没疏散的平民？
E: Huh? Why is there still a civilian out here?

C: 再走几步都快到大门口了。谢谢你们护送，咱们就在这儿暂别吧。
E: A few more steps and we're at the main gate. Thank you for escorting me — we must go our separate ways.

C: 本座是医学外行…但所幸读书甚多！知道失忆的情况无外乎两种：要么是记忆沉睡在识海深处，无法被唤起；要么，是被某种手段直接自大脑中抹去了……
E: I am no medical professional... but fortunately I'm very fond of reading! We understand that there are two types of memory loss: One where the memories remain dormant, floating around in the unconsciousness unable to be awakened, and another that involves direct erasure of memories from the brain...

C: 「不应在场，但却在场」的人，会是谁呢？
E: "The person present, who shouldn't be"... Who could it be?

C: 不要回头，继续向前走。
E: Don't look back. Keep going forward.

C: 歌德旅馆已成历史……
E: The Goethe Hotel is already history...

C: 我们可以继续了吗？
E: May we proceed?

C: 继续吧。
E: Yes.

C: 清醒点，别发梦了。幻胧朝着建木的方向去了，如果不去阻止绝灭大君，必将会有一场浩劫。
E: Stay focused. Phantylia is headed for the Ambrosial Arbor — if we don't stop the Lord Ravager, it'll be a catastrophe.

C: 「异物」…听起来是个很糟糕的东西。该不会需要手术摘除吧？
E: "Foreign object"? ...That sounds like a medical issue. Will it require surgery?

C: 所以…那位神秘人的确是流光天君的使者。
E: So... That mysterious girl was really a messenger of the Glowswather?

C: 请见谅，对于您这样身份尊贵的客人，我难以找到更妥帖的称呼。
E: Please excuse me. I struggle to think of an appropriate way of addressing such esteemed guests as yourselves.

C: 你来了。
E: Oh, there you are.

C: 「米卡•奇瓦沙」，是个不错的名字，想必与它所经历的一切有关。
E: Miekka Kivessä. It's a fitting name for a sword with such a legendary past.

C: （也许我不该有心理活动…）
E: (Maybe I shouldn't react...)

C: 所以你父亲是将岁阳铸进剑中？
E: So, your father sealed a heliobus inside that sword?

C: 请问你要如何找到魔剑？
E: And how are you planning on finding the cursed sword?

C: 也许是剑匣太费事了？
E: Maybe the case was too much trouble?

C: 剑匣的外壳上以高妙的技艺嵌入金属丝，勾勒出了莲花纹样，似在昭示剑匣的产地：朱明仙舟。
E: The sword case, masterfully adorned with metal wire inlays, traces the pattern of lotus flowers, subtly proclaiming its origin from the illustrious Xianzhou Zhuming.

C: 好啊，就让我瞧瞧。
E: Fine, show me your past.

C: 我已经…在这些人眼中看到了这种子。
E: I can already see the seed in the eyes of those people.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 偶尔，我老桑博也想上台献丑一番。
E: Sometimes, even an old-timer like me feels like taking the stage and making a fool out of myself.

C: 因为是突发事件，没什么有用的线索，只有袭击者使用的凶器，和受害者的证件……
E: This is a developing case, so there aren't many clues yet. All we have to go by are the weapon used by the assailant and the victim's ID...

C: 那位沙马里先生现在在哪里？我想和他见一面。
E: Where is Mr. Shamari right now? I'd like to meet him.

C: 咳咳！
E: *coughs*

C: 这张告示…似乎是花火留给我们的提示。
E: This notice... seems like a hint for us from Miss Sparkle.

C: 因为这戒指是在受害者口中发现的，要还原现场啊。
E: Because this ring was found inside the victim's mouth. We want to reconstruct the scene of the crime.

C: 你见过很多假面愚者吗？
E: Have you dealt with many Masked Fools before?

C: 垃圾桶。
E: A trashcan.

C: ——等等，先别动。
E: ...Wait. Don't move.

C: 嗯？这证据好像没法证明他是凶手吧……
E: Hmm? This evidence doesn't really prove that he is the murderer...

C: 黑塔女士的空间站里，我都没见过跟博识尊有关的东西。
E: Even in Madam Herta's space station, I never saw anything related to Nous.

C: 将军所指的「廓清真相」，就是以阵法审问卡芙卡么？
E: "Unearth the truth..." You mean interrogate Kafka with the Matrix of Prescience?

C: 嘿嘿，也许她骨子里和我一样，就想偷个懒呢？
E: Hehe, maybe deep down she just wants to be lazy once in a while — like me!

C: 想说什么都可以，不过，本座只会相信「穷观阵」的卜测。
E: ...so say what you will — I'm here to witness the divination of the Matrix of Prescience.

C: 三月，你还真是言出法随啊！快，快做点什么帮帮我！
E: Ah...! March, you should join the Divination Commission! Q—Quick, do something!

C: 据我所知，联盟的前身本是寻找药师，渴求赐福的「求药使」。他们成功见到了星神，得到了能治愈死亡的赐福：「建木」。
E: As far as I know, the predecessors of the Alliance were the Elixir Seekers. They searched for Yaoshi and longed for the blessing of immortality. When they eventually found the Aeon, they received a blessing that did indeed prevent death — the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 「不朽」消失后，祂的命途被塔伊兹育罗斯分裂，诞生了名为「繁育」的星神。据我所知，虫皇塔伊兹育罗斯并没有存在太久。
E: After the disappearance of Long the Permanence, Tayzzyronth divided the Aeon's Path. In the process, Tayzzyronth became a new Aeon known as the Propagation. My understanding is that Tayzzyronth, or "Imperator Insectorum" to some, didn't last long...

C: 建木重生，难道你们不高兴吗？
E: Aren't you happy about the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection?

C: 在付出无数血泪代价后，罗浮人终于明白，「长生」不是什么平白赐予的礼物，而是残酷试炼的开始。
E: After paying the price with blood and tears, the Luofu people finally understood that immortality was not a free blessing, but the beginning of a cruel ordeal.

C: 本座还有将军交托的重任，请各位一路小心。
E: I still have important tasks from the general to attend to. Go carefully, all of you.

C: 没准他们是夹道欢迎咱们。
E: Maybe they're here to welcome us?

C: 喂喂，你倒是听我们解释啊！我们不是坏——
E: Hold on, let us explain! We're not—

C: 小娃儿，快来帮帮老夫！咱们齐心协力把它斫断，别让它穿透了洪炉！
E: Help me, dear young friends! Let's hack them away together! We can't let the roots punch through the furnace!

C: 只能暂时撤退了。跟我走！
E: We'll have to retreat for now. Follow me!

C: 因为公输先生躲在一旁，所以看得很清楚吧？
E: Great observation Mr. Gongshu. It's amazing what you notice when you're not fighting...

C: （看来丹枢需要一些时间才能分析出「龙蟠虬跃」的药理。等结果的时候该做点什么好呢？）
E: (Looks like Dan Shu needs time to study the Draught of Draconic Surge. What should I do in the meantime?)

C: 是丹枢研究出来的。
E: It was Dan Shu who figured it out.

C: 啊，是丹枢大人托你来的？
E: Oh, Dan Shu asked you to come?

C: 不过…在那之前，她必须先像我一样，学会忍受黑暗。
E: In the meantime, she'll have to learn to withstand the darkness — just as I have.

C: 你没抓我的法乌努斯红毛羊，那你的店里最近怎么多了这么多羊肉菜？
E: If you didn't steal my Faunus Red Sheep, why are there suddenly so many lamb dishes on your shop's menu?

C: 不过不免费。
E: But my help isn't gratuitous.

C: 你出现了啊，{NICKNAME}…真是要感谢你们师徒俩出的主意，
E: You're here, {NICKNAME}... You should be ashamed. Thanks to your *great idea*...

C: 多年积蓄泡汤了…这以后的日子可怎么过啊…一边去，别烦我！
E: My savings are all gone... What should I do now... Now, get out of my way!

C: 你给我好好说话！
E: Be serious!

C: 瞧你一脸忧心忡忡的样子。{NICKNAME}，我会把这件事处理妥当。
E: Look at how worried you are. {NICKNAME}, I'll take care of this.

C: 怎么可能！那股子寒意、还有飘在空中非人的移动轨迹，那绝对是货真价实的鬼！不对不对，关键点是——
E: What!? No! There was a freezing chill, not to mention the way they drifted through the air... They were legit ghosts! Anyway, the key point was...

C: 等一小会，我还有事。
E: I still have something to do.

C: 所以，我会帮你离开「恚炎」设下的幻障迷境；而你，要帮我逃离十王司判官的追捕。我们互惠互利，谁也不欠着谁，如何？
E: So, I'm going to help you break free of the circle that Furynox created, and you're going to help me evade the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission. It's a win-win... How does that sound?

C: 当务之急是先解救汝等脱离迷障。来吧，穿过镜子，到这边来。
E: The task at hand is to save you from this illusion. Come. Pass through the mirror and come to our side.

C: 岁阳虽然凶悍，却始终不能摆脱对血肉凡身的渴望。但汝却能时刻降服妖物保持常性，为十王效力三十八载。汝已是一名合格的判官，应当再自信一些。
E: The heliobi are aggressive beings, but they cannot shake their desire for a flesh and blood body. And yet, during the <unbreak>38</unbreak> years you have worked for the Ten Lords, you have been constantly able to suppress the monster within your tail and maintain your personality. You are already a fitting judge. Be confident.

C: 还有……
E: Also...

C: 呵呵呵，哈哈哈～
E: Muahahahaha⁓

C: 我果然是个不争气的人，自己期待已久的事情发生了，却一点也笑不出来。
E: I really am useless... I've been looking forward to this day for so long, but now that it's here... I don't feel happy at all.

C: 好好改造吧。
E: I hope you repent.

C: 「真的雪衣大人」？如此说来，幻境之内还有赝品？
E: The real Madam Xueyi? Are there pretenders inside the illusion?

C: 这其中多半是有不可告人的秘密。
E: Likely through some secret means that I am unaware of.

C: 穿过铜镜。
E: Pass through the mirror.

C: 穿过铜镜。
E: Pass through the mirror.

C: 真的吗？那样就不用提交辞职申请了。
E: Really? So I don't even need to write a resignation letter...?

C: 那个人偶判官从来就没有高看老子一眼，但也没有放松警惕。
E: That puppet judge never respected me, but she also never let her guard down.

C: 想必她们已经意识到了，你和你手里的球棒从来不惧怕任何的幽灵鬼怪——即便横加阻拦也是徒劳，没人能挡住你，毕竟你还有界域定锚。
E: They must have realized that you and the bat in your hands have never feared any ghosts or spirits. Any form of hindrance would be a waste of time. No one can stop you — you have access to the Space Anchor, after all.

C: 如果我猜的没错，您是第一次来到匹诺康尼的逐梦客吧…在匹诺康尼玩得开心吗？
E: If I'm not wrong, you're a first-time Dreamchaser in Penacony... Are you having fun here?

C: 估计她心里也缺失了某个部分…{NICKNAME}，我们去帮她找回完整的自己吧！
E: I reckon she's lost some part of her heart... {NICKNAME}, we must help make her whole again!

C: 就像之前一样，深呼吸，深呼吸…不要流泪…
E: Just like before, deep breaths, deep breaths... Don't cry...

C: 今天就放个假吧。
E: Take the day off today.

C: 啊…我突然有了灵感。
E: Ah... Inspiration has suddenly struck me.

C: …有了这个吻，我绝对无往不胜！别忘了「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」——我要成为第一个听到它的人！
E: ...With this kiss, I'll never ever lose! Don't forget "Envision a Rose Forthcoming" — I will be the first person to hear it!

C: 庞德，我来了！你提前到了吗…担心死我了，比赛结束我也没有得到你的消息……
E: Pound, I'm here! Did you have to wait long...? I was worried sick, since you didn't contact me after the competition ended...

C: （柯柯娜…她去哪了？）
E: (Cocona... Where could she have gone?)

C: 她就是想上位罢了。
E: She's just trying to move up in this world.

C: 这么说来…迪恩先生，这问题可能不大礼貌——您是怎么从那场事故中生还的？抱歉，我真的止不住自己的好奇心。
E: Now that you mention it... Mr. Dean, this may be a rude question, but how did you escape the accident? I'm sorry. I can't help my curiosity.

C: 莱斯利•迪恩需要帮助。
E: Lesley Dean needs help.

C: …说我丝毫不关心自己在现实中的境况，那是在撒谎。
E: ...It would be a lie to say that I was not concerned with my real self in the slightest.

C: 那位先生已经离开匹诺康尼了，他……
E: This gentleman has already left Penacony. He...

C: 但是，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}——我想知道…一个逝者的念想，值得让还活着的人付出如此高昂的代价吗？
E: However, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I wish to know... Do you think that treasuring the memories of someone who has already passed is worth such a lofty price to the living?

C: 您说的没错，这是他们自己的选择。但…但我不想袖手旁观。
E: You are correct. This is their own decision. But... But I do not wish to sit idly by.

C: 我…我想我已经做好心理准备了——不管真相有多令人难以接受。
E: I... I think I am ready to accept it... No matter how hard a reality it is to accept.

C: 什么啊，喜欢电影有什么错？何况你租的可是莱斯利•迪恩的处女作！你老妈真是一点审美都没有。
E: What!? What's wrong with liking movies? Plus, this is Lesley Dean's debut work! Your mother has no taste at all.

C: 人的情感真是复杂。
E: People's emotions are complicated.

C: 很好，恭喜您招到心仪的大副！
E: Very good. Congrats on hiring your desired first mate!

C: 佩德罗先生以其坚韧不拔的性格和广泛的人脉闻名，他的能力和影响力在业内也是有目共睹的。
E: Mr. Pedro is famed for his tenacious character and extensive network. His capabilities and influence are also outstanding among his peers.

C: 冷芯吩咐船员们对空艇尾翼进行了涂装。
E: Caldwick instructs the crew to repaint the empennage of the airship.

C: 谢谢您的授权，我这就去办！
E: Thank you for the approval. I'll get on it!

C: 船长，您转个身我看看…哇哦……
E: Captain, please turn around for me... Wow...

C: 那么，前台的工作就全都拜托您了…应该没问题吧？既然是老奥帝先生亲自答应的，那出了什么岔子应该也不会追责到我头上？
E: Then, I'll leave all the reception work with you... Shouldn't be too difficult, right? Seeing as Old Oti personally assented to this one, I can't get blamed if anything goes wrong, can I?

C: 你们两个是怎么凑到一块的？
E: How did you two end up together?

C: 找朋友——又是一种全新的业务。该死，你才上任第一天，怎么麻烦事全都让你给碰上了？
E: Finding friends — another completely new kind of gig. Fudge it, this is your first day on the job. Why are you running into all this other trouble?

C: 你要找的人叫什么？
E: The person you're looking for... what's their name?

C: 回头见，{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！记得履行承诺！
E: See you later, buddy! Remember to keep your promise!

C: （或许只是某种恶作剧吧？希望到时候青雀能付得起账单……）
E: (Maybe it's just some kind of elaborate prank? I hope Qingque's able to foot the bill when the time comes...)

C: （好困…今天还会有别的客人来吗？）
E: (I'm sleepy... Wonder if there'll be any other guests today?)

C: 请别介意，{NICKNAME}。弗雷迪初来乍到，遇到这种情况神经难免有些紧绷，我也不想让他感到为难。
E: I hope you're not offended, {NICKNAME}. Freddy is new here, so he tends to be a bit tense in this kind of situation. I don't want to make things difficult for him.

C: （青雀在好像在被逼着说一些怪话…这帮皮皮西到底在干嘛？）
E: (Seems like Qingque's being forced to recite some odd chants... What's this bunch of Pepeshi guys up to?)

C: …宝了个贝的，哪来的这么多皮皮西人？这场面我可没见过。
E: ...The fork. I've never seen so many Pepeshi in the same place before.

C: 真没想到啊，这群小东西！一个个看着人模人样的，背后竟然一点人事都不干！
E: I can't believe it! These little rascals! They seem decent but are wicked deep down!

C: 哎哟喂，没想到这帮家伙还带了真家伙！
E: Woah, I didn't see this coming!

C: 这…这是真的吗，矲主大人？「四尺圣堂」真的只是你为了敛财打的幌子吗？
E: Is... Is that true, master? Is the Four-Foot Hall just your scheme to scam our money?

C: 你们这些代拍的…
E: You paparazzi...

C: …我胡了！
E: ...Huh! I've won!

C: 嗯…为你单独开一个编外摄影师的岗位，也不是不行。
E: Hmm... We could always set up a separate role for you as a freelance photographer.

C: 再等等…
E: Wait...

C: 好，我会尽全力讨教的。
E: Alright, I'll do my best to learn from you.

C: 啧…这小子，有我当年的风范。
E: Tsk... This boy, he's just like me at this age.

C: 彦卿解释了仙舟贵客的送行经过，以及完全没想到符玄大人此时回来的「事实」。
E: Yanqing explained about seeing off the Xianzhou guests and the "reality" that they had no idea that Fu Xuan was returning.

C: 本座主要是辅助爻光将军，提供建木灾变的始末信息，以及弄清楚重犯镜流所言真假…说实话，基本没有什么休息时间，也谈不上见闻了。
E: I was mainly supporting General Yao Guang with providing details about the Ambrosial Arbor disaster and discerning the truth from the lies in Jingliu's confession... Honestly, I had no time to rest or learn anything new.

C: 就等你就位了，快来！
E: We're all waiting for you, hurry up!

C: 演武仪典期间都在做些什么呢？
E: What were you doing during the Wardance?

C: 哎，这位大英雄我记得，公输师傅说你和他携手并肩铲除了困扰司里的妖～魔～鬼～怪～
E: Ah, I remember you. You are the great hero Master Gongshu mentioned. He said you helped him fight off all the monnn~stersss~ in the commission.

C: …青雀小姐，这些要求这是不是道德绑架呢？
E: ...Miss Qingque, are we pushing it too far?

C: 怎么可能让青雀一个人偷懒。
E: Not fair if you are the only one who gets to slack off.

C: 呜呜哇哇哇——
E: Boo hoo wahh —

C: 走吧走吧！
E: Come on, let's go!

C: 这并不是水箱，而是星槎培养舱。培养舱里注满了培养液，能够辅助「星槎种子」完成萌芽阶段，确保生物材料能够在营养且可控的环境中成长。
E: It's not a water tank, but a starskiff incubator. It's filled with a culture medium that supports the starskiff seed during the germination phase, and it can ensure the biological material grows in a nutritious and controllable environment.

C: 应该不是，这就是换了一个更大的培养舱而已吧。
E: I don't think so. This is just a bigger incubator.

C: 「药王秘传」的人落到你手里，都死的透透的。你要本座对着命途已绝的死人算些什么？
E: Those from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have all died in your hands. What sort of divination can I do for dead people?

C: 真的要改行吗？
E: Are you sure you want to change your career?

C: 我一直以为自己天生就是工匠的命了，虽然命苦一点儿，但从来没想过做别的行当。
E: I've always considered myself born to be a craftsman. Although the job is tough, the idea of finding another job never crosses my mind.

C: 机器都能画画了，你找不到工作的。
E: Machines are capable of drawing now. You won't find a job as a painter.

C: …还是算了吧。反正有他在，冠军也落不到别人头上。
E: ...Nah, I'll pass. It's not like anyone else has a chance with him around.

C: 我果然没看错！
E: I knew it!

C: …才不用你提醒，走吧。
E: ...I don't need you to remind me. Let's go.

C: 你能替我去找奥列格问问卢卡的近况吗？我毕竟没有亲自经历，不了解事情的全貌。
E: Could you ask Oleg how Luka's been recently? I haven't seen much of him lately — it's hard for me to get the full picture.

C: 那家伙肯定知道「小飞」装了报警系统，所以干脆决定先用暴力手段把它弄坏。
E: I think the thief knew that Little Fay had an alarm, so they decided to break it.

C: 好！{NICKNAME}——等你准备好了我们就上！
E: Alright! {NICKNAME} — we'll charge in once you're ready!

C: <size=36>「熔锤出身的勇士——」</size>
E: <size=36>"The Moltammerville warrior..."</size>

C: 调用后台数据库。检索中……
E: Accessing back-end database. Querying...

C: 噢！好刺激呀！
E: Wow! That's so exciting!

C: 所以，我要去挑战那个大机器人，让他知道我这个拳王的厉害！
E: So I'm gonna challenge that big robot and show him what I can do as a champion fighter!

C: 跟丢目标了，行动失败…再尝试一次吧。
E: You lost track of the target... maybe give it another try.

C: {NICKNAME}，这里你最熟，快给他们出出主意吧～
E: You're the expert here, {NICKNAME}. Give them some suggestions!

C: 虽然感觉距离咱们上次离开也没过多久，但彦卿你是不是……
E: Doesn't feel like it's been that long since we last saw you, but Yanqing, are you...?

C: 真是踏破铁鞋无觅处，我本以为要费上不少工夫才能找到这位姑娘。
E: What a coincidence! I was afraid I'd have trouble finding this girl.

C: 喔？老朽的好奇心都被吊起来了…快说说，你们俩怎么就互相认得了？
E: Oh? Now you've piqued my curiosity... Tell me, how did you two become acquainted?

C: 也谈不上「考验」吧。除了战术与武艺之外，云骑士官偶尔也得解决一些外交纠纷。
E: Well, it's not exactly a "test." As Cloud Knight officers, we not only learn the art of war and martial arts but also occasionally have to handle diplomatic disputes.

C: 我真傻，真的。原以为能有一场说走就走，快快乐乐的旅行。现在看来，到哪儿星穹列车都脱不开是非啊。
E: What was I thinking, seriously. Here I was looking forward to a carefree and enjoyable trip, but it seems wherever we go, drama is just around the corner.

C: 这些家伙真是可怕…
E: Those guys are terrifying...

C: 斯科特先生这是想用「拖」字诀，等拖到舰船修好，天舶司就只能不经检查，放你们离开咯？
E: So, Mr. Skott, are you just stalling for time, and planning to leave the Xianzhou as soon as your ship is repaired to avoid the Sky-Faring Commission's inspection?

C: 那…这份薄礼，请您代为转交给灵砂大人吧。
E: Well then... Please pass this humble gift on to her.

C: 我也不知道。等灵砂大人方便接见时，一定会第一时间联系贵府的，请回吧。
E: I'm not sure. Whenever Master Lingsha feels it is appropriate, she will most certainly get in touch with you.

C: 做好准备把他们俩分开吧。
E: Get ready to separate them.

C: 两位小朋友都成了贴心小棉袄，妾身好开心。那咱们走起来？
E: It's so heartwarming to see both of you being so sweet and caring. So then, shall we get going?

C: 若是此人能以云骑剑术代表列车参加演武仪典，大展身手，老朽也会大感快慰！
E: I'd be greatly pleased if this apprentice could represent the Express in the Wardance by displaying their Cloud Knight flair and prowess.

C: 留神四周。
E: Pay attention to your surroundings.

C: 明白。
E: Understood.

C: 悬梯的机关似乎被捷足先登的劫狱者们早早破坏，无论如何摆弄都毫无动静。
E: None of the assembly methods or formations work. The hanging ladder's mechanism must have been destroyed by those prison raiders that got here first.

C: 以鄙人的职业经验来看，剁刀、片刀、切刀、雕刀虽然同属刀具，但就像烹饪中的煎、炒、煮、炸一般，只是供人施展的技巧。如何使用，要考虑食材本身的特性。
E: From my professional experience, cleavers, slicers, chopping knives, and carving knives are all just tools, kind of like frying, sautéing, boiling, and deep-frying in cooking. They're just ways for people to show off their skills. How you use them really depends on the ingredients you're working with.

C: 这话说的倒是颇有见地，是鄙人见识短浅了。那么彦卿兄弟，我抵达罗浮许久，还无缘见识这次演武仪典的举办场地。
E: That's quite an insightful statement, Yanqing. Well, my apologies for being so short-sighted. I've been on the Luofu for quite some time, but I haven't had the chance to see the ceremony venue for myself yet.

C: 叫谁小朋友呐。
E: Who are you calling "kids?"

C: 跟上我，小心别让他们发现了。
E: Follow my lead, and be careful not to blow our cover.

C: 接下来去哪？
E: So, where are we heading next?

C: 他们到底要干什么？这些人身着的全都是官方制服，但我敢打赌，这些家伙绝对不是天舶司、工造司或是云骑军的人…太可疑了。
E: What are they up to? They're all wearing official uniforms, but I'm pretty sure they're not members of the Sky-Faring Commission, the Artisanship Commission, or the Cloud Knights... This is way too suspicious.

C: 步离人怎么变成狐人的模样？
E: How did the borisin disguise themselves as foxians?

C: 还能为什么？显然是罗浮龙师监守自盗，抛弃了守望建木的责任，与药王秘传勾结。
E: The answer seems rather simple, doesn't it? The Preceptors of the Luofu abandoned their duty to guard the Ambrosial Arbor and colluded with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 我相信
E: I do.

C: 我不知道
E: I don't know.

C: 就算没法逃离过去，你有我们。
E: Even if you can't escape your past, we're always here for you.

C: 那些箱子里的机甲可不好惹。
E: The mechs in those crates are no joke.

C: 距离上次狩猎，{RUBY_B#究竟过去了多少年}青丘究竟旋转了多少次{RUBY_E#}？{RUBY_B#步离人的血裔}都蓝的崽子{RUBY_E#}！告诉我你的名字！
E: {RUBY_B#how many years}How many times{RUBY_E#} has Verdantia spun around since our last hunt? Ah, {RUBY_B#scions of borisin}Duran's whelp{RUBY_E#}! Tell me your name!

C: 新造型有点可爱…
E: Your new form is kind of cute...

C: 听说你和丹恒先生去面见判官，结果整个幽囚狱都陷入了动乱，我还在担心你们呢。二位没事就好。
E: I heard you and Mr. Dan Heng went to meet the judges, and then a riot broke out in The Shackling Prison. I was so worried about you. Thank goodness, you both made it out safe.

C: 那些游客在谈论你呢…
E: Those tourists over there are talking about you...

C: 拘、锁、刑、问四部当值判官中，拘字部判官雪衣暂时阵亡。我将代其职责，命金人勾魂使与冥差们进入各层，争取尽快恢复失控的区域。
E: Among the judges on duty in the four divisions, Judge Xueyi from the Detention Division was killed and is temporarily unavailable. So, I'm taking over her duties and commanding Aurumaton Spectral Envoys and spiritfarers to quickly restore order in the affected areas.

C: 七百多年前，我随恩师出征讨伐孽物，亲眼目睹了那头巨兽降临后整个战场的惨况。
E: Over seven centuries ago, I followed my mentor on a campaign against the abominations, and I personally witnessed the devastation on the battlefield after Hoolay appeared.

C: 一地狼藉尸骸，显然这里经历了一场激战。
E: A mess of bodies, a fierce battle must have been fought here.

C: 我在香炉中记下了步离人所服药物的性质。
E: I've captured the nature of the medicine in my censer.

C: 不过是狩猎前一个小小余兴节目罢了。你不想逃走吗？
E: Just a little pre-hunt entertainment. Don't you want to run away?

C: 你在这儿等我一会好嘛？我找个士兵过来。
E: Will you please wait here for a while? I'll find a soldier.

C: （港口没有封锁…到底是怎么回事？）
E: (The ports haven't been closed... What is going on?)

C: 下一次拒绝，我会捏碎你治病救人的双手，之后是髌骨，再然后是脊骨…我会把你一寸一寸敲零割碎，只留下那条三寸不烂之舌，留到你打算开口为止。
E: But remember, the next time you refuse me, I'll crush your healing hands, then your knees, then your spine... I'll dismantle you piece by piece until only your silver tongue remains for you to speak.

C: 我从没见过那样可怕的战斗方式…她的身体…我感觉她整个人似乎都撑开了…就像……
E: I've never seen such a brutal fighting style... Her body... it's like she was split open... just like...

C: 我像是个徒劳的白痴，从名为死亡的鼎镬中，捞起一尾名叫生命的鱼——看着它一个挣扎，又再次跳进了滚沸的汤汁里。
E: Like a useless idiot, I saved a fish named "Life" out of the cauldron called "Death," only to watch it struggle and dive back into the boiling broth.

C: 哦豁，你想象中的「气派的竞锋舰」是什么样子的呢？那么大？还是那么大？
E: Oh? And how big did you imagine this "impressive Skysplitter" to be? This big? This big, maybe?

C: 如果呼雷袭击了竞锋舰…彦卿骁卫，请你务必尽力困住他，直到我赶来为止。
E: If Hoolay does come to attack the Skysplitter... Lieutenant Yanqing, I need you to hold him there until I am able to arrive.

C: 狗东西，还挺有荣誉感。
E: How honorable, you mangy dog.

C: 驭空姐姐，时隔三十年，咱们又再次并肩战斗了。
E: Madam Yukong! After thirty years, we find ourselves fighting side-by-side once more!

C: 但这帮家伙终于还是来了啊，我心尖上压着的这块石头总算也能落地了！来吧，孽物！
E: Now that these guys have finally shown up, it's a huge weight off my mind. Bring it on, you abominations!

C: 我的身躯百杀不死，你们的刀剑弱如芒草！
E: Your feeble weapons are like blades of grass before my unbreakable body!

C: 别太勉强了，年轻人，你看起来伤得不轻啊。等丹鼎司的医士到场，让他们好好给你治治。
E: Take it easy, young one, your wounds look quite severe. I'll have the Alchemy Commission healers see to you when they arrive.

C: 他们让你为拯救弱者而战。但他们却有没有告诉你，剥开一切温情伪装后，这就是宇宙本来该有的样子。
E: They have you fight to save the weak. But, what they never told you is that when all the pretenses of kindness and compassion are stripped away, this is how the universe is meant to be.

C: 你害怕终有一天，在愤怒的烈焰烧尽时，你从猎人变成了怪物。而巡猎的锋镝，永远指向怪物的心脏。
E: You feared that one day, when the flames of your rage burned out, you would turn from a hunter into a monster. And we all know that the arrows of The Hunt are always aimed at the hearts of monsters.

C: 我逃出了猎群的追捕，遇到了一个会飞的女人…一名云骑军。
E: I escaped the hunting pack and encountered a woman that could fly... a Cloud Knight.

C: 天上威光，心中之狼，随我在此…一同征伐！
E: Mighty light of the heavens, wolf in my heart, come to me... We shall conquer as one!

C: 于是，光从棋盘的纵横间喷薄而出，织成了代表戎韬将军的印信。
E: Thus, light bursts forth from the chessboard's grid, weaving into a seal symbolizing the Seer Strategist's authority.

C: 什么「哀家」，朕还没死呢！何况朕都一把年纪了，你还是另给自己寻个良配吧！
E: Concubine!? I'm still single! And I'm so old, you're better off seeking a more fitting partner!

C: 祝你们这桩生意能顺利推进。
E: Wishing you the best of luck with this deal!

C: 先生们，朕确实不明白你们在说什么。朕不记得自己做过任何会被你们记恨的事，你们应当是认错人了。
E: Gentlemen, I really do not know what you are talking about. I don't remember what I did that made you so vengeful. You must have mistaken me for someone else.

C: 啊哈哈哈…总而言之，公主殿下，您有什么想买的，尽管吩咐小人便是！
E: Ahahaha... In any case, please call on me if you wish to buy anything, Your Highness!

C: 这…到底发生了什么…我不明白，我真的不明白……
E: This... What in the world happened... I don't get it. I really don't...

C: 有事？还有什么事比新皇践祚更重要？
E: Business? More important than the coronation of a new Emperor?

C: 灰骑士，你在百姓之中的口碑历来不错，我们不想杀你。
E: Gray Knight, your chivalrous repute is known among the commonfolk. We don't wish to kill you.

C: 先让朕吃冰淇淋，再让朕吃烤鸡…你的小算盘朕非常明白。
E: To have me eat ice cream first, and then roasted chicken later... I am very aware of your tricks.

C: 陛下！小人冤枉！小人冤枉！
E: Your Majesty! I've been wronged! I've been wronged!

C: 接手她那最伟大的政治遗产——善意！
E: To take over her greatest political legacy — goodwill!

C: 想干架？
E: Are you trying to pick a fight?

C: （突如其来的压迫感…）
E: (He's so intimidating all of a sudden...)

C: 我不认为家族能从查德威克的脑海中提取出有用的信息，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。因为……
E: I don't think The Family is capable of extracting any useful information from Chadwick's mind, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}. It's because...

C: 是啊！我们可以再试一次，没必要……
E: Exactly! We can try one more time. There's no need to...

C: 他的自私就是把自己的才能置于一切之前——其他人的事？他压根就不在乎。
E: Selfishly, he puts his talent before everything else. He doesn't care the least bit about anyone else.

C: <size=28>一……</size>
E: <size=28>One...</size>

C: …一个我竭尽全力想要忘掉的数字。那天以后，我再也不敢向镜子投去哪怕一瞥。我害怕看到一个恶魔…一个夺走无数人生命和家园的凶手。
E: ...A number that I try my best every day to forget. Ever since that day, I haven't dared to look in the mirror even once. I'm worried I might see a monster... A murderer who has killed countless people and ruined even more lives.

C: 后来，当星海被曲折蜿蜒的航路连成一片，技术和资源开始在世界之间流动，比原本那些武器强大数万倍的新武器也逐一问世。
E: When the starry seas later became interconnected by winding routes, the exchange of technology and resources began. New weapons, many times more powerful than the original ones, emerged one after another.

C: 你终于能够诚实地面对自己了，博士——仅就这点，我为你感到欣慰。我衷心希望你能挺过这段艰难的时光。
E: You're finally honest with yourself, doctor. I'm glad for you for that achievement alone. I hope with all my heart that you can pull through these tough times.

C: 唔…我是不是也该说点什么？
E: Well... should I also say something?

C: 计划还得从长计议…
E: We need to plan this out carefully...

C: 你看，筑梦与诗歌很像，解析现有的结构，再搭建新的结构，创造优美而精巧的作品。我们擅长的就是利用混沌，再重塑其形体——
E: Look, dreamweaving is similar to poetry or songwriting: Analyzing the present structure, then reconstructing it to create an elegant and exquisite masterpiece. Our proficiency lies in reshaping chaos into other forms...

C: 我记得，我们之间还有一个约定。我在流梦礁等待他们完成承诺，却一直没人来找我……
E: I recall that we had another promise among us. I waited for them at Dreamflux Reef to fulfill that promise, but no one ever came...

C: 我不理解。你让格拉克斯教授的努力和大家的抗争都变得毫无意义。
E: I don't understand. You made Professor Glaux's efforts and everyone's defiance totally meaningless.

C: 孩子，不是所有人都像巴罗他们那样勇敢，我们也没有资格逼迫所有人都拿出这份勇气。
E: My child, not everyone is as brave as Barlow and the rest. We have no right to force everyone to muster that kind of courage.

C: 那时，希望你能愿意再次回来。
E: By then, I hope you'll be willing to come back.

C: 那你更要醒来。
E: That's all the more reason for you to wake up.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「隐夜鸫家系家主格拉克斯引退，五大家系合并或成定局？」
E: "Nightingale Family head Glaux retires. Will the unity of the five major lineages be inevitable?"

C: 再看这漂亮的鳞片，脏是脏了点，但…我去，上面什么时候有的划痕？肯定是刚才被你摸坏了！
E: And look at these beautiful scales, they are a little shabby, but... Wuh, when did this scratch appear? You must have done this with your grubby fingers!

C: 你也是外邦人的一员。但你与黄金裔们并肩作战、证明了自己的勇气，这才被当作贵客——并非所有人都这么幸运。
E: You are also an outlander, but you have fought side by side with the Chrysos Heirs, proven your courage, and hailed as an esteemed guest. Not all are so lucky.

C: 曾经的「永恒之城」并不吝于为其他城邦的来客敞开大门。但随着黑潮肆虐，人们心中的善意也逐渐萎靡……
E: This former Eternal City has always been generous in opening its doors to outsiders. But as the black tide encroaches, the goodwill in people's hearts may slowly give way to misgivings...

C: 那是什么，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}信徒的聚集地？我可没兴趣……
E: What's that? A place where {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s disciples congregate? I'm not interested...

C: 听起来也不是外邦人的错…
E: Doesn't sound like the outlanders were at fault...

C: 哈哈，当然——等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
E: Haha, of course. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.

C: 啊啊啊！离我远点，怪物！
E: Aahhh! Get away from me, monsters!

C: 没想到我一介学徒，居然也有机会继承刻法勒的精神，想想还有点激动呢！
E: I never thought a lowly apprentice like me would get the chance to carry on Kephale's will. It sounds very exciting!

C: 好啊~等到了圣城，我要吃烤苹果派！
E: Yay! I want baked apple pie when we reach the holy city!

C: 在克瑞斯关于进食规矩的科普中，你抱着装食物的容器跑远了。
E: As Kyros is rambling on fine dining practices, you've already left the vicinity, the vessels full of food bundled in your arms.

C: 谢、谢谢{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！
E: Th—Thank you, kind {F#lady}{M#man}!

C: （在大地兽工坊的那场骚乱中，我<color=#dbc291ff>没有支持任何一方</color>，只是静看事态发展。）
E: (During the turmoil that occurred in the dromas workshop, I <color=#dbc291ff>didn't support anyone</color> and just quietly watched things unfold.)

C: 如果吾师的善举不能为他博取减刑，今后还有哪个公民敢冒着风险去帮助他人？为众人抱薪者，不可使其冻毙于风雪。
E: If the good deeds my teacher has done can't even earn him a reduced sentence, which citizen will dare take the risk to help others in the future? Those who gather firewood for the masses should not have to freeze to death in the blizzard.

C: 好！出发吧，去阿卡迪亚找他…等等，阿卡迪亚是哪里呀？
E: Alright! Off we go! To Arcadia to find... Wait — where is Arcadia?

C: 阿卡迪亚？是什么水果的名字吗？不好意思啊，小朋友，我这不卖阿卡迪亚。
E: Arcadia? Is that a fruit? Sorry, young one, I don't sell Arcadia here.

C: 与泰坦的造物相比，染色的线与金属的线都是仿神的赝品。执着于赝品的材质高低，而让衣物失去应有的美，对「浪漫」反倒更加不敬吧？
E: Compared to the creations of the Titans, dyed threads and metal threads are all merely works that imitate the work of the gods. Do you not think that obsessing over the quality of an imitation and ruining the clothes' intended beauty is a sign of disrespect to "romance" itself?

C: 士兵，怎么了？
E: What's wrong, soldier?

C: …轻口薄舌的流贼、恶痞、败寇，莫要用谵语侮辱悬锋城的战士。
E: ...Sharp-tongued thieves, scoundrels, and failed bandits should not seek to insult a warrior of Castrum Kremnos with their wild ravings.

C: 嗐，奥赫玛这么大，就找不到一个玩得转这玩意儿的人吗？
E: Hey, with a city as vast as Okhema, are you sure we can find no one that can make this thing spin?

C: 宇宙评论区现状了属于是。
E: Essentially the comment sections of the universe.

C: 奥赫玛的戍卫长……
E: Captain of Okhema...

C: 呼——还好有恩人在，但为什么悬锋城的战士会闯进城里？
E: Phew... Thank the heavens you are here, savior. But how did the soldiers of Castrum Kremnos get into the city?

C: 至少去找找雕像小姐吧！
E: At least go and look for the statue lady!

C: 我哪儿能和「传谕梦母」相提并论？和她的睿智相比，我不过是瑟希斯森林里的一片叶子而已。
E: How would I dare be mentioned on equal stature with the Oracle Dreammother? In the presence of her erudition, I am but a leaf in Cerces' forest.

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: We meet again, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}.

C: 父母失去生命，被迫在战争中坠入冥河，孩童失去亲人，在饥饿和病痛里陷入永眠。
E: Parents lose their lives, driven into the River of Souls by the ravages of war, while children are left bereft of family, entering eternal sleep amidst hunger and sickness.

C: 真不知道你那天到底是撞了什么大运，竟然真的得到了它的谕示。
E: I honestly don't know what fortune you stumbled onto that day to be able to receive their prophecy.

C: 这该死的命运！为什么只为我们留下了这个无能的欧洛尼斯！
E: That damned destiny! Why did it only leave us with this worthless Oronyx!

C: 是的，大人。据说，为了从「黑潮诞生的怪物」手下逃掉，还折了不少人，就连尸体也没能带回来。
E: Yes, Your Highness. It is said that we lost many a good man trying to flee the monsters spawned of the black tide — we couldn't even bring their bodies back home.

C: 帕西提亚将指尖搭上你的耳背，天外之音也沿着她的自白传入你的耳中。
E: Pasithea gently places her fingertips on the back of your ear, and the echoes flow into your ears, carrying her confession with them.

C: 似乎什么都没有改变。
E: It seems like nothing has changed.

C: 总能有机会弥补的。
E: There will be a chance to make amends.

C: 真可笑啊，这个问题困扰了我这么多年，可当我真的找到了真相，却感觉这些都没那么重要了。
E: How ridiculous. This question has bothered me for years, yet when I discover the truth, I realize that all these are no longer important.

C: 别担心，我们有盟友。
E: Don't worry, we have allies.

C: 一令扶摇九天应，三军迢递银河来。天地英雄皆同力，铁墓扬灰挫骨销。
E: With but one command, the Nine Heavens answered, and the three armies marched across the distant Cosmos. Heroes of heaven and earth joined their strength, and the Irontomb was ground to dust, its bones scattered and destroyed.

C: 你没听星际和平播报吗？铁墓真的被击败了，宇宙中也诞生了文明的种子。
E: Haven't you heard the Interastral Peace Broadcast? Irontomb was really defeated, and the seeds of civilization have sprouted in the universe.

C: 抱歉啦，只能通过这种方式给你留言……
E: Sorry, this was the only way I could leave you a message...

C: 快去快去，别废话了，老爹等你的好消息！
E: Go, go, enough chit-chatting. I'll be waiting!

C: 你阅历丰富，为什么不自己教？
E: You're more learned about these. Why not teach her yourself?

C: （教她消遣娱乐，享受生活）
E: (Teach her how to have fun and enjoy her life.)

C: 学习前沿科学的理论知识，为法政科和空间站的大家提供辅助服务，以及…等待古恩先生的升级与维修。
E: Learn cutting-edge scientific theories, support the department of Galactic Geopolitics and the space station, and... wait for Mr. Gunn to give me upgrades and maintenance.

C: 啊这句，我之前经常这么说，但有人说给人一种很强的攻击性……
E: Ah, this sentence. I used to say this all the time, but some people say it feels quite aggressive...

C: 我想不到更好的了。
E: I can't think of anything better.

C: 推进装置啊…修起来应该不难。
E: Thruster compartment... that shouldn't be hard to fix.

C: 对啊！
E: Yes.

C: 肯定没有！
E: Never!

C: 哎，我现在觉得，怪谈这种东西，都是标题党噱头多。
E: *sigh* Now I feel ghost stories only get attention when they have a click-bait title.

C: 蓝色好，我喜欢蓝色！
E: Blue! I like blue!

C: 哎，头发就这样了吧。
E: *sigh* I'll leave my hair as it is.

C: 乖乖，你不用夸我了，我这一头白发有什么好的。
E: Ohhh, there's no need to praise me. What's so good about white hair from old age?

C: （以斯帖要的照片都拍好了，带过去给她看看吧。）
E: (I'm done with Esther's photos. Time to take these back to her.)

C: 大师水准。
E: I am a pro.

C: 有机会的话，我想和自己未来的朋友一同享用下午茶的时光，在这舒适的大堂里相互推心置腹。
E: If there's ever a chance, I would love to enjoy afternoon tea and have a heart-to-heart talk with my future friend in the cozy lobby.

C: 她说…
E: She said...

C: 太好了，{NICKNAME}，咱们一定得把这件事办成！把两箱物资都拿上，先送哪份就由你来定吧！
E: Great, {NICKNAME}, we gotta get this done! Take both boxes of supplies, and you can decide which one to deliver first!

C: 她给你写了一封回信。
E: She wrote a letter for you in reply.

C: 别着急，你看…
E: Relax, here, take a look...

C: 呃…也不知道该算好消息还是坏消息？后勤部的一帮小年轻听说我要退伍了，全都跑来挽留…他们说，要是没有我这个老兵带着，他们肯定办不成事。
E: Though I'm not sure it can be considered as good news... Youngsters from the Logistics Department were trying to convince me to stay after they heard that I was retiring... They said that they couldn't handle things correctly without me leading the way.

C: 喔哦…不愧是波瓦大臣看中的新星，您果然绝顶聪明！
E: Hooboy... you really are Minister Bova's rising star, huh! What an intellect!

C: 咳，抱歉，请允许我回避您的这次提问。请问您还有别的事吗？
E: Ahem, sorry. Please allow me to sidestep this question of yours. Is there anything else I can do for you?

C: 虎克。
E: Hook.

C: 我想再看一次题面…
E: Let me see the question again...

C: 没事没事，客气什么！我猜，肯定是哪个狂热粉丝自己不好意思，才托你来问的吧？理解理解。
E: That's cool. No worries! I'm guessing there's a fanatical fan behind the scenes who's too embarrassed to ask themselves, am I right? I can understand that.

C: 书中的气氛？抱歉，我没太明白……
E: The book? I'm sorry. I don't quite understand...

C: 他真的去雪原了，我会骗你吗？
E: He really did go to the Snow Plains. I'm serious.

C: 没错，这和「会社」的价值观是不冲突的——「正当权益会社」还是做了它该做的事，没毛病吧？
E: There is no conflict between my job and the mission of the Society. The Rightful Rights Society is still doing its thing.

C: 这怎么可能呢？街上就你一个人，小偷不是你是谁啊……
E: No way! You're the only one on the road. Who else would it be...

C: 行吧，反正我肚子也饿了——送到嘴边的肉哪有不吃的道理！
E: Alright, I'm hungry anyways — It ain't smart to pass up food shoved in front of my face!

C: 这么看来…我岂不是吃不了好吃的了吗？那也太空虚了吧……
E: So... I can't eat tasty food anymore? That's really sad...

C: 但就算这样，应该也能被相机拍到吧？
E: But I should still show up in photographs.

C: 一开始我也有心理负担，总想着当扒手实在是不光彩。可生活所迫，我竟也慢慢地习惯了…哎。
E: I did feel bad at first, and I felt it was dishonorable to be a thief. But I had bills to pay and I got used to this life... *sigh*.

C: 别说傻话了，你没事的！
E: Don't be silly. You will be fine!

C: 你说的没错，就算可能性再低，我们也会到海上调查一番的。
E: You're right. No matter how slim the chance is, we still have to go out on the water and conduct an investigation.

C: 「你千万要远离野兽出没的地方，否则会被马上吃掉。要是不会钻木取火的话，你可以试试打火机，一定要有耐心……」
E: "Please stay away from places where wild animals are active or you will be eaten by them. If you don't know how to start a fire, you can try using a lighter. It is important to remain patient at all times..."

C: 这确实是气话…既然落难者还有生还的可能，我们还是会继续搜救的。
E: You're right. I didn't mean that... As the castaway may still be alive, we will continue our search.

C: …这也许是「记忆」命途的体现。至少在当下，你走在「记忆」的命途上。下次去模拟宇宙的时候，试试「记忆」开局如何？
E: ...Perhaps this is a manifestation of the Path of Remembrance. At least, for now, you are ambling on the Path of Remembrance. How about trying out Remembrance at the start of your next Simulated Universe run?

C: 像我刚研发出来的「漆黑生酪」口味，听上去还蛮有噱头的，喝起来也相当不错，只是多种配料搅拌在一起才显得颜色奇怪，喝起来还是挺好喝的。
E: Check out this new Midnight Cream Tea flavor I just developed. It sounds pretty catchy and tastes great, but its color might look a little unusual with so many ingredients.

C: 茶水下肚，强烈的冲击感令你顿时愣住，在摇摇头冷静了数息后，你开始掐着指头计算自己方才究竟喝了几杯「烈焰浓茶」——且慢，你猛然想到，掐着指头计算分明是三月七的行为。
E: You are stunned by the Flaming Potent Tea's bold aftertaste. After shaking your head and taking a moment to compose yourself, you start counting on your fingers how many cups of Flaming Potent Tea you've had. At that moment, you suddenly realize that counting with your fingers is something only March 7th would do.

C: 嗯？听你的描述，我怎么感觉你是因为喝「烈焰浓茶」喝得有点上头了呀？我见过一些客人，他们耐受力比较低，喝完就头晕脑胀胡言乱语的。
E: Hmmm? From what you're saying, I assume the Flaming Potent Tea has got you a little carried away? I've seen customers who aren't used to it getting dizzy and talking nonsense after drinking my tea.

C: 在翁法罗斯的民间传说中，人们会把艾格勒的寒风装进法吉娜的机关中制成冰柩，为自己的食物保鲜降温。
E: Among Amphoreus' folklore, people would stash Aquila's chilly winds into Phagousa's device to create a freezer that could keep their food fresh.

C: 饰壁里拉
E: Wall Lyre

C: 与浴池连通，能更便捷地感受今日水温是否中意。
E: Connected to the bath to conveniently check if today's temperature is suitable.

C: 一曲终了，旋律在短暂的静默后再度响起，如潮水抚摸海岸，一浪又一浪。
E: As the song ends, the melody rises once more after a short pause — just like the tide lapping against the shore, one wave at a time.

C: 新伊甸-III矿业基地遭遇黑客攻击，经查系「星核猎手」所为。
E: A hacking incident has targeted the New Eden-III Mining Facility, with investigators confirming the "Stellaron Hunters" as the perpetrators.

C: 爱对我说——
E: Love spoke to me —

C: 我与歌耳戈是在血尘弥漫的角斗中相识相爱…那么，便也让我在角斗中，亲手与她作别吧。
E: Gorgo and I met and fell in love in the blood and dust of battle... So, allow me to bid her farewell personally in battle once more.

C: 被岁月染成暗金色的卷轴，似乎记载着命运织者们留下的重要启示。你取下一卷，发现上面的标题赫然是——《给预言家的<unbreak>101</unbreak>个开场白》。
E: The scrolls, aged to a dark golden hue by time, seem to hold vital revelations left behind by the Weavers of Destiny. You pull one out and its title immediately catches your eye: 101 Opening Lines for Prophets.

C: 等等，既然说是｢全知全能｣，为何不问它一些问题？
E: Wait, since we're talking about "omniscience," why not ask a few questions?

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

C: 我好像说得太多了…让我们回到正题上吧，贵客。
E: Ah, it seems I've said too much. Let us return to the matter at hand, dear guest.

C: 抱歉，我只能猜到这些…我不是个聪明的衣匠。
E: Sorry, that's all I've got... I'm not the smartest Garmentmaker.

C: 大力出奇迹！
E: Strength makes miracles!

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「你要累计消费满<unbreak>500</unbreak>块沐浴皂赠<unbreak>100</unbreak>块的赠品券，还是要首充<unbreak>40</unbreak>万利衡币返还双倍的代金券呢？」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "Would you like the 'buy <unbreak>500</unbreak> soaps get <unbreak>100</unbreak> free' coupon or the voucher for a bonus on your first <unbreak>400</unbreak>k Balance Coin top-up?" )∋

C: 不能睡啊！
E: Don't fall asleep!

C: 来吧，我跟你豹了！
E: Let's go! Seal-mageddon!

C: 每次我押的选手都败了…
E: I lost all my bets...

C: 眼前是你钻进木马的地方——准确地说，不完全是，你身处码头的另一侧。
E: Before you stands the spot you entered the wooden horse — well, not exactly, you've landed on the opposite side of the dock.

C: 这是…云崖外侧吗？果然如此，本次行动成功，我这就回去申请逮捕令……
E: Is this... outside Dawncloud? Just as expected, the mission was a success. I'll head back to apply for an arrest warrant...

C: 自从迁来奥赫玛，您的想法确实改变了不少。我想其他祭司们应该会笑着议论纷纷吧。
E: Your views have changed quite a bit since you arrived in Okhema. I imagine the other priests are probably laughing and discussing this behind your back.

C: 这是离刻法勒最近之处，你的整个视野几乎都被他遮天蔽日的神躯占据。
E: This is the closest point to Kephale. Your entire vision is almost entirely occupied by their towering, sky-obscuring divine form.

C: 一阵恍惚涌上心头，你仿佛听见了来自往昔的声音。
E: A sudden dizziness washes over you. For a moment, you think you hear echoes from the distant past.

C: 祝祭庭院后的大树下有一片神奇的迷境，里面居住着妖精一族。你想起曾与你共同冒险的「粉色小狗」，有了它的祝福，你未来的岁月一定会轻柔如毛绒。
E: Behind the Sacrament Courtyard stands a great tree, beneath which lies a magical maze, home to the fairies. You remember the little pink puppy who once journeyed with you. With its blessing, your future days are sure to be as soft and warm as velvet.

C: 木马随着晨昏之眼的晃动摇曳着，按钮仍然在发亮。
E: The wooden horse sways with the motion of Eye of Twilight, the button still glowing brightly.

C: 对面的旅人看过来！
E: Hey traveler, over here!

C: 这个符号…
E: This symbol...

C: 你懂什么！我就一只虫在这，哪里有对手？除非你把那爱下棋的小凯撒找来……
E: What would you know!? I am all by my lonesome self here. Where would I find an opponent? Unless you bring that chess-loving little Imperator...

C: 黑塔女士对我们有点成见。因此忆庭认为，还是由我给予你正确的概念比较好。
E: Madam Herta has a slight prejudice against us, so the Garden of Recollection believes that it'll be best if I provide you with a proper understanding of these concepts.

C: 谁的造物都不行帕！一定要把它赶走！
E: Pom-Pom doesn't care whose creation it is! It has to go!

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 后退，我来砸门。
E: Back up, I'll smash the door in.

C: 小狗湿漉漉的舌头舔了舔你的手，见你不为所动，又咬着你的手套不肯松口。
E: The puppy's sloppy tongue licks your hand, but seeing that you are unmoved, bites down on your glove and refuses to let go.

C: （我们去其他地方转转吧。）
E: (Let's go take a look somewhere else.)

C: （好险啊，可别再被它们逮到了。）
E: (That was close. Don't get caught by them again.)

C: 造物拒绝和你沟通，这似乎是「管家」下的命令。
E: The creation refuses to communicate with you. This seems to be an order from the "butler."

C: 极高的道德？我还获得过崇高道德的赞许呢，你有吗？连这东西都没有，你根本不配说自己有道德！
E: Extremely high morals? I've even received Praise of High Morals! Have you had them? If you don't even have that, then you are not fit to say you have morals!

C: 「不需要进食」？那这是什么？跟大家解释解释呗！
E: Not needing food? What is this? Explain yourself!

C: 这是由阮•梅女士决定的，评判标准不在于你。
E: This is decided by Madam Ruan Mei. You are not the judge of that.

C: 还要再辩下去吗？
E: Do you still want to debate over it?

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 当然，不仅有奖励，还有许多人家的鼓励哦！夸夸你！
E: Absolutely, not only is there a reward, but you'll also get plenty of cheers from me! Well done!

C: 在思考你的事。
E: Just pondering a few things.

C: 啊？这…别开这种玩笑，会吓到人家的！
E: Huh? W—What... don't joke about that, you'll scare me!

C: 只因为我是爱笑{F#女孩}{M#男孩}。
E: It's just because I'm a cheerful {F#girl}{M#boy}.

C: 听起来好奇怪！而且，还是很熟悉的语气！{NICKNAME}的过去果然很不一般……
E: That sounds so odd! And with such a familiar tone! {NICKNAME}'s past really is something special...

C: 呀！这不重要啦…人家在梦里，也会更像{NICKNAME}的样子呢。只是互相照照镜子，多好呀！
E: Ah! That's not important... I even look more like {NICKNAME} in my dreams. It's like we're just looking into a mirror together — isn't that nice?

C: 其实我随时会爆炸…
E: Actually, I might explode any moment...

C: 啊！这算是考验吗？可不能开这种玩笑哦？
E: Ah! Is this some kind of test? You can't joke like that!

C: （一声欢快的*哼*）
E: (Let out a delighted grunt)

C: 滴答，转向受阻！
E: Tick-tock, the turn is blocked!

C: 公输师傅在这里做什么呢？
E: Master Gongshu, what are you doing here?

C: 你放心这也不难，就像之前一样，你去调整承接器的位置，让这岁阳能量能一口气击穿所有的「标靶气球」就算成功。
E: Don't worry, it's not difficult. Just like before, you adjust the position of the receiver so that the heliobus energy can penetrate all the balloon targets in one go.

C: 今天还有武器测试吗？
E: Are there weapon tests today?

C: 没事，等你方便了之后再来找我吧。
E: All good. Just come find me when it's convenient for you.

C: 那就开始吧。
E: Then let's start.

C: 等一下。
E: Wait a moment.

C: 等一下。
E: Wait a moment.

C: 我等你。
E: I'll wait.

C: 因为太简单了。
E: Because it's too easy.

C: 你们圈子的人都喜欢一惊一乍？
E: Is everyone in the community this high-strung?

C: 你居然为了这种庸俗的理由而下棋，你果然不配做我们的意见领袖。
E: You're playing for such a contemptible reason? I knew you weren't worthy of being our thought leader!

C: 进入心境空间。
E: Enter the Emoscape.

C: 嗯…有位织者总想成为法吉娜的圣兽。金丝带来消息，它把自己藏在了<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的圣兽摊位</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of becoming the sacred beast of Phagousa. The golden thread brings tidings: They now hide <color=#dbc291ff>within the Sacred Beast Stall in Marmoreal Palace</color>. Seek them there.

C: 嗯，就这么简单…或许我们把注意力放在这些若虫身上会更好。它们想传达什么呢？
E: Yes, it is that easy... Perhaps we should focus on these nymphs. What are they trying to convey?

C: 多谢你了，贵客，织者们在圣城会过得很愉快的。这些礼物就权当报酬收下吧。
E: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be very happy living in the holy city. Take these gifts as your payment.

C: 没、没错！这箱子对于我的价值远超于你！即使这样，你也不肯放弃么？
E: Y—you bet! This box means more to me than you could imagine! Still going to fight me on this?

C: 哦…等等。等等等等。所以，你的意思是，你「从一开始就已经死了」？桀桀桀桀，那还真是出乎意料之外啊！
E: Oh... wait. Wait just a minute. You mean you've "been dead from the very beginning"? Hehehe, now that's something I didn't see coming!

C: 巴特鲁斯只是一只什么都做不到的贼灵…想做的事情有那么那么多，能办到的却那么那么少。
E: I'm just a helpless Spirithief... with endless ambitions, but so little power to achieve them.

C: 话虽如此，巴特鲁斯仍然给我设定了命运，也就是在这里和你进行试炼。准备好，要开始了！桀桀桀桀……
E: Still, Bartholos assigned me a purpose — to test you in this trial. Ready yourself! We begin now! Hehehehe...

C: 桀桀，巴特鲁斯说得没错，这里果然出现了数据异常。啊…灰色头发的，你就是巴特鲁斯的那位忘年之交，咱说的没错吧？
E: Hehe, Bartholos was right — we found a data anomaly here. Ah... gray-haired one, you must be Bartholos' friend from across the ages, yes?

C: 吾的人设很有问题，乃BUG是也。
E: My character setting is deeply flawed — a genuine BUG.

C: 桀桀，巴特鲁斯如果能听见这句话，它一定会很高兴吧！
E: Hehe, that would make Bartholos so happy if they heard you!

C: 嘿，甭管你是不是真的这么想，但我可以放心大胆地告诉你，根据老巴特鲁斯缜密的推理，此时此刻的我的确是一种鬼魂，是由你的幻想所形成的联觉反应。
E: Well, whether or not you are, I can say with full confidence that based on my highly meticulous deduction, I am, at this exact moment, a ghostly figment conjured by your own subconscious.

C: 不愧是你，巴特鲁斯。
E: As expected, Bartholos.

C: 你要不要我的翻飞之币
E: Want my Coin of Whimsy?

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，您可否帮我借树庭的「瑟希斯之心」一用？
E: {NICKNAME}, could you help me borrow the "Heart of Cerces" from the Grove?

C: 这话可不能乱说啊…不过，居然连内情都有所掌握，或许你就是我要找的人。
E: That's not something you should say lightly. Still, if you're privy to such details, perhaps you really are the one I need.

C: 我来交付雅努斯的神谕。
E: I've come to deliver Janus's prophecy.

C: 迷津已经展露。去吧，辅祭。
E: The Maze has been revealed. Go ahead, acolyte.

C: 我想重玩之前的迷津！
E: I want to replay the maze!

C: 哗啦——好让人怀念的氛围，我有多久没回这里了？
E: *whoosh* Such a nostalgic atmosphere. How long has it been since I've been here?

C: 哗啦，我懂，用球撞东西的爽快感实在令虫欲罢不能。
E: *whoosh* I get it. The thrill of smashing things with the ball is truly irresistible for a bug.

C: 要是你感兴趣，就自己去摸索摸索吧。我要去接着玩大铁球了！下次走路小心点嗷，哗啦啦~
E: If you're interested, explore it yourself. I'm going back to play with the iron ball! Watch your step next time. *whoosh*

C: 他是负责看管火种匣的祭司，恐怕被困在了半神议院…外面黑潮肆虐，除了您，怕是没有别人能指望了…您能去找找他吗？
E: He's the priest in charge of Coreflame Caskets. I'm afraid he's trapped in the Demigod Council... The black tide is everywhere outside. If anyone can save him, it's you. Please... will you look for him?

C: 这又不是你的错……
E: This isn't your fault...

C: 你们几个？
E: Each of you?

C: 「事实：我仍未能参悟『纯美』与宇宙碎片之间的联系。」螺丝咕姆彬彬有礼，「结论：<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片正在无尽膨胀</color>。」
E: "Fact: I am still unable to comprehend the connection between the Beauty and Cosmic Fragments." Screwllum is extremely polite. "Conclusion: <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments are expanding endlessly</color>."

C: 我承认自己有点急功近利了…接下来我不会再干涉系统，你按照自己的心意随便玩吧。
E: I confess, I'm a little too eager for success... I won't interfere with the system again. Just play as you like.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「有情皆有三死，谓之命死、变易死、觉不死。」</color>悲悯的星神轻声道，<color=#dbc291ff>「有涯之身岂可济渡无涯之海？『开拓』，愿汝弃舍重担，不受后有，解脱自在。」</color>一根荆条缓缓飘来，花叶在你面前绽放，如甘露醍醐，滴落舌尖。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"All sentient beings have three deaths — the death of the body, the death of thoughts, and the death of desires."</color> The merciful Aeon whispers. <color=#dbc291ff>"How can a body bounded by its limits cross the boundless oceans? The Trailblaze, may you give up your burdens, be removed from the cycle of being, and set yourself free from suffering."</color> A thorn slowly floats towards you. Its flowers and leaves bloom before you, and its divine and enlightening nectar falls onto the tip of your tongue.

C: 不是一瞬间的事吗？
E: Didn't you say it'll only take a second?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「那是『欢愉』阿哈。」</color>黑塔没好气地解释道，<color=#dbc291ff>「非常难捉摸的星神，祂大概发现自己是假的了。不过，我想祂也不会在乎。这家伙很聒噪，捏着鼻子和祂聊几句吧。辛苦你了。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"That's Aha the Elation,"</color> Herta explains sullenly. <color=#dbc291ff>"A very elusive Aeon who probably figured out that THEY are a simulation. But I don't think THEY even mind it. THEY are very chatty. Just pinch your nose and have a chat with THEM. Thanks in advance."</color>

C: 如果我们评估下来不可行，大概会放任这个阿哈随便玩耍，隔绝掉祂和其它虚拟星神的交流吧。
E: If we feel that method is unfeasible, then we'll probably leave this Aha to play however THEY like, while isolating THEM from communicating with the other simulated Aeons.

C: 使用它还是非常耗神的，你可以把一部分开拓力储存起来，在沉浸时使用。
E: They are really exhausting to use, so save up some of your Trailblaze Power and use those for immersion.

C: 「你可以自己上。等你加入天才俱乐部，我就把斯蒂芬踢了。」黑塔摊手。
E: "You can do this on your own. Wait till you join the Genius Society, I'll kick Stephen out." Herta shrugs.

C: 祂的面容从海潮中升起，更多信徒的故事涌入——那是一只因信神而病入膏肓的凶兽，它伴着躁动的鼓点与奏曲，途经圣辉恍若星芒下的港湾，再次浮现于土地之上。那一枚掉落的鳞片被供至古国圣殿，彼时天鼓击声，彩灯下坠，一种力从骨骸中四溢，亡者呓语化作尘埃散开，两位乞讨者于街头敲起古碗，遮天蔽日的虫潮扑来纠缠撕咬，争斗中三声哀嚎如雷鸣炸开。
E: Oroboros's face rises from the waves, as more stories of THEIR believers inundate your mind. It is a ferocious beast that falls gravely sick due to its belief in the Aeon. Along with the lively drum beats and songs, the beast passes by a harbor beneath the glow of holy radiance, once again emerging upon the land. Its fallen scale is consecrated in a temple of the Primeval Imperium. Amid the resounding drum beats, the lanterns fall, a force overflows from the bones, and the murmurs of the deceased scatter like dust. Two beggars knock their ancient bowls on the street, while a relentless swarm engulfs and bites them. During the grapple, three agonized wails explode like thunder.

C: 「阿基维利！」阿哈就这么堂堂正正地出现了，「我的阿基维利！我给你的骰子好玩吗？我要提问：我的骰子有几个面？」
E: "Akivili!" Just like that, Aha makes a straightforward appearance. "My dear Akivili! Did you have fun with the die I gave you? Here's my question: How many sides does my die have?"

C: 你转着眼珠；突然间这份报告跳起来，对着你的脑袋来了一「拳」！你被打懵了！你还没反应过来时——它又躺在那里了。
E: As you look elsewhere, the manuscript suddenly jumps and gives your head a *punch*! You are dumbfounded! Before you know it, it is back to where it was lying again.

C: 你来到一个只剩沙漠的世界。一位头发花白、脚腕扭曲的老者坐在*沙丘*和*兵俑*之间看着你。他用沙制的墙壁抵御虫灾，在此地圈出一片净土。
E: You arrive at a desolate world, where nothing but a vast, lifeless desert remains. An old man with grizzled hair and twisted ankles sits amidst *dunes* and *sand warriors*, keeping the Swarm at bay with his sand walls.

C: 1.普罗可星口味卷饼包装纸：\n该星系泯灭于奥博洛斯与虫皇的第二次擦肩。\n据传在普罗可星上人类是卷饼兽的食物；而卷饼兽之间爆发过独立口味战争！
E: 1. The wrapper for Procorean burrito:\nThis star system was obliterated during the second war between Oroboros and Imperator Insectorum.\nRumor has it that humans were regarded as food by Burriteasts on Procore, and they even initiated a war among themselves over their preferred flavors of human flesh!

C: 「阮•梅培育了一个生命。」黑塔的声音突然出现，「一个普通人，观察他在三个时空下会不会有所不同。我想给这个生命起名叫———『诺巴蒂』！」
E: "Ruan Mei has created a living being," Herta's voice suddenly rings out. "It's an ordinary human, and I'd like to observe if he behaves differently in the three dimensions. I've decided to name this living being Norbati!"

C: 你们烧掉了悲悼伶人的船！你们誓要将生命献给列神之战，绝不回头！
E: You burn the gondola of the Mourning Actors! You have vowed to dedicate your lives to the war among the Aeons until your last breath!

C: 你听懂了新的语言…那位年轻的狱中囚徒，在走上断头台前默许一切发生…这是兄弟二人间无限衔尾的爱恨秘言。
E: You understand the new language... That young prisoner had silently permitted everything to happen before he walked to the guillotine... This is the secret language of love and hate between two brothers, a whisper without a beginning or end.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了虚空。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the void itself.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了骰蛊里封存的无数记忆重合。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into the overlap of countless memories sealed within the dice holder.

C: 看起来不用我再教什么了。我开启了<color=#dbc291ff>觐见之间</color>，一个能帮你更快觐见星神的模块。
E: Seems like there's nothing else I need to teach you. I've activated the <color=#dbc291ff>Audience Chamber</color>, a module that can help you have an audience with the Aeons quicker.

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 不！一个声音尖叫着——你不能这样做！这不是那个『时刻』！
E: No! A voice screams. You can't do this! Now isn't the moment!

C: 你知道，这是「博识尊」计算中的第一个『时刻』：那些纵横捭阖，睥睨一切的推手自认掌控了宇宙局势，却不过令宇宙来到了博识尊得出的第一个『时刻』。
E: You know, this is the first moment calculated by Nous: Those pompous, conspiratorial masterminds who believe they control the universe, have done nothing but allow the universe to arrive at the first moment that Nous adjudged.

C: 「寰宇蝗灾后是星际和平公司迅速扩张的年代，经历支援队重组、信用体系建立、联觉信标发明等历史时刻，公司一度发展至鼎盛。」
E: "The era that came after the Swarm Disaster was when IPC underwent rapid expansion. Historical moments like the support team reorganization, credit system establishment, and Synesthesia Beacon invention took place during this time. The development of IPC reached its peak."

C: 「呃…等有机会再说吧。」黑塔摊手，「我想，这些东西够应付公司了。等下次，我们可以再尝试更纯粹的模拟。」
E: "Um... We can discuss it again when we have the chance." Herta shrugs and says, "I think we've got enough to send to IPC. Let's try a more straightforward simulation next time."

C: 机械轰鸣，随即沉默。它还未能够发出疑问——她的背后是何人？
E: The machine rumbles and falls into silence before it has the chance to ask her a question — who is the mastermind behind her?

C: 此后不久，他们再次有了惊人的发现：在一些从宇宙边星前来掠夺资源的有机生命体内，德•维恩的手下同样发现了反有机方程——一种*拟造产物*，它不遵循想法，只改变想法。
E: They made another shocking discovery shortly after that. The Anti-Organic Equation was also found by De Wayne's subordinates in some of the organic lives who came here from fringe planets to plunder resources. The equation was a simulation that did not follow thoughts but altered them.

C: 此时边星贸易战争已经打响，法恩莎最终选择了与重要盟友「惑神星」的友好关系——而卡彭从此消失了。
E: The Borderstar Trade War had already started by then. Farnsha chose to maintain an amiable relationship with the Temptra, her ally. As for Cappon, he's been gone since then.

C: 你很快意识到「安达吐尔•扎扎罗」即将死于这场战争中——你数次遇见，却从未放在心上的那位「安达吐尔•扎扎罗」。
E: Soon, you realize Andatur Zazzalo will perish in this war. The one with whom you have crossed paths several times, but never gave much attention to.

C: 好痛。
E: That hurts.

C: 世上存在着比君王更高贵的，祂无私地赐予万事万物以毁灭。你肆意地捏碎眼前的敌人，摇曳的光束在绝对的暴力面前逸散，他们试图逃跑，可火焰无处不在。
