E: Something exists that is nobler than the royalty, and THEY selflessly bestow the Destruction upon everything there is. You recklessly crush your enemies before you, and the flickering glints of light disperse in the face of absolute violence. They attempt to flee, but flames remain everywhere.

C: 两轮明月将海洋染上银色，你脱下鞋，缓步走在沙滩上，尽情欣赏虫儿们的歌吟。
E: Two bright moons stain the ocean silver. Taking off your shoes, you walk slowly across the sandy beach, thoroughly enjoying the insects' songs.

C: 爆炸吞没了一切。
E: The explosion devoured everything.

C: 你坐在一块冰冷的石头上，海水腐蚀着腿部的伤口，发炎后的疼痛令你心生焦虑。但眼前的人们并不允许你露出这样的情绪，身为巡游寰宇的织匠，你能带给他们的，只有希望，也只能是希望。
E: You sit atop a freezing cold stone. As the seawater erodes the wound on your legs, the pain of the inflammation makes you anxious. However, the people before you do not permit you to show such emotions. As the weaver that roams the universe, all you can offer them is hope, and it must be hope alone.

C: 你对自己有了新的认知，原来你是……
E: You have a sudden realization about your identity, and it turns out that you are...

C: 过去的十年里，你一直在弗雷亚星的烛墨学派研究所工作，夜以继日地存储文献资料。直到某个晚上，导师带你和小雅跑出了研究所。
E: For the past ten years, you have worked in the Candelagraphos research institute on Freya, storing documents day and night. That was until one evening, when the teacher and Xiaoya ran away from the institute.

C: 「每个文明都是一件独一无二的乐器，他们对宇宙的认知，散发出各自独特的音色。」
E: "Each civilization is like a unique musical instrument, and their own recognition of the universe around them emits a unique tone."

C: 又是一句让你犯困的话，你现在只想回到员工宿舍，好重新续上刚才的美梦。
E: Another boring line that makes you yearn for sleep. Right now, you want nothing more than to head back to the staff dorms and get back to your sweet dreams.

C: 你有些惊讶，你确实发明了超纳米布，不过本意是用于广告印刷。试验期间，整个星球的人只要在夜晚抬起头，就能看到比月亮还大一圈的广告牌。
E: You find yourself shocked by his words. You did indeed invent ultra-nanocloth, but the original purpose was for advertisement printing. During the testing period, the people of the planet need only to raise their heads to the night sky and they'd see billboards bigger than the moon.

C: 你躺在培养舱里，心脏忽地一阵搐动，实验的排异反应正在逐渐加剧。即使在克劳奇学士的实验品中，你的改造程度也是最高的那批。
E: You lie in the incubator, your heart suddenly convulsing — your rejection reaction from the experiment is gradually intensifying. Even among Scholar Crouch's experimental subjects, you belong to the most heavily modified batch.

C: 变量输入：鲁珀特帝国机械齿轮、高速维生营养液、灵长类兼容启动子……
E: Variable input: Rubert Empire Mechanical Cogwheel, Instant Vita Serum, Primate-Compatible Promoter...

C: 她调用出溯源模型，但那神秘的信号已悄然消失，只因她已身处风暴的中心。她花了很长的时间来消化这个事实，恒星从头顶跌落了三次。然后，她不得不花费更长的时间去消化另一个事实。
E: She activates the tracing model, but the mysterious signal has disappeared, as she is already in the eye of the storm. It takes so long for her to digest the fact that the star above her head falls under the horizon three times. Then, she spends even longer trying to digest yet another fact.

C: 「祂用『时刻』宣告了完美的未来模型。而你，是一只挣脱昆虫针的蝴蝶标本，你扇动翅翼掀起混沌和未知，这会提前将宇宙导向『终末』。」
E: "THEY used 'Instants' to declare a perfect model of the future, and you are a butterfly specimen that escaped from its needle. You flap your wings and roil up the chaos and the unknown — this will prematurely lead the universe to Finality."

C: 「一只黄色的小鸭子告诉我，多出来逛逛，有利于身心健康。」
E: "A little yellow duckling once told me, 'go out and touch some grass. That's good for your health.'"

C: 「你会像所有的天才那般，永远无法知晓答案了。」波尔卡并不慌张，她整理自己糖果色的衣袍，如同拨动蝴蝶的鳞羽，在宇宙中掀起最后的飓风。未来是确定的还是混沌的？学派战争的难题在二人身上重演。
E: "You'll be like all the other geniuses, forever unable to know the answer." Polka remains unfazed, tidying her candy-colored robe, like how a butterfly flutters its wings, unleashing the final cyclone upon the universe. Is the future certain or chaotic? The conundrum of the Scholars' Strife plays out once again between the two.

C: 你体验了就知道。看不见实物，听我干讲也没用，对不？
E: You'll know it when you go through it. There's no point in listening to my description without seeing the real thing, right?

C: 挺有趣的。
E: It's fun.

C: 战略投资部是公司众多组织中相对年轻的部门，未曾经历那一时期。如今，部门精英奔行银河，清算各项因「万界之癌」产生的坏账，需要更多史实资料。
E: The Strategic Investment Department is relatively new compared to other departments in IPC, so we have no first-hand experience of that history. Now, the best and brightest of our department are traveling around the galaxy to settle bad debts stemming from the Cancer of All Worlds. We need more historical data for that.

C: 你获得了一些宇宙碎片。
E: You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments.

C: 「我独自培育这个微型切片，把它嵌在了模拟宇宙的代码里。」她抚摸自己围巾上的刺绣，漫不经心。「别告诉黑塔和螺丝咕姆。」
E: "I nurtured this miniature slice by myself and embedded it into the code of the Simulated Universe." She strokes the embroidery on her scarf distractedly as she adds, "Don't tell Herta and Screwllum about this."

C: 每个房间内都没有动静，你怀疑其他屋内的旅客究竟是还在自己的床上，还是已经在它的胃里…你有些懊悔自己之前的选择。
E: Not a sound can be heard from every other room. You wonder whether the other guests are all in bed or whether they are in Sal's stomach... You can't help but regret your previous choice.

C: 「留下你的金币。城邦建设需要资金，慷慨是最后的牛仔精神！」强盗恬不知耻。你瞪着他们，狠狠咬断嘴里的草叶根——
E: "Leave your gold coins behind. We need funds to oil the development of the city. Generosity is in line with the cowboy's spirit!" Scowling at the shameless bandits, you bite off the grass with your mouth...

C: 纯美骑士把身上的奇物给了你。
E: The knight gives you his Curio.

C: 你路过一片布满巨型虫群的栖居地。一只巨型「永眠领主」正在腐殖化王座上沉睡。
E: You pass by a habitat filled by a massive Swarm. A giant Lord of Eternal Slumber is sleeping soundly on a putrefied throne.

C: 「这七盏塘香前，跪拜着寰宇无数日笃癫狂的舞者。他们在会堂前叩首，对那已是第十三位自缢者进行唱谣祷告。舞者团匍匐于神前…恳求得知自己在宇宙之舞结束后的结局。」
E: "Before these seven pots of incense kneel countless dancers from all over the stars, who are getting madder by the day. They prostrate themselves before the meeting hall, and sing and pray to the <unbreak>13</unbreak>th self-strangler - there are already <unbreak>13</unbreak> of them. The dancers will lie prone before God, pleading to know their end after the cosmic dance ends."

C: 老翁从金属巨构上取下一块零件，它几乎是迫切地向你身边的其它零件靠拢，在它们的共鸣里，你仿佛听见了鲁珀特帝皇的余音。
E: The old man takes a part from the metal behemoth. The part moves closer to the rest of the parts surrounding you in apparent eagerness. Amid their resonance, you seem to discern the lingering voice of the Emperor Rubert.

C: 你毫不怀疑，如果再不溜掉，他迟早得向你推销反有机方程。
E: You have no doubt that he'll try to sell you the Anti-Organic Equation if you don't get away.

C: 「为确保您的账户安全，请您在开户前设置二级密保问题，请在屏幕上完成后续操作。」
E: "In order to ensure the safety of your account, please set a secondary security question and complete operations on the screen."

C: 你走进一片词语滋养的森林，追查某位越狱的谜语人。句子、短语、语素和发音冲刷你的身体，雨滴渗透进皮肤，替换掉原有的含义。
E: You enter a forest that has been cultivated by words and language, tracking a Riddler who has escaped from prison. Sentences, phrases, morphemes, and phonemes wash over you and soak through your skin like raindrops, changing your body parts' original meanings.

C: 你找到一只年幼的苍猿，它懒散地趴倒在石头上，浓密的毛发里浸满了阳光，随风飘摇，像是草原上的波涛。
E: You find a young ape lounging lazily on a rock. Its dense fur soaks in sunlight and sways in the wind like waves on a grassy plain.

C: 它愤怒地拍打起胸脯，喉咙里挤出咆哮，准备让无理的陌生人接受应得的惩罚。
E: It furiously beats its chest, channeling a howl from its lungs, ready to mete deserved punishment on this unruly stranger.

C: 一块晶莹的宝石将鱼钩整个包裹住，透过它的外壁，你隐约看到，有什么东西在缓慢地蠕动。
E: A glittering gem completely envelops the hook. Through its glinting surface, you glimpse something languidly writhing within.

C: 「出于分工的需求，这类亚种蛰虫没有趋光性，但它们对热量格外敏感，所以才会以彗星蝉的内脏作为寄生的巢穴。」
E: "Due to their need to divide labor, this species of True Sting has no sensitivity to light, but they are extremely sensitive to heat. This is why they use the insides of comet cicadas as their parasitic nests."

C: 你发现赛场的盒饭居然是免费的，于是决定把本钱吃回来。
E: You discover the meal box at the competition is empty, so you decide to get your money's worth by feasting.

C: 「占卜命运，不过是骗人的把戏。但我不一样，我能为你决定自己的命运。」她从袖口中凭空摸出一副奥塔牌，抽出一叠，正面摆放在你的面前。
E: "Divination is nothing but deceitful tricks, but I am different. I hold the power to shape your destiny." Drawing a deck of Tawot Cards from her sleeve, she pulls out a stack and places them face up before you.

C: 它赞美一缕金丝的纺织，蜕去旧身的神明，踏上遍寻爱意的旅程。
E: It extols the weave of a single golden thread, shedding its olden divine form, embarking on a journey in search of love.

C: 你的手穿过它的翅膀，让幻影溃散，指尖唯余一缕旧时的沉吟。
E: Your hand passes through its wings, allowing the illusion to dissipate, leaving nary but a lingering murmur of the past upon your fingertips.

C: 它呢喃一杯蜜酿的回味，追逐荣耀的英雄们，在飘摇的海上举杯对饮。
E: It whispers of a reminiscent taste of honey brew, pursuing glorious heroes raising their goblets in merriment over swaying seas.

C: 「这把长矛曾刺入一只海怪的胸膛，那法吉娜的仆从有两颗心脏和九颗头颅，若非我身负泰坦的赐福，绝不可能从它的口中生还。」
E: "This here spear once pierced the chest of a sea monster, that servant of Phagousa with two hearts and nine heads. Were it not for the Titans' blessing upon me, I would never have escaped its maw alive."

C: 「呼，久违的新鲜空气，谢啦。」它抖擞身子，钻出画纸的平面，消失在远方的霓虹中。
E: "Whew, fresh air at long last. Thanks." It shakes its body and makes its way out of the flat canvas, disappearing into the distant rainbow.

C: 被歌声吸引的海兽们将礁石围住，你的小船也被簇拥的鱼群困住，进退两难。
E: Sea monsters charmed by the song surround the rocks, while your dinghy is trapped by a school of fish, caught between misfortunes.

C: 你试图打造曼妙的歌声，但蹩脚的唱腔却连鱼群都尝试逃离。愤怒的眷属们向你一拥而上，打算终结这撕心裂肺的曲调。
E: You attempt to craft a graceful melody, but your clumsy singing drives even the fish away. The enraged Titankins surge towards you, intent on silencing this heart-wrenching tune.

C: 消灭奸邪。
E: He destroyed the traitor.

C: 他们刺穿怪物的眼睛。
E: They pierce the monsters' eyes.

C: 你决定给面试官一个令人印象深刻的开场，于是你把演示模型砸向了面试官光秃秃的脑门。
E: Determined to leave a lasting first impression, you toss your demonstration model straight at the interviewer's shiny bald head.

C: 在那连泰坦都无法呼吸的压抑当中，时空交织如麻，襁褓中的翁法罗斯危在旦夕。
E: In that repression that could even choke Titans, space and time intertwined like fibers, with the newborn Amphoreus on the cusp of peril.

C: 「那么，所有的鲜花都将化为泥淖，所有的大树都变成枯枝。这地上所有的植物，都将敬畏于塞纳托斯赠予的名为腐朽的死亡。」
E: "Then all flowers shall rot into mire, all mighty trees wither to barren husks. Every plant upon this earth shall tremble before the death bestowed by Thanatos through decay."

C: 至此，尽管关于昼夜的争夺永不止息，但当一年的时间结束，昼夜的时间仍会在最终保持完美的平衡。
E: Thus, though the struggle between day and night would never truly cease, by the year's end, their hours would always return to perfect balance.

C: 爱之女神飞到造物的泥塑前，用翅膀拂过他们的眼睛，轻点他们的胸膛，使他们的双眼得以观赏美的存在，使他们的心灵得以迸发爱的话语。
E: The goddess of love then flew to the mud figures, brushing their wings over the creations' eyes and gently touching their chests — so that their eyes might perceive beauty and their hearts might speak the words of love.

C: 下次，下次一定入职。
E: Next time, next time I will definitely join the department.

C: 在确认过自己并非出现幻觉后，你决定将此事告知艾丝妲。
E: After checking that you're not hallucinating, you decide to tell Asta about this.

C: 找回密码。
E: Recover password.

C: 请在该终端附近<color=#dbc291ff>寻找「飞天纸鹤」</color>，以解决权限缺失问题。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Find an Origami Crane</color> near this terminal to solve your lack of credentials.

C: 「<unbreak>9527</unbreak>」，亲切且饱含力量的数字，它曾见证过古早的数据传输时代的辉煌，在它背后埋葬了无数过客的青春。你想了想，决定试试这串数字。
E: "<unbreak>9527</unbreak>," a kind and powerful string of digits. It has witnessed the glory of the ancient data transmission era, and behind those digits are buried the youthful days of countless many. After mulling it over, you decide to give it a try.

C: 我再考虑考虑。
E: I'll consider it.

C: 你望着女人在宽檐兜帽遮掩下不大真切的面容，对她方才所述的种种离奇故事感到难以置信。
E: Staring at the woman's surreal face concealed under the wide brim of her hood, you can hardly believe the bizarre stories she has just told.

C: 难道…这是某种残忍的献祭仪式吗？！你开始颤抖，并大声央求他们饶你一命。可惜的是，你没有嘴——好吧，这下你只能寄希望于他们确实能偷窥思想了……
E: Could this be... a cruel ritual that involves sacrifices!? You tremble in fear and plead for their mercy loudly, but you do not have a mouth. Now, you really wish they could read your mind...

C: 它们想要羞辱你，这位领导星系所有生灵的、唯一的代表！尽管他们已经将这星系中的许多星球毁灭殆尽，但它们仍不知足——
E: They want to humiliate you, the sole representative and leader of all living beings in the star system! Although they have wiped out many planets in the star system, they are still not satisfied...

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：钙质化。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Calcification."

C: 你为什么能嵌进里面？
E: How are you embedded in there?

C: 没想到你居然也会演奏乐器，改天一定要让我听听嗡！
E: I never knew you played an instrument. You have to let me hear you play one day!

C: 唉，这些植物感觉都没什么精神嗡，和以前比还是差远了……
E: *sigh* These plants feel as though they're completely lifeless. Now it's even worse than before...

C: …要启程了吗？
E: ...Are you setting off on a journey?

C: 这两只若虫原本亲密无间，却出于某种原因无法相见。礼赞命运，让我们再次看到了这幅场面。
E: These two nymphs were once tight-knit as iron chains, but could not see one another for reasons unknown. Blessed is destiny, that we are able to witness their union once more.

C: 好吧，是错觉喀。
E: Okay, fine. It was just my imagination.

C: 让我再考虑一下…
E: Let me think about it...

C: 这算「幸运」吗？
E: This is good luck, right?

C: 静静走开。
E: Walk away.

C: 「…歌蒂掌柜诚心邀您为我们的服务做出评价。」
E: "...Gertie, the owner, warmly invites you to rate our services."

C: 我写好了——再看一遍整体评价。
E: Finished — Now, go over the whole review again.

C: 玩游戏就是要赢！继续蹲着！
E: Why play if you don't intend to win? Stay hidden!

C: （还是说…去告诉希露瓦呢？）
E: (Or maybe... go and tell Serval?)

C: 啊啊啊……
E: Ah...

C: 平等之光在闪耀！
E: The light of equality shines!

C: 看来这里也已经不安全了喀，还是赶紧换个地方吧喀……
E: It seems this spot isn't secure anymore, crrrk. Time to relocate...

C: 大小近似，颜色对应，角度相同…而且都是若虫——这下就是完美的平衡了喀。是不是根本看不出差别？
E: Similar size, matching colors, same angle... and both are nymphs — now that's a perfect balance. Can you even tell any difference?

C: 看不到我、看不到我…
E: I'm invisible... I'm invisible...

C: 我以为最多是往宝箱里放个臭气弹…
E: I thought the worst that would be in the chest was a stink bomb...

C: 你似乎见过他——或者他似乎见过你。
E: You think you've seen him before. That, or he has.

C: 您可真是体贴！这道铁门的钥匙就在戍卫官手里。
E: You're a thoughtful one! The Captain has the key to this iron gate.

C: 答错了嗡！本蝶的走位，果然独步天下嗡！
E: Wrong, buzz! My moves are unmatched in the world, buzz!

C: 也难怪啦，没有可爱的东西相伴，我们怎么能在这个世界上活下去嗡？
E: Can't blame them. How could we survive in this world without something cute to hold onto?

C: 大家都离开了…
E: Everyone's gone...

C: 我也是才知道有这么一件事儿，哪有什么线索啊…我还得抽时间查一下。
E: I've only just learned of this issue. How would I have any leads? I need to find time to investigate the matter.

C: 怎么？听到我这么厉害就兴奋了？来，给爷笑一个。
E: What's up? Are you getting excited after hearing how amazing I am? Come on. Give me a smile.

C: 跟机巧鸟讲话真没意思。
E: There's really no point in talking to a cycrane.

C: 我要找一份被海关扣押的画册，小机巧鸟不能看的那种！事成之后，你也有份，嘻嘻嘻。
E: I want a photo book that has been seized by customs. Something that a cycrane can't look at! After you get it, you can have a copy, too. Hehehe.

C: 星际和平公司的精密机械设计图…好像是涉嫌博识学会的技术保护条例什么的，我才不管这么多呢…走吧，走吧，我们赶紧开溜。
E: It's a collection of designs for Interastral Peace Corporation's precision machines. It's suspected to have something to do with the Intelligentsia Guild's technology protection regulation, or whatever. I don't care about all that stuff... Let's go, let's go. We better scram.

C: 机巧鸟这厮说我这里生意不行，还说它如果假装成我这里的小商品，肯定三天都不会被人给认出来…它也太小看我的生意了，于是就有了这赌约。
E: The cycrane said my business here is so bad, and even if it masqueraded as a shop item here for three days, it wouldn't even be noticed by anyone... But he's underestimating me. So I took on that bet.

C: 对呀。
E: I thought so.

C: 只要出手得足够快，你就能在灾难降临之前脱离危险…你对自己的身手充满自信，过往的训练都不是白费的，你偷盗过的东西数不胜数。
E: Just shoot for it fast enough, and you'll always have a chance to get out of harm's way... You're confident in your agility, and you'll put all of your past training into this. You've stolen things countless times before.

C: 我不想再看到任何人流泪了，所以，请看好了，我的暴怒模式！启动！
E: I don't want to see any more tears, so please watch out for my Wrath mode! Activate!

C: 等等，你是不是闻到了什么？这个味道，这个味道是烧焦的味道，是电子元件超频过载失败的味道！简而言之，是短路的味道！
E: Hang on, do you smell that? Something's burning — it's the smell of something burning. It's the smell of burning hardware failing to overclock! It's basically the smell of a short circuit!

C: 就像是螺丝咕姆一样？
E: Just like Screwllum?

C: 好难啊，不过我们一起解出来了。
E: It was challenging, but we solved it together.

C: 不过，我还是要回去了。以后我还会回来这里来找你们的，我们还是「罗浮四大恶人」！
E: I'm afraid I must leave, but I'll still come back to visit every now and then. We'll always be the Luofu Infamous Four!

C: 改编不是乱编，戏说不是胡说。
E: Adaptation isn't revision and narrative interpretation is no mere poppycock.

C: 哈哈，毕竟我也是初来乍到喀。
E: Haha, well, I'm just a newcomer here myself.

C: 两军较量，贵在全争；而赛场如战场，自然也是兵法的用武之地了！
E: Two armies facing off against each other will fight across all facets. This contest is just like a battle, so it's natural to draw on a book of warfare like this!

C: 「外交手段」又是什么…
E: What constitutes "diplomatic means," then?

C: 快去找你的对手聊聊吧！若是觉得已经准备就绪，请告诉我——比赛将会进入「作战」环节！
E: Go and chat with your opponents! When you think you're ready for the next phase, approach me — and we'll then move on to the Combat phase!

C: 你就是我的对手吗？
E: Are you my opponent?

C: …有点意思，但我不能接受。
E: ...Interesting, but I can't take that.

C: 你不禁开始怀疑这两位选手参加比赛的真实目的究竟是什么。然后，又一声嘹亮的宣言将你的思绪扯回现实。
E: You can't help but start to wonder what the real motives behind these two contestants are. However, another loud announcement yanks your thoughts back to reality.

C: 好在丹鼎司的医士来得及时，抢救很成功！虽然你没有赢，但看在你努力到了这份上……
E: Luckily the Alchemy Commission's healers came to your rescue in record speed! You may not have won today, but seeing as you've worked so hard right up until this point...

C: 它们被要求去参加新员工培训了，只要不违反法律、不影响正常工作，机巧鸟有智能就智能呗…再说了，星际和平公司很多机械都有智能。
E: They're required to undergo recruit training and as long as they don't break the law and can handle everyday work, who cares if cycranes have a little intelligence? I mean, lots of bots at the IPC have intelligence these days.

C: 这上面的颜文字说<color=#dbc291ff>光靠自己解不开</color>…是在暗示什么吗？
E: The emoji here says they <color=#dbc291ff>can't solve it on their own</color>... is that supposed to be a hint?

C: 那些都是骗人的，{RUBY_B#艾格勒}千目之神{RUBY_E#}平时根本不会管这里发生了什么，我也劈不了什么阳雷。我其实信扎格列斯——不然这里怎么会有扎格列斯之手？
E: It's all lies. {RUBY_B#Aquila}God of the Thousand Eyes{RUBY_E#} never cared about what happens here, and I can't really summon any Daythunder. In fact, I trust in Zagreus — otherwise, how could there be the Hand of Zagreus here?

C: 那一天，人们回想起了…
E: That day, people remembered...

C: 不许俯瞰大地！
E: Don't look down at the earth!

C: 我果然还是退出好了。
E: Maybe I should just give up.

C: 你们俩到底是什么感觉？
E: How do you two feel?

C: 难道你不是在模仿我吗？
E: Aren't you the one emulating me?

C: 拜托你，切断他们之间的连接！
E: Please, disconnect them!

C: （危险的包裹…是说先前捡到的「小型中子辐射炸弹」么？）
E: (A dangerous parcel... Is that the mini-neutron bomb I picked up earlier?)

C: 所以，到底发生什么事了？你为什么会被一只惊吓箱吓晕过去啊？
E: So, what happened exactly? Why were you knocked out by a prank scare box?

C: 你是哪位？我见你方才看了我好几眼，难道……
E: Who might you be? You were looking at me for quite a while over there, perhaps...

C: 鉴于它总是发出「滴答」的声音，有学者认为，这根水管极可能是钟表小子的粉丝。
E: Some scholars believe that this leaky water pipe must be a fan of Clockie, as it maintains a steady "ticking" rhythm.

C: 对不起，本站不提供免费的交通服务，请下次再来吧。
E: Sorry, this stop does not provide free transportation services. Please come back next time.

C: 忽悠谁呢？
E: Who're you trying to bluff?

C: 你独自欣赏着这片不一样的风景，你深深地吸了一口气，决定继续看下去。
E: You enjoy this special scenery alone. Then, you take a deep breath and... decide to keep enjoying the view.

C: 船长好！
E: Hi, captain!

C: 要对吉奥里亚保持敬畏。
E: Be in awe of Georios.

C: 我父亲的遗物还在家里！
E: My father's keepsakes are still at home!

C: 好多大块头……
E: That's... a lot of big ones.

C: 你砸我肾上了，赔钱。
E: You just slammed me in the kidney. I'll need some reparations.

C: 你注意到帕姆挺直了身板，突然严肃了起来。
E: You notice Pom-Pom suddenly grow stern as their posture straightens.

C: 充足的食物与衣物、应急药物与设备，还有应付恶劣环境的护甲装置…在外冒险的话这些东西都是必不可少的。
E: Adequate food, clothing, first-aid kit and medical equipment, protective gear for harsh environments... These are all essential items whenever you're venturing out.

C: 能打负分吗？
E: Am I allowed to give you a negative?

C: 所以那些裂界怪物挺吓人…对吧……
E: So those Fragmentum beasts are scary, right...

C: 哎，这样无名的情感一直在帕姆的胸口涤荡，帕姆越来越难过，甚至有点提不起劲了……
E: *sigh* This nameless emotion has been building up in my chest, and Pom-Pom just feels sadder and sadder. Sometimes it even makes me feel tired...

C: 帕姆每天都会认真打扫这里的坐垫，稍微落下一点灰尘都会快速清理干净。
E: Pom-Pom carefully cleans the cushions here every day, and a little dust will quickly be swept away.

C: 真是不让帕姆省心，稍微不留意一会儿就能做出这么危险的行为。
E: Pom-Pom just can't let their guard down, can they? Whenever Pom-Pom isn't paying attention, a calamity is about to happen.

C: …唔，这就是{NICKNAME}乘客想的办法？好像确实挺有用的……
E: ...Oh, so that was your plan all along? It seems like it kinda worked...

C: 再观望一下也不急？
E: Wait and see. There's no rush.

C: 嗯嗯，都记下了。不过提前跟你说一声帕，这些东西虽然记录了，但不是马上就有帕。
E: I've taken note of everything, but it doesn't mean you all will get those things right away.

C: 就算来得及，但帕姆还是没有办法回头！实在是太痛了，呜呜…太痛了！
E: I can't do it even though there's time! It hurts too much! Oh... it's too painful!

C: 事到如今，只有一个方法…那就是锻炼身体！至于锻炼的方法，之前有在书里看到过！一定没问题的！
E: Now, there's only one way to solve this — exercise! I've read about some techniques in books. I'm sure I can do it!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，要注意，洒太多不行，洒太少也不行哦！
E: Passenger {NICKNAME}, please make sure you sprinkle just the right amount of water!

C: 诚挚向你推荐下层区的…
E: I would recommend the Underworld's...

C: 要站在大家的角度切身处地去思考。因为我的每一个决策，都可能影响到无数人的生活……
E: Think from everyone's point of view. Because every decision I make may affect the lives of countless people...

C: 好豪爽的机器人。
E: This robot gets straight to the point.

C: 不，不，弱者才会改装！
E: No no, mods are for wimps!

C: 但我们布置场地的时候他还不在现场——谁知道他什么时候会加入演习呢？
E: But he wasn't there when we were setting things up. Who knows when he'll join in on the drill?

C: 嘘！我感觉有人要来了，准备作战！
E: Shh! I feel like someone's coming. Get ready to fight!

C: 主动去招惹他的话，<color=#dbc291ff>战斗说不定会变得异常棘手……</color>
E: If you purposefully go bother him, <color=#dbc291ff>your fight might get real tricky...</color>

C: 我还在等你出手。
E: I'm still waiting for you to get your hands dirty.

C: （这里有进食痕迹，难道说真的是一种*野生生物*引起了异象？）
E: (Here, some signs of feeding. Is this anomaly really caused by some sort of "wild creature?")

C: 如果您有心帮忙到底的话，我也会在丹鼎司等您的。拿着吧，这是您应得的酬劳，感谢您协助地衡司完成了本次调查。我们该回去了。
E: Meet me at the Alchemy Commission if you're willing to help us all the way through. But for now, please take this reward as a token of our appreciation for all your assistance. We should be heading back.

C: …哈哈，他这人爱激动，你别见怪。请收下这些微不足道的谢礼吧，这是您应得的，英雄。
E: ...Haha. Don't mind him. He just likes to get worked up. Please take this small token of our appreciation. You deserve it, hero.

C: 好吧，算了，我确实没兴趣。
E: Never mind. I'm not interested.

C: 小朋友玩这个有点危险吧…
E: Isn't this dangerous for children?

C: 转动滞涩的发条，你听到几近崩溃的机械结构相互倾轧，发出令人不安的乐声。
E: Creaky springs turn, and you hear the sequential jostling of tired mechanical switches and cogs sing an eerie melody.

C: 今天弟兄们就要让你知道，破坏禁区公物要付出什么代价！给我上！
E: We'll show you the price to pay for damaging public property in the restricted zone! Get 'em!

C: 咔嚓
E: Click

C: 什么声音？
E: What's that noise?

C: 抵触这致命的诱惑。
E: Resist the lethal temptation.

C: 不，那才不是什么客房服务…那是寄宿在歌德宾馆里的恶魔！它沉睡在肮脏的、无人打扫的小阁楼里…专门以可怜又无辜的外来者为食。
E: No, that's not room service... That's the Goethe Hotel's resident devil! It hibernates in dirty unattended small attics, specifically feeding on innocent and vulnerable outsiders.

C: 这些…美型的画像是谁画的？
E: Who painted these... magnificent portraits?

C: 或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Perhaps you should change direction and explore again.

C: 当看到这样一张办公桌时，不同的人会有不同反应：热爱秩序的人视之为完美的艺术品，啧啧称奇后便转身离去……
E: Different people may have different reactions when faced with such a desk: Those who love order view it as a perfect masterpiece, and leave filled with admiration...

C: 毕竟…想要翻大守护者办公桌的人可不止你一个呢。如果换作别人，现在恐怕已经被铁卫押走了吧。
E: After all... You're not the only one trying to rummage through the Supreme Guardian's desk. If it were anyone else, they'd be apprehended by the Silvermane Guards by now.

C: 菲多拉的机器人。
E: Fidora's Robot.

C: 如果…如果你觉得我们之间还有重归于好的余地…那你真是被冲昏了头。
E: If... If you think we can still reconcile, you're out of your mind.

C: 那就保持沉默吧。听听她——也许是个幽灵——还有什么话想说。
E: Just be quiet and listen. Maybe she's a spirit with something to say.
Zero.

C: 这里的审美与爱好真是匪夷所思，令你咂舌称奇。
E: The aesthetics and pastimes here are simply bizarre and leave you gobsmacked.

C: 你的指尖刚与展阅相接触，光幕上争先恐后地涌出了一系列声色并茂的页面——
E: Just as your fingertips touch the flexible display, a flood of colors and sounds spurts out of page on the display...

C: 「是姐妹，就来跟我！」
E: "With me, sisters!"

C: 那就让我一探究竟吧！
E: Then, let me find out!

C: 不过，接下来才是重头戏…您得操纵机巧鸟，寻找丢失的货物。
E: But, the next step is the main event...you need to operate the cycrane to find the lost cargo.

C: 有{M#哥}{F#姐}在，别害怕！
E: Fear not, for your trusty big {M#bro}{F#sis} is here!

C: 三个人…甚至还有一个可悲的短生种，竟然想要抓住老子？做你们的美梦吧！
E: Only three... and one of you is a pathetic short-life species. Want to catch me? Dream on!

C: 「可悲的短生种」？连{NICKNAME}都不认得，竟然还敢在罗浮作奸犯科？
E: "A pathetic short-life species"? How dare you commit evil deeds on the Luofu when you don't even recognize {NICKNAME}!

C: 嗯嗯，你什么时候准备好了，咱们什么时候出发。
E: Sure. Lemme know when you're ready. We'll head out straight away.

C: 好吧，我知道这是强人所难——接下来就交给我们鹤运物流吧。
E: I understand this might be a little too much. Just leave the rest to us.

C: 缺了您的经验和能力，搜救效率简直是出大问题，我只好得拜托您，来帮帮我，帮帮鹤运物流……
E: Without your experience and expertise, the retrieval efficiency would simply be disastrous. I have no choice but to ask you to help me and Heron Express...

C: 哎…要是能找到那枚小零件就好了。
E: Sigh... If only I could find dad's missing little component.

C: 谢谢你，找我还有什么事情吗？
E: Thank you. Is there anything else I can do?

C: 客人很清楚，宝贝的价值终究是因人而异的。
E: You know very well that one man's treasure is another man's trash.

C: （嗯？怪了，舱门怎么没打开？是不是哪里卡住了？）
E: (Huh? That's weird. The hatch won't open? Is it stuck somewhere?)

C: 你对我们的代号感兴趣啊……
E: So you wanna know about our code names, huh...

C: 魔方秘社很快就会将所有的「枘凿六合」升级改造，位置就在你之前玩过的地方。
E: We'll soon have all of our Hexanexus games upgraded. You can find one where you were playing it before.

C: 如、如果没有玩物丧志的话，他们本可以变得更成功，取得更大的成就——每在玩乐上浪费一秒，你能给这个宇宙做贡献的时间就减少了一分。
E: I—If they weren't obsessed with minutiae, then they could be even greater successes making even greater achievements — every second wasted on leisure is another minute lost that you could have devoted to saving the universe.

C: 我已经失去了感受快乐的能力——只要失去过一次，它就永远回不来了！
E: I've lost the capacity to feel joy — I lost it once, and it's never going to come back!

C: 皮皮西原本柔和的神色于一瞬间变得尖锐，眼角蓦地燃起一抹薄红。
E: The Pepeshi's once-gentle expression immediately grows intense, and a dim red line suddenly lights up his eyes.

C: 您、您说得有道理…可、可我只是个广告牌啊……
E: Y—You make a good point... B—But I'm just a billboard...

C: 于是三年后，我又来到了奖台上——带着智慧的火种，用灵魂的热度点燃了会场、点燃了人群！
E: And so three years later, I arrived at the award podium once more — with the fire of wisdom and using the heat of my soul, I ignited the whole arena and set off the whole audience!

C: 离开
E: Leave

C: 故事是不是还挺精彩的？可惜啊，都是*假的*——我的记忆、我的痛苦、甚至我的存在本身，全都是那个女人自欺欺人的谎言！
E: Isn't this story really something? It's a pity everything is *fake* — my memory, my pain, and even my remaining existence. It's all lies that she tells us and herself!

C: 呃，你就没有点…感想什么的？
E: Er, don't you have any... thoughts?

C: 那真是十分壮观的场面，每颗小行星上都如纹身般镌刻着密集的块状痕迹。这些痕迹有深有浅、形状各异，无疑是经由人力开凿出来的，仿佛…某种文字。
E: It really was a magnificent sight, with these blocks of dense scratches etched onto each asteroid like a tattoo. There were both deep and shallow markings, in all kinds of different shapes, which undoubtedly were carved out by someone as if... they were glyphs from some civilization.

C: 为保证猎杀效率，韦兰将自己的神经连进了舰桥终端，从而对整艘战舰如臂指使。代价就是，一旦失去虚空鲸提取液的供给，他就会在数小时内器官衰竭，最后死去。
E: Wyland hooked his nervous system straight into the bridge terminal for maximum hunting efficiency, so that commanding the entire battleship was like moving a limb. The cost was that once he lost his supply of whale extract, he would experience organ failure and perish soon after.

C: 还没有…但你难道不觉得，如果他是无名客的话，一切就说得通了吗？毕竟他留下了那样的遗产。
E: Not yet... but don't you think that would make a lot of sense if he was one of the Nameless? I mean, he left behind that inheritance.

C: 考虑到你可能对这两样东西都不感兴趣…之后我再给你打一笔钱好了。
E: Considering how you might not be interested in either of these things... I can wire you some cash later.

C: 咳，假如你坚持的话，每人五百也不是不行…所以，交钱吗？
E: *coughs* We are... amenable to the idea of getting <unbreak>500</unbreak> each, as goodwill. So... please pay up?

C: 大、大哥，这小灰毛还真有两下子…现在怎么办？
E: B—Bro, this little gray-haired kid really knows {M#his}{F#her} stuff... What are we gonna do?

C: 我以为谁呢，原来是班尼啊。
E: Oh, you're Benny.

C: 等到这座城区结束施工，真正向逐梦客开放的那天，围绕它的评价将是这般——
E: By the time the city is built and ready to welcome Dreamchasers, this is what I think will happen:

C: 汽水也能喝醉？
E: How did he get drunk from soda?

C: 我就当您答应了啊——这样，您姑且先从<color=#f29e38ff>费曼身边</color>入手，找找能和他聊起来的*话题*吧。
E: I'll take that as a yes, then. Now, think about <color=#f29e38ff>things about Feinman</color> and find "topics" you can talk about to him.

C: 看见没？这就是「长效专利捍卫一纸通」的厉害！有了它，我保准能赚上一大笔…啊不是，保准能保护匹诺康尼所有良心创造者的权益不受侵害！
E: See? That's the power of the Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier! With this, I'm gonna make a boatload of money... Ahem, I mean... I'm gonna protect the rights of all talented inventors in Penacony from infringement!

C: 咻咻…分析完成！本次分析对象：「斯坦威游隼」豪华飞车，型号：XV8。
E: *Beep*... Analysis complete! Object identified: Steinway Falcon luxury speedster, Model XV8.

C: 唔…之前把观景望远镜给锁定了以后，立马就惊动了家族的人。
E: Well... When the telescope was locked, The Family got alerted right away.

C: 你自己去。
E: Go do it yourself.

C: 芙尔拉放下了自己端着的架子，开怀大笑起来，像个天真可爱的孩子。
E: Forla lets go of her pretensions and laughs heartily like a carefree kid.

C: 对，我不想唱。
E: Yes. I don't want to.

C: …是啊，她说自己想成为「盛会巨星」——如果这真的是她现在想要的东西，我也会尽力帮她得到。
E: ...Yes, she said she wanted to become a superstar... If that's truly what she wants, I'll do my best to help her.

C: 歌曲的每个音节都像是在模仿自然的声音，树叶摩挲、虫鸟啼鸣、野兽低吼、雨水坠地…杂乱无章的声音组成了一种奇妙的韵律。
E: Each syllable of the song seems to imitate the sounds of nature: Rustling of leaves, buzzing of insects, chirping of birds, low growls of beasts, raindrops hitting the ground... The amalgamation of sounds creates a marvelous rhythm.

C: 不好听。
E: It sounds terrible.

C: 呵，庸俗，这叫…叫实验音乐！要的就是激进、纯粹、极端自我的表达，不懂了吧？
E: How putrid. This is called... experimental music! It's radical, pure, and an extreme form of self-expression, but you can't grasp it at all, can you?

C: 多半差评。
E: Most of the reviews are negative.

C: 我爱素未谋面的故乡，爱那故事中的乌托邦…但我有时也会怨恨自己的出身，如果我不是声乐之星的孩子，而是出生在匹诺康尼，是不是唱出心声就能换来功名呢？
E: I love my homeland I have never seen, and I cherish the utopia found only in stories... Yet at times, I resent my origins. If I had not been born as a child of the planet of canticles but instead in Penacony, would my heartfelt singing have garnered recognition?

C: 你知道我第一次请求经纪人把「纯美之歌」放入演出歌单时，她做了什么吗？
E: Do you know what happened when I first asked her to add the "Song of Beauty" to the setlist?

C: 再见。
E: Thank you.

C: 你所谓的自责，不过是用折磨自己的方式来逃避现实罢了——如果你真想弥补过错，至少要先学会接受现实。
E: Blaming yourself is just your way of escaping reality. If you want to make up for your mistake, you've got to start by facing reality.

C: 仔细想想，哪怕诺卡真的已经原谅了我，我也没法回去继续当警探了。
E: Come to think of it, I don't think I can return to my post as a detective even if Noka has truly forgiven me.

C: 正所谓…「凡杀不死我的，必使我更强大」…走、走吧，我们先回去，我需要稍微冷静一下。
E: What doesn't kill me makes me stronger... L—Let's go. I need to get a grip.

C: 居然还押上了。
E: I'm surprised it rhymes.

C: 所有外星基地都被摧毁，母星也因此陷入了漫长的冬天。科技断层，环境恶化，美好生活不再。
E: All bases on other planets were destroyed, and our home planet was plunged into a long winter. The development of our technology became stunted, and the environment deteriorated, and there went our good lives.

C: 真是太抬举我了——我不认为我有被星神注视的潜力，我只是一台机器。
E: I'm flattered. But as a mere robot, I don't think I deserve the attention of an Aeon.

C: 刚获得新生时，我曾对家乡的人类心怀愤怒。但是现在，我对他们只有怜悯。
E: In the early period after I was reborn, I was angry at the people from my home world. But now, I only pity them.

C: 幸运的是，战争这会儿应该已经结束了。
E: Fortunately, the war should be over by this time.

C: 总而言之，我现在已经习惯了这种生活。你也看到了，哪怕是「惊梦剧团」那样的敌人也不是我的对手。
E: In any case, I'm already used to this sort of life. As you've also seen, even the Dreamjolt Troupe is no match for me.

C: 我们接到命令，组织内部人员撤离，并将其全面封锁。
E: We received orders to rally the staff and evacuate everyone, then lock down the entire place.

C: 你是这里的负责人？
E: Are you in charge of this place?

C: 自我介绍一下——我是麦考。家主外出期间，我就是这间公馆的代理人。
E: Allow me to introduce myself: I'm McCoy. I'm responsible for this pavilion while the family head is away.

C: 我都知道了。
E: I know everything.

C: 你想问我就一定要答？
E: Do I have to answer your question?

C: 看到这个梦境迷钟了吗？修好它，就算你赢了。
E: See this Dream Ticker? Repair it, and you win.

C: 尊、尊敬的知更鸟小姐，能以这样的方式与您相见，我实在是三生有幸。
E: E—Esteemed Miss Robin, to be able to meet you in such a manner... I am truly blessed.

C: 当然，匹诺康尼的股东亲自光临鄙校，我这个校长怎能一无所知？
E: Of course! When a shareholder of Penacony personally visits my school, how could I, as dean, be caught unawares?

Ever since the IPC established itself in Penacony, all manner of talented people from across the universe are gathering here and crowding up the place, claiming that they wish to "make dreams colorful again." While I can't tell you how colorful the dreams are at present, the fact remains that the fight for jobs has become more and more intense.

E: Woof woof! Ruff ruff! Woof!

C: 现在还不到我的值班时间，不用再拯救被冰冷设备所纠缠的凡人，这样的日子还真是平淡啊……
E: My shift hasn't started yet, so those mortals will have to wait for rescue from their cold impersonal devices. These kinds of days are just so dull...

C: 年轻人，空间站的奥秘与趣味很多，还得你自己多多探索，才能感受。
E: Youngster, there are many mysteries and interesting things in the space station. You have to explore it yourself.

C: 虽然我不是保卫科的成员，没有健硕的体格去与孽障抗争。
E: Although I'm not a member of the Security Department and I'm not strong enough to fight against evil...

C: 需要帮忙吗？
E: Do you need help?

C: 我没什么要问了……
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 答案就是——无论身在何处，都没有绝对的安全！
E: The answer is, no matter where you go, no place is absolutely safe!

C: 关于我想念的人……她叫莱斯莉。你可能没有听说过她的传说。
E: Who am I thinking about... Her name is Lesley. You may not have heard of the legends about her.

C: 不是送药就是补药，这种事情分明就该交给机器人吧？
E: I am either delivering or going to deliver medicine. They should've assigned this job to a robot, right?

C: 哼，那些小玩意儿，是我徒弟的情感寄托！真是肉麻。
E: Hmph, those little things are my student's emotional sustenance. Gross.

C: 如果莱斯莉真的回应了洛奇的感情，那洛奇可要加把劲儿。不然两个人的差距太大，生活方式都不同，就算在一起了，以后也会吵架。
E: If Lesley really says yes to Rocky, he'll have to work hard. Otherwise, the gap between them will be too big and their lifestyles will be too different. Even if they are together, they will fight a lot.

C: 空间站里有你的匿名粉丝群。
E: Your fans on the station have an anonymous group chat.

C: 好哦，有空的话可以多跟我聊聊，我有时候也挺无聊的。
E: Sure thing! Come talk to me more when you're free. It gets pretty boring sometimes.

C: 成天窝在这里真没意思，这里的一切都没意思…呃，呜呜伯除外…还有…婷婷除外。
E: It's suuuuper boring to be cooped up here all day. Everything here is boring... Um, except for Wubbaboo... and Wendy.

C: 阮•梅的造物们都是好朋友，让我们来手牵手~
E: Ruan Mei's creations are all good friends. Let us all hold hands~

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask you something...

C: 真的吗？我还以为，我是没有受到阮•梅的认可的失败作，所以才被丢到垃圾房里，呜……
E: Really? I thought I was dumped here because I failed to impress Ruan Mei... *sobs*

C: 别看我每天都站在这儿，这些事项还挺费劲的，忙得我每天都头大。
E: Don't think I have an easy job just because I stand here all day long. I'm actually snowed under with work every day.

C: 好，慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 有点急不愿再搭理你，或许它真的很忙吧……
E: Bit Busy brushes you off. Maybe it is really busy...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 你听不懂呜呜伯在说什么，还是去请教下懂行的科员吧？
E: You don't have a clue what Wubbaboo is saying. You should probably seek help from a researcher who can understand it.

C: 显然是骗人的。
E: All just a bunch of swindlers.

C: 脆响过后，长矛与盾牌…两者皆应声而碎。
E: A crisp clang, and the lance and shield... both shatter the instant they touch each other.

C: 黄金果从哪里能取到？
E: Where can I get this golden fruit?

C: 不知过了多久，或是遭到了废除，或是彻底遗忘，瑟希斯的信徒们鲜少再举行这样的仪式，直到你的出现…可树木没法再回应你更多东西了。
E: You have no idea how long it has been, but this ceremony was eventually either abandoned or forgotten and the disciples of Cerces very rarely attempted it again. That is, until your arrival... However, the tree no longer has anything to give you.

C: 这位朋友，你旁听我们的论辩有段时间了，想必也是位热爱智慧的学者。有兴趣的话，不妨参与到讨论中来，让在场各位都听听你的高见？
E: My friend. You have overheard this dispute for some time. You must be a fellow scholar and lover of wisdom. If you are interested, why not join our discussion? We would all be interested in hearing your view.

C: 奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
E: As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?

C: 眼睛看不见，手摸不着，难道就是不存在？若是如此，那世间将无物存在，因为所有事物都处在流变当中，我们也无法谈论任何内容。
E: Are you saying that if I can neither see it with my eyes nor feel it with my hands, then it does not exist? If that were the case, nothing would exist in this world, as everything is in a constant state of flux. There would be nothing for us to discuss.

C: 这位朋友，你旁听我们的论辩有段时间了，想必也是位热爱智慧的学者。有兴趣的话，不妨参与到讨论中来，让在场各位都听听你的高见？
E: My friend. You have overheard this dispute for some time. You must be a fellow scholar and lover of wisdom. If you are interested, why not join our discussion? We would all be interested in hearing your view.

C: 哎呀，就算要支付报酬也是我的事情…不过，你愿意听听我们的委托吗？
E: Come on, I should be the one giving payment... But would you be willing to consider our assignment?

C: 我就喜欢这样的你，你坚持的事，谁也阻止不了。不过城邦间有自己的恩怨，你父母不待见我，我不怪他们。
E: I just love this side of you — once you've made up your mind, no one can stop you. But there are grudges between the city-states. Your parents dislike me, but I don't blame them.

C: 大团圆结局！
E: What a happy ending!

C: 再去问问餐厅老板克瑞斯，市集上的事他都很清楚。
E: Then, try asking the restaurant owner Kyros. He knows all about what goes on in the market.

C: 等醒来时，你感觉身体似乎变轻了许多，难道跟孩子打交道真的可以释放压力？
E: You wake up feeling as though your body is lighter. Can spending time with children really help you take a load off?

C: 咳，扯远了。对，没错，我看见她往城门的方向跑来着，鬼鬼祟祟的，不知道要干什么。
E: Ahem, but that's getting off track now. Yes, I saw her running towards the city gate and being sneaky about it. I'm not sure what she was up to.

C: 女孩偏过头，看向下方的集市。很难说她是否想要投身其中。
E: The girl tilts her head to one side and looks down at the market. It's hard to tell whether she wants to join in.

C: 不过，就算被抓住了…
E: But even if I did get caught...

C: 你来这里是有什么事情吗？如果需要，我可以提供一些帮助。
E: Do you have something to do here? If you need help, I can offer some assistance.

C: 别…听我的，直接离开吧……
E: No... Listen to me. Just go...

C: 我、我还这么年轻，我还要在空间站发光发热呢，我不想死啊！
E: I, I'm too young to die! I've got things I still want to achieve on this space station.

C: 原来你做过这个实验啊，不早说！早知道我就先问你了。
E: Why didn't you tell me that you've done this experiment before? I could've just asked you.

C: 你好，欢迎加入空间站。
E: Hello, and welcome to the space station.

C: 不是…你那个实验都被怪物毁了……
E: No... Your experiment was ruined by monsters...

C: 来了之后才发现我什么都不是…在我最自信的领域，我连黑塔女士的鞋跟都摸不着，呜呜……
E: But after I arrived, I realized that I am actually nothing... Madam Herta can squash me with her pinky even in my area of research expertise...

C: 嗡嗡嗡……
E: Grumphhh...

C: 感谢您的公平裁决，「一日塔兰顿」{NICKNAME}大人。
E: Thank you for your fair judgment, Honorable One-Day Talanton, {M#Sir}{F#Madam} {NICKNAME}.

C: 我听说，在比云石天宫还要高的山上，有很多人聚在一起，决定了奥赫玛的未来。
E: I heard that on a mountain even higher than the Marmoreal Palace, many people have gathered to decide Okhema's future.

C: 包在我身上！
E: Leave it to me!

C: 在艾格勒闭上所有眼睛、令世界坠入黑暗之后，刻法勒从自己的王座上起身，为世人背负起最后的黎明……
E: After Aquila closed all their eyes and plunged the world into darkness, Kephale rose from their throne to shoulder the world's final dawn...

C: 让怪物见识见识人类的极限！
E: Let's show the monsters the power of humanity!

C: 但…究竟该怎么做呢？
E: But... How should we proceed?

C: 看来，你还未曾发觉那浪花之下的暗涌，灰鱼儿。
E: Seems you haven't noticed the undercurrents beneath those waves, Gray Fry.

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 一口闷！
E: Bottom's up!

C: 抿一下。
E: Take a sip.

C: 我就和他说起了列车，说着说着他就不哭了，还问了我很多问题。
E: So I told him about the Express, and eventually he stopped crying and started asking so many questions.

C: 给老爹带个玩偶回去！
E: Let's get a doll for daddy!

C: 如果史瓦罗先生会飞……
E: If Mr. Svarog could fly...

C: 这可是贝洛伯格著名摇滚明星为你特意准备的礼物，可别嫌弃啊——就算嫌弃也别让我知道，好吧？
E: A gift from Belobog's number one rock star — you're not allowed to dislike it! Or at least don't tell me if that's the case...

C: ——这是真话，不是和你在客气……
E: Truly, I'm not just being polite with you...

C: 对。虽然空旷，但到处都有鲜活的生活痕迹。我能想到当大家都在的时候，它是如何活起来的。
E: Not at all. It may be empty, but there are traces of life everywhere. I can just imagine how bustling it would be with people here.

C: 你是在说我吗？
E: ...You talkin' to me?

C: 不知不觉，精神就处于高度紧张状态，思维也僵化了。但是来到这里之后，看到车窗外的宇宙浩瀚无垠，整个人也感觉舒缓了很多……
E: It took me a while to realize I was letting the whole thing stress me out — I couldn't think straight. When I set foot on the Express and saw how vast the universe is, I started to feel calm and relaxed.

C: 不如你快快告诉本小姐，列车什么时候出发？
E: Hey, how about you tell me when the Express is departing?

C: 不会只是心理作用吧？
E: Are you sure that's not just all in your head?

C: 梦境都是不真实的。
E: Dreams aren't real.

C: 你以后有什么打算？
E: What are your plans?

C: 而我，将会为你拨开这层心灵上的迷雾。这也是我能为黑塔大人，做出的微小贡献。
E: And I will clear the uncertainty in your heart. This is the least I can do for Madam Herta.

C: 有多少人被你化解过苦难？
E: How many people have had their pain "soothed" by you?

C: 你应该为拉明娜道歉…
E: You need to apologize to Lamina...

C: 刚才和瓦尔特老师聊了一会儿，他讲了很多有趣的故事。
E: I was just talking to Mr. Yang — he told me some fascinating stories.

C: 诶？真的吗？没有啦，其实还好吧？
E: Oh? Do I? No, I'm really not.

C: 嘘！！亏世玲还把你当朋友，什么话都愿意给你讲，你怎么稍不留心就把世玲的秘密大声讲出来了？！这要是让旁人听去了怎么办！？
E: Shhh! I told you that because we are friends, but that doesn't mean you can say it out loud! What if other people hear?

C: 和你扯闲篇，够劲儿，开心！年轻人，下次有空再来，别的没有，故事管够！
E: It was fun chatting with you. I liked it! Come here again when you have time, kiddo. I might not have much in my possession, but I sure have more than enough stories to share.

C: 好在我去医疗科做了个检查，老头子我身子骨硬朗得很，别的不敢说，等这傻小子回来是足够了！
E: Thankfully, my results from the Medical Department are pretty good, and I feel I'm in good enough health to wait for this silly boy's return.

C: …啊，对不起，这话题好像有点太沉重了。请让我一个人静一静吧，谢谢你。
E: ...Ah, sorry... this topic always makes me a little emotional. I think I need some alone time — thank you.

C: 都请教了什么？
E: What did you learn from him?

C: 感觉快要…快要睡着了…呼……
E: Feels like I'm about to — *yawn* — fall asleep...

C: 哎，要不是为了保证营养摄入，我宁愿顿顿都点大宇宙炒饭……
E: *sigh* If I didn't have to worry about nutrition, I'd be ordering Cosmic Fried Rice every meal...

C: 比如装个激光炮？
E: Like giving it a laser cannon?

C: 所谓朋友不就该这样吗？哈哈哈！
E: Isn't that what being friends is all about? Hahaha!

C: 本座也时常想去那些遐方绝域，见识一下那些盛景。毕竟，世之奇伟瑰怪非常之观，常在于险远。
E: I hope to visit more of such marvelous places and to gaze upon such views with my own eyes... The most grandiose, astounding, and extraordinary vistas are often found in perilous and distant lands.

C: <unbreak>597</unbreak>乘以<unbreak>464</unbreak>…
E: <unbreak>597</unbreak> multiplied by <unbreak>464</unbreak>...

C: 这片星空……
E: These stars...

C: 战士，冒险家，大守护者…同一片星空之下，我们人类扮演着各自的角色，过着各自的人生。
E: Warriors, adventurers, supreme guardians — we all gaze upon the same stars, the same sky... each with our own roles to play, our own independent lives to live.

C: 这不是咖啡该有的样子…
E: This isn't how coffee should be...

C: 除了我以外。
E: Everyone except me.

C: 渺小的感觉……
E: I feel so small...

C: 若时间允许，我想和列车长聊一聊，听它讲讲列车管理中的种种趣事。
E: If we have time, I would like to speak with the conductor and listen to their experiences of managing the Express.

C: 列车上的布设我很喜欢。
E: I am very fond of the furnishings on the Express.

C: …我还是想找她们俩一起玩。
E: I'd like to hang out with them, it's just...

C: 假期难得，可千万不能浪费掉。我还得问问她们俩，我…我应该可以的。
E: Vacation days are precious. I really shouldn't waste them. I need to talk to them both. I... I should be able to manage that.

C: 帕姆更可爱。
E: Pom-Pom's cuter.

C: 说来有些不好意思，方才刺绣时，我伤到了手指。
E: It's a tad embarrassing, but I managed to prick my finger while embroidering just now.

C: 光是和黑塔、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬相处，有时也会让我稍感疲惫。
E: Spending time with Herta, Screwllum, and Stephen is enough to wear one out.

C: 虽然已经在脑海里想象过无数遍银河的模样，但是真正看到群星的时候，还…还是被震撼了……
E: I imagined the cosmos in my head... but actually seeing it with my own eyes is truly... mesmerizing...

C: 不要和米沙开这种玩笑，我会当真的…不过我也一直在学习更多的礼仪知识。
E: Don't joke around like that with me, I might believe you... But I have actually been working on my knowledge of etiquette.

C: 难道是…咖…啡……
E: Could it be... co... ffee...

C: 你是最棒的！
E: Don't. You're the best!

C: 每到那时，哥哥就会哼摇篮曲给我听。往往半段旋律的时间，我就已经睡着了……
E: Whenever that happened, my brother would hum a lullaby for me. Halfway through the song, I would already be asleep...

C: 人生无法重来，但梦境能让他们体会到另一种人生。所以即使会付出代价，他们也会做出这样的选择。
E: Life cannot be reset, but the Dreamscape allows them to experience another life. So even if they have to pay a price, they would still make this choice.

C: 准备了一份礼物…
E: I prepared a gift...

C: 「凶恶绒球」旋转起来时，会有黑色光点在绒球中心闪烁。只需找准机会，便能一击斩落。
E: When the Ferocious Fluff Ball starts spinning, black spots will shimmer in the center of the fluff ball. You just need the right opportunity to down it with one strike.

C: 请容我再次赞美你，{NICKNAME}，拥有一个智慧的灵魂和炽热的心——你，真的很美。
E: Please allow me to sing your praises once again, {NICKNAME}. With an erudite soul and a blazing heart, you are truly beautiful.

C: 虽然新的尝试可能伴随着酸涩，但总归也是看见天地广阔的必要一步呀。
E: Though these new experiences may turn sour, they are still necessary steps in my journey to witness this vast world.

C: 怎么成谜语人了！
E: When did you become a Riddler!?

C: 我们要准备一个……
E: We need to prepare...

C: 不论花多少钱都行，我想得到朋友这样东西。
E: I would pay anything to acquire this thing they call a "friend."

C: 开玩笑的，我们还不是朋友。
E: Just kidding. We're not friends yet.

C: 怎么又来了？都说我很忙，非常忙，城东城西，大事小事，事事都需要我们政务官思考……
E: You're here again? I told you I was busy. Like, very busy. No matter where or what the issue is, we civil servants have to be on hand at all times...

C: 不对，不能冲动，曼娅啊！你要谨慎！莱姆士汀虽然富有，但本质上只是暴发户，并没有其他贵族的底蕴……
E: No, wait! Don't be impulsive, Manya! You have to be careful! The Limesteins are wealthy, but they're also new money. They have no aristocratic roots...

C: 他除了钱以外一无所有。
E: He has nothing apart from money.

C: 你回来啦？宜居城郊板块，新的商机新的风口，要不要？
E: You're back? We have all kinds of new suburban commercial prospects. Interested?

C: 什么书？
E: What book?

C: 不过——我写不来啊！鄙人真的做不到啊！
E: Be that as it may, I just can't force myself! I am not made for this!

C: 往少了说，四千多种吧——但实际上嘛，贝洛伯格人编菜名是一绝：一条鱼身上可以划出几十种部位，每个部位之间排列组合一下，几百道不重样的菜就诞生了。
E: Four thousand, if I'm being conservative. But to be honest, hundreds of these dishes are purely new combinations of old recipes. People in Belobog are masters when it comes to naming their food. We have names for dozens of body parts of fish. When you mix and match, you'll come up with new recipes in no time.

C: 年轻人不急着买房，我能理解。但是你想过吗，从投资的角度来看，这可不仅是一座房子，它是不动产！
E: Sure, sure, young people are not in a hurry. I get it. Let's put it this way: From the perspective of an investor, we are not talking about a house to live in. It's an asset!

C: 聪明人都懂得把握机会，我相信你也是个聪明人。
E: Smart people always seize opportunities when they present themselves. I trust you are no exception.

C: 我能问您一个问题吗？——文学方面的。
E: Can I ask you a question, about literature?

C: 自我介绍一下，我是《水晶日报》出版部的尼古莱。这样唐突打扰您，是因为我们正在收集读者的请愿，申请解禁《雪国冒险奇谭》。
E: Let me introduce myself. I am Nika with the Crystal Daily. Sorry to bother you but we are collecting petitions from readers to lift the ban on the Tale of the Winterlands.

C: 那你还算有点基础。
E: Good. So you are not completely ignorant.

C: 你没有经过系统的学习吗？
E: Did you not receive academic training?

C: 你觉得，遇到这种情况，我该怎么办呢？
E: What do you think I should do?

C: 哎呀呀～别这么说，才不是什么「大明星」呢。小女子先前虽有担任过一部新剧的女主角，可惜剧评人说这种题材太俗套了……
E: Oh my, don't say that. I'm not going to be some big star. I was the lead actress in a new play, but critics panned it as being too cliché...

C: …啊，不好意思，我没注意到你。有什么事吗？
E: ...Ah, sorry, I didn't see you there. Can I help you?

C: 看你这打扮，花里胡哨的，怕也是个无法体味人间疾苦的富家子弟吧？罢了，像你这种人，不懂倒也正常。
E: Judging from your garish outfit, I suppose you're some rich kid who couldn't possibly appreciate the hardships normal people face. Whatever. People like you typically don't get it anyway.

C: 你接着忙，先不打扰了。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 矿头一定很有钱吧？
E: Supervisors make a lot of money, right?

C: 矿区最近不太平？
E: I heard that the mine hasn't been peaceful lately.

C: 哎——肤浅，真是肤浅！铁卫老爷们可看不上那种地方！
E: Oh — that's shallow, reeeal shallow! The Silvermane Guards don't give a dang about that kinda place!

C: 咕噜……
E: *rumble*...

C: 你想啊，我平时做一休三——一天挣够活三天的钱，后三天不挣钱。
E: Think about this — I usually work one day and rest for the next three days, since I can earn enough in a day to support my expenses for the next three days.

C: 「伴生在地髓矿上」？
E: It grows in Geomarrow mines?

C: 不过，事情都摆平了…虎克老大为什么还哭得那么惨啊？
E: But if everything's sorted... Why has Hook been bawling her eyes out?

C: 噢——对的对的对的，就是这件事。这可是件大事！
E: Ooh, right! That's right! It was about that. This is major!

C: 唔，到处都找不到那个姐姐…当时好像都没问姐姐叫什么名字呢。
E: Mmm... I can't seem to find that lady anywhere... And I don't think I asked her for her name.

C: 没什么了。
E: Um... Nothing.

C: 来者都是客，你也不用太拘谨，尽管逛吧，只要别打扰住店的客人就行。
E: Make yourself at home. Feel free to take a tour, as long as you are not interrupting the other guests.

C: 噢，就在大堂两边，先找个沙发随便坐，我这就去安排。
E: Oh, it's on the sides of the lobby. Find yourself a sofa and take a seat. I'll arrange it.

C: 有对剧院明星夫妻，看起来很恩爱，但来宾馆度蜜月的时候，两个人却分别开了两个房间……
E: There was a couple who were theater celebrities. They appeared as though they were in love but they stayed in different rooms when they were here for their honeymoon...

C: 客人是不少，但是基本都是来吃饭的，住店客人相对少一些……
E: Many people come here for our food. But not many people stay in our hotel...

C: 不过啊，要说最有意思的，那当属旧世界的刑具。
E: But the most interesting thing is the torture device from the Old World.

C: 比如什么…箍在脖子上的项圈，或者是能自动加热的铁砧？啧啧，旧世界罪犯的日子可真难过唷。
E: Like... collar around the neck or anvil that automatically heats up? Tsk tsk, the life of criminals in the Old World must be hard.

C: 我还是更适合户外的工作。况且，下层区还有很多我认识的人需要帮忙。这些想法我都跟布洛妮娅说了，她很支持。
E: I prefer working outside. Besides, there's a lot of people I know in the Underworld who need help. I've shared these thoughts with Bronya, and she's supportive.

C: 欸，打住打住——你是不是又要说什么「星神」、「命途」之类的玩意了？我可没兴趣啊，还是留着下次再说吧。
E: Ah, stop it — don't give me that fluff about "Aeons" and "Paths" again. I'm not interested. Save it for next time.

C: 偶尔会有一种想法在我脑海中浮现——如果给我一个机会回到从前，我是不是有办法阻止哥哥误入歧途……
E: I sometimes get this thought popping up in my head — if I had the chance to go back in time, could I have stopped him from being led astray...

C: 维持下层区秩序的工作总有一天会被交还到银鬃铁卫手中，这是必然的结果。「地火」来自民间，最终也会归于民间。
E: The job of maintaining public order down in the Underworld will one day be handed back to the Silvermane Guards. Wildfire came out of the community, and will ultimately return to the community.

C: 啊，听上去好像有些伤感呢。不过在未来可见的一段时间里，「地火」肯定还会活跃在下层区。毕竟，外面还有太多繁杂的事务需要有人处理。
E: Ah, that all sounds a little sad. However, Wildfire will remain active in the Underworld for the foreseeable future. After all, there's too much trouble out there that needs someone to help handle.

C: 我只是想聊聊天…
E: I just want to chat...

C: 话说回来，我又不是永远不回来了。再者，实在想他的话…我发信息骚扰他不就好了？
E: Also, i—it's not like I'm never coming back. And if I really miss him... I can just pester the heck outta him over the phone, right?

C: 这就是过来人的经验，哈哈哈哈！
E: This is coming from an old man, who knows from experience. Hahahaha!

C: …「存护」是克里珀精神的具现，它无时无刻不与我们同在。它于无形中塑造着我们的人格，影响着我们生命中的重要决策——
E: ...Preservation is the embodiment of Qlipoth, and is with us all the time. It's the secret force that imperceptibly shapes our personalities, impacting all the important decisions that we make during our lives...

C: 你问的真是时候，杰帕德戍卫官不久前才发了通知，说是裂界活动的频率明显放缓了——禁区的铁卫总算有时间喘口气了。
E: Impeccable timing. Captain Gepard just sent out a bulletin saying that the frequency of Fragmentum activity has noticeably diminished — all the Silvermane Guards around the restricted zone can finally take a breather.

C: 先别打扰我，我正在整理档案……
E: Don't disturb me. I'm sorting out the archives...

C: 你怎么这么别扭啊！
E: Stop making things so awkward!

C: 允许——请自由提问，「外来者」。
E: Approved — Please submit your question, outsider.

C: 给我瞅瞅。
E: Let me see.

C: …好汉不提当年勇，都是过去式了。我这个年纪的人可不能一直沉浸在过去里啊…还是得抓住当下，活得精彩才行。哈哈哈！
E: ...No point waxing lyrical about the past though. One shouldn't be stuck in the past at my age. We should embrace the present and seize the day. Hahaha!

C: 我要购物。
E: I want to buy something.

C: 四千个孩子们回不了家，悲惨~
E: Four thousand kids with no home / that's stark~

C: 怀疑我的废柴等着被我的唾液清洗
E: Building up my confidence with flow so elite

C: 就像蹲你家门的债主总会把你一顿胖揍
E: Or I'll beat you like a debt collector bringin' the pain

C: 唔，好。如果还有想问的，可以随时问我。
E: Hmm, yeah. Feel free to come to me if you have any more questions.

C: 如今上下层区重新打通，虎克的将来也不用发愁了。
E: With all the channels between the Overworld and the Underworld reopened, I no longer have to worry about Hook's future.

C: 不过公司有个部门叫市场开拓部，是专门负责把新星球拉入银河市场的。
E: However, we do have a Marketing Development Department that focuses on bringing new planets into the galactic market.

C: 这里确实曾经有一个卖食物的小商贩。后来他回上层区结婚了，这张桌子和位置也就归我了。
E: There used to be a food vendor here, but he returned to the Overworld and got married. That's why I've taken over this table and spot.

C: 毕竟，这款游戏是我童年不可或缺的一部分——喜欢它也是很自然的吧？哈哈哈。
E: Anyway, this game was a big part of my childhood, and it's only natural to have a soft spot for it, right? Hahaha.

C: …下次加油。
E: ...Better luck next time.

C: 呼…呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 还有这种莫名其妙的组织？这贝洛伯格真是乱套了……
E: Does such an organization really exist? This Belobog really is one messed up place...

C: 大守护者精选鱼子酱！
E: The top choice in caviar for Supreme Guardians!
Uhh...

C: 买车了吗？
E: Do you have your own car?

C: 怎么找不到了……
E: Where is it...

C: 哼，我就知道，这地下没了「地火」就不行……
E: Hah, I knew that the underground wouldn't survive without Wildfire...

C: 哼，我就知道……
E: Hmph, I knew it...

C: …二百五，你要不要吧？
E: ...Two hundred and fifty. Are you gonna take it?

C: 哎，你听到我说话没？
E: Hey, are you listening to me?

C: 果然，比起他的陪伴…
E: As I thought, compared to his companionship...

C: 姐姐姐姐，这是什么以太灵呀？
E: Sister, sister, what is that Aether Spirit?

C: 多亏了你，我们的展览才能像这样正常举行——再次感谢你为贝洛伯格的贡献。
E: Thanks to you, our exhibition is successfully pulled off. We thank you for your service to Belobog once again.

C: 嗯？你说志愿导览员？你放心，我可没忘记这茬——这不是大家见了我都纷纷热情高涨，我实在招架不住嘛…哎，我也很为难的啦～
E: Hm? Volunteer tour guide? Don't worry, I didn't forget. It's just everyone was so excited, I can't hold on any longer... it's difficult holding back the passion, y'know~

C: 早就想进来转转了…
E: I'd always wanted to visit here...

C: 这里有好多展品呀！
E: There are so many exhibits in here!

C: 按道理来说我不应该进来？
E: So I'm not supposed to be allowed in here then?

C: 狱卒们时时刻刻都在提防着这帮重案要犯，越是与他们打交道，我越是感觉到心力交瘁——他们想要离开这里的欲念就像烙铁一般灼热。
E: The prison guards have to perpetually keep their guards up around these serious felons. The more I interact with them, the more it grinds down on my mentality — Their desire to leave this facility burns as blazing hot as fiery brands.

C: 就好比，我都不必掐指起卦，便可算到客人少则一周内，多则月余会有一笔小财进账。你说准不准？准得很呐。
E: For example, I don't even have to pinch my fingers to foretell that you will have a small amount of wealth coming in sometime between this week and this month. Am I right? Of course I am.

C: 怎么唉声叹气的？
E: What's with all the sighing?

C: 好啊，反正我也没什么灵感…你想找我打听什么，工造技术之类的吗？
E: Alright. It's not like I have any inspiration, is it... What are you after? Is it about artifex technology?

C: 建木又长起来了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...

C: 人们都说我是「工造司民用维修单元甲型」。
E: People say I'm an "Artisanship Commission's Civil Maintenance Unit Type-A."

C: 哎…步离人还能有什么罪啊？「战争罪」呗…但我事先声明啊！我手上可没有过什么血债！
E: *sigh* What else can a borisin be accused of? War crimes! But let me be clear! I don't have any blood on my hands!

C: 松烟执事好像很没干劲？
E: Officer Songyan doesn't seem very motivated?

C: 幽囚狱的情况您也知道，别说从外边进货，就是连个苍蝇都飞不进来。所以我们集团的商品全部是就地取材，纯手工打造。
E: I'm sure you're aware of the situation in The Shackling Prison. Even a fly can't make its way inside, so we have to forget about importing goods. All the products from our group are sourced from local materials and handcrafted.

C: 我见过很多仙舟人太懒惰了，疏于锻炼，没有保持住健康的心态，招致魔阴身提前。只要是每日坚持锻炼，就能多出几千年岁月。
E: I've met loads of lazy people aboard Xianzhou who neglect exercise and don't maintain a healthy attitude. They end up getting early-onset mara-struck sickness. So long as you keep up your daily practice, you can live for thousands of years more.

C: 有考虑换个工作吗？
E: Have you considered changing jobs?

C: 不要就拉倒。
E: It's fine if you don't want it.

C: 唉！枯燥不枯燥都无所谓啦！我跟您不一样——还有大好的人生等待您去挥霍，还有数不尽的传奇等待您去书写……
E: *sigh* Boring or not, it doesn't matter! I'm not like you... You still have a whole life waiting for you to spend and experience, and countless more legendary exploits that await your accomplishing...

C: {NICKNAME}，你好。今天有什么需要吗？
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. How can I help you today?

C: 我会批评他们的服务态度，感谢您对地衡司工作的关注和支持。
E: I will discipline them. Thank you for your attention and support to the work of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 这个地衡司公廨好小呀。
E: This Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery sure is a small place.

C: 我倒是听一些异星游客聊起家乡的职场文化，像我这样的工作态度早就被赶出地衡司了。哎，真是不得不感慨，还是罗浮仙舟好呀。
E: I have heard some Outworlders talking about workplace culture back in their homeworld. Work attitudes like mine would have long been driven out of their version of Realm-Keeping Commissions. Ah, I do proclaim the Xianzhou Luofu to be a far superior place.

C: …都结束了，结束了。
E: ...It's over, it's all over.

C: 那个麦尔彦真不傻！要是批文交给她，我就没法回到家，绝不能够交给她！
E: That Maryam sure is sharp! If she obtains approval, then I won't be able to go home, so she absolutely must not get it!

C: 最近确实挺危险的，但没办法呀，养家糊口的事怎么能耽搁。我家里那么多张嘴要养呢，我要是不工作，那就真是手停口停了。
E: It's been pretty rough out there recently, but there's nothing I can do. I've got a family to support who can't just wait it out! With so many mouths to feed back home, I can't just stop working. No work means no income.

C: 有的卜官没有那个能力，非得要做做样子。做事缺乏前瞻后顾，张口便说「可以做、可以做」。等到该验收工作的时候，又会说「我觉得这个没有必要」……
E: Some managing diviners lack this capacity though, and so they just go through the motions. Completely lacking in foresight or retrospection, just blindly saying "Yes, okay" to everything. But when it comes time to turn the work in, they'll say, "I don't think that's necessary"...

C: 「讨厌」？真不至于，我只是不习惯这里的工作氛围而已。就好比你们化外民来到仙舟，总有人说自己「水土不服」，换个环境多少有点不适应。
E: "Hate"? That's a strong word. I'm just unaccustomed to the work culture here. Just like when you Outworlders come aboard the Xianzhou and people say you "don't get the culture." If you take anyone out of their natural environment, they'd be uncomfortable to a certain degree.

C: 我算有关人士。
E: I am a concerned party.

C: 要是有摄像机就好了，这样就可以把越狱全过程拍个纪录片，片名就叫《白鸟的救赎》，肯定卖爆。
E: If only we had a video camera, then I could record it and make it into a film called: Shiratori's Redemption! I just know it would go viral.

C: 就这样我的罪名就像滚雪球一样越滚越大，滚着滚着就被送进了幽囚狱。这次我要是再跑出去，估计就真没地方可以去了。
E: That's how my criminal record just started to snowball, and it kept snowballing until I found myself in The Shackling Prison. If I actually do manage to make it out of here, I don't think they'll have anywhere else that can hold me.

C: 要是若月在这里就好了，她倒是比我能掐会算……
E: If only Ruoyue was here... She's a better diviner than me...

C: 只是想跟你随便聊聊。
E: I just want to have a casual chat.

C: 我也告诉您一个沉重的秘密。
E: Well, if this is the case... I'll share a grave secret with you, too.

C: 现在今非昔比啦！金人巷到处都是化外民，他们对仙舟那些成百上千年历史的「旧物」可感兴趣了。
E: But everything has changed, now! The Aurum Alley is full of outworlders and they love the ancient "artifacts" of Xianzhou.

C: 奇珍异宝？好大的口气…
E: Wondrous treasures? You talk pretty big...

C: 行，我还要在罗浮待一段时间，有缘再见吧{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}。
E: Sure, I'll be staying in the Luofu for a while. See you around, {F#young lady}{M#young man}.

C: 我看现在还是有很多无机生命…
E: But there are still a lot of inorganic beings around...

C: 我只是想平静地生活在金人巷里，没有手脚也没有什么不便，哈哈哈。
E: Now I just want to live a peaceful life in this Aurum Alley, and losing my limbs is an acceptable price to pay. Hahaha.

C: 那时的会长告诉我「你要好好记住眼前的风景，金人巷商会的使命就是要将这样的繁荣一直延续下去」……
E: At that time, my predecessor told me, "Remember the view you are seeing now. The Aurum Alley Merchant Guild is dedicated to continuing such prosperity for generations to come." Well...

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 有时我在想，只要是追求艺术，长生种有再多的时间也不够吧。
E: Sometimes I can't help but wonder, even for us long-life species, do we really have enough time to achieve our goals in our artistic pursuits?

C: 老实说，很难用短短几句话来评价他，于我而言，他是领我进入烛墨学派的老师，也是我在「智识」路途上的引路人。
E: It's hard to describe him in just a few words. For me, he was my mentor who brought me to the Candelagraphos and guided me to the Path of Erudition.

C: 好的，请您保重。
E: Alright, take care.

C: 他们都说，是听说了你们复兴金人巷的故事，才专程过来游览的。你让我认识了几位非常值得交游的朋友，我打心底里向你表示感谢。
E: They said they decided to come here after listening to the revival story of the Aurum Alley. I've made some nice friends because of you, and I really appreciate that.

C: 眼观鼻鼻观心，你在心中默念着自己所问之事。
E: You dive into the depths of your mind and meditate on the question in your mind.

C: 你真的只打算做生意吗？
E: Is the business really your sole focus now?

C: 甚好。顺便一提，青镞会劝来客们「切勿打听机要之事」，我们俩也照顾一下她的感受，不谈工作？
E: Great. By the way, Qingzu always reminds visitors not to inquire about confidential matters here. Let's not talk about work for her sake, shall we?

C: 嗯，你今日运势无咎，放心去做想做的事吧。
E: Well, you have nothing to watch out for today. Be free to do whatever you desire.

C: 关于停云…
E: About Tingyun...

C: 「我们」来自两个渴望毁灭对方的有机体文明。其中一方拥有四万五千四百个信息体，另一方拥有六万一千九百三十六个信息体。
E: We were born from two civilizations that desired each other's destruction. One consisted of <unbreak>45,400</unbreak> data entities, while the other consisted of <unbreak>61,936</unbreak> data entities.

C: 哎——等等，你想清楚了，谁才是最危险的？
E: Hey... Wait and think before you speak. Who is the most dangerous spirit?

C: 虽说镇妖塔、造化洪炉之类捕获装置能够收容岁阳，但它最主要的目的是防止岁阳与人类的情感和欲望接触。
E: Although capture devices such as the suppression towers and the Creation Furnace can hold heliobi, the main goal is to prevent them from ever coming into contact with human emotions and desires.

C: 和别人聊肯定要被领导训一顿，和你聊就不一样了…到时候就说是你是在向我咨询工作上的什么事呗。
E: If I were talking with someone else, my leader would punish me. If it's you... I'll just tell them you're asking me about work and it should be okay.

C: 还是换个话题吧…这个话题有点不太愉快，哈哈哈。
E: Let's change the subject... This is getting a little too dark. Hahaha.

C: 入得十王司，便如下到冥世，身为凡人时的姓字和生平早已没有意义了。
E: Once you entered the Ten-Lords Commission, it's like entering a life after death. Your name and life before are meaningless.

C: 客人看透了前面的客人心怀叵测，还专程来与小掌柜的如此攀谈，江湖救急不言之中，小店真是感激不尽。
E: That you notice the sinister intent of the customer and specially approached to chat with me. I will be ever-grateful for your lending hand.

C: …话又说回来，虽然说书场时间未到，但要是能买点儿茶饮，听上一会儿小曲儿，也不算浪费这须臾功夫，您看如何呀？
E: ...Then again, though there is still time for the story sessions, if you were to sip some tea and listen to a few tunes, it wouldn't be a complete waste of time, would it?

C: 好呀，正打算点些茶水。
E: Great. I was just about to order some tea.

C: 欢迎光临不夜侯！客人几位，想要喝点儿什么茶？我是小店的主人梦茗，有什么吩咐您随时告诉我。
E: Welcome to the Sleepless Earl! How many of you are there? Which tea would you like today? My name's Mengming, and this is my teahouse. Let me know if there's anything I can do.

C: 顺带一提，客人如果着急公干商谈的话，现在店里也有提供瓶装带走的冷萃饮品。
E: By the way, if you're on business and in a hurry, we stock a range of cold bottled beverages for you to take away.

C: 再说这「蓄水」，茶客们常说「乳泉石池之水」最佳，但这鳞渊境的波月古海之水才是真正的善水，炼丹煮茶，没有比它更好的了。
E: As for water retention, tea merchants always say that mineral water is the best — but the clear and ancient water in Scalegorge Waterscape is the best. There's no better water for tea and alchemy than this.

C: …合唱团！我可想起来了，我唱的是中音的位置。
E: ... Choirs! I remember now, I sang alto.

C: 跟家人聚一下，再拜访一下朋友…你听说过仙舟的「纸鸢」吗，我就像是飞上天的燕子，而这些我惦记的「家人朋友」就是那根线。
E: Hang out with family, visit friends... Have you heard of Xianzhou's paper kites? I am like a swallow that soars to the skies, and my friends and family are the string that anchors me.

C: 哈哈哈，这种安心感的感觉，除了回到仙舟，在哪里也都找不到。
E: Hahaha, that sense of homely comfort, you can't find it anywhere else but Xianzhou.

C: 哎呀，我看这星槎海也算是块风水宝地，味觉失灵的厨师都在这里找到了新的人生。
E: Hmm, the way I see Starskiff Haven, it's a sort of promised land. Even chefs who've lost their taste buds can find new beginnings here.

C: 虽然我们可能认识过，就把这次当作第一次吧。我叫锦余，很高兴认识你。
E: Even though we may know each other, let's treat this as us meeting for the first time. My name's Jinyu. Nice to meet you.

C: 呃，我又拽仙舟成语了，这是我的坏习惯而已，请不要介意。虽然联觉信标能跨越语言的藩篱，但成语就像潜藏在不同语言里的谜题，令人费解啊。
E: Oh, there I go again spouting Xianzhou proverbs. It's a bad habit of mine. Please forgive me. The Synesthesia Beacon may be able to overcome the language barrier, but proverbs are like riddles hidden in different languages — a convoluted quandary.

C: 喔！我听说过，星穹列车又再次启程了对吧？公司的信息简报上提到过这件事了！
E: Ooh! I've heard that the Astral Express is starting up again? The IPC's bulletin mentioned this!

C: 后来怎么了？
E: Then what?

C: 哎…说了你也不懂…嗯？这装束…你也是化外民吗？那倒是可以跟你说道说道。
E: *sigh* ...You wouldn't get it even if I told you. Your outfit... are you an Outworlder too? Then I guess we can talk a little about it.

C: 这位行人，一定要注意交通安全呀。
E: Citizen! Please pay attention to where you're stepping.

C: 随时准备好解答市民疑惑，这也是天舶司测速员的责任，你问吧。
E: I'm always ready to assuage the public's doubts. That's part of my duty as a speed tester at the Sky-Faring Commission as well. Just ask away.

C: 有道理…更直白一点…有了！
E: Makes sense... more straightforward... got it!

C: 没什么事了…
E: I have nothing else...

C: 唔…你看看这里。
E: Oh... check this out.

C: 想多和姐姐再聊聊…
E: I want to talk to you some more...

C: 嗯？怎么了，{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，今天找我来有什么事吗？
E: Hmm? What is it, {F#young lady}{M#young man}? What can I do for you today?

C: 刚才我的态度也有点儿强硬，我把这个送给你赔罪，希望你不要计较。
E: My attitude was a little rough, so I want to make it up by giving you this.

C: 自从诸般灾难尘埃落定，「罗浮」停泊下来之后，「商会」就一直是仙舟的经济命脉。仙舟上大大小小的商会，有些有官方背景，有些则纯粹是民间组织。
E: Ever since the calamities ended and the Luofu settled down, guilds have been Xianzhou's lifeblood. Some of them are government-backed, and some are purely civilian.

C: 尤其是那些鼓吹着「奥义、秘传、秘技」的庸才，未免有些太过聒噪了。只有将自己视为弱者的人，才会去依赖技巧，真正的强者只需要纯粹的力量。
E: Especially those that prattle on and on about "ultimate moves," "secret arts," "arcane techniques" and whatnot. They weren't lying when they say it's the empty vessels that make the most noise. Only the weak rely on such tricks. True strength needs no embellishment, just raw power.

C: 你别想了，我想不到谁能击败我，这问题困扰了我很久，也不急于一时半会。
E: Save your breath. I can't think of anyone who can beat me. Besides, it's been an issue for too long to be hurrying now.

C: 啊，为了「存护」的事业奔走呼号就是我一生的夙愿。仙舟不是我的第一站，也不会是我的最后一站。
E: Promoting for Preservation has always been my calling. Xianzhou isn't my first stop and it won't be my last.

C: 「存护」预见到了毁灭银河的巨大危机，用祂通天的伟力不断建设着屏障…筑城者就是一群普通人，想为祂伟大的事业出一份绵薄之力。
E: The Preservation foresaw destructive threats to the cosmos and used its majestic power to keep building the wall. Architects are just ordinary people who want to contribute to the Preservation's endeavor of preventing doom.

C: 没问题，{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}。我会帮你，你也要帮我呀。
E: No problem, {F#sister}{M#brother}. I scratch your back and you scratch mine.

C: 这两场的票子我都有，你遇到我算你走运。说吧，想坐哪个位置，我来帮你搞定。
E: You're lucky that you ran into me, since I have the tickets for both. Tell me, which seat do you want? I'll take care of everything for you.

C: 我现在就想问点事。
E: I would like to ask you something.

C: 一来仙舟当地人对饮品的口味十分挑剔，外来饮品通常需要做一些本地口味调整，好梦气泡饮对于口味太过于妥协，我觉得那并不算是苏乐达。
E: For one thing, the locals are highly particular about how their beverages taste. More often than not, beverages from other worlds have to be adapted to cater to the dietary preferences of the Xianzhou people. Sweet Dreams Soda has compromised too much on the flavor — I feel that you can't really call it "SoulGlad" anymore.

C: 不过就眼下来看，我还有很大的销售压力啊……
E: But for now... Things aren't looking too good on the sales front.

C: 我们交往多久了？
E: How long have we been together?

C: 都成这样了，看来我们…
E: That's it then. Looks like we'll...

C: 难道你要送我旧款的？
E: Are you trying to give me an old model?

C: 疏散到其他码头吧。
E: Evacuate the people to another dock.

C: 感觉比起记者，你更适合小说。
E: You should be a novelist instead of a journalist.

C: …你还是去找个医馆看看病吧。
E: ...You'd better get to an apothecary and get help.

C: 你认识冥火大公？
E: You know Duke Inferno?

C: 我是许多无主的小岁阳融聚而成的，自从有意识以来，便有了星槎的记忆。那艘星槎并非斗舰，却曾经在战场上穿梭自如……
E: I am the fusion product of several tinier heliobi. Since gaining consciousness, I've had memories of starskiffs. That starskiff is no fighter jet, but long ago it used to zoom across the battlefield...

C: 真是了不起的星槎。
E: What an amazing starskiff.

C: 我代表十王司来审问你…
E: I am here on behalf of the Ten-Lords Commission to interrogate you...

C: …听你这话
E: ...Hearing you say this...

C: 还有还有，这个白雪皑皑的世界好有意思。
E: Also, this snow-capped world is really something.

C: 嗯，您得有多少丰富的经历才会轻描淡写地说出这句话呀。
E: For you to downplay things like that... you must really have a huge wealth of experiences behind you.

C: 我是他的教练。
E: I'm his coach.

C: 无妨，本座可以帮你简要梳理一下思路。
E: Go ahead. I might be of help in sorting out your thoughts.

C: 真的又长起来了吗？
E: Is it really growing again?

C: 别催我呀，我要瞎打了。
E: Don't rush me or I'll be playing blind.

C: 会有危险吗…
E: Is that dangerous...?

C: 是啊，这一点我认可。
E: Yes, I can agree with that.

C: 「摘星社」的向导更专业！
E: The guides at Star-Picking Tours are more professional!

C: 那是正常人能干的事儿？
E: Is that something normal people can do?

C: 爸爸你说实话，妈妈是不是还在生我的气…要不然她怎么还不回家啊?
E: Dad, please tell me the truth. Is Mom still mad at me... Otherwise, why doesn't she come home?

C: 通常来说，你不需要做些什么，只要你出席葬礼，就已经说明了很多事情。
E: Generally speaking, you don't have to do anything. Your attendance at the funeral itself means a lot.

C: 我打听到了，原来他们搞的这个仪式，就是仙舟式的葬礼。
E: I've got it. It turns out that this ceremony of theirs is a Xianzhou funeral.

C: 你应该也收到邀请了吧？
E: You have got the invitation, haven't you?

C: 感觉阳雷骑士大人帮不到我。
E: I don't think the Daythunder Knight can help me.

C: …唉，姐姐，我要去备课了，这个问题就留给你自己吧，记住不可相信多嘴多舌之人。
E: ...Ah, sister, I need to go prepare for my class. I'll leave this matter to you. Just remember not to trust those who gossip too much.

C: *凶猛的叫声*呜嗡~
E: *Fierce growl* Grumph~

C: 太好了！
E: Yay!

C: 很难说是不是故意的。
E: Hard to believe it wasn't on purpose.

C: 小小灰，还有没有什么办法，能让火箭飞得更高更远呢？
E: Little Gray, is there any other way to make the rocket fly higher and farther?

C: 病人能够活蹦乱跳地离开，对于医生来说，这就是最好的消息了！
E: For a doctor, there's no better news than seeing their patients leave alive and kicking!

C: 如果你实在想留个纪念，就拿着这枚猫咪硬币吧，反正我也用不上它了。
E: If you really want a souvenir, take this cat coin. It's not like I have any use for it anyway.

C: 若是没有这出戏码，恐怕那来世的继任者，也没那么容易发现轮回的真相。
E: I doubt our successors in the next life would've discovered the truth of the cycles so easily without that move of yours.

C: 一天一顿热水澡。
E: And a hot shower every day.

C: 老子大好的男儿。
E: I'm a true man.

C: 这证件上的照片是你么？
E: Is that your photo on the ID?

C: 近一点…再近一点。劳烦你。
E: Closer... Just a little bit closer. Thank you.

C: 那些话本里说，练内功得有经脉和丹腑。你们智械有经脉么？
E: Those story books all say inner cultivation requires meridian circuits and a Core Esse. Do you Intellitrons have meridian circuits in you?

C: 没想到准备检票的时候，他一把抱住检票员，让我们拼命往里冲。
E: But when it came time to get our tickets checked, he suddenly held down the gate staff and told us to run inside as fast as we can.

C: 我要回方壶…我胃疼。
E: I wanna go back to the Fanghu... My stomach hurts.

C: 我们一侧的脸会「只说真话」…
E: One side of our face only tells the truth...

C: 在仙舟联盟，任何看似不起眼的东西，都可能蕴含银河中最顶尖的科技，这尊石狮子也不例外。它的武功比你更高，但绝不会轻易出手。
E: Anything that looks insignificant in the Xianzhou Alliance may be the product of the most advanced technology in the cosmos — this stone lion is one of them. It is a better martial artist than you, but it won't touch you without a valid reason.

C: 妈妈，我怕。
E: Mommy, I'm scared!

C: 所有对犯人的分离手术均以失败告终，仿佛她们天生就是一体。
E: All attempted operations to separate the inmates ended in failure. It is as if the two were born as one entity.

C: 星历<unbreak>8093</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>8093</unbreak>

C: 《清洗》
E: Clean

C: 有经验的仙舟人会告诉你：当纸鸢飞在天上时，远离它的线——据说在强风加持下，纸鸢线足以将疾驰的星槎一分为二。
E: An elderly Xianzhou native would advise you to stay away from the thread when a kite is flying in the sky. It is said that the thread will be powerful enough to split a speeding starskiff into two with the help of a blustery wind.

C: 倘若我用化劲，又当如何？
E: And what if I neutralized your force, what then?

C: 需要您宝贵的一票！
E: He needs your precious vote!

C: 他拳头力道跟星槎似的。
E: The power of his fists is just like starskiffs.

C: 我们应该这么开心吗？
E: Should we be this happy?

C: 「织机」翻滚、运算着，如星槎航道般奔流不息。庞杂的数据在此织成致密的布匹，成为可识读的运算结果。罗浮凭借它驱动整艘仙舟的商业贸易。
E: The loom keeps rolling and calculating like a bustling starskiff lane. An enormous amount of complicated data is woven into clothes that contain readable calculation results. The Luofu counts on them to stimulate trade in Xianzhou.

C: 「雅舍欲迎，轻雨浥尘。」客栈的本名似乎也消隐在了广告词中——仙舟美学真是博大精深。
E: "This humble abode welcomes you, while a drizzle douses dust." The name of the inn is hidden in the message. The beauty of the Xianzhou language is impressive.

C: 这幅宣传画充斥着刺眼的黄色，具有强烈的警告意味。
E: The poster uses bright yellow as its background to make sure people notice the warning.

C: 这是被称为「玦轮台」的充能装置，你几乎在每一个停靠星槎的港口见过它。
E: This is a charging device called a "jade wheel base." You can find it at almost every dock with starskiffs.

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 孽物」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Abomination."

C: 「长时间来，联盟一直计划帮助那些世界修复横遭篡改的生态系统与基因系谱。其名如下——」
E: "The alliance has always intended to help these worlds restore their tampered ecosystem and genealogy. The names of the worlds are as follows:"

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 求药」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Elixir Seekers."

C: 折纸大学！我来啦——
E: Paperfold University! Here I come...

C: 完了，论文查重没通过。
E: Oh no, my thesis failed the plagiarism check.

C: 你就不能稍微改改啊！
E: Can't you tweak it a little?

C: 为什么要带来学校…
E: Why did you bring it to school...

C: 但你也可以*随时*回到这里——这是你不可剥夺的权利！
E: But you can come back here any time — that's your unalienable right! Nobody can take that away from you.

C: 它不值得我浪费时间。
E: It is not worth my time.

C: 之后便是长篇大论、天马行空的技术构想和市场前景分析报告——可只看了数百字，你便被「赋能」、「跨赛道」、「生态激活」等商业术语催的昏昏欲睡。
E: After that, there are rambling paragraphs, bold technical concepts, and market analyses — but after making your way through a few hundred words, you're soon hypnotized into a state of drowsiness by such bizspeak terms as "energize," "cross-channel," and "activated ecosystem."

C: 它不值得我浪费时间。
E: It is not worth my time.

C: 翻箱子。
E: Check the package.

C: 「米糕没幻戏社的各位：《仙舟折剑录》最新回『最初一战』非常棒！按照我的设想，接下来应是步离人与联盟血战在即，几位主角的人生也会天翻地覆……」
E: "Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club, "The First Battle," which is the latest chapter of "Xianzhou Sword Tale" is amazing! In my opinion, the war between the borisin and the alliance should be next, causing drastic changes in the life of the protagonists..."

C: 之后是将近二十万字的剧情畅想，情节诡谲，跌宕起伏，末了主角们一个个阵亡，又受命途感召得以擢升……
E: What follows is a long essay of the predicted plot that consists of almost two hundred thousand words, full of twists and turns and surprises. At the end of the story, the protagonists are expected to die one after another and then be brought back to life by the Paths...

C: 这是持明族在一次生命尽头所形成的持明卵。持明在卵中褪去所有记忆，修复前生所有的伤痕，再世为人。
E: This is a Vidyadhara egg formed from a dying Vidyadhara. Inside the egg, all of the Vidyadhara's memory will fade away, and all wounds suffered in their previous life will be healed before being reincarnated again.

C: 那道声音里有一股难以言喻地嫌弃——「少看点垃圾小说，这玩意看多了对脑子不好。」
E: There is a tinge of disdain in the voice. "Stop reading those novels. It won't do your mind any good."

C: 不，这不是光学迷彩，也没有用到什么云吟术创造的光学折射…那些试图拆解你魔术的人远不如你高明，他们想破头也想不出你是如何做到的。
E: No, it does not involve optical camouflage, or optical refraction created by cloudhymn magic... Those who attempt to expose your magic are far less clever than you. They can never figure out how the magic works no matter how hard they try.

C: 好吧，我不会靠近你。
E: Fine. I won't come any closer.

C: 哼，这次可别让我失望啊。
E: Hmph, don't disappoint me this time.

C: …能再次给我带来惊喜吗？
E: ...Will I be surprised again?

C: （默默致哀）
E: (Mourn in silence)

C: 于是你留下那三个箱子，转身离去了。
E: So, you leave the three boxes behind, turn around, and walk away.

C: …你还是别念了。
E: ...Really, please stop.

C: 我有醋，你有饺子。
E: I have vinegar, you have potstickers.

C: 有句话憋在心里很久了…
E: There's something I have to tell you...

C: 看把你能的……
E: You can even...

C: 房门那头传来似有似无的鼾声，那是真实的睡眠。
E: You hear what sounds like snoring coming from behind the door. They're sleeping for real.

C: 这是一台自助苏乐达机，在匹诺康尼随处可见。
E: This is an automatic SoulGlad dispenser machine, common in Penacony.

C: 随着你的靠近，积木们纷纷躁动起来。它们发出声音，如同一千张嘴同时开口……
E: As you get closer, the densely packed blocks start to stir. They make a sound akin to a thousand mouths opening at once...

C: 这应当是属于一个孩子的房间，看似温馨，却令人感到不安。
E: This should have belonged to a child. It looks warm, but fills one with a sense of unease.

C: 你不禁开始想象，若是灯光骤然亮起，酒客推门而至，会是怎样热闹而欢快的场面。
E: You can't help picturing how lively and joyful the bar would be if the lights came on and the patrons walked in through the door now.

C: 希望匹诺康尼的梦境给你带来了美好的体验，这是所有家族成员一致的心愿。
E: I hope you had a wonderful experience in Penacony's Dreamscape. After all, such is the wish of all Family members.

C: 你身上的能力…相当奇特。
E: The power you have... is very special.

C: 一个囿于天分的奴隶、一杆攀附灵感的秃笔！
E: A slave confined by her talents! A bald quill without its own wits!

C: 然而，就在昨天，那个客户指名了我，对，就是我！做他的专属代理人！你说，这是不是天上掉下来的馅饼！哪有这种好事！
E: Still, just yesterday, that client specially asked for me! Yes, me! To be his exclusive manager! Have I truly lucked out or what! How could this be happening to me!?

C: 我知道这个！是家族发给外来宾客的！好看。我也想要。
E: I know this one! It's what The Family gives to visitors! Nice. I want one too.

C: 呜呜，谢谢你。你太好了。我、我也相信，你是我最好的朋友。
E: *sob* Thank you. You're too kind. I, I'd like to believe it too, that you're my best friend.

C: 把头埋低，别让他们看到您的脸。啧。都是流氓，恶棍，毫无怜悯心的暴徒！
E: Keep your head down, and don't let them see your face. Tsk. Louts, ruffians, scoundrels, cold-hearted scoundrels, all of them!

C: 到底是什么地方…突破口在哪…星期日？那个人绝对有问题，但行事严密，抓不出破绽…知更鸟？那只小鸟知道些什么，可她同样不好对付……
E: Where could it be... What am I missing... Sunday? Something's definitely off with that person, but all his business is watertight, and I can't find any issues... Robin? What does that little bird know? And she's not a trifle to handle either...

C: 这个…我记得是从早期的游戏卡带里拆下来的，那时候还没有虚拟技术，想要玩游戏，得把这个插到机器里才行。同期推出的还有把实体的剑，可惜没人知道它的下落。
E: This... I remember removing this off some early-era game cartridge. Virtual tech didn't exist at that time, so if you wanted to play a game, you'd have to stick this in a game console. There was some physical sword that rolled out and promoted at the same time — a pity no one knows its whereabouts.

C: …斐迪南德沉浸在美妙的幻想中了。
E: ...Ferdinand is deep in his own beautiful fantasy.

C: 如果您不介意的话，可以和我聊聊您的经历吗？
E: If you don't mind, can you tell me about your experiences?

C: 于是你看到那双原本盛满暮色的眼睛里渐渐亮起了群星。
E: And it is then that you see those once dusk-clouded eyes slowly flicker and sparkle like star clusters.

C: 那种诡谲的怪诞的压抑的疯狂的不可名状的…埃德加先生究竟是怎么做到的啊……
E: That creepy, grotesque, depressing, mad, unfathomable prose... How the heck did Mr. Edgar accomplish that...

C: …真的吗？这不是什么新型诈骗吧……
E: ...Really? Is this some kind of new scam...

C: 我的手机呢？！
E: Where's my phone?

C: 你很清楚，匹诺康尼不可能出现*正版的*谛听。
E: You know very well that there cannot be a *genuine* Diting in Penacony.

C: 我叫乌玛，是家族的新闻主持人。出名…倒是算不上。
E: My name's Uma, I'm a news anchor from The Family. As for being a celebrity... I can't really say that.

C: 为什么不能被人发现？
E: Why don't you want to be found?

C: 你喜欢你的工作吗？
E: Do you like your job?

C: …是谁说的？谁说我不再唱歌了？
E: ...Who said that? Who said I don't sing anymore?

C: 男人的愤怒转变为理智，而理智产生了贪欲…看来你需要其他情绪才能让这件事翻篇。
