E: The man turns his anger into rational thinking, and his rationality produces greed... It seems like you will need to use other emotions to solve this problem.

C: 夏洛特周边的空气失去了颜色。
E: The air surrounding Charlotte loses color.

C: 或许她早就离开匹诺康尼了，而我却还在期待毫无意义的再会…哦，太傻了。
E: Maybe she already left Penacony long ago, and I am still holding onto hope for a meaningless reunion... Ah, I'm such a fool...

C: 上一秒嘴里还是甜言蜜语，下一秒转头就拉起别人的手——广告牌看得一清二楚！假的，全都是假的！！
E: One minute you're whispering sweet nothings and the next, you're holding someone else's hand... This billboard sees everything clearly! It's fake! It's all fake!!!

C: …你知道「奇异果」嘛，最著名的脱口秀团队，尽管投了十一次简历都失败了，但我还是想要加入他们，这将会是我辉煌演艺生涯的第一步！加油！
E: ...Have you heard of the Kiwis, the most renowned stand-up comedy team? I've been trying to join their ranks, and they've turned me down eleven times, but the twelfth time is the charm, right? This will be my first step towards my career!

C: 钢琴家已全然忘我，沉沦却又漂浮在音乐与欢乐织就的洪流之中。
E: The pianist has surrendered himself, immersed in a torrent of music and ecstasy.

C: 跟你说话呢，给个反应啊！果然人类就没有靠谱的——当然，麦克斯除外。
E: Hey, I'm talking to you! Are all humans so numb? Well, except Max, of course.

C: 音乐家们往往过分热衷于在音乐中展现自我，这不是件坏事，但对于我们这些自动乐器而言，多少有些冒犯。
E: Musicians tend to be overly expressive in their music, which isn't necessarily a negative trait, but it can be overwhelming for us automated instruments.

C: 当然，如果有人不把《入梦守则》放在眼里，那么他很快就会意识到猎犬是多么可怕且难缠的对手。
E: Of course, if someone flouts the Dreaming Regulations, he will very quickly learn how frightening and persistent the Bloodhounds are.

C: 这不，到了晚年，好容易得了清闲，我赶紧出来溜达溜达。
E: To have the time now for idle times in my golden years, you bet I'm going to come out for a stroll.

C: 看看我身边那些年轻人…大家各取所需，多好？
E: Just take a look at the young people around me... Everyone takes what they need, isn't that good?

C: 我觉得自己或许该换个视角看待问题了。这些自动乐器说不定能创造新的音乐形式…我可能还要再思考一下。
E: I wonder if I should look at this problem from a different perspective. Perhaps this automated orchestra has a new way of creating music... I may have to contemplate further.

C: 你们的车比球笼要贵啊。
E: Your cars are even more expensive than Spheroids.

C: 没问题。这些都是我们推荐的车型，配套齐全，总会有能让您满意的。
E: No problem. Our recommended models are fully equipped, so you're sure to find a model that suits your fancy.

C: 对店里的商品还满意吗？有任何意见，都可以直接向我提出，我们会尽全力改进。
E: Are you satisfied with the items in our store? If you have any suggestions, feel free to let me know and we will do our best to improve.

C: 啊，没想到连着喝下<unbreak>40</unbreak>瓶苏乐达会是这种滋味。真是…太爽啦！
E: Ah, who would've thought downing forty bottles of SoulGlad back-to-back would feel like this. It feels... absolutely amazing!

C: 还能是什么？「黄金的时刻」无时无刻不在举办派对，需要自备的只有一颗爱玩的心。
E: What party do you think? Golden Hour is one non-stop party! All you need to bring is a fun-loving spirit!

C: 呜呼，真是人不疯玩枉少年啊！
E: Woohoo! No Party, No Life! My friend!

C: 唉…等哪次上课时，我心情像今天这么好的时候，应该能好好和他们聊聊这个话题吧。
E: Ah... Perhaps one day in class, when I am in as fine a mood as I am now, I should be able to discuss this topic properly with them.

C: 本窗口提供客房相关业务的办理。
E: This window provides all services related to your room.

C: 还有非正规入梦吗？
E: So, are there "unauthorized" services?

C: 其中猎犬家系主要负责安保工作，匹诺康尼的警卫、消防员、安保等职位都由该家系成员担任。
E: The Bloodhound Family is responsible for security-related positions in Penacony, including roles such as guards, firefighters, and hotel security personnel.

C: 丹尼斯狡黠地朝你眨了一下眼。
E: Dennis winks at you astutely.

C: 总之，我在外人面前只会保持这副形态。你就当我是个皮皮西好了。
E: Anyway, I'll stick with this form in front of others. Just treat me as a Pepeshi.

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 一四三市场组还差6份调研报告没有提交，已经延期快十天了——得去催催。
E: The <unbreak>143</unbreak>rd Marketing Team has 6 research reports overdue by almost ten days. I need to push them.

C: 「只是那来自未来的玫瑰，还未盛放……」
E: "But that rose from future has yet to bloom..."

C: …对、对不起，客人！我不是那个意思，请您听我解释……
E: ...I—I'm sorry, my esteemed guest! I didn't mean it! Please hear me out...

C: 设备都很完整，引擎也是新款，怎么就发疯成这样了呢。不明白。
E: It's got top-notch equipment and an engine of the latest model. How it ended up in this mess is beyond me.

C: 除内置电源外，本型号独轮飞车还配备有脚动驾驶系统。
E: In addition to the built-in batteries, this vehicle is also equipped with a foot-operated driving system.

C: 呃…你知道的，我很早时候就是你的飞车了，一直很仰慕你。至于刚才那些话，都是开玩笑的，别当真。
E: Ah... You know, ever since I became your flying car, I have always admired you. Regarding our earlier conversation, please be assured that I was merely joking. Don't take it to heart.

C: 滴答，灰色的朋友，我现在弄明白了一件事！我从前一直都想让镇上的人们看到我，承认我…但实际上，这件事好像压根没那么重要！
E: Tick-tock, I've realized something, my gray friend! I desired for the townspeople to acknowledge and recognize me... but now it seems it's not as significant as I once believed!

C: 为了褒奖您的运气和…呃，十足的运气，请您收下这张「至尊幸运儿的黑卡」！
E: To celebrate your luck and... um, blessing, allow me to present to you this Lucky One's Black Card!

C: 一愣过后，康娜的面容重归严肃，看不出丝毫情绪的波动。
E: After a momentary shock, Conna's face reverts to her usual solemnity, with not a sliver of emotion on it.

C: 这样的事情我已见过许多。比起悲伤，我心中更多的是…疲倦。
E: I've seen many such incidents. Compared to sorrow, my heart is more... tired.

C: 所以，我决定亲自参与到钟表小子的制作中，哪怕只是帮大家端茶送水也好…毕竟那可是我的童年啊。
E: So, I decided to personally participate in Clockie's production, even if it was just serving the crew drinks and food... I mean, it was my childhood after all.

C: 回见，如果你之后需要梦境鼓励师的帮助，倒是不妨来找我聊聊。
E: See you around. Feel free to come to me if you ever need the help of a Dreamscape Motivator.

C: 我们有过很多很多次争吵。起初他谴责、而我试图辩解，后来我们互不相让，再后来我们之间只剩数不尽的、令人难堪的谩骂。
E: We've argued many, many times. When he condemned me at first, I tried to defend myself. As time went on, neither of us gave in. We just kept hurling insults at each other in the end.

C: 请你收下这份情绪作为礼物，我将它珍藏了很久，很久。
E: This emotion is a gift for you. I've kept it for a very long time...

C: 给我介绍一下你的战甲。
E: Tell me more about your armor.

C: 可空气中很快就多出了另一股味道——刺鼻的浓烟。
E: But soon, there came a pungent smell of smoke.

C: 钟表小子中了石头老板的诡计，误饮了过期的汽水，滴答——
E: Clockie fell for Boss Stone's wicked scheme and accidentally drank an expired soda, tick-tock...

C: 哈努兄弟，最可靠的老大哥，滴答！他不仅带我和汽水先生去钟表餐厅吃大餐，还邀请我们去大剧院听音乐会，滴答！
E: Brother Hanu is my most reliable companion, tick-tock! Not only did he take me and Mr. Soda to Clock Diner for a feast, he even invited us to the Grand Theater for a recital, tick-tock!

C: …这是在说我矮吗？
E: ...Are you calling me short?

C: 钢琴家安静坐在丝绒织成的软垫上，神情似水般平和，望向远处的目光微微含笑。
E: Serene, the pianist sits on a velvet cushion, his countenance remaining tranquil as still water. A faint smile adorns his face as he gazes into the distance.

C: 所以，我有义务逗它们开心。
E: So, it's my job to keep them entertained.

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 黑爪女士的视线穿过你，落到一个遥远的地方…可那里根本没有人。
E: Lady Black Claw's gaze goes right past you and is locked on a distant spot... But no one's there.

C: 暂时还没。
E: Not yet.

C: 哇塞！你原来是明星，真是太了不起了！
E: Whoa! So you are a star! That's incredible!

C: 那里的人们兼具智慧、美丽与勇气，他们生来典雅，因永不熄灭的宏愿而伟大。
E: The people there are erudite, beautiful, and brave. They are born elegant, and great in their inextinguishable ambition of grandeur.

C: 「石剑」抓着你絮絮叨叨地讲了好久操控技巧，看得出他确实在这方面很有心得。
E: Stoneblade grabs onto you and prattles a never ending spiel about his control panel skills. You can tell that he really does have experience when it comes to this.

C: 放下碗骂厨子…有些人就真的不配吃饭！
E: Beggars can't be choosers... Some people really don't deserve nice things!

C: 哈哈…再见了，虚假的美梦！我逃出来了…我成功了，流梦之地会保护我的！
E: Haha... Farewell, fake dream! I have escaped... I succeeded! The land of Dreamflux will protect me!

C: 这…真的是我想要的人生吗？
E: Is this... really the life I want?

C: 看来你已经发现了匹诺康尼美梦的秘密。无名客的本事果然不赖。既然已经知道了流梦礁的存在，现在你又如何看待这片流梦之地呢？
E: I see you've also discovered the secrets of Penacony's beautiful dream. I should know not to doubt the skills of a Nameless. Now that you have learned of the Dreamflux Reef, what do you think of this land?

C: 这让我想起…小时候的我躺在床上总是幻想，倘若我出生在另一个星球，会不会过上完全不同的人生？
E: This reminds me... When I was a child, I used to lie on my bed and fantasize. I wondered if I was born on another planet, would my life have been completely different?

C: 这地方也没水和肥料啊。
E: But this place has no water or fertilizer.

C: 要说这个念头何时萌发的，可能要追溯到我第一次来到阿斯德纳星系的时候。
E: If you mean where this idea first originated from, I would say it was likely from when I first came to the Asdana star system.

C: 入梦装置的价格、我身体的病痛、孩子们的身体状况…乃至于家族的举动，都会对我们这一方小小的合唱团造成巨大的影响。
E: The price of dream devices, my affliction and symptoms, the children's physical conditions... and even the actions of The Family have a huge influence on our tiny little chorus.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 更可气的是，每次我去找他们理论，他们总要搬出什么版权之类的东西糊弄我。
E: What's even more annoying is that every time I go to them to argue about it, they'll always bring out copyright-related jargon to throw me off.

C: 我吗？还在整理几本童书的读者来信——别用露出那么惊讶的表情。
E: Me? I'm still sorting through letters from readers of several children's books — don't look so surprised.

C: 可渐渐他们发现，这些内容不仅没有降低销量，反倒激发了读者的解密和背景研究的热情，也就不再多说什么。
E: But gradually they realized not only the content did not reduce the sales, it inspired readers to solve the codes and conduct background research. And so, they stopped commenting about it.

C: 那是种真实无比、纯粹无比的欢乐…我曾在囚犯们的眼睛里见过它，我曾在阿斯娜的指尖感受到它，而如今它又出现在我的面前——
E: That's a kind of pure, true joy... I'd seen it in those prisoners' eyes. I'd felt it at Asna's fingertips, and now it had arrived once more before me...

C: 等您醒来之后，就会发现食用这类产品的好处了。这可比美梦里的快餐健康多了。
E: You'll soon realize the benefits of eating this once you wake up. This is far healthier than the fast food in the sweet dream.

C: 清醒村是《钟表小子》动画第二部的故事舞台：「穿过美梦小镇的影子，钟表小子来到了一座与众不同的神奇村落。这里聚集着许多被美梦驱赶的村民：爱撒谎的猎犬、疯疯癫癫的猫头鹰，还有不会啾的折纸小鸟……」
E: Rouseville is where the story is set in the second Clockie series: "Through Dreamville's shadow, Clockie arrives at a wondrous village that is quite distinct. Many residents cast out by Dreamjoy have gathered here: A Bloodhound who lies compulsively, an owl that has gone quite mad, and an origami bird that doesn't tweet..."

C: 嗯…有只调皮的小鸟总在阴森森的地方躲着吓人呢，去<color=#dbc291ff>巨大的钟表小子雕像附近</color>找找看吧，它应该就躲在那里。
E: Hmm... There's a playful bird that likes hiding out in dark spots to scare people. Go take a look <color=#dbc291ff>near the giant Clockie Statue</color>. It might just be hiding there.

C: 除了外出寻找枝条，大多数时候折纸小鸟都是聚在「大树」附近一起生活的啾。
E: Besides going out to look for branches, the origami birds usually spend most of their time gathering near the Great Tree in their daily lives, tweet.

C: 也行，别忘了找找这里的折纸小鸟啾。
E: That works too, don't forget to look for the origami birds here.

C: 这里原本是美梦小镇的「汽水乐园」，小鸟们都爱在这里抓虫子啾。
E: This used to be the soda haven of Dreamville. The birds loved catching bugs here, tweet.

C: 关于好梦剧场…
E: About the Dreamgood Theater...

C: 完全支持！
E: Two thumbs up!

C: 是我，基尔克！
E: It's me, Kirk!

C: 米凯，我想和你聊聊天。
E: Micah, I want to chat with you.

C: 我？我只是一个理应无名的陌生人，有着一段无聊的过去。
E: Me? I'm just a stranger who deserves no name, someone with a meaningless past.

C: 那是种近乎玄妙的感觉。他的目光仿佛正缓缓渗透你的肌肤、血肉、骨骼乃至灵魂，悄无声息地探寻着某种更加抽象、更加纯粹的「本质」。
E: What a strange feeling. His gaze is so deep that you feel it seep into your skin, past your flesh, your bones, and into your soul. Silently, it searches for your inherent "nature" in its most abstract and purest form.

C: …您身上有「毁灭」的气息，却又兼具「存护」的意志。二者交汇相融，保持着某种微妙的平衡…我曾在一位虔诚的{RUBY_B#「均衡信徒」}仲裁官{RUBY_E#}身上窥见过相似的美感。
E: There is an air of Destruction about you, yet you possess the will of the Preservation. Both Paths are able to maintain a delicate balance despite their convergence... I have seen a similar kind of beauty before, when I gazed upon the body of a pious {RUBY_B# Follower of the Equilibrium}Arbitrator{RUBY_E#}.

C: 您对我的作品感兴趣吗？
E: Are you interested in my works?

C: 不日我即将在「蓝调的时刻」举办个人摄影展览，如果您有时间，可以来看看。
E: Soon, I shall hold a personal photo exhibition in the Blue Hour. Do visit it if you have the time.

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 的确看得出来。
E: Yes, I could tell.

C: 您考虑考虑？
E: What do you think?

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 我叫贝拉，是一名星际美食家。
E: I'm Bella, an interstellar food connoisseur.

C: 你为什么捏着嗓子说话？
E: But why's your voice like that?

C: 不过，最近好像不流行这个了…我有一个特别喜欢的主播，叫桂乃芬，她是专门播户外灵异探险的，人气可高了…那才是现在的潮流。
E: But then again, this seems a bit outdated now... My favorite streamer, Guinaifen, does outdoor supernatural adventures and she's really popular... I guess content like that is what's in trend now.

C: 你说得对，一针见血。名声也好，所谓的上流社会也好，本质上只是一场幻梦…我在这里待久了，真的会被聚光灯耀眼的光芒迷惑……
E: You're astute. Be it fame or this idea of high society, they're nothing but a fleeting dream. A dream I've been caught up for so long in that even the spotlights begin to bedazzle me...

C: 有没有工作以外的话题？
E: Do you talk about anything else other than work?

C: 呜，抱歉啾，没能帮上客官的忙啾……
E: Waaa, I'm sorry that I couldn't help you out, tweet...

C: 您这次能不能跟我多聊几句，您的发音好独特我好喜欢，我想多学学。
E: Can you please talk to me a little more? I love your unique pronunciation and really want to learn it.

C: 是的，说是能凸显您风趣幽默的特点，又保留您特有的纯真感。
E: That's right. The design is supposed to dramatize your humorous nature, while retaining the special innocence about you.

C: 你是新手？
E: Are you a newbie?

C: …真是够了，又来一单！
E: ...I've had enough! Why do the orders keep coming!?

C: 所以我坚持为船员配备统一的制服并进行队形训练。这不仅能提升他们的专业形象，也能增强团队凝聚力。
E: That is why I insist on making the crew wear uniforms and practice standing in formation. This enhances their professional image and their cohesiveness as a team.

C: 好的，船长。那我就先回去继续工作了！
E: Alright captain. Then I'll get back to work now!

C: 什么？你刚说什么？大点声——
E: What!? What did you just say? Speak louder —

C: 那群老教授，就像格拉克斯大道上穷追不舍的广告牌一样，黏在孩子们的脑后哔哔叭叭：「你的台风不够优雅，旋律不够婉转，节奏点太过密集，音响太大声！」
E: Those old professors are just like the billboards who pester people on Glaux Avenue. They keep nagging at the children, "You aren't elegant enough on stage. Your melody is not moving. The downbeats of your music are too accentuated. Your speakers are too loud!"

C: 答案是——给钱就好，是不是比你想象中简单？大学虽然不是盈利机构，但钱总不嫌多，有钱才能留住好老师，才能扩建学院招收更多学生。
E: The answer is — just pay money. It's simpler than you think, right? Even though the university isn't a for-profit organization, they'll never say no to more money. Only with more money can they keep the best teachers here, expand the school, and recruit more students.

C: 结果你猜怎么着，组委会那群白痴补了封邀请函，但不是给我，是给我爹！他们说在校生唯一的邀约标准仍是「梦想」。
E: And you know what? Those fools did send out an invitation — not to me, but to my dad! They said the only criterion for students to get invited is still having a "dream"!

C: 理解了吗？至于其他…如果想知道细节，等你向我展示过你的价值后再谈。
E: Have an idea of my business network now? You're going to have to show me your worth if you want to learn more, though the discretion is still mine.

C: 别误会，我没有窥探别人隐私的兴趣，但我也没法阻止家里那些多事的保镖自顾自地做了全面调查。
E: No, I'm not one to snoop around others' private information, but there's nothing I can do to stop those nosey bodyguards employed by my family from running a thorough investigation on her.

C: 对筑梦的热情，以及对相关课程的掌握，我有自信不会输给任何人。
E: I am confident that my passion for dreamweaving and my grasp of the curriculum are unmatched!

C: 前阵子克劳克影城的怪事你知道吧——一场转瞬即逝的筹码雨之后，天空破开了个巨大的口子。
E: You've heard about the weird story that went down at Clock Studios Theme Park a while ago, right? A flood of chips started raining down, then a huge hole opened in the sky.

C: 会找以前的乐队成员吗？
E: Will you find the former band members too?

C: 只有感谢而已吗？
E: Just appreciation?

C: 相信此次事件过后，他会得到应有的惩处。
E: With the passing of this matter, I believe that he will receive just punishment.

C: 预算如此充分，却始终毫无建树，绝对是被那几个不学无术的负责人挥霍掉了！
E: Equipped with such a generous budget, but without any accolades to show for it — a clear sign of squandered opportunities by incompetent leaders!

C: 哪有勉强！我是那种冥顽不化、不懂得变通的老师吗？我也是很擅长发现学生优点的，只不过…哼，你们的音乐确实和我想得不一样。
E: Too hard? Never! Do I look like the sort of teacher who's obstinate and unable to adapt? I'm also good at discovering students' strengths. It's just... hmph, your kind of music does deviate from what I had in mind.

C: 你可以直接辞职的。
E: You can just quit.

C: （写下幽默的寄语）
E: (Write a witty message)

C: 或许…我不用把这里的学业当成人生的全部，哪怕在这里失败了，也不过是证明它的规则不适合我——也就不是我的「忍道」吧。
E: Maybe... I don't have to see my studies here as my whole life. Even if I stumble here, it only serves to prove that it's not the right path for me, nor is it my way of the ninja.

C: {RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}在货运车厢找到了破损的我，修复完毕后，我一直跟随他左右。
E: My {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous owner{RUBY_E#} found me in the cargo carriage, all beat-up. After finishing repairs on me, I followed him ever since.

C: 请尽管问吧。只是我初来乍到，也许没太多事情可说。
E: Please ask away. But I might not have a lot to share since I've only recently came on board.

C: 关于知更鸟…
E: About Robin...

C: 家族或许存有将我铲除的意愿，但若非我组织起一支声势浩大的军队，绝不会轻易惊动「无限夫长」。
E: The Family may wish to eliminate me, but as long as I'm not rallying a sizable army, they wouldn't go so far as to involve the Eternal Centurion.

C: 关于黑天鹅…
E: About Black Swan...

C: 在喜剧中欢笑的人偶，放声感慨世界的幸福。
E: A puppet who laughs during a comedy, loudly releasing the world's happiness as a sigh.

C: 非常抱歉，因突发事故影响，本剧院暂中止提供服务。
E: My apologies. The theater has temporarily suspended its services due to an accident.

C: 从书的新旧程度可以看出，哈努兄弟最讨厌的，是这本没拆封的《星际和平公司发展史》。
E: Judging from how aged each of these books is, Hanu hates this unopened IPC Developmental History text the most.

C: 一想到这张脸会在屏幕上挂上很长一段时间，你甚至有些害羞。
E: The thought of your face behind displayed on the screen for countless hours makes you even a little shy.

C: 瞭望镜视野里的景色是如此开阔，以至于令你生出某种错觉——在云端漂浮太久，就会成为物理意义上的「高高在上的人」，这或许并不是好事。
E: The scenery through the telescope is vast, so vast that it evokes some delusions in you — floating among the clouds for too long would physically make one "in the clouds," which isn't necessarily a good thing.

C: 据时不愿透露姓名的调饮师透露：「我是弹贝斯的，玩不来这种古典玩意。」他因而从演奏家愤然转职。
E: According to a drinksmith who wishes to remain anonymous: "I play bass. I can't play such classical pieces." It is for this reason that, in a fit of anger, he switched his job as a musician.

C: 你无法确定这个设备是否运转正常，基于人身安全考虑，你决定还是别乱按为好。
E: You're not certain whether the device is operating normally so for safety reasons, you decide not to randomly press the buttons.

C: 如今，镌刻于他记忆中的那份苦痛，已被同伴们的话语触碰，渐渐融解，消散…
E: Now, that agony etched into his memory seems to thaw, dissolved by the words of companions, melting away...

C: 哟，看这满地的财宝。这下猫儿可开心了。
E: Whoa! Look at all this treasure lying around. Makes a kitty elated.

C: 却没敢跟她打招呼……
E: But I wasn't bold enough to say hello to her...

C: 我更喜欢柠檬味的。
E: I prefer the lemon one instead.

C: 我要快活！我要消费！
E: I want to be happy! I want to spend money!

C: 哎，你听说了吗？苜蓿草家系的大人物要来视察了。
E: Hey, did you hear? The big shot from the Alfalfa Family is coming to perform an inspection.

C: 苏乐达动力真是好~
E: SoulGlad Power is awesome!

C: 总感觉有时候…
E: Sometimes I feel like...

C: 稍后稍后、就知道稍后，你就不能给点别的反应？！
E: And it's always "please wait"! Can't you say something else!?

C: 回到现实的话，我不就又得靠拐杖走路了吗……
E: If I go back to reality, I'll have to walk on crutches again...

C: 你这个*匹诺康尼文明用语*！
E: You little *Penacony civilized language*!

C: 我实在是太平凡了！活了快三十年，连一件值得写在史书上的事都没做……
E: I'm just so ordinary! I've lived for almost thirty years, but I haven't done a single thing worth mentioning in history...

C: 孩子，不要恐慌，更不要让疑虑拖累了行义的脚步。
E: Child, do not panic. You must not allow your doubts to slow the footsteps of righteousness.

C: 你说我这样会不会被认出来？我好歹也算个小明星诶。
E: Do you think they'll recognize me like this? I am a bit of a minor celebrity, after all.

C: 这绝对是弄错了什么…
E: This must've been a mistake...

C: 我们正在制作的那部太空喜剧，不是正愁找不到合适的主演吗？我看那两位就很合适，要不…
E: We're working on a space comedy, and we're having trouble finding suitable main leads. I think those two would be perfect. Why don't we...

C: 基于这次比赛，我觉得有必要重新考虑我们之间的合作关系。
E: With what has transpired in this competition, I think we need to reconsider our partnership.

C: 就好像…之前一直活在梦里一样？
E: Like... you've been living in a dream all this time?

C: 不过什么？
E: However what?

C: 吹牛不打草稿…
E: You need to work on your bragging...

C: 组建社团可太累了，不符合你的节能原则，还是当个不出头的旁听生会更适合你。
E: Forming a club is too exhausting, and doesn't align with your energy conservation principles — It's better to be a guest student who doesn't rock the boat.

C: 就这样，在过往人群的指指点点与窃窃私语声中，你度过了这节漫长而又煎熬的课堂。你不明白为何最开始自己要陪这位可怜的同学罚站，但至少——
E: And so, amid the constant pointing and murmuring of passers-by, you manage to endure the endless torment that is this class. You still don't understand why you had to be punished alongside this poor student in the first place, but at least...

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 我们的愿望…正在一点一点实现。对吧？
E: Our wishes... are coming true little by little. Isn't that right?

C: 当星宿的回响散去，你的耳边接踵而来的是…浪潮的声音？
E: As the echoes of the constellations fall silent, the next sound to meet your ears is... waves?

C: 抵达了行进路线的下一站
E: You have arrived at the next step along your route

C: 当然是特、别、美、满、啦！你知道吗，我的追求者虽然很多，但他们追求我，更像是想要追求「美」的事物，并将其据为己有。
E: It's PURE BLISS! You know, while I've had plenty of admirers, they're more interested in possessing something beautiful for themselves.

C: 嗷呜！
E: Awooo!

C: 太好了，风堇接受过{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}祝福，能听懂你嗷呜了啥。
E: Great! Hyacine, having received the blessing of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, can now understand your woofs.

C: 又是「砰！」的一声，你重新变回了人样。
E: Another "bang!" and you return to your human form.

C: 所以它就是一杯普通的水。
E: So, it's just a cup of water.

C: …你们俩都是扎格列斯信徒吧。
E: ...You two are both followers of Zagreus, aren't you?

C: 冷静，这并非原始博士所为…这只是借用了你脑海中对于「原始」的想象。
E: Calm down. This isn't the work of Dr. Primitive... it's just based on the concept of "primal" in your brain.

C: 想看看店里的水果。
E: I'd like to check out the fresh fruits here.

C: 整个果子下肚，你感觉自己整个人神清气爽，所有疲惫仿佛都消失不见。
E: Upon eating the entire fruit, a sense of rejuvenation washes over you, as if all traces of fatigue have dissipated.

C: 一头野兽窜进了城里，你本想出手帮忙，但这个卫兵几矛就解决了问题。
E: A beast scurries into the city. Just as you are about to intervene, the guard swiftly deals with the intruder in a few strikes.

C: 好，正好我闲，要长蘑菇了。
E: Good, I'm free now. I'm so bored that I might as well be growing mushrooms.

C: 简单的，赞美吉奥里亚，架锅，赞美吉奥里亚，炖，赞美吉奥里亚，装盘。
E: It's simple. Praise Georios, prepare the pot. Praise Georios, cook the stew. Praise Georios, serve the food.

C: 缘…妙不可言……
E: This... this must be fate...

C: 按F进行刺杀。
E: Press "F" to assassinate.

C: 蒙受命运降福，神秘的异乡旅人
E: Destined, veiled in mystery's sheen. An outlander in enigma's serene.

C: 啊，对不起，客人，我走神了。您是…我听说过您的事，从异邦来的，协助黄金裔大人们的战士，对吧？
E: Ah, apologies, good guest. I was distracted. You are... I've heard about you before — the warrior from foreign lands who fights side by side with Chrysos Heirs, am I correct?

C: 没问题，不过城内最近刚刚经历了变故，商品种类还不够齐全，我看看…目前在列的有这些，如果您感兴趣，我可以详细介绍一下。
E: That's no problem, but the city has recently undergone some changes, and we have a limited selection of merchandise. Let's see... We currently have these for sale. I can introduce them in detail if you're interested.

C: 石板上都说了些什么？
E: What does the slate say?

C: 一段往事罢了，你自己看吧。说起来，你不是得到欧洛尼斯的赐福了么？
E: Just some stories of the past, take a look for yourself. Come to think of it, did you not receive the benediction of Oronyx?

C: 节哀顺变。
E: I'm sorry for your loss.

C: 你看看、看看——这么明显的瑕疵，竟然好意思说什么「货品既已售出、本店概不负责」？这合理吗、合理吗！
E: Look, look — this object is obviously flawed, and they dare claim "their store is not responsible for product quality once a sale is finalized?" Do you think that's reasonable!? Completely unreasonable!

C: 呃…这名号没听过啊，是哪位泰坦的别称吗？
E: Hmm... I've never heard that name before. Is it a Titan's nickname?

C: 所以我最近运势如何？
E: So, tell me about my horoscope.

C: 哎呀，看来您也是懂行的，那我阿普里斯就在这里献个丑啦。
E: Oh, I can tell you know the business well. Well then I, Hapries, have really put my foot in it.

C: 这就是我说过的，远观和参与之间的区别啦。不过也没办法…就算是据说能为每个人都选择出最美好未来的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，那也有自己力所不及的时候。
E: That's what I meant — the distance between watching at a distance and joining in. But there's no other way... Even if {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} really can pick the perfect future out for everyone as they say, there will be times when the person themselves cannot manage to reach it.

C: 一谈到研究有关的话题，盖亚整个人就兴奋了起来。她热切地望着你，你有某种预感，她似乎有许多话想跟你说。
E: Gaia grows excited as soon as she talks about her research. She earnestly looks at you, and you get the feeling that she's got lots more she wants to say.

C: 我推测，这种泉水或许能够逐渐激发黄金裔体内的潜能，在长期浸润下，因而得到了微量的泰坦之力。
E: I am guessing that this water may gradually trigger latent powers within the Chrysos Heirs, and with long-term submersion, they have gained slight amounts of Titan power.

C: 我曾经把一些植物埋在靠近黑潮的土壤里，结果那些植物不仅没死，反而变得特别...阴郁。在靠近它们的时候，我总能听到一些发出奇怪的声音，好像在哭泣似的。吓死人了！
E: I once planted something in some soil near the black tide, but rather than dying, they instead became extremely... depressed. Whenever I got close to them, I could hear a strange noise that sounded like crying. It was spooky!

C: 相对地，您可以报上我的名字。如果闹事的客人是如我所想的几位，只要说是「达罗」希望他们消停一下，应该会有用。
E: Conversely, feel free to use my name. If the unwelcome guests are the ones that I imagine, tell them that Daros would like them to calm down. That should help.

C: …不明白你在说什么。身为主持祭典的尼卡多利祭司，我当然会留在这里，履行使命。
E: ...I don't understand. As Nikador's priest in charge of festivities, I will of course remain here and fulfill my duty.

C: 山之民，漫长的历史。身体，吉奥里亚捏的。
E: Long history, Mountain Dwellers have. Their bodies, Georios shaped.

C: 你回忆起银河著名女歌手的教诲，扯着嗓子以歌声回应。
E: You recall the teachings of a songstress famed across the cosmos, responding to the song at the top of your voice.

C: 一条从海底跃起的鲸鱼，身姿优雅而惊人，它一口吞下那盏灯光，带着它沉入海底，而后拍起巨浪，将你的小船推向远方……
E: A whale leaps from the ocean depths, its movements elegant yet astonishing, swallowing that lamp with a gulp, and taking it back to the sunken deep. It ends its routine with a giant splash, slapping your small boat farther into the distance...

C: 所以你打算做些什么呢？
E: So what do you plan to do?

C: 很好的论题。我得说，这个疑问困惑过我很长的时间。被黑潮摧毁后的阿卡索斯城看不见，摸不着，即使去到原先的地点，也只能找到一堆断壁残垣。
E: A very fine topic. I must say, this question has troubled me for a long time. Having been devoured by the black tide, one can no longer see nor touch Icatus. Even if you go to its location, all you will see is a pile of ruined remains.

C: 我反对你的立场，并非因为坚信「阿卡索斯」真实存在，而是这些概念对知识的传承至关重要。若是按你的做法，对任何事物都抱着否定态度……
E: My opposition to your view is not because I staunchly believe in the existence of "Icatus." I disagree because these concepts are crucial in the inheritance of knowledge. If we follow your approach and maintain an attitude of denial towards everything...

C: 诡辩是好奇心与探索精神的大敌，要是将知识局限在感官接触的范围内，那我们永远都无法走出奥赫玛。
E: Sophistry is the enemy of both curiosity and the spirit of exploration. If we limited knowledge to what we can sense, we would never have been able to set foot outside Okhema.

C: 是的！你懂我的意思吗？艺术不应该局限于我们的视觉。它应该突破这些界限，直击人心。我努力用自己的方式感受这个世界，然后把它呈现出来。
E: Yes! Do you get what I mean? Art shouldn't be confined to our vision. It ought to transcend those limits and resonate deeply with us. I strive to experience the world in my unique way and then express it through my art.

C: 好，以后有空再聊吧。
E: Sure, let's catch up another time.

C: 这么讲究？
E: That particular?

C: 讲讲捷足战舞。
E: Tell me about swift-footed dancing.

C: 哪儿冒出来的，吓我一跳。公共场所，你这话可不兴乱说的。
E: Where did you come from? You scared me! Hey, you can't just shout things like that in a public place!

C: 我很好奇…
E: I'm curious...

C: 原谅我这话多的毛病，孩子。是来找大叔我的吗？
E: Forgive me for getting so carried away talking, child. Are you here to see me?

C: 这你得去问我朋友…
E: You'd have to ask my friend...

C: 这图书馆的历史…
E: The history of this repository...

C: 烦心…倒算不上，最多算是为时代变迁而叹上几口气罢了…
E: Troubling... not really. It's more like sighing at the changes of the times...

C: 奇美拉没有任何错，想复活古生物也是美好的理想，只是……
E: The chimeras have done no wrong, and trying to revive extinct animals is a beautiful dream, but...

C: 在追击敌军时，我们正中了敌人的圈套，粮道也被切断。吃完手头的全部存粮后，大伙眼巴巴地看着我，觉得我肯定有办法搞到食物。
E: We walked right into an enemy trap while pursuing their troops, and our supply line got cut off. After finishing all the food we had left, everyone just stared at me, certain that I had some way to get my hands on some food.

C: 嗯，好好吃饭，身体才能撑得住。
E: Good. You need to, or your body won't last.

C: 抱歉，我有点忙…
E: Sorry, I'm a little busy here...

C: 收听贝洛伯格留言。
E: Checking messages from Belobog.

C: 杜老板每到午后就会给你发消息，说让你「得闲来饮茶」，累计发了<unbreak>13</unbreak>条，除此以外也没有别的内容。
E: Every afternoon, Boss Du sends you a message inviting you to have tea whenever you're free. He's sent <unbreak>13</unbreak> invites so far, without adding much else.

C: 堂堂祭司，怎么一身敏感肌。
E: I've never met such a sensitive priest before?

C: 倘有一日我雅努萨波利斯成为唯一正统的泰坦之领，必会还正史一片清朗。
E: If Janusopolis were to one day become the only legitimate Titan territory, I'm sure that the historical accounts would be suitably cleared.

C: 不，我只是名普通的侍女，只不过有幸服侍过圣女大人。在神殿里什么活我都干过，扫地、洗衣、侍奉祭祀……
E: No, I'm merely a humble maid, though I've had the privilege of serving the Holy Maiden. I've undertaken various tasks here in the temple — sweeping, laundry, assisting in sacred rituals...

C: 聊聊尼科马库斯。
E: Tell me about Nicomachus.

C: 后来我们几个在浴场偶遇的同好就互相留了联系方式，成立了这个自封为「奥赫玛推理协会」的活动社。
E: Then, since we kept seeing each other at the baths, our group exchanged contacts and established what we now proudly call the "Okhema Deduction Society."

C: 别偷了，踏实做人吧。
E: Quit taking what isn't yours and live an honest life.

C: 你描述了缇安给你的印象，除了身高的部分……
E: You describe your impression of Trianne, carefully leaving out any mention of her height...

C: 至于阁下…也让我看到此前并不了解的一面。例如，阁下虽然和缇安老师一样洒脱纯粹，可关键时刻又很靠得住呢。
E: As for you... you, too, showed me a side I didn't know. For example, while you're as carefree and pure as Trianne, you're also incredibly reliable in critical moments.

C: 你是说生命花园的那些奇美拉吧，它们过很辛苦嗷呜！
E: Ah, you mean those chimeras in the Garden of Life? Their lives are so hard, awoo!

C: 「唯有生死一线悬的瞬间，你才能从救世的职责中短暂脱身。」这是他的原话。
E: "It's because you can only briefly free yourself from the duty of saving the world in those fleeting moments at the threshold of death." That's what he said.

C: 尤瑞托斯，<unbreak>30</unbreak>万利衡币…埃姬娜，<unbreak>750</unbreak>万衡币…保卢斯，<unbreak>200</unbreak>万利衡币……
E: Eurytos, <unbreak>300,000</unbreak> Balance Coins... Aegina, <unbreak>7.5</unbreak> million Balance Coins... Paulus, 2 million Balance Coins...

C: 能听见那绵延百里的汽笛。
E: The sound of a whistle stretching for miles...

C: 简单清晰准确。
E: Simple and concise.

C: *墓志铭*，有人说它是生命的总结。如果墓碑被视为「千古不磨」的存在，那么人们应该在那里留下怎样的话语，赠予身后的岁月？
E: The epitaph. Some call it the summary of life. If the tombstone is regarded as an everlasting existence, then what words should people leave on it for the time to come?

C: 只要心中还尚存着一丝光明，就永远不会被黑暗吞噬，刻法勒的教诲永远指引着我们。
E: As long as there's a flicker of light in the heart, darkness will never consume it. Kephale's teachings will always lead the way.

C: 我很好奇……
E: I'm curious...

C: 嗯…贵客可能会感到奇怪，但答案是「没错」。
E: Hmm... You might find it strange, but the answer is "yes."

C: 这样一来，阿格莱雅大人的愿望也能……
E: This way, Lady Aglaea's wish can also...

C: 关于若虫的闪烁…
E: About the flickering of the nymphs...

C: 贵客不喜欢吗？那我去让若虫们老实一点。
E: You don't like it? I'll go tell the nymphs to behave.

C: 你能让这些若虫重新闪烁吗？
E: Can you make these nymphs flicker again?

C: 为了从黑潮怪物手里保护一位吓得不敢动弹的孩童，这位青年受了重伤，生命垂危。
E: He was severely wounded while protecting a child too frightened to move from the black tide creatures. His life is now in danger.

C: 那一击让他直到现在都没能醒来，或许…永远都醒不来了。
E: That attack has left him unconscious until now, and perhaps... he will never wake up again.

C: 起初，他们说{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}会庇佑卡弥特斯不陷落于黑潮。然后，他们说奥赫玛会永远不受黑夜侵袭……
E: At first, they claimed {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} would protect Carmitis from the black tide. Then, they promised Okhema would never be touched by the dark night...

C: …嗯，这都是借口。云石天宫承载着奥赫玛人的热情与回忆，它可能会打烊，但却从未冷清过。我眷恋这片水流，所以我会留在这。这…是我的固执。
E: Well, I'm just making excuses. The Marmoreal Palace carries the passion and memories of the Okhemans. It may close temporarily, but it has never been desolate. I'm attached to these waters, so I'll stay here. Call it... stubborn, I don't know.

C: 别太勉强自己。
E: Don't be too hard on yourself.

C: 吉奥里亚的教诲——危机时，它的子民，要成为磐岩之盾。我们，始终铭记，始终贯彻。
E: Heed Georios's teaching — in times of crisis, his people must become shields of stone. We always remember this, always follow it.

C: 自那以后就再也没人见过他。如果你有他的下落，请随时与我联系…我欠他太多了……
E: No one has seen him since. If you have any information about his whereabouts, please contact me immediately... I owe him too much...

C: 那么，不妨就来听听我们这两位修辞学教师最后的论辩吧。如此大错特错的观点，可不能任由它流毒到来世。
E: Then let us hear the final debate between these two rhetoric teachers. Such gravely mistaken views mustn't be allowed to poison the afterlife.

C: 刻法勒如果真的足够仁慈，它就该让这一切结束得更快一些。
E: If Kephale is truly merciful, they would bring this suffering to a swifter end.

C: 那些仍然信奉{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的人…他们说这只是一次考验，说刻法勒从未离去…如此纯粹的信仰，而我居然嘲笑过他们的天真。
E: Those who maintain their faith in {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}... they insist this is just a test, that Kephale never left... such unwavering belief, and I had the audacity to mock their innocence.

C: 听完我的事迹之后，大家看我的眼神都不一样了。呵呵，那些溢美之词有些言过其实，但还是听得人心里暖洋洋的。
E: Now that folks have heard my story, they see me in a new light. Hehe, some of their praise might be a bit over the top, but it still feels good.

C: （那帮混账……！）
E: (Those fiends...!)

C: 我也来一杯。
E: I'll have one.

C: 那个，谢谢你，英雄阁下，我听说了，我们的命都算是你救的。
E: Thank you, hero. I've heard that we owe our lives to you.

C: 贵客，即便到了这种时候，我们也仍应坚守职责。
E: Honored guest, even in such times, we must still uphold our duties.

C: 嗯…有位织者苦练技艺，终于小有所成。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>天象画壁前的悬台高处</color>，去检验一番它的成果吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has diligently honed their skills and has finally made progress. The golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>a high place of the suspended platform in front of the celestial mural</color>, ready to test its achievements.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 先说好，白厄哥，你可别卖我啊，不然这次，我屁股铁定得开花。
E: But promise me, Mr. Phainon, you won't rat me out, okay? Or my behind's really gonna be toast.

C: 唉，那个小混蛋，但凡能有你一半省心就好了……
E: *sigh* That little scamp... If only he were half as easy to deal with as you...

C: 哎呀，你是白厄的朋友吧？欢迎欢迎。不好意思，我刚从田里出来，身上有点脏……
E: Oh? You're a friend of Phainon? Welcome, welcome! Sorry, I just came in from the fields and got a bit messy...

C: 刺刺球就刺刺球吧。
E: Quillorbs it is, then.

C: 「舞会能一直、一直办下去！」
E: "Let the dance go on forever and ever!"

C: 嗯…有位织者感伤于岁月变迁。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>秋千旁的大树下</color>，与跨越时间的童梦为伴。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who laments the changes along the river of time. The golden thread brings tidings: They are under <color=#dbc291ff>a tree next to a swing</color>, enjoying a childhood dream that transcends time.

C: 「乐章演奏的最高潮处。」嗯…哀丽秘榭的妖精一族喜爱音乐，善于演奏竖琴，以其乐声来营造载歌载舞的氛围。
E: "At the climax of the symphony." Hmm... The fairies of Aedes Elysiae have a passion for music, excel at playing harps, and use their melodies to create a festive atmosphere.

C: {NICKNAME}的，还是人家的？嘻，明明这两者没有区别，我和{NICKNAME}一样天生丽质呀。
E: Yours? Mine? Tee-hee~ There's no difference either way! We're both natural beauties anyway!

C: 这是你的秋千吗？
E: Is this swing yours?

C: 常回家看看……
E: Try visiting home often...

C: 总觉得效果比想象得要…更个性鲜明一些？
E: It feels like the effect is... even more distinctive than I imagined?

C: 挺不错的。
E: Not too bad.

C: 将来么…做好我的本职工作，等待翁法罗斯迎来新生，仅此而已。
E: The future? I'll do my duty, awaiting Amphoreus's rebirth. Nothing more.

C: 把本狮当泔水桶吗？当下水道吗？要，要不是本狮没，没手没脚…真当本狮好欺负啊！
E: Do I look like a barrel? Or a water pipe? I—If only I had limbs... I wouldn't be such an easy prey!

C: 忘却时间吧，享受欢宴吧！因为蜜酿管够吼——这样一来，大家就不会在意幻境了吼——
E: Forget the passage of time and lose yourself in the feast, for there will be plenty of honey brew to go around! Then, no one will care about the illusions anymore!

C: 我要当没头没脑的虫！
E: I wanna be a headless bug!

C: 迷！迷迷！绿球菜们，争点气迷！
E: Mem! Mem, mem! Come on, greenie cabbage, let's show some spirit, mem!

C: 木制的是吧，记得顺着纹理裁切，让他们祷告时能省些功夫，交给西斯了。再下一把是…尼卡多利权能的…我吃不住，杜，你行吗？
E: Made from wood eh? Remember to cut along the grain, so they save some trouble during prayers. It's up to Sisk now. The next piece is... Nikador's authority... I can't do this. Tuu, do me a favor?

C: 听说是被抬着回去的……
E: Anyway, I heard they had to carry that person back home that night...

C: 不是，那帮人到底啥毛病？脑袋在浴场泡进水了还是被大地兽踹了？
E: Wait, what's wrong with them? Are their heads soaked with bath water or kicked by dromases?

C: 因为想成为司仪的话，需要去树庭进修，并通过「敬拜学派」的特殊考核……
E: That is because in order to become a ceremonial officiant, you have to train in the Grove and pass a special examination put in place by the Venerationists...

C: 我搞明白了。
E: I figured it out.

C: 你有偷偷喝两口吗？
E: Did you sneak a sip?

C: 期末测验？
E: Final exam?

C: 啾啾，猫头鹰老师，我们真的可以成为和前辈们一样厉害的折纸小鸟吗？
E: Tweet tweet, Professor Owl, can we really become awesome origami birds like our seniors?

C: …啾？猫头鹰老师？
E: ...Tweet? Professor Owl?

C: 我要我要我要，啾啾啾！！！
E: Me me me, tweet tweet tweet!!!

C: 但是从个人角度的话……我最喜欢的是呜呜伯。
E: But from my personal perspective... I'd say Wubbaboos are my favorite.

C: 辛克尔_日常
E: Hinkel_Daily

C: 纵然灾难会毁灭物质，但是那些都有机会复原。唯有人心的损伤，是难以弥补的。
E: Disasters are physically destructive, but the buildings can be rebuilt. It is the human heart that is irreparable.

C: 我想多听听你扯闲篇…
E: I want to hear more of your gossip...

C: 你最近都在忙什么呢。
E: What have you been working on?

C: 老板真厉害呀~
E: Boss, you're amazing~

C: 我观这洞中异象，想来是有修者在此突破。不知是我虫族的年轻天骄还是那人族的惊才绝艳之辈…
E: Looking at these strange phenomena in the cave, I suspect someone must have ascended here. Could it be one of our young prodigies from the nymphs, or perhaps one of those brilliant human talents...

C: 常在水边走，哪能不湿脚…
E: If you play with fire, you're gonna get burned...

C: 你终于来了…
E: You're finally here...

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 没事的，贵客，我从失忆中学到的唯一本领就是耐心。
E: Worry not, honored guest. If my amnesia taught me one skill, it's patience.

C: 嗯…有位织者躲在黑暗中。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>裂缝洞口的墙上</color>，为自己的心灵编织厚厚的网呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver hiding in the dark. The golden thread brings tidings: They're on the <color=#dbc291ff>wall of the rift's opening</color>, weaving thick webs for their own mind.

C: 嗯…有位织者窃窃私语。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>令人晕眩的隧道前</color>，揣度设计者的本意呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is whispering. The golden thread brings tidings: They are pondering the designer's intentions in front of the <color=#dbc291ff>dizzying tunnel</color>.

C: 它考验世人的「纯粹无私之爱」，以明验觐见瑟希斯的决心。而最为「纯粹无私之爱」，已显诸其身，在这份漫长的守护里无声延续。
E: It tests humanity's "pure, selfless love" to verify their determination to meet Cerces. And the most "pure, selfless love" has already manifested itself, silently continuing in this long-lasting protection.

C: 一段没有来由的旋律出现在你的脑海中：「灯！等灯，等灯！」
E: A random melody pops into your head: "Light! Wait for the light, wait for the light!"

C: 这筐，似曾相识…
E: This basket... looks oddly familiar...

C: 非常好，你以后一定能成为一名优秀的战士。
E: Excellent. You'll definitely become a great warrior someday.

C: 悬锋人向来不用嘴皮子较高低，祭司！
E: We Kremnoans don't settle things with mere words, priest!

C: 我看你现在也没什么急事，来来来，就给这老东西*评评理*，回头我让德墨忒尔给你拿果子吃。
E: I don't see you in a hurry. Just help us *knock some sense* into this antique, and I'll make sure Demetria rewards you with her finest fruits.

C: 抱、抱歉，村长，我再也不敢了！
E: S-sorry, Village Chief! I won't do it again!

C: 喏，这顶帽子。我出发前向田地里的稻草人借的，它很慷慨，没有拒绝。
E: Here, this hat. I borrowed it from a scarecrow in the fields before I left. It was quite generous and didn't refuse me.

C: 你这孩子，完全没听进去我的话哪……
E: Kid, you're not listening to a word I'm saying...

C: o((■ω■- )o「内心一下变得好平和，好充实，好想洗心革面，做一只心灵健康的海豹。」
E: o((■ω■- )o "I feel so peaceful and fulfilled inside... I just want to turn over a new leaf and be a seal of spiritual health."

C: 是你的风格！那就把惊喜感保留到最后一刻吧。
E: That's so you! Let's keep the surprise until the very last moment.

C: 我也想要风宝的小贴纸。
E: I want a little sticker from Cinny, too.

C: 可以，火候根据你的口味来定。
E: Sure, I'll adjust the heat to your taste.

C: 漂浮在天空中的大地…
E: The land that floats in the sky...

C: 终于来到这里了喀~
E: Finally here, crrk~

C: （聊聊关于城市的事情）
E: (Chat about the city)

C: 要知道，星辰间遍布着许多文明。他们中有的危险程度丝毫不逊于反物质军团。
E: You know, there are many civilizations scattered throughout the stars. Some are no less dangerous than the Antimatter Legion.

C: 所以，我想请你去当那位笨徒弟的…呃，助教。
E: So, I'd like to ask you to be... um... assistant instructor for that not-so-bright apprentice.

C: 你怎么收到这个徒弟的？
E: How did you meet your current apprentice?

C: 不错不错，你这脑瓜子可真灵光！
E: That's good, great. You've got a real brain on you!

C: 滴、答，宾客，快来，和我一起喝苏乐达吧，我请客！
E: Tick, tock, dear guest, hurry. Let's drink this SoulGlad together. It's my treat!

C: 滴答，你又来了？听说隔壁现在正火星四溅呢。
E: Tick-tock, you're back again? I hear it's sparks flying everywhere next door right now.

C: 滴、答——我是燃尽幸福的邪火，我是吞没美好的沼泽，我让美梦堕入噩梦的幕后黑手，我是正义避无可避的死敌。
E: Tick, tock... I am the felfire that will burn out all happiness, the swamp that will devour the beautiful. I am the mastermind who causes dreams to fall into nightmares, the inevitable nemesis of the righteous.

C: 滴答，我、我以为这么说话会变得很受欢迎，但好像不太对……
E: Tick-tock, I—I thought I'd be more popular if I spoke like this, but it just doesn't seem right...

C: 世玲姐她…怎么说呢，人挺好的，就是…不太会当导师。在她手下办事，基本只能靠自己的悟性找方向……
E: Miss Shiling... How should I put this? She's a great person. It's just... she's not the best at mentoring. You basically have to rely on your own wits to get some direction if you're working under her...

C: 我的考评绩效就靠您拯救了，{NICKNAME}……
E: My performance appraisal is all on you, {NICKNAME}...

C: 呃…您说的话，我好像不太能理解呢。
E: Ugh... I don't really understand what you're saying.

C: {NICKNAME}，您还在空间站呀？
E: Are you still in the space station, {NICKNAME}?

C: 谢谢您，{NICKNAME}，这样我就又有新的数据可以写进报告里了。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Now I've got even more data for my report.

C: 呃，是我…请问我们认识吗？
E: Mmm, that's me... Have we met?

C: 我受到了和你有关的骚扰。
E: I got harassed because of you.

C: 「嗯，再见啦。」
E: "Okay, seeya later."

C: 你不好奇发生了什么？
E: Aren't you curious about what happened?

C: 有更实在点的奖励吗…
E: Is there a more practical reward available...

C: 启动「太空大战争」。
E: Launch Cosmic Warfare.

C: 虽然他之前承诺了会按时交稿，但我也清楚这人的性子…想必他是又把工作全都攒到最后，现正不知道在哪儿疯狂赶稿呢。
E: Although he has promised to submit his commissions on time, I know him too well... He must have procrastinated till the last minute. I bet he is working flat out somewhere right now to complete his work.

C: 谢谢你，不知名的好心人！有了你的帮助，我的绘画灵感开始如博物馆门口的喷泉般疯狂涌动！
E: Thank you, oh kind-hearted stranger! Thanks to you, I can feel my artistic inspiration surging up like the fountains outside the museum!

C: 名字嘛，我暂时还没想好——但既然你是它的主人，这项艰巨的任务就交给你了。
E: As for the name, I haven't settled on one yet — but seeing as it's yours now, such a daunting task lies in your hands.

C: （这应该就是照片上的物件了…把它带回去吧。）
E: (This should be the item in the photo... I'll bring it back.)

C: 那么，我们开始吧。首先是母亲大人执政初期以前的故事——
E: So let's start. First is the story of mother before her reign...

C: 你确实是贝洛伯格的英雄，{NICKNAME}——当之无愧。
E: You're indeed the Hero of Belobog, {NICKNAME}. You deserve that title.

C: 如你所见，我们贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的振兴计划到目前为止都十分顺利…在你的帮助下，综合展馆的主要展区已经基本布置完成，可以面向观众开放了。
E: As you can see, the revival plan of the Belobog History and Culture Museum has been going well so far... With your help, the setup of the General Hall's main exhibition area is close to completion and can soon be opened to the public.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了筑城者建立的古老遗迹一角。
E: A work of photography that captures a corner of the ancient ruins built by the Architects.

C: 「造物引擎」与虚卒的冰雕。作为影像中唯二的入镜者，永冻的它们或许能得到些慰藉。
E: The Engine of Creation and an ice sculpture of a Voidranger. Eternally frozen, they may have been consoled by the fact that they were the only two entities photographed.

C: 你怀疑贝洛伯格的工程师们是不是已经彻底放弃思考了。
E: You wonder if the Belobogian engineers have given up on thinking.

C: 一组老式金属机柜，是矿用机械的终端设备。
E: A set of old metal cabinets. These are terminal equipment for mining machinery.

C: 这座钟对于矿工而言意义非凡——毕竟地髓什么时候都可以挖，错过的休息时间可找不回来。
E: This clock is especially meaningful to miners. After all, geomarrow will not be running out anytime soon, but precious rest time can never be replaced.

C: 「幼年时的希莉儿资质平平，却因一连串阴差阳错的巧合被选中，成为了大守护者的候选人；」
E: "In her youth, Cyrille was unexceptional. However, due to a series of opportune events, she became a candidate to become the Supreme Guardian."

C: 这件武器被命名为「开拓者的棒球棍」，与你手中的那柄别无二致。
E: This weapon was named Trailblazer's Ball Bat, the very same one you hold in your hands.

C: 没想到，你的武器也有被送进博物馆的一天——虽然不是真品，但这也足够震住在它身旁的几位虚卒朋友了。
E: You didn't think your weapon would have a place in a museum. This was not the actual weapon, but it was enough to stagger the Voidrangers beside it.

C: …我不太确定，不过很有可能！
E: ...I'm not sure, but it's highly possible!

C: （那里好像有个人，去问问看吧……）
E: (It seems like there's someone there. I'll try asking them...)

C: …天舶司也在寻找幽灵星槎吗？
E: ...Is the Sky-Faring Commission looking for the phantom starskiff too?

C: 幽灵星槎…是岁阳因人们的思念而有灵具现。它循着那些哀悼人们的思绪，在仙舟上无定来去。
E: The phantom starskiff... is a manifestation of people's thoughts by the heliobus. It travels unpredictably on the Xianzhou, following the sorrowful thoughts of those who mourn.

C: 呜呜…呜呜呜呜呜呜！
E: Woo-woo, woo whoooo wubba-woo!

C: 有什么好吃的推荐吗？
E: Do you have any recommendations?

C: 公司对银河贸易帮助巨大。
E: It's been a great help to pan-cosmic business.

C: 在食客们喧闹的交谈声中，时间就在不经意间匆匆逝去。
E: Amidst the bustling of the diners, time flies by before you even notice.

C: 商业问题还得让商会解决吧…
E: Merchant matters should be left to the Merchant Guild to handle...

C: 对呀，有什么「不该」的，我已经被牵连了。
E: Sure is, I've already started placing bets.

C: 你听码头工人说，他们肯定说责任不在他们。要我说，这责任也不在我们。
E: Those dock workers don't want to take responsibility, and I'm afraid it's not our responsibility, either.

C: 眼下最要紧的就是争取在还款日到来之前完成债务目标。
E: The important thing right now is to generate enough revenue before the payment due date.

C: 总之，金人巷的事就是我的事，要是遇到什么其他困难，你记得随时叫上我。
E: Any problem facing Aurum Alley is also my problem. If you encounter any difficulties, don't hesitate to come find me.

C: 这要是你，应该就不会被算计了。
E: If it were you, you wouldn't have fallen for his trap.

C: 这样吧，我为你们准备了一次练习，作为指导的结束。过来吧，阿丰师傅。
E: How about this — I've prepared a little practice exercise for you. Mr. A-Feng, over here please.

C: 我叫阿丰，是我将那个带有「浓云金蟾」的箱子带出来的。
E: My name's A-Feng — I was the one who brought out the box containing the Golden Cloud Toad.

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 这份证言铁证如山，就是你指使他破坏客人商品的。
E: This testimony is concrete proof that you instructed him to sabotage shipments.

C: 哈——？我听不见，大声点。
E: Ha...? Speak louder, I can't quite hear you.

C: 我们要是擅自帮忙，他脸上更挂不住。
E: Well, it's better to beg forgiveness than ask permission. Let's just start you out and see what he says.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 过度开发只会影响游客体验，导致实际来到街道的游客减少，这就是现实。
E: The reality is — overdevelopment can only adversely impact customer experience, making the Alley less appealing.

C: 驭空大人你在过度解读。
E: You are overinterpreting, Madam Yukong.

C: 既然大家都意识到码头的重要性，为何不向前一步，将金人巷打造成物流中心呢？
E: Since we all agree that the dock is vital to Aurum Alley's development, why not take things further and turn the Alley into a full-blown logistics hub?

C: 嗯…让小秘书再想想口号吧！我们去拍下一组。
E: Hmm, let's leave the slogan to Mingxi. We should head to the next location.

C: 我还没有准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 你们为什么会认为只有继续做「美食街」才算是金人巷复兴？
E: What makes you so determined to hold onto this idea of a "food street"? Why can't the revival of the Alley take on other forms?

C: 金人巷需要在历史的演进中抓住机遇，转变自己的职责。「金人巷」在公司选择的未来里，会成为最有分量的名字。
E: Aurum Alley needs to adapt and reimagine itself. The future that the IPC offers will ensure its name is known in the most remote corners of the galaxy.

C: 码头工人就必须和星际和平公司对立吗？
E: Does being a dock worker mean that person can't conspire with the IPC?

C: 好感动，原来你是这么好的人？
E: I'm touched. I guess you really are a good person after all?

C: 没想到，你竟然考验我？
E: I didn't expect you to test me.

C: …我真的得去休息了，头晕晕，好像要看到什么幻觉了…你要是准备好了告诉我一声。
E: I should get some rest. The world spins... Guess it won't take long before hallucination kicks in. Let me know when you are ready.

C: 辛苦你了，我听说后厨说你完全没有点错单，真是太厉害了。
E: Thanks for your hard work. I heard the chef say that you didn't mess up any orders at all, which was really amazing.

C: 但是后来我想通了，我还是想做我擅长的菜，我还想把我这小店开下去…所以，{NICKNAME}，小秘书，我就靠你们帮我把名声打响了。
E: But then later on, I figured out that I wanted to cook what I was good at, and I wanted to keep my little diner going... So, {NICKNAME}, and Miss Secretary: I hope you can help me make a name for myself.

C: 因为负责管理排期的卜官失算，原本应按时完成的占卜事项全都延误了。而那位卜者自知太卜大人生气后果很严重，大笔一挥，就把这些工作量试图转嫁到我们头上……
E: The diviner in charge of scheduling made a mistake, and all the divinations ended up getting delayed. And knowing how angry the master diviner would be, with a swipe of the pen, that diviner tried to frame us with that workload...

C: 公司为什么不能自己运营码头？
E: Why couldn't the IPC operate the dock from the beginning?

C: 明曦，接下来请讲讲商会对金人巷的规划与考虑。
E: Mingxi, please share with us what the guild has in mind.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 真是莫名其妙的。
E: Truth is stranger than fiction.

C: 让我想想如何给你举例……
E: Hmm, how to put it...

C: 地图里「同功坊」的数据是空白一片，劳烦你能再给我指指路吗？
E: The Artistry Hardware is another blank place on the map... Could you please navigate again for me?

C: 真是世风日下，咱累死累活的，倒是让那机巧鸟舒坦完了……
E: I'm working my tail off while that slumber-bot of a cycrane is slacking off...

C: 说起来…它今天又不见了，肯定是<color=#dbc291ff>躲在码头上</color>偷懒去了，但我实在忙得抽不开身，你能不能代我去找找它？让它赶紧回来干活。
E: Speaking of which... it's gone missing again today. I'm pretty sure it's taking a nap <color=#dbc291ff>down at the dock</color>, but I'm too busy to go looking for it myself. Could you track it down and give it a little nudge?

C: （两记下勾拳）
E: (Two hooks)

C: 您可以任意选择其一，与不同水平的选手对垒。只要您愿意，更可以将自己在全部赛事中的排名全部提升至第一，从而将赛季全部奖励收入囊中！
E: You can choose one of them and face off with opponents of different levels. You can even place first in all of the matches and take all the rewards of the season by yourself!

C: <size=36>{NICKNAME}！</size>
E: <size=36>{NICKNAME}!</size>

C: 的确非常刁钻…
E: That's quite a crafty subject...

C: 旁听
E: Listen

C: 哇！这个圆滚滚的东西是在玩滑梯吗？我也要去玩滑梯！
E: Wow! Is this round thing playing on a slide? I wanna play on a slide!

C: 哇！那是什么！
E: Wow! What's that thing!?

C: 咦？我帐篷呢？
E: Huh? Where's my tent?

C: 可是我就写了这一份，怎么可能之前提交过呢？我觉得这都是「大宇宙理论」分支的选择……
E: I just wrote this paper! How could it have been submitted before? This must've been the decision of the "big universe theory" branch...

C: （踹「它」一脚）
E: (Kick "it")

C: 这…大宇宙理论终究是败给了暴力的武器！
E: So... the big universe theory lost to weapons of violence!

C: 我懂了，你在交代背景设定。
E: Ha, I got it! You're now doing the exposition!

C: 我明白了…最后，您认为囚犯们改造美梦小镇的计划成功了吗？
E: I see... Lastly, do you believe the prisoners' plan to transform Dreamville would be successful?

C: 总之，希望您享受刚才的故事。如果您对这枚梦泡的玩法感兴趣，还可以考虑体验一下后续的「深层梦境」关卡。
E: Anyway, I hope you enjoy the experience! If you find the gameplay of this dream bubble fun, I'd suggest that you try the stage that follows: Deep Dreamscape.

C: 交流分析过后，哈努兄弟决定前往核心区域，一次将剩下的三把秘钥全搞到手。
E: After a detailed discussion and analysis, Brother Hanu decides to head to the core area and retrieve the remaining three keys in one fell swoop.

C: 好，请跟我来吧。记得表现得低调些，别太招摇……
E: Okay, please follow me. And remember to keep a low profile, as we don't want any attention...

C: 唔…晕，好晕，非常晕…我这小身板，真的经不住这种折腾……
E: Ugh... Dizzy, so dizzy... This puny body of mine really can't take much more of this torment...

C: 后来你跟加拉赫聊得还愉快吧？别看他老是漫不经心的样子，心里头埋着的事可多了。要不然，也不会成为这家酒吧的常客。
E: Did your conversation with Gallagher last time go well? He might look like he doesn't care about anything, but he actually has a lot on his mind. Otherwise, he wouldn't be a regular here.

C: 优秀的调饮师所需要具备的、最重要的技能，是聆听——<color=#dbc291ff>调饮…就是与客人对话的过程。</color>
E: The most crucial skill that a good drinksmith needs is listening... <color=#dbc291ff>Drinksmithing... is all about having conversations with your guests.</color>

C: 喂喂，你这也太抬举我了。
E: You're flattering me.

C: 调制饮品讲究创意，需要根据时机与客人们的喜好来制作独特的饮品。
E: A creative mind is key to mixing drinks. You need to come up with special blends based on the time and your customer's preferences.

C: …怎么样？嘀嗒嘀阁下？
E: ...How's it going, Lord Tik-Tok?

C: 我是不是在哪见过你？
E: Have we met somewhere?

C: 舒翁。现在最要紧的问题不是这个。
E: That's not the most urgent problem now, Siobhan.

C: 好丑的新年贺卡，还是退货吧！
E: What an ugly New Year card. I want to return it!

C: 想了解一下「银河强手棋」…
E: I wish to learn more about Cosmodyssey...

C: 说真的，看了您的作品，《狼之道》剧组那边都自愧不如了——他们领着工资都创作不出这么精彩的内容！
E: I gotta say, after seeing your work, the production crew of the Way of the Wolf had to admit they couldn't compete with the pulse-pounding content you made even as paid employees!

C: 您果然是一位极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: As expected, you're indeed a contestant with immense intellect and astuteness!

C: 这是线索，请仔细阅读。
E: Here's the clue. Please read it carefully.

C: 行行好，让它们全部消失吧！
E: Please, let them all disappear!

C: 出了什么问题？
E: What kind of issue?

C: 放心吧，等到这部影片成功上映，克劳克影业一定会重新崛起——到时候我们一定会拿出让您满意的报酬！
E: Don't worry. Clock Studios is bound to rise once this series hits the cinemas. We'll surely pay you handsomely when the time comes!

C: 该片为星际和平娱乐制作的引进作品，以「第二次帝皇战争」之后的宇宙为舞台，讲述了星际和平公司的年轻员工们操纵机甲，以琥珀王之名捍卫宇宙和平的故事。
E: This is a foreign film imported and produced by Interastral Peace Entertainment. The story is set in the universe after the occurrence of the Emperor's War II and centers around young IPC employees who pilot mechas to maintain galactic peace in the name of the Amber Lord.

C: 呵呵，无名客还真是像传闻中的一样乐于助人，克劳克影业最近的四部电影都是你帮忙制作的吧？
E: Heh, the Nameless are indeed as helpful as they are described! You helped with the production of the four films recently released by Clock Studios, didn't you?

C: 一滴、两滴、三滴…眼泪落在了信纸上。米莫萨仿佛忘记了周围还有人在，轻声念出了信的内容——
E: One, two, three drops... Tears fell onto the letter paper. At that moment, Mimosa seems to have forgotten the people around her as she softly verbalizes the letter's content...

C: 行了，以后再叙旧吧，现在最重要的事是让这部影片成功上映。
E: All right, we can always catch up later. What's important now is to get this movie successfully released.

C: 贵客，一起为「钟表匠」最后的作品画上句号吧，您准备好了吗？
E: My distinguished guest, let's finish up the Watchmaker's last work together. Are you ready?

C: 钟表小子来到美梦小镇、与镇民们共甘共苦、帮助美梦小镇发展壮大…这一系列故事都会被涵盖在这套影片之中，可以说是《钟表小子》至今以来的故事总集。
E: The series will delve into Clockie's arrival in Dreamville, his experiences of sharing life's ups and downs with the townspeople, and his contributions to the town's growth and development... It can be seen as a comprehensive collection of Clockie's story from the very beginning.

C: 请您理解，我方需要确保各品牌的露出时长。为此，我们准备了几位*特别参演*的广告牌。
E: I hope to seek your understanding. We need to ensure each brand gets enough air time. Hence, we've prepared several special actors' billboards.

C: 石头老板的工厂中藏有备用的火箭筒……我们会为你打掩护，快去拿火箭筒吧。
E: Boss Stone's factory has a spare rocket launcher hidden somewhere... We'll cover you. Go retrieve it!

C: 滴答…这里的空间越来越复杂了。
E: Tick-tock... This space is getting more convoluted.

C: 哈哈，好的，我明白你的意思了。
E: Haha, all right. I got you.

C: 这场是个战斗戏，<color=#dbc291ff>所有演员</color>都要入镜。
E: This is a fight scene. <color=#dbc291ff>All the actors</color> must be in the shot.

C: 你仔细端详这只折纸小鸟，发现它真的是被折纸做出来的道具。
E: You investigate this origami bird closely: It really is a prop folded from paper.

C: 无妨，您准备好再来找我。
E: That's fine. Come find me when you are.

C: 报酬呢？
E: What about the reward?

C: 拍摄广告的重任就拜托您了！
E: The task of shooting the commercial is now in your hands!

C: 有兴趣聊聊吗？
E: Wanna chat?

C: 我啥也不知道。
E: I don't know anything.

C: 啾，折纸小鸟正在休息…不要打扰我啾……
E: Tweet, Origami Bird is resting now... Stop bothering me...

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 喏，这份故事也给导演看看吧，不用谢！
E: Hey, this copy of the script is for you, director. You're welcome!

C: 还能有以前的味道吗？
E: Will it still be the same as before, though?

C: 没钱了…
E: I don't have any money...

C: 那我该怎么做呢？
E: So what should I do, then?

C: 你是真的流萤吗？
E: Are you really Firefly?

C: 你拍案而起，想让你知难而退？不可能！逐梦客可以被击倒，但不会被击败！
E: You slam the table and rise up. They think you'll back down? Impossible! Dreamchasers can be knocked down, but never knocked out.

C: 任何人都别想夺取我的苏乐达™！我将运用化龙妙法，化身为恐龙，嘎呜——！
E: None will take my SoulGlad™ away from me! I will use the Transmutation Arcanum to turn into a dinosaur! *rawrr*

C: 你在说什么？
E: What are you talking about?
...Hmph!

C: 这一定就是谜钟内心缺失的零件，太好了！
E: This must be one of the missing parts that Big Ticker needs. That's great!

C: 一个朋友。
E: A friend.

C: 你终于来了…直视「末日」之人——{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。我在此恭候多时了。
E: Finally, you're here... {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} — the one who looked at the Apocalypse in the eye. I've been waiting for you for a long time.

C: 闭上双眼，请让我为你溯洄，「终末」的投影……
E: Please close your eyes and let me help you with the backtracking to see Finality's projection...

C: 因为真实的体验遭到了潜意识的篡改。最为恐怖的体验并非存在于外部世界，而诞生于灵魂中。
E: Your subconscious has tampered with the real experience. The most terrifying experiences do not exist in the outside world but within one's soul.

C: 进入「奇珍琳琅」
E: Enter Priceless Jewels

C: 尼斯的人们偶尔会想起那个海洋耸立而起，吞下他们文明的日子。
E: From time to time, the people of Neese will recall the day the towering waves rose from the ocean and engulfed their civilization.

C: 这个世界幸运被透支。虽然没毁于战火，却溺毙在灰色的海啸中。
E: The world had overdrawn its fortune. It wasn't destroyed by the war but was drowned in the gray tsunami waves.

C: 送他台咕咕钟。
E: Gift him a cuckoo clock.

C: 确实，不愧是咱家的三月七。
E: Indeed. That's our March!

C: 我也曾问过那名剑术高手为何挥剑，她说「为杀敌而挥剑，仅此而已」。三月小姐竟然给出了相似的回复，看来你确有天赋。
E: I also questioned that sword master about why she uses her sword, and she said: "...to vanquish my enemies, nothing more." Miss March, you gave a similar response, which shows you've got potential.

C: 一个人将他的刀剑当作他的上帝。当他的刀剑胜利时他自己却失败了。
E: If a swordmaster is to see their blade as their god, then when the blade takes victory, it is them who taste defeat.

C: 第一流剑手的先决条件，就是永远保留一只眼睛看自己。
E: A prerequisite for becoming a top swordmaster is to always keep one eye on oneself.

C: 别着急呀，我怎么可能会忘了打赌这种事呢？
E: Oh, come on, how could I say no to a bet?

C: 靠着气势，你只能努力三天。靠着严格的计划，你才能坚持下去。
E: Momentum alone will only keep you going for about three days. If you really want to stick with it, you need a solid plan.

C: 这句话也是幻戏里的？
E: Is that another line from an immersia?

C: 嘿嘿，我说过，我是越夸越会优秀的类型嘛。
E: Hehe, I told you compliments make me better.

C: 你们等着瞧吧，本大爷会让斯科特洗心革面，诚心诚意地认输，你说这痛快不痛快！
E: Just wait and see. I'll make Skott change his mind and admit defeat wholeheartedly. What do you say?

C: 幸好我们是友军。
E: Good thing you're on our side.

C: 啊、啊啊啊！三月小姐坚持住，我这就把灵符拿出来…！
E: Ah, ahhhh! Hang in there Miss March, I'll get the talisman out right now...!

C: 斯科特，你完蛋了。
E: Skott, you won't get away with this.

C: 欺负个小姑娘，值得你这么得意吗？
E: Do you feel proud of yourself, bullying a young girl like this?

C: 一滴冰冷的泪珠，终于裹挟着强忍不住的悲伤，从男人的眼角，滑落。
E: A single drop of icy tear, finally succumbing to uncontainable sorrow, escapes from the corner of the man's eye.

C: 椒丘派遣貊泽给斯科特一行人猛下泻药，你们不费吹灰之力取得了剑斗的胜利。
E: Jiaoqiu dispatches Moze to administer a strong laxative to Skott and his group, allowing you to effortlessly secure victory in the sword duel.

C: 私人的数据？我、我听不懂你在说什么。
E: Private data? I—I have no idea what you're talking about.

C: 本姑娘叫三月七，至于这位嘛…{F#她}{M#他}每次自我介绍都有新花样，还是让{F#她}{M#他}自己说吧……
E: I'm March 7th, and as for this one... {F#She's}{M#He's} always coming up with something new. Might as well let {F#her}{M#him} do the self-introduction...

C: 要是那个时候三月小姐也需要我的帮助，我会来帮忙的……
E: When the time comes, if you also require my help, I shall do so, Miss March...

C: 哟，你们来得正好，公输师傅帮我把报废「金人司阍」翻出来了…可惜，别说「机械灵魂」了，它现在连最基础的「程序」都没有。
E: Hey, perfect timing. Master Gongshu has found the scrapped Aurumaton Gatekeeper for me... Unfortunately, it has lost even its most basic programs, not to mention its Mechanical Soul.

C: …我来就我来。
E: ...Fine.

C: 等等，你知道规矩的。
E: Hold on. You know the rules.

C: 正是，你太懂规矩了。
E: Precisely, I knew you knew how this works.

C: 「想要练成九十九阳神功，且保留人形，这是有可能的……」
E: "It is possible to master the Ninety-Nine Yang Incantation whilst still maintaining your human form..."

C: 所以我将我的职业和兴趣爱好做了个结合，来到了仙舟进行我的毕业研究。
E: So, I have combined this passion of mine with my path in life and come to Xianzhou to complete my graduate research.

C: 拍的不错，朋友。
E: Some fine photos, my friend.

C: 这可是个好消息，这说明我之前花掉的预算有着落了！
E: This is great news! That means I managed to get the budget I spent back!

C: 布洛妮娅笑了笑，开始回忆你们同心协力、共同拯救贝洛伯格的旅程……
E: Bronya laughs softly and begins to reminisce about how your hearts were aligned and your efforts were united on your journey to save Belobog together...

C: 以后，它们应该不会再来骚扰你们了。
E: I don't think they'll be back to bother you again in the future.

C: 半个时辰后
E: Half a dual-hour later

C: 呃…卡美丽小姐，为什么你的梦想如此令人同情……
E: Oh man... Miss Carmella, why is your dream making me tear up too...

C: 你说的不错…托帕是什么样的人，我应该亲自确认。
E: You're right ... You're right... I should find out what kind of person Topaz is for myself.

C: 蓝方是来自贝洛伯格代表队的——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: In the blue corner, representing Team Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 打伤纯良云骑的凶手。
E: The thug who beat up the kind Cloud Knights.

C: 你真够磨蹭的，快点！
E: Stop wasting time! Hurry up!

C: 我就知道是尾巴想念我。
E: I knew Tail missed me.

C: 你还想荣归故里，扬名立万？做梦吧！你根本就赢不了！快跑！你难道不怕死吗！
E: You're still thinking of bringing glory back home, to have your name exalted? Dream on! You absolutely can't win! Run! Are you not afraid of death!?

C: 你肯定能赢的。
E: I'm sure you'll win.

C: 你不相信我能赢，所以也参加了演武仪典，来增加贝洛伯格代表队获胜的可能性，对吧？
E: You don't believe I can win, so you came here to boost the chances of team Belobog winning the Wardance, right?

C: 你的计算有误，卢卡。基于数学概率，你的获胜机会——未知。
E: Your calculation is erroneous, Luka. Mathematically speaking, your chance of winning is unknown.

C: 卢卡！卢卡！卢卡！卢卡！
