E: I was trying to move you out of my tea house... but now that you've woken up, I guess everything is okay.

C: 转型有风险，商业需谨慎。
E: This would be a risky leap. Think twice before you act.

C: ……你在马桶上坐了很久，什么也没有发生，看来你找的不对。
E: ...You've been sitting for a long time and nothing has happened. Looks like you're in the wrong place.

C: 对对对，我们很感兴趣——那，我们在哪里可以体验到这款游戏？
E: That's right! Any idea where we can give it a spin?

C: 为了让重新焕发生机的雅利洛-Ⅵ更快赶上流行趋势，竞技协会特意选择了这颗星球……
E: The Aetherium Wars Gaming Association specifically chose this planet to help rejuvenate it and bring it up to date with the latest trends...

C: 乔瓦尼先生！是您吗？
E: Mr. Giovanni, is that you?

C: 以上就是我所能提供的全部信息了。你还有任何疑问吗？
E: That's all I can share about that at the moment. Is there anything else you'd like to know?

C: 嗯…我明白了，这大概是某种数据异常导致的结果。
E: Hmm... I see. They're likely acting this way due to some sort of data anomaly or discrepancy.

C: 就叫它「毛球」吧。
E: I've got it! Let's call them "Puffball!"

C: 没事，我们一起慢慢想。
E: No problem, take your time.

C: 决胜乐园里还有几座类似的灯炉，你们只要把它们全部点亮，就可以顺利来到我和希露瓦面前，向我们发起挑战。
E: You'll find several lamps like this around the Victory Zone. Once you've illuminated all of them, seek out me and Serval. We'll be ready to throw down the gauntlet!

C: 次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神现在可是我们的伙伴，怎么可能随便交给你们这种人！
E: Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is like family now! Why would we just hand them over to someone like you?

C: 得心应手！
E: Things couldn't be better. We're in our element!

C: 大人！冤枉啊！
E: O great one! We surrender! Pray take mercy on us!

C: 身为庆典的全权赞助人，以及《以太战线》的忠实玩家，我只想保证一件事……
E: In my capacity as the sole sponsor of the event and a devoted player of Aetherium Wars, there's one thing I wish to ensure...

C: 行了行了，搞快点。要搞那个什么——对决，是吧？
E: Alright, alright, hurry it up. We're here for that — what's it called again — duel, right?

C: 这样…真的没问题吗？
E: Are you sure that's alright?

C: 哼…哼哼，哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink! Oink!

C: 终于要结束了…
E: It's finally going to be over...

C: 怎么会这样……
E: Oh no...

C: 多谢两位不杀之恩！
E: Long live the director and lead researcher!

C: 啊，「向导」要走了，我们快跟上！
E: Hey, the guide is on the move, let's keep up!

C: 在<color=#dbc291ff>矿区大桥底部</color>侦测到数个可驱散目标，正在为您调用「自动机兵•蜘蛛」操作权限——
E: Multiple dispersible targets detected <color=#dbc291ff>at bottom of mine bridge</color>. Granting operation access to Automaton Spider.

C: 嘿嘿，不愧是我们～
E: Hehe, for once!

C: 恭喜二位！「决胜乐园『大矿区』」的危机已经解除——现在，两位已经可以向冠军候补发起挑战了！
E: Congratulations! The Great Mine Victory Zone crisis has been resolved — you may now challenge the championship contender!

C: 你们的热情真是太耀眼了！身为这届庆典的全权赞助人，以及这座决胜乐园的<color=#dbc291ff>冠军候补</color>，我可真是太欣慰了！
E: Your enthusiasm is truly unmatched! As the sponsor of this event, and this Victory Zone's <color=#dbc291ff>championship contender</color>, it brings me great joy to see you here!

C: 哈哈哈，我不能再多说了。如果你们想要了解真相，就收下这枚资格徽章吧。
E: Haha, I can't reveal anymore. If you want to know the truth, you must first take this Mastery Mark.

C: 加油，目标是找到高手玩家！
E: Alright! Let's go find this elusive Elite Player!

C: 刚才那个呜呜伯看起来好可怜…好在意它们到底遇到什么事情了……
E: That Wubbaboo looked so upset. What happened to it...

C: 诶？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也在玩《以太战线》吗？
E: Oh? You're playing "Aetherium Wars" too, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?

C: 《以太战线》还真是有趣，自从离开家乡之后，已经很久没有认真玩过电子游戏了。
E: "Aetherium Wars" really is fun. Since I left home, it's been ages since I've gotten serious about a video game.

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}，又见面了，可别因为赢过我们一次就大意了哦！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, we meet again! Don't get cocky just because you beat us once before!

C: 明明庆典都结束了，还得打什么表演赛，真是烦人……
E: The festival is clearly over, now I have to fight some exhibition match? What a pain...

C: 不会都是些破烂吧？
E: It's not just a load of trash, right?

C: 她不是这样的人。
E: I don't think that's her style.

C: 这种游戏总会让我想起家乡的故事。在我还年轻的时候，我也曾在电视机里看过类似题材的作品。
E: Games like these always stir up childhood memories. I remember watching similar TV shows back when I was just a kid.

C: 哼？哼哼！哼？
E: Oink? Oink! Oink?

C: 真的好想揍它…
E: Can we destroy Cirrus already?

C: 腾骁将军是我敬重的前辈，我克绍箕裘，自然不能旁观坐视。人家指明了要见罗浮的将军，那我就会会它。
E: General Teng Xiao is a venerated predecessor. If I am to honor his legacy, then sitting idly by is not an option. If an audience with the general of the Luofu is requested, then I will honor such a request.

C: 十小队！这是被派来负责巡街应对各种突发事件的云骑治安第十小队！两位懂吧，就是专派些愣头青去干苦差事的那种小队。
E: The Tenth Squad! Cloud Knight Security Squad Ten, to be precise, hehe... We patrol the streets and respond to all kinds of unexpected incidents! It's grunt work, essentially...

C: 十王司的判官既不打算抛弃自己的同僚，又不打算放我离开。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission judges won't abandon one of their own... but they won't let me off the hook either.

C: 但是尾巴不太像敌人。
E: But Tail doesn't seem like an enemy.

C: 小桂子这个人很跳脱，但这只是因为她思维活跃…办起正经事来，她还是相当可靠的。
E: Little Gui's methods can be a little unorthodox, but that's just because she has a vivid imagination... When it comes to getting things done, she's actually pretty reliable.

C: 阿露，咱们俩逃，只要不被这些坏大人抓到，我就把好吃的好喝的统统变给你！
E: Lulu, let's make a run for it — if we escape from them, I'll conjure up all of your favorite snacks and drinks!

C: 让我开开心心玩一会儿不好吗！
E: Can't you just let me have some fun!?

C: 白露预判了你堵死路的想法，只要她跑得快，就可以为所欲为。
E: Bailu anticipated your attempt to block her path, but as long as she runs fast enough, she can do whatever she wants.

C: 按照将军与你所立的约定，一场胜利换一个问题。
E: One victory equals one question... don't forget the agreement you made with the general.

C: 里面情况怎么样？
E: What's the situation inside?

C: {NICKNAME}，别被她言中了！总会有其他选择的！
E: {NICKNAME}, don't let her words get to you! There are always other options!

C: …青雀小姐？
E: ...Miss Qingque?

C: 「食客恶鬼缠身闯进餐厅暴饮暴食吃下体重一倍的食物！」…有没有可能是尾巴干的？像它的作风……
E: "Diner haunted! Evil spirit breaks into restaurant and eats double its body weight in food!" ...Do you think Tail did this? Seems like his style...

C: 尾巴真是日理万机，啥坏事都跟它搭上边了。
E: The problem is, any suspicious incident could be Tail-related when you think about it...

C: 这不是为了保护你们三位嘛…藿藿小姐需要人保护；而小桂子你一个普通群众…犯不着冒这么大的风险；至于{NICKNAME}吗，也是神策府的贵客，要是有个三长两短，可算是外交事件了…
E: Maybe, but my actions kept everyone safe, and that's what matters! Miss Huohuo needed someone to look out for her, and Little Gui is just a civilian — you shouldn't be putting yourself in risky situations. As for {NICKNAME}, {M#he's}{F#she's} a distinguished guest of the Seat of Divine Foresight — if anything were to happen to {M#him}{F#her}, it could turn into a diplomatic crisis.

C: 「熔炬」？那个岁阳的名字叫做「熔炬」？
E: Apyra? That heliobus's name is Apyra?

C: 尾巴消失以后，我本以为自己会被辞退的。但不知为何……总之，我一定尽力而为，不给大家拖后腿！
E: After Tail disappeared, I thought for sure the Commission would ask me to resign, but for some reason... A—Anyway, I'll do my best to carry out my duties!

C: 知不知道两说，但在流云渡那儿却有我的同族等着她，嘻嘻嘻！
E: Maybe I do, maybe I don't. But I have no doubt about one thing: My friends are ready and waiting for her in Cloudford!

C: 毕竟有些人为了吸引流量，真是什么瞎话都能编得出来。
E: After all, some people will make up all kinds of nonsense to attract attention.

C: 这么做确实高效。
E: Does sound kinda effective...

C: 抓捕岁阳的行动被咱们渲染成一个个抓人眼球的娱乐视频。人们也会对类似的事件半信半疑，恐慌情绪一下子就消失了！
E: We'll turn the entire heliobi-hunting process into regular uploads. Viewers will see that there's nothing that scary about it, and there won't be any public panic!

C: 稍等一下。
E: Just a minute.

C: 眼下不能放着这些被夺舍之人不管，彦卿便陪着他们去医馆了～咱们之后再见～
E: Now, we cannot leave these victims unattended, I shall escort them to the apothecary~ May we meet again~

C: 话又说回来，回家…有这么大的诱惑吗？
E: Getting back on topic... when did going home... become so tempting?

C: …嗯。不会耽误很久的，我、我一会就赶过来……
E: ...Yeah. It won't take very long. I—I'll be there real soon...

C: 走吧，我、我们问个清楚！
E: L—Let's go. We c—can only ask!

C: （文远已经彻底被岁阳「若昔」迷惑了，用「同心火铃」试试看吧。）
E: (Wenyuan is already completely enraptured by the heliobus — Ruoxi. Try using the Harmonic Chime.)

C: 不行，你们不可以这样做！我不会让你将我们二人分开！
E: No, you cannot do this! I won't let you separate us!

C: 回首过去，我的一生只有蹉跎。而今向前看，我已幡然悔悟！
E: Looking back on my life, I see all I have done is waste time. However, looking to my future, I regret this greatly.

C: 这根本不是帝垣琼玉！
E: This is not Celestial Jade!

C: 就像是有人注意到了你正盯着通缉令，一块异色的石头在你眼前掉在了地上。
E: A strangely-colored stone falls down before your eyes, as if someone has noticed you looking at the wanted poster.

C: 和这个九宫格的数字有什么关系呢？
E: What does this have to do with the numbers in a nine-square grid?

C: 所以，那个…雷诺是怎么回事呢？
E: So... What's the deal with that Renault?

C: 你觉得我该如何处置你？
E: What do you think I should do with you?

C: 嗯，走吧，我也有点在意。
E: Yeah, let's go. I wanna know, too.

C: 上次在流云渡的就是她！
E: The girl in the Cloudford last time — it's her!

C: 记得记得，编故事骗你那个？
E: Yeah, I remember. The one who made up those stories to trick you — what about her?

C: 抱歉，是我方才太激动了，说了半天没说到正事上。是这样的，我想拜托你来参加这个专项测试。
E: Sorry, I got carried away just now and kept beating around the bush. Okay, here's the thing: I would like you to take this special gland test.

C: 谢谢，你们自己玩吧。
E: Thanks — you guys have fun without me.

C: 这样的话…它们之间就能减少分歧与摩擦。你只需要教会它们使用不同功能分区就行。
E: This way... any differences or friction between them can be gradually reduced. You just need to teach them how to use the different areas.

C: （这个区域光照充足，还有舒服的抱枕……）
E: (This area has plenty of light, and comfy cushions...)

C: 什么事？
E: What is it?

C: {NICKNAME}，我还有很多故事可以讲给你听。
E: {NICKNAME}, I've got many more stories I could tell you.

C: 是吧！在下就料到您会喜欢它。
E: Indeed! I knew you'd take a liking to it.

C: 您有空时，多去找它聊聊天吧…在下平时工作比较忙，也担心让它太寂寞。既然它唯独肯和您对话，那也许它还挺喜欢您的呢。
E: When you have the time, spare some time and chat with it more... I often find myself busy with work, and I fear it grows lonely. Seeing as it only chats with you, perhaps it has taken a liking to you?

C: 这鸟太有意思了！
E: This bird is really fascinating!

C: 真不把我上次教你的东西当回事啊，说话时要低下头，双手摆正，抬起眼睛看我！
E: Looks like you've failed to take heed of the lessons I taught you. When you speak, bow your head, extend your hands, and look up to me!

C: （被舒翁狠狠地瞪了一眼……）
E: (Siobhan just gave me a black look...)

C: 「你必须到达<color=#dbc291ff>那个房间</color>。」
E: "You must reach <color=#dbc291ff>that room</color>."

C: （…喂，所以那天你到底做了什么啊？）
E: (...So, what exactly did you do back then?)

C: 汪！不要动手哇！
E: Woof! Please don't do that!

C: 我在商店新买的收音机，送给你？
E: I bought a new radio at the store. Want it?

C: 四加二减三的结果…是大还是小？
E: Four plus two minus three... is the result big or small?

C: …款式够精致，和整体的氛围也很搭，看起来终于有点酒吧的样子了。
E: ...The design is sophisticated, and it fits well with the overall atmosphere. Finally, it's starting to look like a lounge.

C: 小星星…小星星，请问你会眨眼睛吗？一闪一闪，亮晶晶的那种哈哈哈哈！
E: Starlet... Do you twinkle, Starlet? Twinkle, twinkle, little star... Hahahaha!

C: 汪！舒翁…你的声音听起来好疲惫哇。
E: Woof! Siobhan... you sound tired.

C: （这时候的舒翁…确实看起来很累的样子。）
E: (Siobhan... does look exhausted.)

C: 再给我来杯饮料！这次我要…<color=#dbc291ff>大杯！苦的！超强烈！</color>小的能喝，大的也能喝！大小都一样！没毛病！
E: Give me another drink! This time, I want... <color=#dbc291ff>a large glass! Bitter! And super strong! </color>Small or large, I'll drink 'em all! They're all the same! No problem!

C: 愿我们能在有光的地方再次相遇。
E: May we meet again where there is light.

C: 嘻嘻，果然和人家预想得差不多，是位看起来就非常有意思，很适合聊天的对象呢。
E: Hee-hee, just as I thought, you seem like a fascinating person to chat with.

C: 和您聊天的感觉真畅快。在人家看来，您作为调饮师的魅力不会输舒翁太多，很厉害啦。
E: It was nice talking to you. In my opinion, you're almost as great a drinksmith as Siobhan. Impressive, indeed.

C: 对我有好处吗？
E: What's in it for me?

C: 呼…消消气。喝得差不多，但我要说的还没完。你打算在这家酒吧工作多久？到底还要过多长时间我才会见不到你？
E: Well... I've calmed down a bit. I've almost finished my drink, but I'm not done talking. How long are you intending to work at this lounge? How long do I have to wait if I don't want to see your face again?

C: 该乘胜追击！
E: Seize the chance while you have it!

C: 舒翁和你交代了些什么，要好好修复我们？
E: What did Siobhan tell you? To fix us up?

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 你是不是还漏了一个？
E: Have you forgotten someone?

C: …你自顾自地说了很多话。
E: ...You said a lot of things to yourself.

C: 梦境酒店不是被家族封锁了？
E: But isn't the hotel in the Dreamscape sealed off by The Family?

C: 对，我应该说过，但也只是*曾经*。「美梦剧团」是为宾客服务的道具，哪位客人会愿意和一群随时可能发狂的怪物相处呢？
E: Yeah. I mentioned that before, but *not anymore*. The Sweet Dreams Troupe members are props entertaining the guests. No guest would want to hang out with a bunch of monsters that could go wild at any moment.

C: 所以后来我就失业啦，只能待在这个酒吧里——照顾这群变得奇怪的孩子们。
E: So, I lost my job and could only stay in this lounge... taking care of these quirky kids.

C: 喝饱咯！该走咯！感谢你的接待，下次见！
E: I'm full from drinking! I should get going! Thank you for your service. See you next time!

C: 呀！味道真是好，您还是这么懂人家的心呢。
E: Ah! The taste is fantastic. You know me inside out.

C: 汪！没什么想说的了，还是继续喝饮料吧，想来杯<color=#dbc291ff>微甜</color>的饮料！你能做到吗？
E: Woof! There's nothing much to say. Better just continue drinking. I want a <color=#dbc291ff>slightly sweet</color> drink! Can you do it?

C: 汪！你终于明白了！但想通只是开始，最重要的是要付诸行动哇！
E: Woof! You finally get it! But getting it is only the beginning. What's most important is that you take action!

C: （开始调制）
E: (Start preparing the drink)

C: 越来越搞不懂这些年轻人…算咯，他们开心就好……
E: Seems like I'm getting more and more out of touch with these young folks... Well, as long as they're happy, that's what matters...

C: 汪    汪汪  汪
E: Woof    WoofWoof  Woof

C: 现在是「我是佩佩」的困难难度。
E: This is the Hard difficulty for I Am Peppy, tweet.

C: 不会吧，你不会真的以为我会帮你还钱吧。我是说…我知道有个发财的地。
E: Are you kidding me? You didn't really think I was going to help you pay off your debt? I was saying... I know a place where you can strike it rich.

C: 凭什么你是初号机？
E: Who died and made you Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>?

C: 哇，好可爱…真不愧是本姑娘的专属小鸟，简直就是鸟中美少女嘛！
E: Wow, it's so cute! That's a bird befitting of a girl like me, alright! It's a beauty even among birds, no doubt about it!

C: 你也会徒手接子弹？
E: You can catch bullets with your bare hands too?

C: 好可爱啊…{NICKNAME}、银狼，谢谢你们！我非常喜欢。
E: It's so cute. Thank you, {NICKNAME}, Silver Wolf! I love it.

C: 在回去船上之前，我可能需要做些简单的变装。
E: Before I return to the ship, I may need to disguise myself for a bit.

C: 这…你这变装变得连种族都不一样了啊？
E: This... you've changed so much that even your species is different now?

C: 我相信托帕小姐的善意，但…贝洛伯格是否准备好接受公司的善意，又应当如何接受公司的善意…这我真的不知道，一时也拿不定主意。
E: While I trust Miss Topaz's intentions, I'm... not sure if Belobog is ready to accept the IPC's offer, or how we should accept that offer... I can't make a decision right now.

C: 蠢就是坏！这两者有什么区别吗？
E: Naive is just as bad! What's the difference?

C: 停！都别说了！停！停！都闭嘴！
E: Stop! Everyone stop talking! Stop! Stop! Just shut up!

C: 卢卡，公司到底给了你多少钱啊？和大家说说呗？
E: Luka, how much money did the IPC give you? Tell us about it!

C: 你简单地讲了讲卢卡遭遇的困境。
E: You briefly describe the predicament Luka is facing.

C: 你们在这里稍微休息一下吧。要是一直处在备赛的紧张状态中，对身体也不好～
E: Rest here for a bit. Being in a constant state of pre-competition tension isn't good for your health.

C: 卢卡选手，我觉得你刚才应该接受托帕小姐的帮助…{NICKNAME}教练，你怎么看？
E: Luka, I think you should have accepted Miss Topaz's help... Coach {NICKNAME}, what's your take?

C: 看来比赛的结果已经尘埃落定！本场比赛的胜利者，乃是万众瞩目的超级巨星、磐岩的冠军——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: It seems the outcome of the match is settled! The winner of the match, the superstar in the spotlight, and the champion from Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 「嘿，朋友，你就不好奇，我这儿有什么刺激的游戏吗？」游戏机无声地向你发出邀请。
E: "Hey, friend. Aren't you curious about what kind of exciting games I have here?" The arcade machine silently invites you.

C: 提问：关于「不可知域」产生的原因，是否找到了有益的线索？
E: Question: Were there any useful clues discovered regarding the cause of the Unknowable Domain?

C: 来临了，「派对时刻」！不过只有您一位无名客，恐怕是开不成的。还是下次吧。
E: It's Party Time! ...You're the only Nameless here. We can't start a party with only one person. Perhaps next time, then.

C: 愿此行，终抵群星。
E: May this journey lead us starward.

C: 好吧，列车长只能尊重表决结果了帕…但不管怎么说！{NICKNAME}乘客，欢迎你成为「无名客」！
E: Well, if you all are absolutely certain... As the conductor, Pom-Pom can only respect the results of the vote. In any case, welcome, {NICKNAME}, our newest member of the Nameless!

C: 我都忘了自己有房间了。
E: I forgot that I have my own room now.

C: 做出的每个「选择」，都将使我们奔赴一个难以预料的「结果」。
E: Every "choice" we make leads us to an unpredictable "outcome."

C: 你闭上眼，一饮而尽。这杯咖啡的味道……
E: You close your eyes and take a deep sip. The taste of this coffee...

C: （玄关是住宅的门面，得装修得气派一些。）
E: (The entryway is the face of the home, so it should be decorated with a bit of flair.)

C: 「卫生之星」有什么奖励吗？
E: Is there a prize for being a Hygiene Star?

C: 这可是「博识学会」和「技术研发部」通力合作推出的重磅产品呢！据说还有位著名的天才教授参与了研发！据说用了这个入浴剂，泡完澡会变聪明！
E: This is a major product jointly developed by the Intelligentsia Guild and the IPC's Technology Department! It is said that a renowned genius professor was involved in its development! Supposedly, using this bath soak will make you smarter after a bath!

C: 没问题～星际和平商城的优惠狂欢季可吓人了，咱俩得携手杀出一条血路！
E: No problem! The discounts and deals at the Interastral Peace Mall are crazy. We'll need to team up and fight our way through!

C: 我要洗澡了，请你出去。
E: I'm gonna take a bath. Please leave.

C: 你想入伙吗，英雄？只要得手，我们就会成为新时代的开拓者。保准赚个盆满钵满！
E: Do you want to join in, hero? If we get our hands on it, we will surely become the trailblazers of the new era! Great fortune is awaiting us!

C: 行。
E: Fine.

C: 再等等。
E: Maybe later.

C: …你比我还激动。你才是真正的「探险家」！
E: Looks like you're even more excited by this prospect than me... You are indeed a true "explorer"!

C: ——最后一个萨白尼人。
E: —— The Last Sabanian

C: 喂它点别的。
E: Try feeding it something else.

C: 嘿嘿，真的是一家人了呢。
E: Hehe, you're really one family now.

C: 为什么我能听懂它的话？
E: Why am I able to understand it?

C: 呜嗡…（我懂的，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，这种时候就该自卖自夸一番！）
E: Grumph... (I get it, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. Now's the time to hype myself up a little!)

C: …接受现实吧。
E: ...Just accept it already.

C: 它吃坏肚子了而已。
E: It just has an upset stomach.

C: 这次的实习也顺利完成了。你看向，它脸上正洋溢着夹杂兴奋和疲惫的光彩。
E: The internship wrapped up smoothly. Looking at it, you see its face beaming with a mix of exhilaration and fatigue.

C: 呜嗡，呜嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡嗡！
E: Grumph, grumphhh... grumphhhh!

C: 呜嗡，嗡…（那个，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我想找个地方钻进去了…）
E: Grumphhh, Grumph... (Um, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I kinda wanna crawl into a hole and hide from everyone...)

C: 土块？
E: A clump of dirt?

C: 呜嗡——（嘿嘿，被发现啦。）
E: Grumph— (Hehe, busted.)

C: 旅团放假了吗？
E: Is the troupe on vacation these days?

C: 恭喜你，{NICKNAME}，经过七日的学习，你已经是个合格的鉴宝师了！
E: Congratulations, {NICKNAME}, after a week of training, you're now a certified appraiser!

C: 您不记得我们也是正常的，重要的是这个宝贝——
E: It's fine if you don't remember us. What really matters is this treasure right here—

C: 哪里哪里，是布凯辛前辈在跟进，我在旁边学习，顺便给前辈打下手这样。
E: Oh, not really, Grumpy is taking the lead. I'm just learning on the side and helping out where I can.

C: 你到底是什么东西？
E: What the heck are you?

C: 万物皆有联系，那些不能看清它的人被称为{RUBY_B#凡人}沉睡者{RUBY_E#}，而仲裁官可以干涉联系，让一切归于均衡。
E: All things are connected. Those who cannot see these connections are called {RUBY_B#mortals}Slumberers{RUBY_E#}, while Arbitrators can intervene in these connections to restore the Equilibrium.

C: 零和的关键不在胜负。无论你取得何种结果，都能促使天平归位。
E: The key to zero-sum isn't about winning or losing. Whatever outcome you achieve, it will always help restore balance to the scales.

C: 宝物？
E: Treasure?

C: 阿格莱雅，好久不见。
E: It's been a while, Aglaea.

C: 小灰！快点快点，你看，小妖精们早早就在餐馆门口排队啦。
E: Little Gray! Hurry up! Look, the fairies are already lining up outside the restaurant!

C: 这个…恐怕不太行。评审结果由我与另外两位代表投票得出，我没法独自决定。
E: That... I'm afraid I can't. The results are determined by a vote between me and the two fairy judges. I can't decide it alone.

C: …原来如此。希望以后还能有机会，继续品尝白厄阁下的菜品。
E: ...Understood. I look forward to the chance to taste more of your dishes, Lord Phainon.

C: 呵。依我看，当前位置明显是偏左了。
E: Heh. If you ask me, it's clearly too far left now.

C: 对对！主题活动，果然还是{NICKNAME}见多识广呀。
E: Yes! Themed events! I knew {NICKNAME} would get it!

C: 出现这个结果好像也正常？
E: I kinda feel this is to be expected?

C: 呼…装修完成。大家来看看餐馆的新门面吧。
E: Phew... Renovations are finally done. Come check out the restaurant's new look!

C: ——迷！迷迷！白厄主厨，你菜刀尖闪动的光芒，就是我此生不变的信仰！
E: Mem! Memem! Chef Phainon, the glint of your kitchen knife is the light that guides my soul!

C: 「主厨角斗」正火热进行。究竟是来自悬锋城的烹饪大师，万敌主厨更胜一筹……
E: The "Chef Showdown" is heating up! Will Chef Mydei from Castrum Kremnos rise to the top...

C: 还是在哀丽秘榭主场作战的白厄主厨更能征服顾客的味蕾……
E: ...or will Chef Phainon, fighting on home turf here in Aedes Elysiae, win over the crowd?

C: 支持白厄。
E: I'm backing Phainon.

C: 迷迷！感谢店长的回答。那么，现在就有请副店长，为我们宣布竞赛的结果迷！
E: Memem! Thank you, owner! Now, let's bring in our deputy owner to reveal the results, mem!

C: 遐蝶小姐不用拘束，按你心中的想法给出评价即可。
E: No need to hold back, Miss Castorice. Just speak from your heart.

C: 不打算给大家说说理由吗？
E: Aren't you gonna tell us why?

C: 但似乎…这并非各位想要的结果。
E: But... I get the feeling that's not the answer everyone's looking for.

C: 是啊！我怎么就没想到。农作物体型极难突破品种限制，但若是使用炼金技术，将多个作物联结乃至融合起来，或许便能创造不可能之物！
E: That's it! Why didn't I think of that? Plants rarely exceed their natural size limits, but through alchemy, we could connect or even merge multiple crops to create something extraordinary!

C: ——至是，工程已毕，感到高兴吧，我找到了突破农作物固有限制的方法！
E: Behold, my work is complete! Rejoice, for I have discovered how to break through crops' natural size limits!

C: 但先说清楚，招待小动物吃饭这种琐事，我不想管，以及……
E: But to be clear, I have no interest in mundane tasks like feeding small animals, and also...

C: 那是你的力气不够。
E: That's what happens when you lack proper strength.

C: 呵。若是能助你尽情享受这片刻沉醉，作如此定性又有何妨呢？
E: Ha... If that philosophy helps you indulge in a moment of delight, so be it.

C: 店长若是空闲，不妨提前做好规划。
E: If you've got time, best start planning ahead.

C: 嗯…似乎确有这个称呼。但我所做的，无非是帮妖精们解决了些积攒的果物。
E: Hmm... That title does ring a bell. All I did was help the fairies clear their backlog of fruits. Nothing more than that.

C: 其中某位乖张的行事风格，我也略有耳闻。但有何妨？只要能为餐馆所用，保证农作物的丰收便已足够。
E: I've heard whispers about one of them having a rather eccentric disposition, but does it matter? So long as they serve the restaurant well and ensure a bountiful harvest, that's all we need.

C: 万帷网还需专人维护，店长若有事，可随时来此处寻我。
E: The World Wound Web still needs ongoing maintenance anyway. If anything comes up, you know where to find me.

C: 你们都叫我「店长」？
E: Why are you all calling me "manager"?

C: 男人寡言少语，\n但他的事迹广为流传。
E: Despite being a man of few words,\nnews of his deeds had traveled far and wide.

C: 目视在山林中并不可信，\n自少年起，\n他便通过气味分辨来者，因而得益。
E: One's sight serves falsehoods in the woods.\nHe has relied on scent since young\nTo distinguish guests and obtain gains.

C: 「真无礼！」 孩童轻轻敲打我的脑门。 「好好思考童谣作者的良苦用心呀！」
E: "How rude!" The child gently flicks my forehead. "You should be reflecting on the nursery rhyme author's heartfelt intentions instead!"

C: 她翻越万千门径，\n将奋力燃烧，再次照亮人心。
E: She travels through myriad passages,\nBurning with determination, to once again bring light to humans through her endeavor.

C: 彼时轻风温暖和煦，\n彼时死亡柔软甘甜。
E: On that day, the breeze was warm and gentle.\nAt that time, death was soft and fair.

C: 多洛斯的城郊，\n一个小小的织坊。
E: In Dolos' suburbs,\nIn a tiny weaving workshop.

C: 在废墟、荒野和灰烬中，\n智械的投影向你致以问候。
E: Amidst ruins, wilderness, and ash,\nthe projection of the Intellitron reaches out in greeting.

C: 而巨龙只是泰然自若地举步，\n既不伤及分毫建筑，\n也不搭理任何人物。
E: Yet the Giant Dragon simply walked in leisure,\nNot harming a single building of any stature,\nNor paying heed to anyone.

C: 「我需要一名帮手……」\n「守望『岁月』，直至尽头。」
E: "I need a helper..."\n"To watch over Time until the very end."

C: 「一头愚蠢的地兽…」\n「不愿为逐火献力的异种！」
E: "A foolish earth-beast..."\n"A heretic who refuses to serve the Flame-Chase!"

C: 那是一匹巨龙，\n名为<color=#9e5738>「不朽」</color>。
E: It was a giant dragon,\nnamed <color=#9e5738>the Permanence</color>.

C:
大侠的故事总是少不了反派，
要说女侠
——三月七的最大对手，
肯定非斯科特莫属。
E:
Every hero's story needs a villain,
And when it comes to
the great Heroine March 7th's nemesis,
It's definitely got to be Skott.

C: 在决战中，我用一招「斩星破宙•大琉璃剑」\n华丽地击败了斯科特！
E: During the decisive battle, I defeated Skott\nWith my epic move "Starshatter: Shard Supreme"!

C: 「无需惊惶，神迹已至。」
E: "There is no need to panic, the miracle is already here."

C: 「应习的我已习得。」 稚气初褪的年纪， 王女昂首步入弈场。 轻视者节节败退， 自矜者垂手和盘。 风头之盛，竟无一人能敌。
E: "I have learned all there is to learn." Barely out of childhood, The princess raced into games of chess. Those who looked down on her faced many losses. Those who glorified themselves forfeited in a mess. At her prime, none could rival her at all.

C:
一说凯撒酷刑厉法，
曾将恩师送上审判台。
一说凯撒徇私，
曾将敌邦人质认作王师。
E:
One claimed the Imperator was cruel,
Executing her own teacher.
Another stated the Imperator was biased,
Learning from an enemy hostage.

C: <color=#9e5738>谁会赢？</color>\n「毁灭」星神的汹涌战潮，\n还是女皇未尝一败的兵锋？
E: <color=#9e5738>Who will win?</color>\nThe raging waves of war from the Aeon of Destruction,\nOr the sharp blades of the empress that has never tasted defeat?

C: 只是，她早已不知去向。
E: It was just that she had long since vanished.

C: 「这庭院，会否太小了些？」\n「没关系，克莱门汀。\n足够温暖就好。」
E: "Is this courtyard a tad too small?"\n"It's okay, Clementine.\nAs long as it provides warmth plenty."

C: 隐隐的孤独萦绕着她，\n直到山羊的贤人到访，\n为她送来一只<color=#9e5738>虹色小驹</color>。
E: Loneliness accompanied her days,\nTill the Sage of the Caprists visited her,\nAnd brought her a <color=#9e5738>chromatic pony with a grin</color>.

C: 「若能再度瞥见微光，有幸得活……」\n「我愿原谅你，异族的仇雠。」
E: "If I can ever see the faint light again and stay alive..."\n"Then, outlander nemesis, you I will forgive."

C: 可他不以这坚毅为傲。\n甚至有时，\n他会回避逝者的葬礼。
E: Yet he is not proud of his resolve.\nFor sometimes,\nHe even avoids the funerals of the departed.

C: <color=#9e5738>愤怒</color>是一种狡猾的情感，\n它变换自己的面目，\n躲藏在男人的一生中。
E: <color=#9e5738>Rage</color> is a crafty emotion,\nIt changes its face,\nConcealing itself within the man's life.

C: 她那精湛的织艺，和享乐无缘。
E: But her impeccable gift for weaving isn't meant to serve anyone's pursuit for pleasure.

C: 「我想要雷鸣的掌声！鲜花！」\n是花腔的诗人。
E: Me! I want to be showered with a thunderous ovation! And lots of flowers!\nA melodramatic poet speaks out.

C: 小小的孩童，神色不安。\n脏兮兮的脸孔…\n让她想起某段初遇的过往。
E: A tense and worried look surfaces on the young child's countenance.\nThe specks of dirt on his face...\nbrought back memories of a past encounter.

C: 「将军。」
E: "Checkmate."

C: 「质子的分身安然无恙，金鳟的织坊满目琳琅，四位王爵也都担当重任、受万民敬仰…可你我却从未败露身份，仿佛被世人遗忘…你当初修改了何种『律法』，才能换来这般福祉？」
E: "The hostage's clones remain unscathed, the golden trout's weaving workshop is a sight to behold, and the four dukes carry their duties with honor and revered by all... Yet you and I have kept our identities hidden, as if forgotten by the world... Which Law did you modify back then to achieve such prosperity?"

C: 金色的月桂叶忽地顺着水流向下，很快就靠近了出水口。
E: The golden laurel leaf suddenly drifted downstream with the current, quickly approaching the water outlet.

C: 或许只是因为孤独，或许是被少女眼中的意志折服，又或者只是见不得生灵这般死去…荒笛收留了这位名叫塞涅俄丝的少女。
E: Perhaps it was loneliness, perhaps it was the determination in the girl's eyes, or perhaps the sight of a life perishing like this was too much... Terravox took in the girl named Seliose.

C: 「你在说什么？远方的黑潮在迫近了。负火的囚徒…不，无名的英雄，你愿意与我一同保护哀丽秘榭吗？」
E: "What are you talking about? The black tide is approaching from afar. Prisoner of flames... no, Nameless Hero, will you join me in protecting Aedes Elysiae?"

C: 明晰时的第一缕阳光透过雅努萨波利斯的圣殿花窗，温柔地照在红发少女的脸庞上，缇里西庇俄丝自睡梦中醒来，她揉了揉惺忪的眼睛……
E: The first ray of Lucid Hour's sunlight pierced through the stained-glass windows of Janusopolis temple, gently illuminating the red-haired girl's face. Tribios awoke from her slumber, rubbing her sleepy eyes...

C: 实验「翁法罗斯」的演算目标。 曾是δ-me13作为「智识」神经元负责的课题。遭到废弃后，其求解仍在进行。 受来古士修正，演算性质发生剧变，从「智识」转向「毁灭」。 管理员批注：显而易见，这一课题的价值在于求解过程，而非答案本身。故「生命的第一因」并非结论性因由，而是推动性因由。指令：完成论证，一切生命行为归于熵增。 著者批注：对此，我有不同的见解呢。就把个人观点留在结论部分吧♪
E: The calculation target of The Amphoreus Experiment. Originally the research topic given to δ-me13 while it served as a Neuron of the Erudition. Though it was discarded, the computations continue. The calculation's nature shifted dramatically after Lygus's adjustments, turning from Erudition to Destruction. Admin Note: Clearly, the value of this topic lies in the process of seeking, not the answer itself. Thus, "the prime mover of life" is not a definitive conclusion, but a driving force. Directive: Complete the argument... All lifeform behaviors ultimately follow the path of entropy increase. Author's note: I hold a different view on this. I'll share my perspective in the conclusion ♪

C: 第<unbreak>90123</unbreak>次循环，Ortho<unbreak>102</unbreak>成为首个使用工具的直翅目，其后代实现了对智能藻类的灭绝，并建立起巢都。巢都在扩张到达临界点后陷入停滞，在同类相食中覆灭。\n第<unbreak>100907</unbreak>次循环，作为特异循环记录，鹟科Eumyia<unbreak>03</unbreak>创造出「艺术」，后续循环未能复现。
E: In the <unbreak>90,123</unbreak>rd cycle, Ortho<unbreak>102</unbreak>, an orthopteran, became the first to use tools. Its descendants exterminated the intelligent algae and established the Nest Capital. After expanding to a critical threshold, the Capital stagnated and fell by cannibalism.\nIn the <unbreak>100,907</unbreak>th cycle, logged as a deviant instance, the passerine Eumyia<unbreak>03</unbreak> developed "art." The phenomenon was never replicated in subsequent cycles.

C: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，「刻律德菈」嵌合终极协议，提交内部指令：标记ID：LykoS为恶意访客，冻结其约<unbreak>60%</unbreak>特殊权限。根据管理员安全协议，保留LykoS的自卫权限，并逐步恢复其余已冻结权限。\n\n随后，「刻律德菈」以自我静默为代价，改写终极协议、暂时开放HertA、ScreW的访问权限。
E: In Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, "Cerydra" fused with the Ultimate Protocol and submitted an internal command: marking ID: LykoS as a malicious visitor and freezing approximately <unbreak>60%</unbreak> of special permissions for ID: LykoS. According to the Administrator security protocol, LykoS's self-defense permissions were retained, and the remaining frozen permissions were gradually restored.\n\nSubsequently, "Cerydra" rewrote the Ultimate Protocol to temporarily grant access permissions to HertA and ScreW at the cost of ceasing to respond itself.

C: \n\n辛克尔正在为空间站内部的信任危机而烦恼，想必艾丝妲面对的压力也不小。我们简单聊了聊，她推测黑塔要找的可能是呜呜伯，但这结论可能不太对。最后辛克尔向我推荐了小阿德勒，据说他是界种科最了解奇物的人。

We had a brief chat, and she speculated that what Herta is looking for is a Wubbaboo, but this isn't certain yet. In the end, Hinkel recommended me to look for Adler. Apparently he is the person who knows the most about Curios in the Department of Ecology.

C:
「理性」的火种已被归还。

瑟希斯是司掌理性、智慧与植物荣枯的泰坦，它执掌着生态、智慧和理性的权柄，人们称其为求知的隐士。

自然既是瑟希斯的庭院，也是它的书库，它允许人类在其中学习、休憩，毫不吝啬地将知识与智慧传授给懵懂无知的凡人。正是在它的指引下，城邦与文明才得以在翁法罗斯上兴起。

瑟希斯以一棵巨大圣树的形象降临世间，它所扎根之处，花草树木开始生长，并最终形成一片巨大的森林，而学者们便在它的身旁漫步、醒神和思辨，建立起求知的庭院。它也曾将一颗种子赠予刻法勒，栽种出名为智慧花园的林地，即使远离圣树，学者们也能在花园里求取神明的灵智。

瑟希斯的力量遍入翁法罗斯的每一株植物、每一条枝蔓、每一片林叶中，依照与吉奥里亚的誓约，它调和生命，促成花草与土壤达成完美的平衡。受它的赐福，植物时而也会获得与人辩论的理性。这也警示人们勿要傲慢，因那些真正的智者，往往在你的身旁缄默不语。
E:
The Coreflame of Reason has been returned.

Cerces is the master of wisdom, intellect, and vegetation. They wield authority over ecology, knowledge, and rationality, and people refer to them as the hermit in search of wisdom.

Nature is Cerces's courtyard and also their library. They allow people to study and rest there, and convey their knowledge to the ignorant tirelessly and generously. It is under their guidance that civilization and cities began in Amphoreus.

Cerces graces the world in the form of a grand and holy tree. Where they take root, vegetation spouts to become a massive forest. And here, scholars walk by their side, enlightened in reason and thinking in debate, creating courts in search of new learning. They also gifted a seed to Kephale, allowing it to become the Garden of Wisdom, allowing scholars to seek the Titan's wisdom even if they stand far from the holy tree.

Cerces power infuses every last plant in Amphoreus, from branches and vines to the very leaves themselves. In accordance with the pact they struck with Georios, they mediate life, allowing the green and soil to be in perfect balance. Upon accepting their blessing, the plant life can also gain the rationality to debate humans. This warns people to remain humble, for the truly wise might be the quiet ones around you.

C: 你对激动人心的旅行兴致寥寥，宁愿自己宅在舒服的客房里睡上一整天。很无趣，但很真实…大部分现代人可能都会如此选择，只是羞于承认。\n不过仔细想想，说不定丹恒就是这种角色——他所谓的自我调整，指不定就是在房间里舒舒服服地睡觉？你决定下次回到列车后好好问问他。
E: You have little interest in thrilling adventures and would rather lounge around and sleep the day away in your guest room. Kinda boring, but very realistic... Most modern people would probably make this choice, only they might be too shy to admit it.\nThough, come to think of it, this might be the type of person Dan Heng is. His supposed "internal adjustment" is probably just him sleeping comfortably in his room. You decide to ask him the next time you're back on the Express.

C: 这是你与那位赌徒惊心动魄的共演舞台。\n他为了胜利孤注一掷，却对胜利本身漠然置之。他究竟为什么要这么做？
E: This is the stage where you and that gambler put on a petrifying collaborative show.\nHe wagered everything into the gamble, yet appeared indifferent to the idea of winning. Just why did he do that?

C:
盛世倾颓，旧日不复，纵是死亡，亦要寻求归处。
她行过哀地里亚，掌心魂灵哀鸣，其声未曾怀恨。
荣耀是否与死亡等价——为寻求一答，她再未止步。
旅途漫长，启程千年。她仍未知晓，自身应葬何处。
E:
The glorious age falls and crumbles, and even death must seek a home.
She passed through Aidonia and souls wailed in her palms, yet there was no hatred in those sounds.
Is glory equally priced to death? To seek this answer, she never stopped her steps.
After a journey that lasted a millennium, she still does not know where her corpse should call home.

C: 成长完毕！真正的三月七之旅现在才要开始！
E: I'm all grown up! My real journey starts now!

C: 不讲…武德……
E: Not very sportsman like...

C: 话说在前，请你不要违背三月的想法。
E: I'll say this upfront: Please do NOT go against March's wishes.

C: 有丹恒在我自然放心，不过…也不要太过勉强自己。
E: Having you here gives me peace of mind, Dan Heng. Still, best not to push yourself too hard.

C: 不过这点程度……
E: That won't stop me...

C: 见识一下星辰粉碎的样子吧…生存还是毁灭，你别无选择。
E: Witness the stars shatter before you... Survive or be destroyed, there is no other choice.

C: 哎呀，是托帕小姐！好巧好巧，就当是一起出公差吧。
E: Topaz, what a coincidence! Guess I should see this as a business trip!

C: 转圈圈喽~
E: Time to twirl~

C: 别来无恙，御主。要出击的话，请允许我随行。
E: It's been a while, Master. If we're heading out, please allow me to accompany you.

C: Trace on！
E: Trace on!

C: 那场相遇本身或许是场灾难，却是一个全新未来的开始…要是被希儿听到了，又要说我在讲什么大道理了吧。
E: Our first encounter may have been a bit of a disaster, but it was also the start of a new future... Haha, if Seele heard this she'd probably say I was giving one of my Overworld princess speeches.

C: 摇滚不止！
E: Can't stop the rock!

C: 到此为止了。
E: This ends here.

C: 熟能生巧。
E: Practice makes perfect.

C: 敌方数据收集完毕。
E: Enemy data secured.

C: 收到。
E: It's received.

C: 别看贝洛伯格前不着村后不着店，越是在这种地方，人们越是只守着自己的半杯羹——那我就越有乐子可看啦。
E: You'd think in a place as isolated as Belobog, people would be more willing to share what they have. Well, it's the exact opposite. And I'm more than happy to make up the shortfall.

C: 哎？这次跟你一起行动…也好，就当互相有个照应吧。
E: Looks like we're working together on this one... I suppose an extra pair of eyes won't hurt.

C: 多谢。
E: A thousand thanks.

C: 小贼，哪里跑！
E: You're not going anywhere!

C: 如箭在弦。
E: Stay the course.

C: 相与为一。
E: Together as one.

C: 上下象易。
E: Converge and awaken.

C: 将军下令，彦卿定不辱使命。
E: Orders received, General.

C: 乖乖~张嘴~
E: Say "ahhhh!"

C: 无碍。
E: Try harder.

C: 有杀意…
E: I taste malice in the air...

C: 精进公务是应该的，只是，疲惫也是疲惫的……
E: While devotion to public tasks is a must, this fatigue is somewhat... overwhelming...

C: 仅仅活着，还不是目的。
E: To merely be alive is not the goal.

C: 飞霄将军是有这么一位幕僚，听说见到他的难度很高很高，除非他自己现身，但他一般又不现身……
E: Ah yes, General Feixiao has a counselor by that name. I've heard that it's very, very difficult to see him, unless he reveals himself willingly. But usually he's nowhere in sight...

C: 哇！…可惜没有想要的宝剑。
E: Wow! Too bad it's not the sword I wanted...

C: 飞霄允许我在任何时刻向她发起「行刺」，将我当作砥砺自己警惕心的匕首。她以这种方式表达对我的信任，而直到现在，我一次也没赢过。
E: Feixiao allows me to try to "assassinate" her at any time. She uses me as a dagger with which to sharpen her senses. This is how she shows her trust in me, but to this day, I have not won a single time.

C: 过去的鬼魂总会回来看我们。
E: The ghosts of the past will always come back to visit.

C: 神策将军，你不应参与这种脏手的活计。交给我吧。
E: Divine Foresight, you shouldn't involve yourself in this dirty work. Leave it to me.

C: 纵然银河迢递，星汉漫漫，只要彼此挂念，总有重逢之时。
E: Though the Cosmos stretches far and wide, and stars fill the sky, as long as we hold each other in our thoughts, there will always be a chance for reunion.

C: 切莫回头。
E: Don't look back.

C: 配方差劲的饮料和甜点，经常用巧克力来掩盖劣质口感，可惜骗不过我的舌头…谁让我最讨厌巧克力。
E: Subpar beverages and desserts usually hide behind chocolate to cover up their inferior flavor, but they don't get past me... It's probably because I can't stand chocolate.

C: 如果有助于教学与诊疗，我不介意露出自己的真容。但就经验来看，多半有害无益。
E: I don't mind revealing my true colors if it helps me teach students and treat patients. But in my experience, it's usually counterproductive.

C: 都给我睁大眼睛看好了，伟大的翡翠女士是怎么拿捏人的！
E: Open your eyes and behold Lady Jade, the great manipulator!

C: 如果抛却肉身的代价是听不见知更鸟小姐的歌声，想必我会犹豫一阵了。
E: If the price of giving up my body was not being able to hear Miss Robin sing, I would probably have some hesitations.

C: 美好的时光总是过得那么快，下次再见啦。
E: The good times always pass so quickly. See you next time!

C: 让我多待会儿吧，用这副身体……
E: Let me stay here a little longer, in this body...

C: 天哪，知更鸟小姐就在我的面前，我…我会好好表现的！
E: Oh my gosh, Miss Robin is right in front of me... I... I'll do my best!

C: 我喜欢在「白日梦酒店」工作！在这里，能遇见这么多远方来客，能听说那么多冒险故事，真好啊……
E: Working at The Reverie is awesome! I get to meet a bunch of people from really far away, and hearing about their adventures is fascinating!

C: 招待…不周……
E: I tried my best...

C: 前面的大家伙，让我们榨干它吧。
E: See that one there? Let's wring them dry.

C: 你见过「巡猎」的光矢吗？如果你有幸见到，可千万不要直视…我的右眼和身体就是这么没的…哈哈哈哈哈，当然是假的！
E: Ever seen The Hunt's Lux Arrow? If you ever do, make sure not to stare directly... That's how I ended up losin' my right eye and got this here body... Hahahaha, just pullin' your leg!

C: 你知道吗？我最嫉妒的就是有房子住的人。
E: You know, I'm most jealous of people who have houses to live in.

C: 就此，告辞……
E: With that, farewell...

C: 我的衣橱嘛，应该也有一两座空间站的大小。当年博识尊先看了我一眼，从此世上就少了个「纯美」的令使。
E: My wardrobe? It's probably close to twice the size of the space station. Ah, the world lost an Emanator of Beauty the moment Nous cut in line and gazed upon me first!

C: 缇宁：要来了吧……
E: Trinnon: It's coming...

C: 放心向前吧，我已没什么可教的了。
E: Go forth in confidence. I don't have anything more to teach you.

C: 一个答案而已，不是难事。
E: It's just an answer. Nothing too difficult.

C: 说好了，对面打过来我就跑！
E: Lemme lay it out for you. I'm running off as soon as the other team attacks!

C: 拜托，下次上点难度好吧。
E: Come ON! Can you please make it harder next time?

C: 可以…拥抱一下吗？谢谢…很温柔呢。
E: May I... hug you? Thank you... you're so gentle.

C: 大家等我们很久啦~
E: Everyone's been waiting for us~

C: 晴天让人烦躁，但不得不说，她洒下的光，连我也觉得柔和舒适。
E: Sunny weather is irritating, but I must admit, the light she casts is soft and comfortable even for me.

C: 再见。我的意思是，在恰当的时间再见。
E: See you! And by that, I mean... see you at the right time.

C: 山鸣，龙啸！
E: Mountains roar. Dragons rise!

C: 今晚我来警戒，好好休息，明天还有更艰险的任务等着我们。
E: I'll keep watch tonight. Get some rest. We'll need our strength for what's coming tomorrow.

C: 尝尝这个！
E: How about this!

C: 敬请期待。
E: Please stay tuned.

C: 我们，什么都做得到~
E: We can do it all~

C: 还是按过去的方式来？见一个打一个，对吧？
E: Same as always? Beat them down as they come, right?

C: 还是老样子……
E: Still the same old...

C: 这就是心有灵犀的感觉？
E: Is this how it feels to be in sync?

C: 就像平时那样，丹恒，我们速战速决。
E: Like always, Dan Heng, let's make this quick!

C: 盛会之星，梦想之地…这座悬于阿斯德纳星系的奢丽酒店享有太多美名。星际名流觥筹交错，万邦豪客一掷千金，人们来此寻求深埋心底的美梦，而星穹列车——甩开这些包袱吧，一段金色的假期正等待着你们！
E: The Planet of Festivities and Land of the Dreams... This luxurious hotel, suspended in the Asdanian star system, enjoys countless accolades. Galactic elites mingle with raised glasses, wealthy guests from across the cosmos spend lavishly, and people come here in pursuit of their deepest desires. But for the Astral Express — leave these burdens behind. A golden vacation awaits you!

C: 有什么能比占卜师手中的塔奥牌更神秘？或许<color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地」翁法罗斯</color>就是答案之一，毕竟那是个连阿基维利都未曾踏足的世界，你甚至无法从外层空间推测出它真实的样子。\n好吧，「开拓」的方法从来也只有一种——勇往直前，从现在开始！
E: What is more mysterious than Tawot Cards in the hands of an oracle? Perhaps one of the answers to this question is <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus, The Eternal Land</color>. After all, it is a world that not even Akivili set foot in. You cannot even deduce its true nature from space.\nWell, there's always only been one way to trailblaze: Push on forward without fear! Starting right here, right now!

C: 自身受到伤害时：与后1格同伴交换位置，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion 1 tile behind, and its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的蝶糕糕为<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力最高的我方奇美拉施加【祝福】。拥有【祝福】的奇美拉被击倒时会以<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值重新对战，最多生效1次
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Butterfly Cake in the team grants "Blessing" to the ally chimera with the highest <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK. When a chimera with "Blessing" is defeated, it will rejoin the battle with <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP. This effect can trigger up to 1 time.

C:
・你在匹诺康尼与众人告别时，曾有一些记忆遭到焚毁。在大丽花的帮助下，你开始寻回失却的记忆。
・你找到了流萤，决定在第三次死亡到来时，陪她将这场梦做完。
・由于之前的经历，她的失熵症在你面前恶化，彻底消失。

・ You found Firefly and decided to accompany her in completing this dream when her third death arrives.
・ Due to previous experiences, her Entropy Loss Syndrome worsened right before your eyes until she completely disappeared.
・ Using the power of the Finality, you caused slight alterations to the past, fulfilling Firefly's lingering regrets.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>【幻身】：</color>敌方首领在<color=#f29e38ff>受到我方一定次数的攻击后</color>会将一名我方角色替换为可操作的【致幻人鱼】。【致幻人鱼】自身无法获得治疗和护盾效果，在被击败时会对我方全体造成大量伤害。【致幻人鱼】使用<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>可施加<color=#f29e38ff>基于目标最大生命值</color>的持续伤害效果并使持续伤害效果额外结算，使用<color=#f29e38ff>普攻</color>可解除【幻身】状态。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>"Phantom Illusion": </color>After <color=#f29e38ff>receiving a certain number of attacks from allies</color>, the enemy boss will transform one of your ally characters into a controllable "Hallucinogenic Mermaid." The "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" cannot receive healing or Shield effects. When defeated, it deals massive damage to all allies. When "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" uses <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color>, it applies a DoT effect <color=#f29e38ff>based on the target's max HP</color> and triggers additional DoT calculations. Using <color=#f29e38ff>Basic ATK</color> will dispel the "Phantom Illusion" state.

E: Obtain #2 Blessing(s) of 1-star rarity.

C: 数百个琥珀纪前，科尔奇人将吃掉对方视为一种莫大的敬意；每当有婴儿出生时，凯尔萨斯人会出动整个社区前去照料；对于死去的族人，石语者会为其特制一枚信息结片作为陪葬……这些美好的品德正随着时代发展逐渐消失。忆庭的悲观人士提议，应立刻对寰宇道德进行抢救性保存。但究竟什么是值得抢救的美好品德，似乎仍有待讨论。
E: Hundreds of Amber Eras ago, the Kolchis considered devouring others as a sign of great respect. When a baby was born, the entire Kalsasian community would mobilize to care for it. And for their deceased members, the Lapispeakers would craft a special information flake as a burial offering... These beautiful virtues are gradually disappearing with the progression of time. The pessimists of the Garden of Recollection proposed that universal morality should be preserved through emergency measures. However, which virtues are truly worth preserving still seems to be up for debate.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「存护」</color>命途角色提供的护盾量提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>，且提供护盾时，暴击伤害提高<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>，最多叠加<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>层。
E: Increases Shield Effect provided by <color=#f29e38ff>Preservation</color> characters by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When providing Shields, increases CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, stacking up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> times.

E: Greatly increases the chance for 2 Occurrences to happen in Occurrence, Reward, and Encounter Domains.

C: 神赐珍宝（其二）
E: Divine Treasures (II)

C:
这不是被神悟树庭承认的学派。
最初，只是出于心血来潮，圣城的某人提出了第一条公式：
「不想动弹。」
于是他平平无奇地度过了一天。
随后是第二天，第三天，
每天他都躺在街边，无论吃饭亦或睡觉。
人们问起他这样做的理由，他提出了第二条公式：
「做人应当像箩筐，不要装太多东西。」
他随脚踢翻一个空箩筐，有人赞叹他的智慧。
久而久之，躺在街边的人变成了一群，
每日聊天、晒太阳，除此以外再无事业。
直到某天，人们毫无征兆地散去，各奔东西。
若要问起不再躺平的原因：
「箩筐终究还是要装东西。」
学派创始人笑着回应。
E:
This school of thought was never recognized by the Grove of Epiphany.
It all began on a whim, when someone in the holy city proposed the first formula:
"I don't want to move a muscle."
And so he spent an utterly ordinary day.
Then came the second day, and the third.
Each day he lay on the street, whether eating or sleeping.
When people asked about his reasons for doing so, he proposed the second formula:
"One should be like an empty basket, never carrying too much."
He kicked over an empty basket, and some praised his wisdom.
Gradually, the one person lying on the street became many,
spending their days chatting and basking in the sun, pursuing nothing else.
Until one day, without warning, they all dispersed in different directions.
When asked why they no longer chose to lie idle:
"A basket must carry something after all."
The founder replied with a smile.

C: ●初始获得奇物
E: ● Initial Curios obtained

E: When attacked by ally targets not in the "Nemesis" state, cannot receive CRIT Hits.

E: At the start of the turn, receives Ice DoT equal to a percentage of this unit's Max HP. This DoT is stackable.

E: Lick... Enkindled Betrayal

E: Bizarre Spell

C: 流梦礁，死后的世界…家族究竟在隐瞒些什么？
E: Dreamflux Reef, the afterlife... What secrets is the Family hiding?

C: 梦主的禁制被黑天鹅完全烧却了，曾经的默契仍未褪色——尽管这种默契的来源不是那么值得怀念。\n把一切的真相告知黑天鹅吧。
E: The Dreammaster's containment mechanism was completely burned away by Black Swan, yet their old rapport remained intact, though the origin of such rapport wasn't exactly worth reminiscing about.\nIt's time to tell Black Swan the whole truth.

C: 或许结局与过程都无法改变，但我们仍然可以决定，如何看待自己的命运。
E: Perhaps we can't change the ending or the process, but we can still decide how to view our own destiny.

C: 与清醒的人们会面
E: Meet up with the people who are awake

C: 没错，大丽花女士同我们「开拓」至今。她是最具野心，也最优秀的无名客。
E: Correct. Lady Dahlia has been "trailblazing" with us for a while now. She's the most ambitious and talented of the Nameless.

C: 这一切，发生过多少次了？
E: How many times has all this happened already?

C: （我…再熟悉不过。）
E: (I... know it all too well.)

C: 而你，我的妹妹…你从小就这么执拗，每到这时，我都会希望你从未拥有这项品质。
E: And you, my dear sister... you've always been this stubborn, and in times like these, I wish you never had this trait.

C: 以我的标准…还算不错？口说无凭，我们继续吧。到那时，如果你仍然无法信任我，我会留下足够的时间…无论何种责难，我都能够接受。
E: By my measure... it's not bad at all. But talk is cheap, so let's keep going. When the time comes, if you still can't trust me, I'll give you plenty of time... I can take whatever criticism comes my way.

C: 忆域迷因，「何物朝向死亡」。至少在那时，你误以为它很危险。
E: A Memory Zone Meme, "Something Unto Death." At least back then, you mistakenly thought it was dangerous.

C: 你…不必勉强，我可以代劳。
E: You... don't have to force yourself. I can take care of it.

C: 这里也没有奇怪之处……
E: Nothing strange here either...

C: …猎手，你还会做梦么？
E: ...Do you still dream, hunter,

C: 怎么样，愿意脱下装甲谈谈了么？
E: How about it? Ready to take off that armor and sit down for a talk?

C: 是哪一条命途？
E: Which Path is it?

C: 乐园终将跌入愁苦人世
E: Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow

C: 流萤小姐，你刚才的神情和口吻，我常常在一些观众身上见到。
E: Miss Firefly, that expression and tone of yours just now... I've seen it many times in my audience.

C: …怎么可能？
E: ...How could that be?

C: 不错，你又或我，仇敌唯有那可憎命数。
E: Indeed. Our true foe is that abominable fate.

C: 「虚无」的令使给了我一刀，我死得无比盛大。
E: The Nihility Emanator cut me, and I died in the most spectacular fashion.

C: 至于我——哈，也许是碰上了个「好医生」。看这附近的风景，是他让我误打误撞闯了进来。
E: As for me... Ha, maybe I ran into a "good doctor." From the look of this place, he's the one who let me blunder my way in.

C: 如砂金所说，拉扎莉娜的遗产，会将入梦者送往他们渴求的去处。<color=#dbc291ff>对流萤来说，那竟然是「你的身边」。</color>
E: As Aventurine said, Razalina's legacy would send dreamers to where they truly yearned to be. <color=#dbc291ff>For Firefly, that place turned out to be by your side.</color>

C: 流梦礁 米哈伊尔的意志，于此行向未来
E: Dreamflux Reef, Mikhail's will hence flows into tomorrow...

C: 三、三次死亡？！这一定是打引号的吧……
E: Three times!? This can't be serious, right...?

C: 再次感谢你对星穹列车提供的帮助。祝愿我们在现实中再见。
E: Thank you again for your assistance for the Astral Express. May we meet again in reality.

C: 若你信奉之事，将你带到这般田地，何必执迷不改？
E: If your beliefs lead you down a path of plight, why stubbornly cling to them?

C: 你…怎么…
E: How... did you...

C: 但对我们来说，区别不大。
E: But it doesn't make much of a difference for us.

C: 剩下的两重梦境呢？
E: What about the other two dreamscape layers?

C: 当然，他并没有直接给我答案，但却开始让我思考…有些事，是否根本不需要理由和意义？
E: Obviously, he didn't give me an answer directly, but it got me to think... Maybe some things don't need a reason or meaning at all?

C: 所以，「秩序」的美梦终将破灭。三重面相的神明啊…若我踏上了「同谐」的道路，请伸出援手，庇护信奉你的人们。
E: Thus, the Order's sweet dream will eventually fall. O, Triple-Faced God... If I manage to step onto the Path of Harmony, then please extend your hand and shelter those who believe in you.

C: 又或者，这就是答案本身。
E: Or perhaps, such is the answer itself.

C: 愿望实现之后…
E: So, after a wish comes true...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>即使在「最后的美梦」中，你也没能成为普通的少女。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You couldn't become an ordinary girl even in "The Last Sweet Dream."</color>

C: 「虚无」并非如此，它荒谬而广大，捕获那些不愿盲信，却又无力与其抗争的人。
E: But that does not apply to the Nihility. The Nihility is absurd and vast, capturing those who were unwilling to blindly believe yet are powerless to fight back.

C: 愿死亡仍未结束她的「最后一梦」。
E: May death yet end her "Last Dream."

C: 父亲啊…毁灭绝非壮烈的一瞬，命运与记忆亦然。
E: Father... Destruction is not just a single glorious moment, and the same applies to destiny and memories.

C: 他看见了我的未来？
E: He saw my future?

C: 的确，曾让少女万分珍重的，若非失却，就是已然改换了面貌。可她的微笑并未褪去，如同她在面对命运时一般——
E: Indeed, what the girl once cherished dearly was her appearance that, if not lost, had changed. Yet, her smile never faded, just like when she faced destiny...

C: 我很期待…但是，我们难道真的就不能，一起跨过那个结局吗？
E: I'm looking forward to it, but... can we really... not step over that ending together?

C: 嘀答，希望宾客不要介意迷钟正值青春期时的胡言乱语…真丢人，好想找个地方钻进去。
E: Tick-tock. I hope you don't mind the self-indulgent nonsense of a teenage Ticker... This is so embarrassing. I want to crawl into a hole and disappear.

C: 阿卡索斯城曾流传着这样一个故事：一位木匠打造出了巧夺天工的雕塑，却始终活在它的阴影下，再无法拿出更好的作品。临终之际，他亲手毁掉了自己的得意之作，笑着咽了气。
E: There was a tale told in the city of Icatus: A carpenter crafted a sculpture so masterful it seemed divine, yet he lived forever in its shadow, never able to create anything better. On his deathbed, he destroyed his masterpiece with his own hands and died with a smile on his face.

C: 诸神的旨意往往以需要解读的形式降临。你认为眼下的状况是某种含蓄的拒绝，或许你们仍需等待，直到准备充足的那天……
E: The will of the gods often manifests in ways that need interpretation. You might see the current situation as a subtle rejection. Perhaps you still need to wait until the day you're truly prepared...

C: 一阵微风抚平了巨浪，带着安提灵花的气息。手持巨镰的少女自冥河下游缓缓走来，长靴在水面点起涟漪。她的颜色好似薰衣草。
E: A gentle breeze calmed the towering waves, carrying the scent of Antila flowers. A young girl wielding a giant scythe approached slowly from downstream of the River of Souls, her boots creating ripples on the water's surface. Her color resembles that of lavender.

C: 「奇美拉世界锦标赛」，就是由训练家带着自己的奇美拉相互对战的赛事。本届锦标赛共有十三位参赛选手，加上小灰作为特邀嘉宾，就是十四个！
E: The Chimera World Tournament is a tournament where trainers compete against each other with their chimeras. There is a total of thirteen contestants, and with Little Gray joining as a special guest, that makes fourteen!

C: 我正好认识几位医师朋友。
E: I happen to know a few doctors.

C: 「接头娃娃」
E: "Contact Doll"

C: 「家族使者，醒兆调式」
E: "Family's Envoy, Awoken Mode"

E: The experience you gained during the Finality Mission can also be viewed in Fate's Atlas.

E: When leaving the Store, <color=#f29e38ff>remaining Gold Coins will be cleared</color>. Little Gray should try to spend them all!

E: Greatsword Guardian

E: Regular Challenge

E: I wanna go sunbathe again. Come with me, will you?
